5.11: OKamani ni yabeepankiraku olwʼebyobusunibwe, nʼolwʼobungi bwʼabaana abaisuka abaali nabo, nʼengeri okabaka egiyabbaire amukuliryemu, okumuwa ekifo ekikulu, ekimusuucirye omuntu omukulu okukiraku abafugi nʼabakungu abandi bonabona.
5.12: Ni yeeyongera okubakoba ati, “Nʼekikiraku byonabyona, niikwo okubona ngʼonabagereka Eseza, yanjetere ninze zenkani okwaba nʼokabaka oku kiinulo ekyasumbire. Era tete anjetere eizo twabe aamo nʼokabaka.
5.13: Neye ebyo byonabyona tibingasa nga nkaali mbona oMuyudaaya oyo oMoludekaayi ngʼatyaime oku geeti yʼolubiri lwa kabaka.”
5.14: Awo omukaliwe oZeresi nʼabakaagwabe bonabona ni bamukoba bati, “Bakukolere akalabba kʼefuuti ooti 75 obugulumali, eizo amakeezi osabe okabaka, oMoludekaayi bamwanike okwo afe, olwo oyezye okwaba okulya ekiinulo nʼokabaka ngʼoli musangaali.” OKamani nʼaseega ati, ago gabbaire malabuki masa. Kale nʼalagira ni bakola akalabba.

6.1: Ekiire ekyo, okabaka nʼakaya okugona endoolo; kale nʼalagira bamuleetere era bamusomere ekitabo ekibawandiikamu ebibbaawo ebisaana okwebukirya omu mulembegwe.
6.2: Omu kitabo ekyo nʼayajiryamu ngʼoMoludekaayi oweyaloopere oBigusana nʼoTeresi, ababiri oku balaawe abakuumi bʼoku geeti ya kabaka, ababbaire basalire olukwe okwita iye okabaka Akaswero.
6.3: Okabaka nʼabuulya abaweereryabe ati, “Kitiisyaki, na bukuluki ebibawaire oMoluduekaayi okumusiima olwʼekyo?” Ni bamwiramu bati, “Mpaawo ekibamukoleire.”
6.4: Okabaka tete nʼabuulya ati, “Naani ali oku luuga awo?” Atyanu omu kiseera ekyo oKamani yabbaire yankutuuka omu luuga lwʼolubiri, ngʼaizire okutumula nʼokabaka oku kyʼokwanika oMoludekaayi oku kalabba, akebabbaire bamalire okukolera oMoludekaayi.
6.5: Kale awo abaweererya ba kabaka ni bamwiramu bati, “oKamani niiye ali oku luuga aanu.” Okabaka nʼalagira ati, “Mumukobe aingire.”
6.6: OKamani oweyaingiire, okabaka nʼamubuulya ati, “Kitiisyaki, na bukuluki ebibawa omuntu okabaka ogwatakire okusiima?” Atyanu awo oKamani nʼaseega omu mwoyogwe ati, “Naani ogondi-so okabaka ogwayezya okukolera ekintu okuwa ekitiisya omuntu oyo nga tininze?”
6.7: Kale oKamani nʼairamu okabaka ati, “Omuntu okabaka oguyanditakire okuwa ekitiisya,
6.8: baleete eganduula okabaka egiyabbaire azwairekuumu, era baleete nʼomoiza oku mbalaasi okabaka egyatambuliraku era ombalaasi oyo bamuzwalisye engule yʼobwakabaka oku mutwe.
6.9: Awo eganduula eyo nʼombalaasi, babikwatisye omoiza oku bakungubo kabaka, abakirira nakimo ekitiisya, era okobe omukunguwo oyo azwalisye omuntu oyo iwe kabaka ogwotaka okusiima eganduula eyo, kaisi omuntu nago aniine oku mbalaasi nago, era omukunguwo amutambulye amubitye omu kibuga aakati. Omukunguwo oyo ayabe ngʼatumula maaminkirira ati, ‘Kinu niikyo ekibakolere omuntu, okabaka ogwatakire okuwa ekitiisya!’ ”
6.10: Awo okabaka nʼalagira oKamani ati, “Oyanguwe mangu oleete eganduula nago nʼombalaasi, era okole ngʼowookobere oku Moludekaayi oMuyudaaya, aali oku geeti yʼolubiri lwange atyaime. Tiwalekakuuyo ekintu kadi kimo oku bintu byonabyona ebyotumwire.”
6.11: Kale oKamani nʼaleeta eganduula nʼombalaasi era nʼazwalisya oMoludekaayi, nʼamuniinisya oku mbalaasi. Awo oKamani nʼalungamya ombalaasi okumubitya omu kibuga aakati, ngʼayaba alangirira ati, “Kinu niikyo ekibakolere omuntu, okabaka ogwatakire okuwa ekitiisya!”
6.12: Ebyo owebyawoire, oMoludekaayi nʼakanga oku geeti ya kabaka. Neye oKamani nʼayanguwa okukanga e wuwe ngʼanakuwaire era nga yeebiikiriire oku mutwe olwʼensoni.
6.13: OKamani oweyatuukire, nʼakobera omukaliwe oZeresi nʼabakaagwabe bonabona, nabuli kintu ekimutuukireku. Awo abawi bʼamalabuki ba Kamani abo nʼoZeresi omukaliwe, ni bamukoba bati, “Ngʼowebatandiikire okukwica iwe okubba ansi wa Moludekaayi, ate nga Muyudaaya, tiwamwezye. Era mazima oyaba kubbeera nakimo ansiwe.”
6.14: Awo owebabbaire nga bakaali batumula naye, abaweererya abalaawe ba kabaka ni batuuka ni batoolawo mangu oKamani ni bamutwala oku kiinulo Eseza ekiyabbaire asumbire.

7.1: Awo okabaka nʼoKamani ni bakanga okulya ekiinulo e wa nabagereka Eseza,
7.2: era oku mulundi ogwo ogwokubiri, owebabbaire nga bali oku byokunywa, okabaka tete nʼabuulya Eseza ati, “Nabagereka Eseza, niki ekyotaka nkukolere? Dala nakikukolera. Era niki ekyosaba? Dala nakikuwa nʼowekyabba kimo kyokubiri ekyʼobwakabaka bwange.”
7.3: Awo onabagereka Eseza nʼamwiramu ati, “Singa mba nsunire obutake omumaisogo mukulu kabaka, era owekibba nga kikusangaalya kabaka okumpa ekinsaba, nkusaba bwomi bwange kubbaawo, era nkwegairira, bantu bange kutabaita.
7.4: Batuwaireyo, nze nʼabantu bange batwite, batujigirice, era batumalirewo nakimo. Singa babbaire batuwaireyo kubba bagalama abasaiza nʼabakali, nankusirikire nandi ni nkuteganya kabaka, newankubbaire nga omulabe tiyandiyezerye okwiriryawo okabaka ebiyandibbaire afiiriirwe.”
7.5: Awo okabaka Akaswero nʼabuulya onabagereka Eseza ati, “Naani oyo? Era omuntu oyo ali yaina ali kutaka eino okukola ekintu ngʼekyo?”
7.6: Awo Eseza nʼamwiramu ati, “Omulabe waiswe atuyigania, niiye omusaiza oyo omubbimubbi oKamani.” Awo oKamani nʼatya ino omumaiso ga kabaka nʼonabagereka.
7.7: Okabaka nʼasetuka ngʼaizwire obusungu, nʼalekaawo ebyokunywa, nʼawuluka e nza, nʼayaba omu misaale gyʼomu luuga lwʼomu lubiri. OKamani iye awo nʼabona ngʼokabaka amaliriire kumukola kabbikabbi, kale nʼasigala okwegairira onabagereka Eseza okumulamya.
7.8: Awo okabaka nʼaira okuzwa omu misaale gyʼomu luuga lwʼomu lubiri, nʼakanga e gibabbaire banywera, nʼayajirya oKamani ngʼagwire oku mazwi aabigere byʼEseza oku kityamo Eseza oku yabbaire atyaime. Awo okabaka ni yeewunya ino ati, “Omusaiza onu ataka nʼokukwatira onabagereka okalijata aanu zena nga ndiwo omu lubiri lwange?” Okabaka oweyabbaire yankumala okutumula ekyo, ni babiika oKamani oku maiso.
7.9: Awo oKalubona omoiza oku balaawe abaweererya okabaka nʼakoba ati, “Kaisi era oKamani yabbaire akolere nʼakalabba omu kisitokye akʼokwanikaku oMoludekaayi eyalamirye obwomi bwa kabaka. Akalabba ako obuwanvu okwaba engulu efuuti ooti 75.” Okabaka nʼalagira ati, “Mwabe mumwanike okwo.”
7.10: Kale ni baaba baanika oKamani oku kalabba akeyabbaire ategekere kwanikaku Moludekaayi. Awo obusungu bwa kabaka ni bwikaikana.

8.1: Awo oku lunaku olunanyere olwo oluzwanyuma lwʼokufa kwa Kamani, okabaka Akaswero nʼawa onabagereka Eseza ebintu byonabyona ebyabbaire ebya Kamani omulabe wʼaBayudaaya. Eseza nʼakobera okabaka ati oMoludekaayi amuliku oluganda, era ni bamwikirirya okwaba omumaiso ga kabaka.
8.2: Era okabaka ni yeetoolaku oku lunwe empetaye eriku eraama yʼobwakabaka, egiyabbaire atoire oku Kamani, nʼagiwa oMoludekaayi. Era Eseza nʼakwatisya oMoludekaayi obuvunaanyizibwa obwʼokulabiriranga ebintu byonabyona ebyabbaire ebya Kamani.
8.3: Awo Eseza ni yeeyongera okwegairira okabaka, nʼagwa aabigere bya kabaka nga waamagalica amaliga. Era nʼasaba okabaka okukomya entegeka embiibbi oKamani owʼomwibyaire lyʼAgagi, egiyabbaire akoleire aBayudaaya.
8.4: Awo okabaka nʼasiirya omwigogwe ogwʼezaabbu okulingirirya Eseza okumwikirirya okutumula. Era Eseza nʼasetuka, nʼayemerera omumaiso ga kabaka,
8.5: kaisi Eseza nʼakoba ati: “Singa kibba kiti kabaka okisiimire, era singa mba nsunire obutake omumaisogo era ngʼobona oti niikyo ekituuce ekyokukola, owuluce ekiragiro ekisalamu ekiragiro oKamani omutaane wa Kameedasa, owʼomwibyaire lyʼAgagi, ekiyakolere okutaka okumalirawo nakimo aBayudaaya abali omu matwalego gonagona kabaka.
8.6: Mpezya ntya okuguminkiriza okubona akabbikabbi nga katuuka oku bantu bʼeigwanga lyange? Ooba mpezya ntya okuguminkiriza okubona nga bajigirica abantu bʼomu kisito kyʼe waiswe?”
8.7: Awo okabaka Akaswero nʼairamu onabagereka Eseza nʼoMoludekaayi oMuyudaaya ati, “Olwʼokubba oKamani yalumbire aBayudaaya, mpaire Eseza ebintu byonabyona ebibbaire ebya Kamani, era nʼoKamani ni bamwanika oku kalabba.
8.8: Atyanu muwandiike ekiragiro ekindi omu liina lyange nze okabaka, oku lwʼaBayudaaya ekikirira nakimo okubakolera ngʼowemubona, era muteekeku nʼeraama eri oku mpeta ya kabaka. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba, mpaawo ekiwandiiko ekibakolere omu liina lya kabaka era ni bakiteekaku nʼeraama yʼempeta ya kabaka ekibayezya okucuusa.”
8.9: Amangu eino okabaka nʼatumisya abawandiikibe oku naku nga 23 omweri ogwokusatu, igwo omweri ogwa Sivani. Abawandiiki abo ni bawandiika na buli kimo ngʼoMoludekaayi oweyabalagiire baweererye aBayudaaya, nʼabeekubbemberi bonabona, nʼabakungu ababbaire abafuga amatwale 127, okuzwera e Buyindi okutuuka e Kuusi. Ekiragiro ekyo bakiwandiikire ni bakiweererya mu buli itwale omu lutumu lwalyo nʼempandiika yaalyo, nʼeeri aBayudaaya bona omu lutumu olwabwe era omu mpandiika eyaabwe.
8.10: OMoludekaayi nʼakiwandiika omu liina lya kabaka Akaswero, nʼakiteekaku nʼeraama eri oku mpeta ya kabaka. Nʼakiwa abakwenda abʼoku mbalaasi egiiruka eino, egibapiitire kukolanga mirimo gya kabaka, ni bakitwala mangu.
8.11: Ekiwandiiko kya kabaka ekyo ni kiwa aBayudaaya abali mu buli kibuga obwezye okukumbaana, nʼokwetaasa. Era ni babba nʼobwezye okwita, nʼokumalirawo nakimo amaje gonagona aga buli igwanga ooba itwale, agaabbanga gabalumbire ibo aBayudaaya, nʼabakali baabwe nʼabaana baabwe. Era ni babba nʼobwezye nʼokwenyagira nʼebintu ebyʼabalabe baabwe.
8.12: Olunaku olubalondere ekiragiro ekyo okutandiika okukola omu matwale gonagona aga kabaka Akaswero, lwabbaire enaku nga ikumi na isatu omweri ogweikumi na mibiri, igwo omweri ogwʼAdali.
8.13: Ekopi yʼekiragiro ekyo babbaire nʼokugiweererya ngʼeiteeka mu buli itwale, nʼokugimanyikisya abantu mu buli igwanga, kaisi olwo aBayudaaya bayezye okubba bategeke oku lunaku olwo okunyaaŋa abalabe baabwe.
8.14: Kale abakwenda, nga bakolesya embalaasi gya kabaka, ni bairuka bakitwala olwa kabaka okubalagira okukitwala. Era ekiragiro ekyo ni bakitwala nʼomu Susa ekibuga ekikulu.
8.15: Awo oMoludekaayi nʼazwa omu lubiri lwa kabaka ngʼazwaire ebizwalo bya kabaka ebya bbululu nʼebyeru, nʼomusibiro omutukuliikiriri ogwa lineni omusa, nʼengule eyʼekitiisya eyʼezaabbu. Era abantu bʼomu kibuga oSusa ni bajaagaana era ni basangaala.
8.16: Awo aBayudaaya ni babba nakusani, ni basangaala, ni bajaagaana, era ni babba nʼekitiisya.
8.17: Mu buli itwale na mu buli kibuga, ekiragiro kya kabaka e gikyatuukanga, aBayudaaya basangaalanga ni bajaagaana, ni basumba embaga era ni bakulya olunaku olwo ni bawuumula. Abantu abʼamawanga agandi bangi ni batuuka nʼokwesuuca aBayudaaya, olwʼokubba batiire aBayudaaya ekibabbaire bayezya okubakola.

9.1: Awo enaku nga ikumi na isatu omweri ogweikumi na mibiri, igwo omweri ogwAdali, olunaku olwabbaire olwʼokutuukiririryaku ekiragiro nʼeiteeka okabaka ebiyawaire, era abalabe bʼaBayudaaya olubabbaire basuubirira okubawanguliraku owerwatuukire, ebintu ni bibacuukira, aBayudaaya ni babba niibo abawangula abalabe baabwe omu kifo kyʼabalabe baabwe okubawangula.
9.2: ABayudaaya ni bakumbaanira omu bibuga e gibaabbanga batyaime omu matwale gonagona aga kabaka Akaswero, okulwanisya nabuli muntu eyabbaire agezyaku okubakolaku akabbikabbi. Era nandi ni wabbaawo ayezya okubalwanisya olwʼokutya abantu bonabona abamawanga agandi omu bibuga e gibabbanga batyaime okubabbaire nakwo.
9.3: Ababbaire omu bifo ebitongole ngʼabafugi, nʼabeekubbemberibe abʼamatwale, nʼaBagavana, aamo nʼabakungu ba kabaka, bonabona ni batuuka nʼokubbeera aBayudaaya, olwʼokubba babbaire batiire oMoludekaayi.
9.4: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMoludekaayi yabbaire atyanu muntu mukulu omu lubiri lwa kabaka, nʼeitutumulye nga lituuka nʼomu matwale gonagona agʼobwakabaka era omusaiza oyo oMoludekaayi, ni yeeyongeranga bweyongeri okubba owʼamaani.
9.5: ABayudaaya ni baita abalabe baabwe bonabona nga bakolesya empiima, ni babajigirica. Era ni bakola ababacaawa na buli kintu ekibatakire okubakola.
9.6: Era omu Susa, ekibuga ekikulu, aBayudaaya ni bajigirica abantu 500.
9.7: Omu bantu abo baitiiremu nʼoPalusanidasa, nʼoDalufoni, nʼAsupasa,
9.8: nʼoPolasa, nʼAdaliya, nʼAlidasa,
9.9: nʼoPalumasita, nʼAlisayi, nʼAlidayi, nʼoVaizasa,
9.10: ibo abo bonabona eikumi ababbaire abataane ba Kamani omulabe wʼaBayudaaya, oKamani eyabbaire omutaane wa Kameedasa. Neye tibanyagire ekintu kyʼabantu abo abebaitire kadi kimo.
9.11: Awo ni bakobera okabaka oku lunaku olunanyere olwo obungi bwʼabantu abebaitiire omu kibuga ekikulu oSusa.
9.12: Okabaka nʼakoba onabagereka Eseza ati, “Omu kibuga ekikulu oSusa, aBayudaaya bajigiricirye abantu 500 nʼabataane ba Kamani eikumi. Kale abantu bameka abebaitire omu matwale gange gonagona? Atyanu otaka niki? Bakikuwa. Ooba, niki ekyosaba? Era kyona bakikuwa.”
9.13: Eseza nʼairamu ati, “Singa kibba kikusangaalisya kabaka, owe aBayudaaya abali omu Susa olukusa, eizo bairemu okukola ekyo, ekibabaikiriirye okukola olwatyanu. Era oganye nʼemirambo eikumi egyʼabataane ba Kamani, bajaanike oku kalabba.”
9.14: Kale awo okabaka nʼalagira bakikole, era ekiragiro ni bakiranga omu Susa, era emirambo egyʼabataane ba Kamani eikumi, ni bajaanika oku kalabba.
9.15: ABayudaaya ababbaire omu Susa ni beekumbaania oku naku nga ikumi na ina omweri ogwʼAdali, era ni baita abantu 300 omu kibuga ekyo, neye nandi banyaga ekintu kyʼabantu abo kadi kimo.
9.16: Omu kiseera ekinanyere ekyo aBayudaaya abandi ababbaire omu matwale agandi aga kabaka bona ni beekumbaania, okwekuuma nʼokwetaasa abalabe baabwe abo. Ni baita abalabe abo 75,000 neye nandi banyaga ekintu kyʼabantu abo kadi kimo.
9.17: Ekyo kyabbairewo enaku nga ikumi na isatu omweri ogwʼAdali, kaisi oku naku nga ikumi na ina, ni bawuumula ni balusuuca lunaku lwʼokuliiraku mbaga nʼokusangaala. Embaga ya Pulimu
9.18: ABayudaaya ababbaire omu Susa, ni bakumbaana oku naku nga ikumi na isatu, nʼokwikumi na ina. Okwikumi na itaanu ni bawuumula, ni balusuuca lunaku lwʼokuliiraku mbaga nʼokusangaala.
9.19: Ekyo niikyo ekigira aBayudaaya abʼomu byalo, bakulya olunaku olweikumi na ina omu mweri gwʼAdali ngʼolunaku lwʼokusangaaliraku era lwʼembaga, irwo olunaku lwʼokuweereryanganiraku ebirabo nʼebyokulya.
9.20: OMoludekaayi nʼawandiika ebyo byonabyona ebyabbairewo, era nʼaweererya ekiwandiiko ekyo eeri aBayudaaya bonabona ababbaire okumpi nʼe yala omu matwale gonagona aga kabaka Akaswero,
9.21: ngʼabalagira okukolanga omukolo ogwʼokujaagaananga nabuli mwanka oku naku ginu: Olweikumi na ina nʼolweikumi na itaanu omweri ogwʼAdali.
9.22: Egyo nga niigyo enaku, aBayudaaya okubeeramiiryeku abalabe baabwe. Ogwo niigwo omweri ogwasuukire ogwʼeisangaalo omu kifo ekyʼenima, era ogwʼokujaagaanirangamu omu kifo kyʼokwekondamirangamu. Babalagiire okusuuca enaku egyo gyʼokuliirangaku mbaga, era gyʼokusangaalirangaku, era gyʼokuweereryanganirangaku byokulya, nʼokugabirangaku badoobi birabo.
9.23: Kale aBayudaaya ni baikirirya okukolanga ekyo ekibabbaire batandiikire, era ngʼoMoludekaayi oweyabawandiikiire.
9.24: Ekyo kyabbaire kityo olwʼokubba oKamani omutaane wa Kameedasa, owʼomwibyaire lyʼAgagi era omulabe wʼaBayudaaya bonabona, yabbaire asalire olukwe okubajigirica, era yabbaire akubbisirye akalulu, iko akebeetere oPuli akʼokubajigirica nʼokubasaanyawo.
9.25: Neye Eseza oweyamanyikisirye okabaka olukwe olwo, okabaka nʼawuluca ekiragiro mubuwandiike ati olukwe oKamani oluyabbaire asalire okwita aBayudaaya, lucuukiire niiye oKamani. Era ekiragiro ekyo ni kikoba kiti, oKamani nʼabataanebe niibo abebali nʼokwanika oku kalabba.
9.26: Eyo niiyo ensonga kagira enaku egyo bajeetere Pulimu ekizwa omu kibono oPuli. Nʼolwekyo olwʼebibono byonabyona ebyabbaire omu kiragiro ekyo, nʼolwʼebyo ebibabbaire baboine omu nsonga eyo, nʼolwʼebyo ebyabbaire bibatuukireku,
9.27: aBayudaaya abo ibo abananyere ni balyesuucirya iteeka lyabwe nʼeibyaire lyabwe, era ni libba lya buli eyabeeyimbyangaku. Lyabbaire likoba liti, baabbanga nʼokukulya enaku egyo gyombi omu biseera byagyo nabuli mwanka anambula kugonerya.
9.28: Era basalirewo bati enaku egyo bagyebukiryenge era bagikulyenge mu buli mulembe, na mu buli kisito, na mu buli itwale, na mu buli kibuga. Era bati enaku egyo egya Pulimu bali nʼokutagitoolawo naire omu Buyudaaya, waire okulekeraawo okugikulyanga paka mu bʼeibyaire lyabwe.
9.29: Awo onabagereka Eseza omwala wʼAbbikairi, nʼoMoludekaayi oMuyudaaya ni bawandiika ekiwandiiko ngʼekyokubiri ekitumula oku Pulimu, era ni bakiwandiika nʼobwezye bwonabwona olwʼokutaka okukigumya.
9.30: Ekiwandiiko ekyo ni bakiweererya aBayudaaya bonabona omu matwale 127 agʼobwakabaka bwʼAkaswero, nga kibatakirya eidembe, era nga kibakubbiriza okubba abʼamazima.
9.31: Bakiwandiikire okukakasa enaku egyo egya Pulimu, omu biseera byagyo, ebibateekerewo ngʼoMoludekaayi oMuyudaaya nʼonabagereka Eseza owebabalagiire ngʼaBayudaaya abananyere owebeeteekeirewo ebiragiro ebyʼokusiibanga, nʼebiseera ebyʼokwekondamirangamu ibo nʼabʼeibyaire lyabwe.
9.32: Awo ekiwandiiko kyʼEseza ni kikakasa amateeka ga Pulimu, era ekintu ekyo ni bakiwandiika omu byafaayo.

10.1: Awo okabaka Akaswero nʼagereka abantu abʼomu bwakabakabwe omusolo, abʼoku lukalu nʼabʼomu bizinga byʼomu nyanza oMeditereniani.
10.2: Ebyo byonabyona ebiyakolere ebiraga obwezyebwe nʼamaanige, era nʼebyo ebiraga ngʼokabaka oweyatuucirye oMoludekaayi oku bukulu, babiwandiikire omu kitabo ekyʼeByomumirembe egyʼabakabaka bʼe Perusiya nʼe Mediya.
10.3: OMoludekaayi oMuyudaaya, niiye eyaiririranga oku kabaka Akaswero omu kitiisya, era niiye eyabbaire omukulu omu Bayudaaya. ABayudaaya abainaye bamutakanga, olwʼokubba bonabona yabakoleranga ebisa, era ngʼabasakira ebisa okuzwa eeri okabaka oyo.

1.1: Wʼenkabi iye oyo atakolera oku malabuki gʼababbibabbi waire okukwata enzira yʼabakola ebikole ebibbibibbi, waire kukolagana nʼabo abanyooma oMusengwa.
1.2: Wazira ekimusangaalya kugondera mateeka ga Musengwa. Era afumintiriza ku mateeka ago omusana nʼobwire.
1.3: Omuntu oyo ali ooti musaale ogubakomere okumpi nʼomwala gwʼamaizi, ogubala ebineneka byagwo omu kiseera kyabyo, era ogutawotoka amakoola. Omuntu oyo nabuli ekyakola kibitamu.
1.4: Neye ababbibabbi tibabba batyo, wazira babba ooti bisusungu ompunga ebyafuwa ni biduumuuka.
1.5: Nʼolwekyo ababbibabbi oMusengwa yalibasingisya omusango, era abakola ebikole ebibbibibbi abo tiyalibabalira oku kibbula kyʼabatuukirirye.
1.6: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa alungamya era akuuma abatuukirirye, neye enzira ababbibabbi egibasengererya ebalungamya mu kujigirika.

2.1: Lwaki abanamawanga beediima, era lwaki abantu basala enkwe eginambulamu?
2.2: Abafugi bʼoku kyalo beetegeka, era abeekubbemberi bateesera aamo okulwanisya oMusengwa era okulwanisya oyo oguyasukireku amafuta.
2.3: Era bakoba bati, “Oleke twetaisulye eifuge lyabwe, titwabaikirirya okutufuga.”
2.4: Neye Iye oyo atyaima oku ntebeye eyʼobwakabaka omwigulu abasekerera, oMusengwa oyo abanyooma.
2.5: Awo ngʼasunguwaire nʼabakaawuukira, era omu bulwabwe nʼabakanga, era nʼakoba ati,
2.6: “Nteekere okabaka wange, oku lusozi lwange olutukulye oSayuuni.”
2.7: Okabaka nʼalangirira ekiragiro kya Musengwa ati, “OMusengwa yankobere ati, ‘Oli mwana wange, olwatyanu nnangirira nti ndi iteewo.
2.8: Onsabe, nʼakuwa amawanga ni gabba busikabwo nʼekyalo kyonakyona ni kibba matwalego.
2.9: Walibavuniankira nakimo nʼomwigo gwʼekyoma, walibasusungula ni babba ooti kibya ekibasusungwire.’ ”
2.10: Kale atyanu bakabaka inywe, mwiremu amalabuki, inywe abafugi bʼoku kyalo mulabuke.
2.11: Muweererye oMusengwa nga mumuwa ekitiisya. Era mujaagaane neye nga mwewombeeka.
2.12: Mukotamye emitwe omumaiso gʼomwanawe okumuwa ekitiisya, nga bbe, yasunguwala nʼabajigirica mangu. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba obulwabwe tibulwa okusetuka. Neye bʼenkabi abo bonabona abairukira egyali okubakuuma.

3.1: Oo Musengwa, nga ndi nʼabalabe bangi! Era bangi abansetukiraku okundwanisya.
3.2: Bangi abantumulaku bati, “OKibbumba tiyamununule.”
3.3: Neye iwe Musengwa, niiwe engabo enkuuma. Niiwe ompa obuwanguli, era niiwe onjiryamu amaani.
3.4: Nkungirira niiwe Musengwa okumbeera, era onjiramu ngʼosinzirira oku lusozirwo olutukulye.
3.5: Nnambaala ni ngona era ni ndamuka, olwʼokubba oMusengwa ankuuma.
3.6: Tintya enkumi nʼenkumi egyʼabalabe abeneeruguulirirye okunnumba.
3.7: Oo Musengwa, osetuke, Kibbumba wange, onnunule! Okubbe abalabe bange bonabona oku masaya obamulungulemu amaino.
3.8: Musengwa, niiwe onnunula eeri abalabe, era niiwe owa abantubo enkabi.

4.1: Oo Kibbumba iwe omulwaniriri wange, owenkusaba onjiremu! Owenabbaire omu bigosi, wambeereire. Atyanu onkwatire ekisa, era owulire okusaba kwange.
4.2: Bantu inywe, mwalituuca di okummalamu ekitiisya nga munswaza? Mwalituuca di okutaka ebinambulamu, nʼokukolera oku byobubbeyi?
4.3: Aale mumanye muti oMusengwa ayawiire abatuukirirye okubba babe. Era oMusengwa owemmusaba, anjiramu.
4.4: Owewabbaawo ekibasunguwalya mwekuume obusungu okutabakolesya ekibbikibbi. Musirinkirire era mufumintirize nga muli oku buliri bwanywe.
4.5: Muweeyo esadaaka egisaanira, era mwesige oMusengwa.
4.6: Bangi beebuulya bati, “Naani eyatukolera ebisa?” Oo Musengwa oganye ekitangaala kyʼamaisogo kitwakire!
4.7: Neye ompaire eisangaalo eryʼamaani okukiraku abandi abali nʼebyokulya ebyʼempeke ebingi nʼenviinyo gyabwe enyingi.
4.8: Nnambaala ni ngona mwidembe, olwʼokubba niiwe wenkani, Musengwa, onkuuma ni mba mwidembe.

5.1: Oo Musengwa, owulisisye ebinkusaba, ofeeyo okukukenyera kwange.
5.2: Owulire nga nkwekungirira okumbeera, olwʼokubba ndi kusaba niiwe oKibbumba wange era oKabaka wange.
5.3: Oo Musengwa, amakeezi owulira eigono lyange. Amakeezi nkusaba, ni nkuumirira okunjiramu.
5.4: Oli Kibbumba atasangaalira obubbibubbi, era akola ekibbikibbi tomwikirirya okubba aamo na iwe.
5.5: Abeekudumbalya tobaikirirya omumaisogo, ocaawa bonabona abakola ebikole ebibbibibbi.
5.6: Ojigirica abo abatumula ebyobubbeyi. OMusengwa acaawira nakimo abaiti nʼababbeyi.
5.7: Neye nze, olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma, naingiranga mu nyumbayo. Nasinziranga mu Yeekaaluyo entukulye, era ni nkotama okukuwa ekitiisya.
5.8: Oo Musengwa, onnungamye okukola ebikole ebyʼobutuukirirye olwʼokubba ndi nʼabalabe, ondage nakusani enzirayo egimba nkwate.
5.9: Abalabe bange ebibono ebibatumula tibyesigika, ekibali oku myoyo ikwo kufafaagania. Ebibono ebiwaana ebibatumula, bifunya ooti kivundi ekizwa omu magombe agebaliikwire.
5.10: Oo Kibbumba, obasingisye omusango. Oleke ibo abananyere bagwe omu mitego gyabwe. Obabbinge omumaisogo olwʼebikole byabwe ebingi ebibbibibbi, olwʼokubba bakujeemeire.
5.11: Neye oleke bonabona abairukira egyoli okubakuuma basangaalenge, oleke bayembenge nʼeisangaalo bulijo. Era obukuumibwo bubabbengeku, awo-so abo bonabona abakutaka bajaagaanenge oku lulwo.
5.12: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba, Musengwa, owa abatuukirirye enkabi. Ekisaakyo kibakuuma ooti ngabo.

6.1: Oo Musengwa, tiwannenyera omu busungubwo, waire kumbonerezera omu bulwabwo.
6.2: Oo Musengwa onkwatire ekisa, olwʼokubba obwomi busebengerera. Oo Musengwa, ondamye, olwʼokubba amagumba gameketa.
6.3: Era obwomi bwange buli mu kugada okwʼamaani. Neye Musengwa, walituuca di okutandamya?
6.4: Oo Musengwa oirye omwoyo onnunule, ondamye olwʼekisaakyo.
6.5: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba mpaawo mufu akwebukirya. Era naani ayezya okukuwuuja e magombe?
6.6: Amaani gampoiremu olwʼokukunga. Nabuli kiire nkulumuca amaliga ni gadodya obuliri bwange, era obuliri bwange ni butoba nʼamaliga.
6.7: Amaiso gange galoolere olwʼenima, tigabona nakusani olwʼamaliga abalabe bange bonabona agebankunja.
6.8: Muzwe e gyendi nywenanywena abakola ebikole ebibbibibbi, olwʼokubba oMusengwa awuliire okukunga kwange.
6.9: OMusengwa awuliire nga mmwekungirira okumbeera, era yairamu okusaba kwange.
6.10: Abalabe bange bonabona baliswala ni bibasobera, oKibbumba yalibabbingirira ni baaba mangu mangu nga baswaire!

7.1: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange, njirukira eeri niiwe okunkuuma. Onnunule era ondamye abo bonabona abanjiigaania,
7.2: aanambula ekyo bannyiiryagamu ngʼompologoma owaakola ekyayiigire, bankutulyagamu nga mpaawo andamya.
7.3: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange, obwemba nga nakolere ebintu binu: Nga nakolere ekikole ekibbikibbi,
7.4: ooba nkolere omukaagwa wange ekintu ekibbikibbi, waire okulumya omulabe wange nga mpaawo nsonga,
7.5: kale oleke omulabe wange anjiige era ankwate. Era oleke anjemyagire ansi okwitakali anjite, era andeke nga ngwire okwitakali nfiire.
7.6: Oo Musengwa osetukiremu, omu busungubwo olwanisye abalabe bange abannumba nʼobukambwe. Oo Kibbumba wange osetuke, olagire wabbeewo obwenkanya.
7.7: Kale oleke abantu bonabona bakumbaane era bakweruguulirirye, era obafuge ngʼosinzirira oku ntebeyo eyʼobwakabaka omwigulu.
7.8: Musengwa, niiwe alamula abantu bonabona. Oo Musengwa olamule omusango gwange nsinge, olwʼokubba mpaawo kibbikibbi ekinkolere.
7.9: Oo Kibbumba omutuukirirye, iwe akebera emyoyo nʼebiseego, okomye abantu ababbibabbi okukola ebikole ebibbibibbi, neye okuumenge abatuukirirye.
7.10: Kibbumba, niiwe engabo yange, onunula abo abalongoole omu myoyo.
7.11: Kibbumba niiwe omulamuzi etiyeekubbira, era bulijo abakola ebikole ebibbibibbi obasingisya omusango.
7.12: Singa tibacuuke ni beenenya, oKibbumba ayaba okwagalya empiimaye, era ategekere akalasoke.
7.13: Ategekere ebyokulwanisyabye ebiita, yeetegekere okulasa obulasobwe obuliku omusyo empembi.
7.14: Obone ababbibabbi owebaseega okukola ekibbikibbi! Baizwire itima, era batumula byobubbeyi.
7.15: Ekiina ekibakuulira abandi okukigwamu, abananyere niibo abakigwamu.
7.16: Ebyeitima ebibakola bibairira niibo abananyere, nʼebikole byabwe ebyobukambwe bibairira niibo abananyere.
7.17: Neebalyanga oMusengwa olwa bwenkanyabwe, era nayembanga okuwuuja oMusengwa oNambulaku aMwagaagana.

8.1: Oo Musengwa, iwe oMusengwa waiswe, obukulu bwʼeriinalyo buboneka nabuli wantu omu kyalo kyonakyona! Era ekitiisyakyo kiboneka paka mwigulu.
8.2: Wayegeserye abaana abatobato nʼebibbuuta okukuwuuja nakusani, omu ngeri eyo nʼosirica abalabebo, nʼabo abakulwanisya.
8.3: Owenfumintiriza okwigulu eriwabbumbire, nʼomweri nʼenkota ebiwateekere omu bifo byabyo,
8.4: omuntu niikyo eniki-so ekigira nʼomuseegaku? Era omuntu-obuntu, lwaki omulumirwa?
8.5: Wamukolere, nʼabulaku katyayi kati okwagaagana na iwe Kibbumba, era nʼomutiikira engule eyʼekitiisya nʼokumugulumalya.
8.6: Wamuwaire obwezye okufuga ebintu byonabyona ebiwabbumbire. Era ebintu byonabyona wabiteekere ansi wʼobwezyebwe,
8.7: entaama gyonagyona nʼente, nʼebisolo byʼomu kigona,
8.8: nʼebinyonyi nʼenyanyi, nʼebibbumbe ebindi ebibba omu nyanza.
8.9: Oo Musengwa, iwe oMusengwa waiswe, obukulu bwʼeriinalyo buboneka nabuli wantu omu kyalo kyonakyona!

9.1: Oo Musengwa, nakuwuujanga nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona. Nakoberanga abantu byonabyona ebyewuunyisya ebyokolere.
9.2: Nasangaalanga era ni njaagaana olwʼebyokolere. Nayembanga okukuwuuja iwe oKibbumba oNambulaku aMwagaagana.
9.3: Abalabe bange owebakubona baira e nyuma, ni bagwa era ni bafa.
9.4: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba waingiire omu nsonga gyange, nʼosinzirira oku ntebeyo eyʼobwakabaka nʼolamula omusango mu bwenkanya.
9.5: Wakaawukiire abanamawanga, nʼojigirica ababbibabbi, era tibakaali babeebukirya emirembe nʼemirembe.
9.6: Abalabe baiswe bawoireirewo nakimo emirembe nʼemirembe. Ojigiricirye ebibuga byabwe, era tibakaali babeebukirya.
9.7: Neye oMusengwa niiye afuga emirembe nʼemirembe, yateekerewo entebeye eyʼobwakabaka okwalamulira emisango.
9.8: Era yaliramula ekyalo mu butuukirirye, yalifuga amawanga gonagona mu bwenkanya.
9.9: OMusengwa era niiye ekiirukiro kyʼabo abebagadya, niiye olugaga omu biseera byʼebigosi.
9.10: Ibo abo abakumaite Musengwa bakwesiga, olwʼokubba abakunoonia tobalekesula.
9.11: Mwembe nga muwuuja oMusengwa afuga omu Sayuuni, mulangirire omu mawanga gonagona ebikolebye ebyʼamaani.
9.12: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oKibbumba Iye anyaaŋa obwiti, ayebukirya abagada, era tiyeebityaku okukunga kwabwe.
9.13: Oo Musengwa, obone abalabe bange ngʼowebangadya! Onkwatire ekisa, era ondamye okufa,
9.14: kaisi nkuwuujenge eeri abantu abʼomu Sayuuni, era nsangaalenge olwʼokunnunula.
9.15: Abanamawanga bagwire omu kiina ekibakuuliire abandi okugwamu, bapapaire omu mutego ibo abananyere ogubategere.
9.16: OMusengwa yeemanyikisya lwʼokulamula mu bwenkanya. Neye ababbibabbi bapapaire mwebyo, ibo abananyere ebibakolere.
9.17: Ababbibibbi baika e magombe. Eyo niiyo enkomerero yʼabo bonabona abagaana oKibbumba.
9.18: Neye abadamba tiyabalekesulenge enaku gyonagyona. Osuubi wʼabo abebagadya tiyaawengewo emirembe gyonagyona.
9.19: Oo Musengwa osetuke, toganya abantu okuwunuka omusango; olamule abanamawanga.
9.20: Musengwa, obamumemu entiisya era bamanye bati bantu-buntu.

10.1: Oo Musengwa, lwaki ondi yala? Lwaki weebisa nga ndi omu biseera byʼebigosi?
10.2: Ababbibabbi beepanka ni bayiigaania abadoobi. Aale oleke bapapale omu mitego ibo abananyere egibategere.
10.3: Ababbibabbi beewaana olwʼebintu ebibbibibbi ebibeinira okukola. Abalulunkanira okusuna bazumirira oMusengwa era ni bamwegaana.
10.4: Omubbimubbi yeewaana era tanoonia oMusengwa. Era omu biseegobye mpaamu Kibbumba.
10.5: Neye nabuli kyakola kibitamu. Tategeera ati ekibonerezo kya Kibbumba kimukuumiriire, era anyooma abalabebe bonabona.
10.6: Akoba omu mwoyogwe ati, “Mpaawo kabbikabbi akalintuukaku. Tinalibbaaku omu kugada emirembe gyonagyona.”
10.7: Ebyatumula biizwire biraami, na bubbeyi na kutiisyatiisya. Atumula byʼeitima nʼebibono ebibbibibbi.
10.8: Yeebisa omu byalo, nʼakuuma okwita abantu abanambulaku omusango. Akiiya onambulaku obubbeeri.
10.9: Yeebisirira ooti mpologoma aali nʼekyagonereire omu kigona, nʼakuuma okukwata onambulaku obubbeeri. Akwatisya onambulaku obubbeeri era nʼamukulukuusa ngʼali omu lutuulalwe.
10.10: Ayinga abanambulaku obubbeeri, ni batyompoka. Abawangula olwʼokubba wʼamaani mabitiriri.
10.11: Omubbimubbi oyo akoba omu mwoyogwe ati, “OKibbumba yeerabiire, abbuunireku amaisoge, era tabona ekinkola.”
10.12: Oo Musengwa osetuke, Kibbumba obonereze omubbimubbi oyo, neye oyebukirye abebagadya, obabbeere.
10.13: Lwaki omubbimubbi anyooma oKibbumba? Era nʼakoba omu mwoyogwe ati, “Tiyambonereze.”
10.14: Neye iwe, Kibbumba obona ebigosi nʼenima, era weetegekere okubbeera. Abo abanambulaku obubbeeri beewaayo giri niiwe, bulijo niiwe obbeera abafuubbi.
10.15: Omubbimubbi era akola ebikole ebibbibibbi omumalemu amaani. Omubonereze olwʼebikole ebibbibibbi ebyakolere, paka oweyalekereraawo nakimo ebibbibibbibye.
10.16: OMusengwa iye Kabaka emirembe nʼemirembe. Era abanamawanga balijigirika ni bawa omu kyalokye.
10.17: Oo Musengwa, omaite abanambulaku obubbeeri ekibasuubira. Mazima owulira okukunga kwabwe nʼobairyamu amaani era nʼowulisisya nʼokusaba kwabwe.
10.18: Olamula omusango gwʼabafuubbi nʼabebajooga ni basinga, kaisi omuntu-obuntu aleke okubatiisyatiisyanga.

11.1: Nze njirukira eeri Musengwa okunkuuma, mubba mutya okunkoba muti, “Oguluke ooti nyonyi oyabe omu nsozi?”
11.2: Olwʼokubba ababbibabbi bategere obulaso bwabwe, beebisire omu ndiikirya nʼobulaso bwabwe, nga bataka okulasa abalongoole omu myoyo.
11.3: Emisingi gyʼamateeka owegivunika, kintuki omutuukirirye ekyayezya okukola?
11.4: OMusengwa ali omu Yeekaaluye entukulye, oMusengwa ali oku ntebeye eyʼobwakabaka omwigulu. Alingirira abantu bonabona, era yeekeenenya ebibakola.
11.5: OMusengwa yeekeenenya ebikole byʼabatuukirirye, neye acaawa ababbibabbi abataka ebikole byʼobukambwe.
11.6: Ababbibabbi yabamagalicaaku amakala gʼomusyo nʼomusyo gwa salufa, nʼempewo yʼeibbugumu eribitiriri niibyo ebyabba omugabo gwabwe.
11.7: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa mutuukirirye, era ataka bikole ebyʼobutuukirirye. Abalongoole omu myoyo balibba omumaisoge.

12.1: Oo Musengwa otununule, olwʼokubba abantu abatuukirirye bawoirewo, abantu abʼamazima tibakaali baboneka omu kyalo.
12.2: Abantu babbeyangana, batumula ebibono ebiwaanawaana, neye ngʼomu myoyo gyabwe mwizwire bubbeyi.
12.3: Nsaba Musengwa, osirice abatumula ebibono ebiwaanawaana. Era obbuuneku eminwa gyʼabo abeepanka,
12.4: abo abakoba bati, “Ebibono byaiswe bitusunisya nabuli ekitutaka, twatumula ebitutaka, naani ayezya okutuloberya?”
12.5: Neye oMusengwa akoba ati, “Olwʼokubba abantu ababbibabbi bagadya abadoobi, era nʼabebagadya bakunga, nasetuka ni mbakuuma ngʼowebeetaaga.”
12.6: Ebisuubizo bya Musengwa byesigwa, biri ooti feeza egibakenenere nga bagibitya omu kikoomi kyʼomusyo, ni bagikengeiza emirundi musanvu.
12.7: Oo Musengwa otukuumenge, era otulabirirenge eeri ababbibabbi amirembe gyonagyona.
12.8: Ababbibabbi babitabita nabuli wantu, era nabuli muntu awuuja kibbikibbi!

13.1: Oo Musengwa, walituuca di okuneerabira? Ni waneerabirira nakimo? Watuuca di ngʼonkubbira omugongo?
13.2: Nalituuca di okweyanika omwoyo, nʼokubba nʼenima omu mwoyo gwange nabuli lunaku? Omulabe wange yalituuca di okumpangulanga?
13.3: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange, onningemu era onjiremu. Onjiryemu amaani, tinaafa,
13.4: era tiwaganya omulabe wange okukoba ati, “Mmuwangwire,” nʼabampalana okujaagaana olwa kumpangula.
13.5: Neye nze neesiga kisaakyo, najaagaananga olwʼokubba walinnunula.
13.6: Nakwemberanga Musengwa, olwʼokubba onkoleire ebisa bingi.

14.1: Abasirusiru bakoba omu myoyo gyabwe bati, “Mpaawo Kibbumba.” Boonoonoki, era bakola bibbibibbi; mpaawo akola ebisa.
14.2: OMusengwa asinzirira omwigulu, nʼalingirira abantu bonabona, okubona nga waliwo amutegeera, ooba nga waliwo amunoonia.
14.3: Neye abantu bonabona bamuzwireku, ni basuuka ekitagasa egyali. Mpaawo akola ebisa, era kadi waire moiza.
14.4: Abakola ebibbibibbi tibalyega? Bamalawo abantu bange ooti muntu akaavuula ekyokulya, era tibasinza oMusengwa.
14.5: Neye baliizula entiisya, olwʼokubba oKibbumba ali aamo nʼabatuukirirye.
14.6: Abakola ebibbibibbi bakaisya abadoobi okutuukirirya ebibategeka okukola, neye abadoobi ibo bairukira eeri Musengwa okubakuuma.
14.7: Nsaba nti oyo eyanunula oIsirairi azwe mu Sayuuni! OMusengwa oweyaliiryawo eidembe omu bantube, abʼeibyaire lya Yaakobbo ibo aBaisirairi balijaagaana.

15.1: Oo Musengwa, naani eyaingiranga omu Weemayo? Naani eyatyamanga oku lusozirwo olutukulye?
15.2: Niiye oyo onambulaku ekyokumunenya, akola ebituuce, era atumula ebyʼamazima.
15.3: Era atatumula ebyakalebule, atakola abaliranwabe ebibalumya, era atatumula ekibbikibbi oku bainaye.
15.4: Era niiye oyo anyooma ababbibabbi, neye awa ekitiisya abo abatya oMusengwa. Niiye oyo atuukirirya ekyalayiire, era atacuuka nʼowekubba kufiirwa.
15.5: Niiye oyo akoopa abantu empiiya nga tasasulisya amagoba, era ataikirirya enguzi okusibirirya kwoyo abulaku omusango. Nabuli akola ebyo, yaabbanga mucaati emirembe gyonagyona.

16.1: Oo Kibbumba onkuume, olwʼokubba njirukira eeri niiwe okunkuuma.
16.2: Mbutula eeri oMusengwa nti, “Niiwe oMusengwa wange, ebintu ebisa byonabyona ebindinabyo bizwa eeri niiwe.”
16.3: Abo abatuukirirye abali oku kyalo, niibo abakiraku obusa era mwibo niimwo eisangaalo lyange lyonalyona omuliri.
16.4: Abasinza abakibbumba abandi baabbanga nʼebingi ebibaleyerya. Tinabeegaitengeku omu kuwaayo esadaaka gyabwe egyʼomusaaye, era tinasinzenge abakibbumba baabwe.
16.5: Musengwa, niiwe ongabirira byonabyona. Era niiwe osalawo ebiri nʼokuntuukaku.
16.6: Ebyobusika ebyompaire bisa ino, mazima omugabo gwange musa ino.
16.7: Nawuujanga oMusengwa oyo annungamya, nʼobwire omwoyo gwange gunjegesya.
16.8: Mmaite nti oMusengwa aneekubbembera bulijo, olwʼokubba ali na nze okumbeera kaisi tiwaabbaawo ekintukutya omwoyo.
16.9: Kagira omwoyo gwange gwizwire isangaalo era ni njaagaana, ntyo ni mba mwidembe.
16.10: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba tiwalireka omwoyo gwange e magombe, waire okuganya omubiri gwʼoMutukulyewo okuvunda.
16.11: Ondagire enzira yʼobwomi. Era olwʼokubba oli na nze wanjizulya eisangaalo. Era nga ndi oku lubba lwʼengaloyo endiiro nʼabba nʼeisangaalo emirembe gyonagyona.

17.1: Oo Musengwa, owulisisye okwewozyaku kwange olamule omu bwenkanya. Owulire okwekunga kwange ombeere. Otege ekitwi eeri okusaba kwange okunambulamu bubbeyi.
17.2: Niiwe obbe olamule ngʼowembulaku omusango, olwʼokubba niiwe abona ekituuce.
17.3: Ogezeserye ebiseego byange era nʼokebera nʼomwoyo gwange obwire. Waneekenenyere era nandi nʼonjajiryamu nsobi. Ndi mumaliriri okutasobya omu ntumula.
17.4: Oku bikwata oku bikole byʼabantu, olwʼekibonokyo neewala amanzira gʼabakola ebikole byʼobukambwe.
17.5: Bulijo nsengereiryenge biibyo ebiwandagiire, era tincaamangaku naire.
17.6: Oo Kibbumba, nkusaba niiwe, olwʼokubba oiramu okusaba kwange. Ontegere ekitwi, era owulire okusaba kwange.
17.7: Ondage ekisaakyo omu ngeri eyeewunyisya, iwe onunula nʼengaloyo endiiro, abairukira egyoli okubakuuma eeri abalabe baabwe.
17.8: Onkuume ngʼobwokuuma emunge yʼeriisolyo, ombise omu kiiriirye kyʼebiyayabyo.
17.9: Ondamye ababbibabbi abannumba, era eeri abalabe bange abo abakabbikabbi abanzingiza.
17.10: Bʼemyoyo miirugazu era batumula na idumi.
17.11: Banjiiga nga banzingiza nabuli e gincuukira, nga banoonia kakisa kʼokunjita.
17.12: Bali ooti mpologoma aali nzala okunyiiranyiira ekyayiigire, era bali ooti mpologoma okitobba ayeebisire, ngʼajunjumiriire okukwata ekyayiiga.
17.13: Oo Musengwa, osetukiremu obalwanisye, era obawangule. Ondamye ababbibabbi ngʼokolesya empiimayo.
17.14: Oo Musengwa, ngʼokolesya engaloyo eyʼamaani ondamye abantu abo abʼoku kyalo kunu, ibo abali nʼomugabo mu bwomi bunu. Era basune ekibonerezo kyabwe ekiwabategekeire, abaana baabwe basune ekibamala nʼabaizukulu bona bakisikire.
17.15: Neye nze nalibba omumaisogo olwʼokubba tinabbengere omusango. Era nalyesiima owenaliramukira ni nkubona maiso ku maiso.

18.1: Oo Musengwa, nkutaka ino iwe amaani gange.
18.2: OMusengwa niiye eibbaale lyange omuneebisa, niiye olugaga lwange era omununuli wange. OKibbumba wange, niiye eibbaale lyange omuneebisa, mwiye munjirukira okunkuuma. Era niiye engabo yange era niiye amaani agannunula, era niiye olugaga lwange.
18.3: OMusengwa gunsaba iye asaaniire okumuwuujanga, era niiye annunula eeri abalabe bange.
18.4: Akabbikabbi akʼokufa kabbaire kaneeruguuliriirye, amayengo agajigirica ni ganjikaku.
18.5: Okufa ni kuneebbowanganiryaku, era entiisya yʼokufa nʼennumba.
18.6: Omu bigosi byange nasabire oMusengwa, ni neekungirira oKibbumba wange okumbeera. Ngʼali omu Yeekaaluye yawulisisirye eigono lyange, era okukunga kwange ni kumugwa omu matwi.
18.7: Awo ekyalo ni kiyuuga era ni kitengeeta. Emisingi gyʼensozi gyona ni gyenyeenya, era ni gitengeeta, olwʼokubba oKibbumba yabbaire asunguwaire.
18.8: Omwosi ni gwedumbya engulu nga guzwa omu nindoye, era omusyo ogujigirica ni guzwa omu munwagwe. Era amanda agameigera ni gazwa omu munwagwe.
18.9: Nʼabiikulawo eigulu nʼaika ansi, endikiirya ekwaite ozigi zigi nʼebba ansi wʼebigerebye.
18.10: Yatyaime oku keruubbi era okeruubbi nʼamuguluca, era empewo nʼemuleeta kafuufu.
18.11: Yeebbuulisirye endikiirya, kaisi ebireri bya ikendi ebiirugazire zigi, ni bimubiika.
18.12: Omu kitangaalakye ekyʼamaani, ni muzwamu amanda agameigera omusyo.
18.13: Awo oMusengwa ngʼasinzirira omwigulu nʼatumula nʼeigono eryʼangulu ooti kubbwatuka kwʼeraadu; eigono lyʼoNambulaku aMwagaagana ni baliwulira, ni wabbaawo amabbaale ga ikendi, nʼamanda agʼomusyo.
18.14: Nʼalasa obulasobwe, era nʼasalaanica abalabebe, nʼabatiringania nʼokumesya kwa ikendi.
18.15: Musengwa, owewakaawukiire abalabebo nʼofuwa nʼomwota gwʼomu nindoyo, ansi wʼenyanza wabonekere, nʼemisingi gyʼekyalo ni gibba waweeru aawo.
18.16: OMusengwa yasinziriire omwigulu nʼannunula, era nʼantoola omu lwabi.
18.17: Yannunwire omu balabe bange abʼamaani, era okuzwa mwabo abampalana, olwʼokubba babbaire bankiraku amaani.
18.18: Bannumbire nga ndi omu bugosi, neye oMusengwa niiye eyambeereire.
18.19: Yantoireyo era nʼantwala omu kifo kyʼomweyaayo. Yannunwire olwʼokubba yansiimire.
18.20: OMusengwa ampaire empeera kusinzirira ku bikole ebyʼobutuukirirye ebinkola. Era ansaswire kusinzirira kutabbaaku musango.
18.21: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba nkwaite amateeka ga Musengwa. Era tinkolere ekikole ekibbikibbi ni kindeetera okuzwa oku Kibbumba wange.
18.22: Nakwaite amateekage gonagona, era tinjeemerangaku ekiragirokye.
18.23: Mbulaku ekyokunnenya omumaiso ga Kibbumba, era neekuumire okutakola ekikole ekibbikibbi.
18.24: OMusengwa kagira ampaire empeera kusinzirira ku bikole ebyʼobutuukirirye ebinkola. Era nʼansasula kusinzirira kukutabbaaku musango omumaisoge.
18.25: Oo Musengwa, weeragisya ngʼobwoli mwesigwa eeri abo abeesigwa egyoli, era weeragisya ngʼobwoli oNambulaku kyokukunenya eeri abo abanambulaku kyokubanenya.
18.26: Weeragisya ngʼobwoli mulongoole eeri abo abalongoole omu myoyo, neye weeragisya ngʼobwoli muzira eeri ababbibabbi.
18.27: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba onunula abawombeeki, neye oswaza abʼeijoogo.
18.28: Musengwa, niiwe ekitangaala kyʼomwoyo gwange. OKibbumba wange atoolawo endikiirya omu mwoyo gwange.
18.29: Niiwe onjezyesya okulumba amaje gʼabalabe bange, nʼonjezyesya okumenya ebikomera byabwe.
18.30: OKibbumba ebikolebye byʼobutuukirirye; oMusengwa byonabyona ebyasuubiza bituukirira. Niiye engabo yʼabo bonabona abairukira egyali.
18.31: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba, aale naani oKibbumba okutoolaku oMusengwa? Era naani eIbbaale omutwebisa okutoolaku oKibbumba waiswe?
18.32: OKibbumba niiye olugaga lwange olwʼamaani, era annungamya omu nzira ennongoole.
18.33: Agumya ebigere byange ooti bya kimaadu, era nʼankuumirayo e ngulu oku nsozi empaavu anambula bugosi.
18.34: Antendeka omu ngeri yʼokulwana entalo, era ni mba nga mpezya okukolesya akalaso akʼekyoma ekigumu.
18.35: Musengwa, onteekereku obukuumi era nʼonnunula. Engaloyo endiiro niiyo empanirira era obwikaikanibwo bunsuuca wʼamaani.
18.36: Ogalamiirye ebigere byange enzira, era nandi ni ngwa.
18.37: Nabbingire abalabe bange ni mbakwata, era nandi ni njirawo nga nkaali okubajigirica.
18.38: Nabasasaigwirye nandi ni bayezya okusetuka, ni bafa ni mba nga mbamalire.
18.39: Wampaire amaani gʼokulwana olutalo, era ni mpangula abannumba.
18.40: Wagirire abalabe bange ni banjiruka, era najigiricirye ababbaire bancaawa.
18.41: Bakungire okubabbeera, neye nga mpaawo abanunula. Era ni beekungirira nʼoMusengwa, neye nandi nʼabairamu.
18.42: Nabatentenere ni basuuka ooti nkungu, era ni mbeemyaga ooti bitonyonyo byʼomu nzira.
18.43: Wannunwire okuzwa omu bulabe bwʼabantu bange, nʼonsuuca mufugi wʼamawanga. Era abantu abenabbaire timmaiteku ni babba nga ninze abafuga.
18.44: Babba bankuwulira ebibono byange ni bangondera, era abʼamawanga agandi bakotamya emitwe okumpa ekitiisya.
18.45: Bawaamu amaani, era ni bazwa omu ngaga gyabwe, ni baiza nga batukuta.
18.46: OMusengwa mwomi! Bamuwuujenge iye oyo eibbaale lyange omuneebisa! Era oKibbumba iye oyo annunula bamugulumalyenge!
18.47: Niiye oKibbumba anjezyesya okuwangula abalabe bange, nʼaica amawanga ansi wange.
18.48: Era andamya abalabe bange. Oo Musengwa, onjezesya okuwangula abalabe bange, era nʼonnunula eeri abantu abaizwire obukambwe.
18.49: Kagira Musengwa nakuwuujanga omu mawanga, era ni nnyemba nga mpuuja eriinalyo.
18.50: OKibbumba awa okabaka obuwanguli obwʼamaani. Akwatira ekisa oguyasukireku amafuta, akwatira oDawudi nʼeibyairerye ekisa emirembe nʼemirembe.

19.1: Eigulu limanyikisya ekitiisya kya Kibbumba, era nʼebiri omwibbanga biraga ebyemikonobye.
19.2: Nabuli lunaku lukobera olwiraku; era nabuli kiire kiranga eeri ekiire ekiiraku ekitiisyakye.
19.3: Mpaawo ntumula yaabyo ooba kibono kyabyo, waire eigono lyabyo eribulikikana,
19.4: ate ngʼeigono eryʼobukwenda lyasaalaine okumalaku ebyalo byonabyona, nʼebibono byabyo byatuukire nʼomu kisoko kyʼekyalo ekikirirayo nʼakimo obubise. OKibbumba yakoleire eisana ekifo oku kireri eeyo e giribba.
19.5: Lizwayo ooti mugole omusaiza omusangaali awulukira omu kisengekye, era ooti mwiruki owʼamaani ajunjumiriire okutandiika empaka gyʼembiro.
19.6: Eisana lizwerayo oku lubba olumo olwʼekireri, era ni lyaba lisalamu paka oku lubba olundi. Mpaawo ekyebisa eibbugumu lyalyo.
19.7: Eiteeka lya Musengwa lituukirirye, liirya omu myoyo gyaiswe amaani. Ebiragiro bya Musengwa byesigika, bigeziwalya abula amalabuki.
19.8: Amateeka ga Musengwa matuuce, gasangaalya omwoyo. Ebiragiro bya Musengwa bikengeize, biigulya omuntu amaiso.
19.9: Okutya oMusengwa kisa ino, kibbeerererawo emirembe nʼemirembe. Okulamula kwa Musengwa kwʼamazima, era okutwalirya aamo kutuuce.
19.10: Ebiragirobye byʼomugaso ino okukiraku ezaabbu era nʼokukiraku iyo ennongoole. Binyuunyuula okukiraku omujenene, era nʼokukiraku gudi oguzwa omu bisasala.
19.11: Era ebiragiro ebyo niibyo ebindabula nze omuweereryawo, era omu kubikwata mulimu empeera nene.
19.12: Naani ayezya iye onyere okumanya ensobigye? Onsoniye ebibbibibbi ebinkola omu butamanya.
19.13: Onkuume nze omuweereryawo nʼokutakola ebibbibibbi ebigenderere; tiwabiganya okunfuga. Awo nʼabba nga mbulaku ekyokunnenya, era nga mbulaku omusango ogwʼekibbikibbi ekyʼamaani.
19.14: Nsaba ebibono byange nʼebiseego byange obisiime. Musengwa niiwe eibbaale lyange omu neebisa, era niiwe omununuli wange.

20.1: Nsaba oMusengwa airengemu okusabakwo ngʼoli omu bigosi. Era nsaba oKibbumba wa Yaakobbo akukuumenge.
20.2: Nsaba akuweereryenge obubbeeri ngʼasinzirira omu Weemaye, era akujejerenge ngʼasinzirira omu Sayuuni.
20.3: Nsaba ayebukiryenge ebyowaayo byonabyona, era aikiriryenge esadaakayo egibooca yonayona.
20.4: Nsaba akuwenge ebiweegomba, era atuukiriryenge entegekagyo gyonagyona.
20.5: Awo twakubbanga olukero olwʼeisangaalo ngʼowangwire, era twajaagaananga olwʼobuwanguli omu liina lya Kibbumba. Era nsaba oMusengwa akuwenge byonabyona ebiwamusabanga.
20.6: Atyanu mmaite ngʼoMusengwa anunula okabaka oyo oguyasukireku amafuta. Amwiramu ngʼasinzirira omwigululye eritukulye, era amununula ngʼakolesya engaloye endiiro eyʼamaani amabitiriri.
20.7: Abamo beesiga bigaali, nʼabandi beesiga mbalaasi, neye iswe twesige oMusengwa iye oKibbumba waiswe.
20.8: Abo ibo abeesiga ebyo beesiitaala ni bagwa, neye iswe tusetuka ni twemerera.
20.9: Oo Musengwa, onunule okabaka. Otwirengemu owetwakusabanga okutubbeera.

21.1: Oo Musengwa, okabaka asangaala olwʼokubba omuwa amaani. Ajaagaana, olwʼokumununula.
21.2: Omuwaire omwoyogwe ebigwegomba, era tomwimire ekyakusabire.
21.3: Era wamusisinkanire nʼomuwa enkabi egyʼamaani, nʼomuzwalisya oku mutwe engule yʼezaabbu ennongoole.
21.4: Yakusabire obwomi, nʼobumuwa nʼawangaala, nʼomuwa nʼobwomi obutawaawo.
21.5: Ekitiisyakye kinene olwʼobuwanguli obwomuwa, omuwaire obukulu nʼeitutumo.
21.6: Dala omuwaire enkabi egyʼenkalaakalira, era asangaala olwʼokubba oli naye.
21.7: Okabaka yeesiga oMusengwa. Era olwʼekisa kyʼoyo oNambulaku aMwagaagana, iye tasagaasagana.
21.9: Owewaliboneka, walibadyaka omu musyo ogwʼamaani eino. OMusengwa yalibamalirawo nakimo omu bulwabwe, era omusyo gwalibajigirica.
21.10: Walijigirica eibyaire lyabwe oku kyalo, walimalirawo nakimo eibyaire lyabwe oku kyalo.
21.11: Newankubbaire bateesa okukukolaku akabbikabbi, era newankubbaire basala enkwe, tibalyezya.
21.12: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba walibalasamu obulaso, ni bacuuka ni bairuka.
21.13: Oo Musengwa, bakugulumalyenge olwʼamaanigo. Twayembanga era ni tuwuuja obwezyebwo.

22.1: Kibbumba wange, Kibbumba wange, lwaki ondekeswire? Lwaki omba yala nga nkwekungirira okumbeera?
22.2: Oo Kibbumba wange, nkwekungirira omusana, neye nandi nʼonjiramu! Nʼobwire ni nkwekungirira amantawuumula!
22.3: Niiwe oMutukulye atyama oku ntebe yʼobwakabaka, niiwe oIsirairi ogwawuuja.
22.4: Niiwe abazeiza ogubeesiganga. Bakwesiganga era nʼobanunula.
22.5: Bakwekungiriranga era nʼobanunula. Bakwesiganga era nandi nʼobaswaza.
22.6: Neye ndi kinambulamu ooti igino, era mbulamu akabuntu. Abantu banjerega era nabuli muntu annyooma.
22.7: Nabuli moiza ambona nʼansekerera. Bandoodera minwa, ni batengeetya nʼemitwe nʼobulwa nga bakoba bati:
22.8: “Yeesiga oMusengwa, aale amulamye. Abba ngʼoMusengwa amutaka, aale amununule.”
22.9: Neye niiwe owantoire omu kida kya mama, wagirire ni nkwesiga nga nkaali nnyonka.
22.10: Okuzwa olubambyaire, niiwe omulabiriri wange, era okuzwa ngʼowebambyaire, niiwe oKibbumba wange.
22.11: Nʼolwekyo tiwamba e yala, olwʼokubba akabbikabbi kandi kumpi, era mpaawo eyambeera.
22.12: Abalabe bangi abaneeruguuliriirye ooti gate aganumi. Abalabe banzingizire ooti gate aganumi agʼamaani agʼomu kyalo kyʼe Bbasani.
22.13: Bayasamire ooti mpologoma, ompologoma aluluma ngʼalulunkanira okunyiiranyiiramu ekyayiigire.
22.14: Mpoiremu ooti maizi agasusukire, nʼamagumba gange gonagona galegeya omu nyingo. Omwoyo gwange guncemuka ooti dipoli asaanuuka.
22.15: Amaani gampoire ooti nsaka eyatikire, nʼolulumi lwange ni lwekwatira oku kiguno kyange. Ondekere nfe njabe e magombe.
22.16: Ekiziima kyʼabakola ebibbibibbi kineeruguuliriirye ooti kiziima kyʼembwa niikyo ekinzingizire. Engalo gyange nʼebigere byange babisumutyagire.
22.17: Nsuukire magumba meereere. Banningirira ni bankaliryaku amaiso.
22.18: Bagabana ebizwalo byange, era engoye gyange ni bagikubbiraku akalulu.
22.19: Neye nkwegairira iwe Musengwa, tiwamba yala. Iwe amaani gange oyanguwe okumbeera.
22.20: Onnunule eeri empiima gyʼabalabe bange, obwomi bwange obwʼomugaso eino obununule eeri embwa egyo.
22.21: Onnunule eeri amaino gʼempologoma, wabuliire okwegairira kwange nʼondamya eeri embogo.
22.22: Namanyikisyanga obukulu bwʼeriinalyo omu boluganda, era omu nkumbaana gyabwe nakuwuujanga.
22.23: Inywe omutya oMusengwa mumuwuuje. Inywe eibyaire lya Yaakobbo nywenanywena, mumugulumalye. Era inywe eibyaire lya Isirairi nywenanywena, mumuwe ekitiisya.
22.24: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba talekesula abanambulaku bubbeeri, ooba okutafaayo okukugada kwabwe. Era taleka okubafaaku, wazira ababbeera owebamukungirira.
22.25: Nakuwuujanga omu nkumbaana enene. Natuukiriryanga obweyamo bwange egyoli, omumaiso gʼabo abakutya.
22.26: Abadoobi baalyanga ni baikuta. Abo abanoonia oMusengwa bamuwuujanga. Emyoyo gyabwe gibbenge myomi emirembe nʼemirembe.
22.27: Abantu omu mawanga gonagona balimanya oMusengwa era baligaluka ni baira egyali. Ebika byonabyona omu byalo byonabyona byalimusinza.
22.28: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa, kabaka era niiye afuga amawanga gonagona.
22.29: Oleke abasuni bonabona abʼoku kyalo balye embaga era bamusinze. Era abo bonabona ababbaawo kaseera-buseera ni bafa, bakotamye emitwe gyabwe omumaisoge. Niibo abo abatayezya okubba boomi kulwabwe.
22.30: Abantu abʼomu mulembe ogwiza balimuweererya, era balikobera abʼomulembe ogwiraku ebikwata oku Musengwa.
22.31: Abantu abo balikobera abebakaali okubyala, ngʼoKibbumba owaanunula abatuukiriryebe.

23.1: OMusengwa niiye andabirira nze ontaamawe, era mpaawo ekindamba.
23.2: Andeka ni mpumulira omu kiriisiryo ekyʼeisubi eritolito. Era antwala awantu awali amaizi amateeki.
23.3: Anjiryamu amaani. Annungamya omu manzira amatuuce olwʼeriinalye.
23.4: Nʼowentambulira omu kiinamo ekiizwire endikiirya awayezya okubba okufa, tintya akabbikabbi konakona, olwʼokubba iwe obba na nze. Olugaalwo nʼomwigogwo binkuuma.
23.5: Ontegekera ekiinulo ngʼabalabe bange babona. Onjaniriza omu ngeri eyʼenjawulo ngʼonsiiga okalifuwa oku mutwe. Era oizulya ekikopo kyange du.
23.6: Dala obusaabwo nʼekisaakyo byabbanga na nze enaku gyʼobwomi bwange gyonagyona. Era naabbanga omu nyumba ya Musengwa emirembe nʼemirembe.

24.1: Ekyalo nʼebintu byonabyona ebirimu bya Musengwa. Era ekyalo nʼabantu baamu bonabona, niiye onanyerebyo.
24.2: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba niiye eyakomekere ekyalo oku nyanza enene, era nʼakigumirya oku maizi amangi agali ansi eino owʼeitakali.
24.3: Naani ogubaikirirya okuniina oku lusozi lwa Musengwa? Era naani ayinza okwemerera omu kifookye ekitukulye omwabba?
24.4: Abo bonkani abakola ebisa, era abaseega ku biibyo oKibbumba ebyasiima byonkani. Era abatawaayo obwomi bwabwe okusinza ebifaananyi, era nga tibalayira ebyobubbeyi.
24.5: Abantu abo oMusengwa abawa enkabi, era abawa obutuukirirye iye omununuli waabwe.
24.6: Abantu abatyo niibo abamunoonia, era ni bamusinza oyo oKibbumba wa Yaakobbo.
24.7: Inywe amageeti mweigule era na inywe emiryango egyʼeira mweigule, era muganye oKabaka owʼentiisya aingire.
24.8: OKabaka owʼentiisya oyo niiye onaani? Niiye oMusengwa owʼamaani era owʼobwezye. Niiye oMusengwa omuwanguli omu lutalo.
24.9: Inywe amageeti mweigule era na inywe emiryango egyʼeira mweigule, era muganye oKabaka owʼentiisya aingire.
24.10: OKabaka owʼentiisya oyo niiye onaani? Niiye oMusengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona, oyo oKabaka owʼentiisya.

25.2: Oo Kibbumba wange, niiwe oguneesiga, tiwandeka ni nswala, tiwaganya abalabe bange okumpangula.
25.3: Dala abakwesiga tiwalibaganya ni baswala, neye abo abʼenkwe obaleka ni baswala.
25.4: Oo Musengwa, ondage amanzirago, onjegesye okutambulira omu busindebwo.
25.5: Onnungamye omu mazimago era oganjegesye olwʼokubba niiwe oKibbumba omununuli wange, era eisuubi lyange libba mu niiwe okumalaku olunaku.
25.6: Oo Musengwa, oyebukirye okusaasirakwo nʼekisaakyo, ebiwalagire okuzwa eira nʼeira.
25.7: Tiwayebukirya ebikole ebibbibibbi ebyʼomu maisuka gange waire ebyobujeemu byange. Neye onjebukirirye mu kutakakwo okwenkalaakalira, oo Musengwa iwe omusa.
25.8: OMusengwa musa era mutuuce, nʼolwekyo alungamya ababbibabbi omu manzirage.
25.9: Alungamya abawombeeki omu kukola ebintu ebituuce, era nʼabeegesya okukwata amanzirage.
25.10: Amanzira ga Musengwa gonagona galimu ekisa nʼobwesigwa, eeri abo abatuukirirya endagaanoye nʼebiragirobye.
25.11: Oo Musengwa olwʼeriinalyo, onsoniye ebibbibibbi byange newankubbaire nga bingi.
25.12: Muntuki atya oMusengwa? Oyo niiye oMusengwa oguyalungamyanga omu nzira egyasaaniire okukwata.
25.13: Omuntu oyo yaabbanga nʼebyobusuni era eibyairerye lyalisikira ekyalo.
25.14: OMusengwa abba mukaagwa wʼabo abamutya, era abamanyikisya endagaanoye.
25.15: Amaiso gange ngateeka ku Musengwa okumbeera enaku gyonagyona, olwʼokubba niiye antoola omu kabbikabbi.
25.16: Oo Musengwa, ondoleku, era onsaasire, olwʼokubba nsigaire zenkani era ngada.
25.17: Ebigosi byeyongeire omu mwoyo gwange, onnunule omu kugada kunu.
25.18: Obone okugada okwendimu, nʼebigosi byange era onsoniye ebikole byange ebibbibibbi byonabyona.
25.19: Obone abalabe bange ngʼowebali abangi, obone ngʼowebanteekereku ekinakoolo ekyʼamaani.
25.20: Okuume obwomi bwange era ondamye; tiwanganya okuswala, olwʼokubba njirukira eeri niiwe okunkuuma.
25.21: Obusa bwange nʼamazima gange binkuumenge, olwʼokubba niiwe oguneesiga.
25.22: Oo Kibbumba, onunule oIsirairi ibo abantubo omu bigosi byabwe byonabyona.

26.1: Oo Musengwa, olangirire ngʼowembulaku omusango, olwʼokubba mpaawo kibbikibbi ekinkolanga, era neesiga niiwe Musengwa anambula kubuusabuusa.
26.2: Onkeme, Musengwa, ongezyesye, okebere omwoyo gwange nʼenseega yange,
26.3: olwʼokubba bulijo ekisaakyo niikyo ekineekubbembera, era ntambulira mu mazimago bulijo.
26.4: Tinkolagana nʼabantu ababbeyi, waire kweyimbya nʼabananfunsi.
26.5: Ncaawa omukumbo gwʼabakola ebibbibibbi, era tinkolagana nʼababbibabbi.
26.6: Oo Musengwa, nnaaba omu ngalo okulaga nga mbulaku musango, kaisi ni nkusinza nga neeruguulya ekyotokyo,
26.7: nga wembookooka olwembo olwʼokukwebalya era nga ntumula oku byewunyobyo ebyʼamaani ebyokola.
26.8: Oo Musengwa, nga ntaka enyumbayo omwobba, ekifo ekitiisyakyo omukibba.
26.9: Tiwamalawo obwomi bwange aamo nʼabakola ebibbibibbi, waire ngʼobwokola abatemo.
26.10: Ibo abo omu ngalo gyabwe mulimu ntegeka gya bubbibubbi, era babba mu kulya nguzi bulijo.
26.11: Neye nze nkola kiidi ekituuce. Onkwatire ekisa onnunule.
26.12: E gyendi mpaawo kabbikabbi, nawuujanga oMusengwa omu nkumbaana enene.

27.1: OMusengwa niiye ekitangaala kyʼobwomi bwange era niiye omununuli wange, kale mpaawo ogunaatyanga. OMusengwa niiye olugaga lwange, kale mpaawo ekyantisyanga.
27.2: Abantu abakola ebibbibibbi owebaiza okunnumba nga bataka okummalawo, abampalana era abalabe bange owebannumba, beesitaala ni bagwa.
27.3: Newankubbaire amaje ganzingizanga, omwoyo gwange tigwatyenge. Waire olutalo owerwansetukirangaku, nasigalanga nga ndi mugumu.
27.4: Ekintu kimo ekinsaba oMusengwa, era ekiinnoonia, kubbanga mu nyumba ya Musengwa enaku gyʼobwomi bwange gyonagyona, nga nningirira oku busaabwe, era nʼokusaba okulungamyakwe nga ndi omu Yeekaaluye.
27.5: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba omu biseera ebigosi yankuumiranga kusani e gyabba, era yambisanga omu Yeekaaluye, nʼanteeka e ngulu okwibbaale eriwanvu.
27.6: Olwo-so ni nsuna obuwanguli oku balabe bange abaneeruguuliriirye. Era ni mpaayo esadaaka omu Weemaye nga nceera olwʼeisangaalo, era nga nnyemba okuwuuja oMusengwa.
27.7: Oo Musengwa, owulire okwegairira kwange. Era onkwatire ekisa, onjiremu.
27.8: Mpulira omu mwoyo gwange ngʼonkoba oti, “Onnoonie,” Musengwa, zena njiramu omu mwoyo gwange nti, “Nakunoonianga.”
27.9: Tiwankubbira omugongo. Omu busungubwo tiwandekawo nze omuweereryawo. Niiwe oyabire ngʼombeera. Kale atyanu tiwandekawo, era tiwandekesula iwe Kibbumba omununuli wange!
27.10: Obbaabba nʼomama nʼowebandekawo, iwe Musengwa ondabirira.
27.11: Oo Musengwa, ondage enzirayo. Onnungamye omu nzirayo entuuce, olwʼokubba ndi nʼabalabe.
27.12: Tiwampaayo eeri ebyo abalabe bange ebibantakirya. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba abansibiriryaku ebyobubbeyi bansetukiireku, era beeyayira okunkola ebizizi.
27.13: Neye njikirirya nti naabba mwomi, mbone oku busa bwa Musengwa omu kyalo kyʼaboomi.
27.14: Nʼolwekyo okuumirire oMusengwa, obbe mugumu, era oiremu omwoyo. Dala okuumirire oMusengwa.

28.1: Nkwegairira iwe Musengwa eibbaale lyange omu neebisa. Tiwagaana okumpulisisya. Era singa wasirika obusiriki, nasenja abo abaabire e magombe.
28.2: Owulisisye nga nkwekungirira okunkwatira ekisa, era nga nkusaba okumbeera nga nsiirirye engalo gyange ngiringiriirye eKifokyo eKitukulye eIno.
28.3: Tiwantwalirya aamo nʼabantu ababbibabbi, era abo abakola ebibbibibbi. Batumula kusani na bainaabwe, neye nga omu myoyo gyabwe mulimu nkwe.
28.4: Obasasule olwʼebikole byabwe, era kusinzirira ku bubbibubbi bwʼebikole byabwe. Obasasule kusinzirira ku biibyo ebibakola, era obawe ebyo ebibasaanira okusuna.
28.5: Olwʼokubba tibafaayo oku bintu oMusengwa ebyakola, waire ebyo ebiyakolere nʼengalogye, yalibijigirica era tete tiyalibairyawo naire.
28.6: OMusengwa bamuwuuje, olwʼokubba awuliire nga mmwekungirira okunkwatira ekisa.
28.7: OMusengwa niiye ampa amaani, era niiye engabo yange. Mmwesiga nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona. Ambeera era omwoyo gwange ni gwizula eisangaalo, era ni nnyemba okumuwuuja.
28.8: OMusengwa niiye awa abantube amaani. Niiye obukuumi era omununuli wʼoyo oguyasukireku amafuta.
28.9: Onunule abantubo! Owe abantubo okububwo enkabi. Niiwe obbe omulabiriri waabwe, era ngʼobalera emirembe gyonagyona.

29.1: Inywe ebibbumbe ebyʼomwigulu, muwuuje oMusengwa, mumuwuuje olwʼekitiisyakye nʼolwʼamaanige.
29.2: Muwuuje oMusengwa olwʼeriinalye eryʼekitiisya. Musinze oMusengwa ngʼowaanekaaneka omu butukulyebwe.
29.3: Eigono erya Musengwa, liwulikikana oku nyanza. OKibbumba owʼekitiisya abbwatuka. Era oMusengwa awulikikana oku nyanza enene ooti kubbwatuka kwʼeraadu.
29.4: Eigono lya Musengwa lyʼamaani, era eigono lya Musengwa lyʼentiisya!
29.5: Eigono lya Musengwa livunianka emivule. OMusengwa avuniankamu emivule gyʼe Lebbanooni.
29.6: Agira ensozi gyʼe Lebbanooni ni gicuulyacuulya ooti nyana, nʼolusozi oSiriyooni ni lumadukamaduka ooti mbogo omutomuto.
29.7: Eigono lya Musengwa libbwatukira omu kumesya.
29.8: Eigono lya Musengwa litengeetya eidungu, era oMusengwa atengeetya eIdungu lyʼe Kadesi.
29.9: Eigono lya Musengwa liyuujayuuja emivule, era ni limagalicirya nakimo ebikoola byʼemisaale. Omu Yeekaaluye abantu bonabona bakubba olukero bati, “Ekitiisya kibbe eeri oKibbumba.”
29.10: OMusengwa niiye afuga amataba, era iye ngʼoKabaka afuga emirembe gyonagyona.
29.11: OMusengwa awa abantube amaani, era abawa enkabi nʼeidembe.

30.1: Oo Musengwa, nakugulumalyanga olwʼokubba onnunwire. Toganyire abalabe bange okwegooŋa oku lwange.
30.2: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange, nakwekungiriire okumbeera, era nʼondamya.
30.3: Oo Musengwa, wankuumire nandi ni nfa, walamirye obwomi bwange nandi ni njaba e magombe.
30.4: Inywe abantu ba Musengwa abatuukirirye mumwembere nga mumuwuuja. Muwuuje eriinalye iye oMutukulye.
30.5: Obusungubwe bubbaawo kaseera-buseera, neye ekisaakye kibbeerererawo. Amaliga gayezya okubbaawo obwire, neye owebuca eisangaalo ni liiza.
30.6: Owenabbaire nga ndi omu mirembe nakobere nti, “Tinaliijulukuka.”
30.7: Omu kisaakyo, Musengwa, wannywezere ni mba mugumu ooti lusozi. Neye owewankubbiire omugongo, ni mba omu kutya.
30.8: Nakwekungiriire niiwe Musengwa. Nakwegairiire niiwe Musengwa okunkwatira ekisa.
30.9: “Osunamu magobaki owenfa ni njaba e magombe? Enkungu giyezya okukuwuuja? Enkungu egyo giyezya okulaabba ngʼobwoli omwesigwa?
30.10: Oo Musengwa, ompulisisye, era onkwatire ekisa. Musengwa, ombeere.”
30.11: Okunakuwala kwange okunsuuciiryemu mabina agʼeisangaalo. Ontoireku enima nʼonjizulya eisangaalo.
30.12: Nʼolwekyo tinasirikenge, era nayembanga okukuwuuja. Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange, nakwebalyanga emirembe gyonagyona.

31.1: Oo Musengwa, niiwe ekiirukiro kyange tiwandekanga ni nswala. Omu butuukiriryebwo, ombeere era ontaase;
31.2: ontegere ekitwikyo, oyanguwe okunnunula. Obbe niiwe eibbaale lyange omu neebisa, ekikomera ekiwanvu omumba nandi ni nsuna obugosi.
31.3: Ngʼobwoli niiwe eibbaale lyange omu neebisa, era olugaga lwange, olwʼeriinalyo, onnungamye era onkubbembere.
31.4: Onkuume tinaagwa omu mutego abalabe ogubantegere, olwʼokubba njirukira giri niiwe okunkuuma.
31.5: Nkukwatisya omwoyo gwange, Musengwa onnunule, iwe oKibbumba omwesigwa.
31.6: Ocaawa abo abaweererya ebifaananyi ebinambulamu mugaso, neye nze nakwesiga niiwe Musengwa.
31.7: Nasangaalanga era ni njaagaana olwʼekisaakyo, olwʼokubba obona okugada kwange, era omaite enima endi oku mwoyo.
31.8: Tompaireyo eeri abalabe bange, neye ompaire eidembe lyʼokutambulira omu kifo kyʼomweyaayo.
31.9: Oo Musengwa, onkwatire ekisa, olwʼokubba ndi omu bugosi! Amaiso gange gatangaire olwʼokukunga, omwoyo gwange nʼomubiri gwange biwoiremu amaani.
31.10: Obwomi bwange busebengereire olwʼenima, era emyanka gyange gisalikire olwʼokukenyera. Mpoiremu amaani olwʼekibbikibbi kyange, era amagumba gange gagogobere.
31.11: Abalabe bange bonabona banjolonga era abaliranwa bange, bambityamu amaiso. Nʼabakaagwa bange batya okwigerera e gyendi. Owebansangaana omu nzira banjiruka.
31.12: Baneerabiire ooti-so nafiire, nsuukire kitagasa ooti kibya ekyatikire.
31.13: Mpulira bangi nga bantumulaku ebyakalebule, era entiisya nʼenkwata. Abalabe bange bakolera aamo omu kusala enkwe okunjita.
31.14: Neye, nze neesiga niiwe Musengwa, era nkoba nti, “Niiwe oKibbumba wange.”
31.15: Ekiseera kyʼobwomi bwange kyonakyona kiri mu ngalogyo, ondamye abalabe bange, era ondamye abanjiiga.
31.16: Ololeku omuweereryawo nʼeriiso eryʼekisa, olwʼekisaakyo onnunule.
31.17: Oo Musengwa, nkusaba tiwaganya ni nswala, Neye oleke ababbibabbi baswale, Oleke basirinkirire e magombe.
31.18: Obbuuneku eminwa gyʼababbeyi, abo abamalala era abʼeidumi abatumula okubbikubbi oku batuukirirye.
31.19: Ebisa nga bibitiriri ebyobisiire abo abakuwa ekitiisya! Obikolera baabo abairukira egyoli okubakuuma, okola ekyo abantu bonabona nga babona.
31.20: Iwe obabisa e gyobba, nʼobalamya enkwe gyʼabantu. Obakuumira nakusani eeyo e gyobba, nʼobalamya ebizumi byʼabalabe baabwe.
31.21: OMusengwa bamuwuuje, olwʼokubba yandagire ekisaakye omu ngeri eyeewunyisya, owebabbaire nga bazingizire ekibuga okunnumba.
31.22: Natiire ni nkoba nti, “OMusengwa andekerewo tali aamo nanze!” Iye yawuliire okwegairira kwange owenamwekungiriire okumbeera.
31.23: Mutakenge oMusengwa inywe nywenanywena abatuukiriryebe. OMusengwa akuuma abo abamwesiga, neye abʼamalala ababonerezera nakimo ino ngʼowebasaaniire.
31.24: Mubbe bagumu era mwiremu omwoyo inywe nywenanywena abali nʼeisuubi omu Musengwa.

32.1: Wʼenkabi iye oyo oKibbumba ogwasoniyire, oyo ogwatoireku ebibbibibbibye.
32.2: Wʼenkabi omuntu oyo oMusengwa ogwatabalira ekibbikibbi, era onambulamu obubbeyi.
32.3: Owenabisabisanga ekikole ekibbikibbi ekinkolere, nagogobanga olwʼokukunganga ni mmalaku olunaku.
32.4: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba omusana nʼobwire, wambonerezanga ino, amaani ni gampweramu nakimo ooti maizi owegakala omwibbugumu okweisana.
32.5: Awo ni nkubbutuliranga ebikole byange ebibbibibbi, era nandi ni njirayo okubisabisanga ebikole byange ebibbibibbi. Ni nkoba nti, “Oleke mbutulire oMusengwa ebikole byange ebibbibibbi.” Era wena nʼonsoniya omusango gwʼebikole byange ebibbibibbi.
32.6: Nʼolwekyo oleke nabuli mutuukirirye akwegairirenge ngʼokaali oyezya okuboneka. Dala ebigosi ebyʼamaani ooti mataba, owebyaizanga tibyamutuukengeku.
32.7: Niiwe ekiirukiro kyange, ondamya nga ndi omu bigosi abantu ni babbookooka enyembo olwʼokubba onnunwire.
32.8: OMusengwa akoba ati, “Nakuleegeranga era ni nkwegesyanga enzira egiwakwatanga. Nakulungamyanga era ni nkulabiriranga.
32.9: Timwabbanga basirusiru ooti mbalaasi ooba ooti kisolo onasigirya. Ibyo bidamba amalabuki, era babifuga nga babiteekeremu byoma omu minwa nʼemiguwa omu bifubba, nga tikiikyo tibiigerera e gyoli.”
32.10: Ababbibabbi nga bagada ino, neye ekisa kya Musengwa, kibba eeri iye oyo amwesiga.
32.11: Musangaale era mujaagaane inywe abatuukirirye, olwʼebyo oMusengwa ebyakola. Nywenanywena abamugondera muceere olwʼeisangaalo.

33.1: Abatuukirirye nywenanywena musangaale olwʼebyo oMusengwa ebyakola, mumuwuuje inywe abʼemyoyo emirongoole.
33.2: Muwuuje oMusengwa nga mumukubbira otongoli, mumwembere oku nkana eyʼenkosi eikumi.
33.3: Mumwembere olwembo oluyaaka. Mukubbe ebivuga byanywe nʼamalabuki nʼobukugu, nga muceera olwʼeisangaalo.
33.4: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa ebyatumula byʼamazima, era byonabyona ebyakola byesigwa.
33.5: Ataka butuukirirye nʼobwenkanya, era ekisaakye kiizwire ekyalo.
33.6: OMusengwa yabbumbire eigulu ngʼalagira-bulagiri, era nʼakola ebiri angulu byonabyona ngʼatumula kibono.
33.7: Akumbaania amaizi gʼomu nyanza, ni gabba ntuumo. Amaizi agʼomu nyanza oKibbumba agabisa omu bifo omwagakuumira.
33.8: Oleke ekyalo kyonakyona kitye oMusengwa, oleke abantu bonabona abʼoku kyalo bamuwe ekitiisya.
33.9: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba yabbumbire ekyalo ngʼatumula-butumuli, era yalagiire-bulagiri ekyalo ni kibbaawo.
33.10: OMusengwa amalamu amaani ebiteeso byʼabanamawanga, akaisya abantu abo ebibategeka okukola.
33.11: Neye entegeka gya Musengwa gibbeerererawo emirembe nʼemirembe. Ekyasalawo kibbeerererawo omu bantu bʼemirembe gyonagyona.
33.12: Lyʼenkabi eigwanga eriri nʼoKibbumba ogulisinza nga niiye oMusengwa, abantu abo abeyalondere okubba ababe okububwe.
33.13: OMusengwa asinzirira omwigulu nʼalingirira ansi, nʼabona abantu bonabona.
33.14: Asinzirira oku ntebeye eyʼobwakabaka nʼabona abantu bonabona abali oku kyalo.
33.15: Iye eyakolere emyoyo gyabwe bonabona, yeekeenenya ebintu byonabyona ebibakola.
33.16: Okabaka tawangula olutalo lwakubba ali nʼabʼamaje abangi, omulwani tawunuka omu lutalo lwakubba ali nʼamaani mangi.
33.17: Tiweesiga mbalaasi okuwangula olutalo, nʼowaabba wʼamaani ino, tiniiye anunula omuntu.
33.18: Neye amaiso ga Musengwa gali ku baabo abamutya. Era gali ku baabo abali nʼeisuubi omu kisaakye,
33.19: okubalamya okufa nʼokubakuuma nga boomi omu biseera byʼenzala.
33.20: Tukuumirira oMusengwa nga tuli nʼeisuubi mu niiye, iye atubbeera era engabo yaiswe.
33.21: Emyoyo gyaiswe gisangaalira mu niiye, olwʼokubba twesiga liinalye iye omutukulye.
33.22: Oo Musengwa oganye ekisaakyo kibbe na iswe, ngʼowetuli nʼeisuubi mu niiwe.

34.1: Nawuujanga oMusengwa bulijo, omunwa gwange tigwalekerengaawo okumuwuuja.
34.2: Neenyumiriziranga mu Musengwa, oleke abali omu kugada bawulire era basangaale.
34.3: Inywe na nze tugulumalye oMusengwa, oleke swenaswena aamo tuwuuje eriinalye.
34.4: Nanoonerye oMusengwa, nʼanjiramu, era yannunwire mu byonabyona ebyabbaire bintiisya.
34.5: Ibo abo abamwesiga okubabbeera basangaala, era tibaliswala kadi.
34.6: Oyo onambulaku obubbeeri yasabire era oMusengwa nʼamuwulira, nʼamununula nʼamutoola omu bigosibye byonabyona.
34.7: Abo abatya oMusengwa, omalaika wa Musengwa abakuuma nga yabeeruguulirirya, era abanunula.
34.8: Mumugezesyeku muvumbule ngʼoMusengwa obwali musa! Wʼenkabi iye oyo airukira egyali.
34.9: Mutye oMusengwa inywe abatuukiriryebe, olwʼokubba ibo abo abamutya tibadamba kintu kyonakyona.
34.10: Empologoma igyo egyʼamaani gikayaku ekyokulya enzala nʼegiruma, neye abanoonia oMusengwa, tibadamba ekintu ekisa kyonakyona.
34.11: Mwize inywe abaana bange, mumpulisisye, nabeegesya okutya oMusengwa.
34.12: Owoobba otaka okunyumirwa obwomi, nʼokuwangaala ngʼoli omu bwomi obusa;
34.13: okuume olulumirwo okutatumula ebintu ebibbibibbi, nʼomunwagwo okutatumula ebyakalebule.
34.14: Ozwe omu bikole ebibbibibbi, okolenge biidi ebisa, olwanikanenge okuleetawo eidembe era lyobbe osengereryenge.
34.15: Amaiso ga Musengwa gali ku batuukirirye, era atega amatwige eeri okukunga kwabwe owebamusaba obubbeeri.
34.16: Neye oMusengwa ayakanisya abo ibo abakola ebibbibibbi, okubonera nakimo ati abantu oku kyalo tibabeebukirya.
34.17: OMusengwa awulira abatuukirirye owebamukungirira okubabbeera. Abanunula omu bigosi byabwe byonabyona.
34.18: OMusengwa abba kumpi nʼabawoiremu amaani, anunula abawoireiremu nakimo eisuubi.
34.19: Omuntu omutuukirirye ayinza okusuna ebigosi bingi, neye oMusengwa amununula mu byonabyona.
34.20: Akuumira nakimo omutuukirirye, amagumbage nandi ni kuvunikaku kadi limo.
34.21: Ekibbikibbi kyaliita abakola ebibbibibbi, era abacaawa abatuukirirye balibasingisya omusango.
34.22: OMusengwa anunula obwomi bwʼabaweereryabe. Mpaawo kadi moiza kwabo abairukira egyali okubakuuma ogubalisingisya omusango.

35.1: Oo Musengwa, oyakane nʼabanjakanisya, olwane nʼabandwanisya.
35.2: Okwate engabo enene nʼentono, osetukiremu ombeere.
35.3: Otooleyo eisimo nʼomusabbi, olwanisye abanjiigaania. Okobe omwoyo gwange oti, “Ninze omununuliwo.”
35.4: Oleke abataka okunjita ensoni gibakwate baswale. Oleke abateesa okunkolaku akabbikabbi babakanjirirye e nyuma nga bibasobeire.
35.5: Obaduumuule ngʼompunga owaafuwa ebisusungu, era omalaika wa Musengwa ababbingirire.
35.6: Oleke enzira egibabitamu ekwate endikiirya era ebbe ntyereri, era omalaika wa Musengwa ababbingirire.
35.7: Ngʼowebantega emitego gwabwe anambula nsonga, era ni bakuula ekiina nkigwemu anambula nsonga,
35.8: oleke okujigirika kubavumbiikirirye. Era oleke bagwe omu mutego ogubantegere gubapapalye ibo abananyere. Oleke bagwe omu kiina ekibakwire bajigirike.
35.9: Awo nasangaaliranga ebyo oMusengwa ebyakola, najaagaananga olwʼokunnunula.
35.10: Nʼobwomi bwange bwonabwona nalikoba oMusengwa nti, “Oo Musengwa, naani aali nga iwe! Onunula omunafu eeri amukiraku eino amaani, nʼonunula omudoobi nʼadamba, eeri abamunyagaku ebibye.”
35.11: Abajulizi abʼobubbeyi basetuka ni bannumiriza ebintu ebintamaiteku.
35.12: Obwemba nkola ebisa bansasulamu bibbibibbi, omwoyo gwange ni gusigala nga munakuwali.
35.13: Neye ibo owebabbaire nga balwaire, neesibire ebibenga, ni neewombeka ni nsiiba. Owetinasunire okunjiramu okusaba kwange,
35.14: ni mba omu nima oti-so nkunga mukaagwa wange ooba muganda wange. Ni nkotamya omutwe nga ndi omu nima ooti-so nkunga mama.
35.15: Neye nze owenagwire omu bigosi, basangaire, ni bakumbaana okunduula. Nʼabentamaite ni bankubba nga tibalekeraawo.
35.16: Ni banduula ooti bantu abatatya oKibbumba owebakola, ni bannyayiya.
35.17: Oo Musengwa, walituuca di okulingirira-obulingiriri? Ondamye abalabe abannumba. Onunule obwomi bwange obwʼomugaso eino eeri empologoma egyo.
35.18: Nakwebaliryanga omu nkumbaana enene. Nakuwuujiranga omumaiso gʼabantu abangi.
35.19: Tiwaganya abalabe bange abansibiriryaku okujaagaana olwa kumpangula. Era abancaawa anambula nsonga, tiwabaganya okwegooŋa nga ndi munakuwali.
35.20: Tibatumula ebyʼeidembe, neye bayiiya byʼokusibirirya ku bantu abʼeidembe oku kyalo.
35.21: Bannumiriza nga baceera bati, “Ee! Ee! Tweboneireku nʼagaiswe ngʼakikola!”
35.22: Oo Musengwa, iwe ebyo obibona, kale tiwasirika. Musengwa, tiwamba e yala.
35.23: OSetukiremu era ondwanirire! Osale omusango gwange iwe oKibbumba wange, era Musengwa wange.
35.24: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange, ngʼobwoli mutuukirirye olangirire ngʼowembulaku omusango, era tiwaganya abalabe okwegooŋa oku lwange.
35.25: Tiwabaganya okukoba omu myoyo gyabwe bati, “Otyo, tusunire ekitubbaire tutaka!” Ooba okukoba bati, “Oyo tumumalire!”
35.26: Oleke bonabona abegooŋa olwʼebigosi byange, ensoni gibakwate baswale era bacankalane. Era oleke bonabona abaneekudumbaliryaku, baizule ensoni baswaluke.
35.27: Oleke abasiima nsinge omusango baceere olwʼeisangaalo, era bajaagaane. Era oleke bakobenge bulijo bati, “OMusengwa bamugulumalye, iye asiima okubona omuweereryawe ngʼawangwire.”
35.28: Olwo natumulanga oku butuukiriryebwo era nakuwuujanga okumalaku olunaku.

36.1: Ekibbikibbi kitumulira omu mwoyo gwʼomuntu omubbimubbi. Ekyʼokuwa oKibbumba ekitiisya kibabulamu.
36.2: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba yeewaana iye onanyere, nʼaseega ati oKibbumba tiyalibona ekibbikibbikye nʼamunenya.
36.3: Ebibono ebyatumula bibbibibbi era bya bubbeyi. Yakomerye okukola ebintu ebyʼamalabuki era ebisa.
36.4: Nʼowaabba oku buliribwe, afumintiriza kukola bibbibibbi. Yeekanyangulira mu mpisagye embiibbi, nandi nʼacaawa ekibbikibbi.
36.5: Oo Musengwa, ekisaakyo kituuka okwigulu, obwesigwabwo butuuka oku bireri.
36.6: Obutuukiriryebwo bubbeerererawo ooti nsozi empanvu, obwenkanyabwo bwabirira ooti lwabi lwʼenyanza. Oo Musengwa, olabirira abantu nʼebisolo.
36.7: Oo Musengwa, ekisaakyo nga kyʼebbeeyi ino! Abantu bonabona basuna obukuumi mu kiiriirye kyʼebiyayabyo.
36.8: Balya ebyokulya ebibitiriri ebyʼomu nyumbayo ni baikuta. Obawa ebyokunywa ebyesiimisya ebyomusuko ooti mwiga ogukulumuka.
36.9: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba niiwe onanzwa wʼobwomi, era omu kitangaalakyo mutwezyerya okubona ekitangaala.
36.10: Weeyongere okulaga okutaka okutakoma eeri abo abakumaite, nʼokukolera abalongoole omu myoyo, ebisa.
36.11: Tiwaganya abʼamalala okunnumba waire ababbibabbi okumbinga.
36.12: Obone, abakola ebibbibibbi owebagwire! Babakubbyagiirewo era tibayezya okusetuka.

37.1: Tiwaabbanga nʼensaalwa olwʼababibabbi, waire okugongera olwʼabo abakola ebitali bisa.
37.2: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba bawaawo mangu ooti isubi erikala, era bafa ooti bimera ebikala.
37.3: Weesigenge oMusengwa era okolenge ebintu ebisa, olwo waabbanga nʼeidembe oku kyalo.
37.4: Eisangaalo olinoonienge mu Musengwa, era yakuwanga ebyo omwoyogwo ebigwegomba.
37.5: Nabuli kyokola okiwengeyo eeri Musengwa, omwesigenge, era yakubbeeranga.
37.6: Yalagisyanga obutuukiriryebwo ni buboneka ooti isana erizwayo, nʼobwenkanyabwo ni bweraga ooti kasana kʼesaawa omukaaga.
37.7: OSirinkirirenge omumaiso ga Musengwa, okuumirirenge nʼobuguminkiriza iye ekiyakola. Tiwafangayo olwʼabakola ebibbibibbi ni babitamu, era abatuukirirya entegeka gyabwe egyʼokukola obubbibubbi.
37.8: Tiwasunguwalanga era tiwaabbanga nʼobulwa, era tiwaabbanga wʼensire. Ebyo bizwamu kukola kibbikibbi.
37.9: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba abakola ebibbibibbi balibajigirica. Neye abeesiga oMusengwa, balisikira ekyalo.
37.10: Omu kaseera katyai, ababbibabbi balibba bawulawo, nga nʼobwobanoonia tobabona.
37.11: Neye ibo abʼeiwooyo balisikira ekyalo, era balibba mwidembe eribitiriri.
37.12: Ababbibabbi basala enkwe okukola abatuukirirye akabbikabbi, era ni babanyayiya.
37.13: Neye oMusengwa asekerera ababbibabbi abo, olwʼokubba amaite ati olunaku olwʼokubajigiriciryaku lwiza.
37.14: Ababbibabbi basowolayo empiima gyabwe, ni baleega obulaso bwabwe okwita abadoobi nʼabanambulaku obubbeeri, nʼokwita abalongoole omu myoyo.
37.15: Neye ababbibabbi abo, balibaita nga bakolesya empiima gyabwe ginanyereegyo. Nʼobulaso bwabwe balibuvuna.
37.16: Ebintu ebitono omutuukirirye ebyabba nabyo, bikiraku obusuni bwʼababbibabbi abangi.
37.17: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa yalimaliramu nakimo ababbibabbi amaani, neye akuuma abatuukirirye.
37.18: OMusengwa alabirira abanambulaku ekyokubanenya, era obusika bwabwe bwalibba bwʼemirembe gyonagyona.
37.19: Omu biseera ebyʼakabbikabbi tibalibba omu bulumi. Nʼomu biseera ebyʼenzala, baabbanga nʼebyokulya bingi.
37.20: Neye ababbibabbi balijigirika. Abalabe ba Musengwa baliwaawo ooti bimuli byʼomu kigona ebikala. Baliwaawo ooti mwosi.
37.21: Ababbibabbi beekoopa nandi ni basasula. Neye abatuukirirye bagaba nʼomwoyo gumo.
37.22: Abo oMusengwa abaawa enkabi balisikira ekyalo. Neye abo abaalaama balijigirika.
37.23: OMusengwa alungamya omuntu omu nzira entuuce, era akuuma abo abamusangaalya.
37.24: Nʼowebeesiitaala tibagwa, olwʼokubba oMusengwa abakwatirira oku ngalo.
37.25: Nabbaire mutomuto era atyanu nkairiire, neye timbonangaku omutuukirirye oMusengwa ogwalekesula, waire kubona abaanabe nga basabirirya ekyokulya.
37.26: Bulijo agaba nʼomwoyo gumo, era akoopa abandi, era abaanabe babba nʼenkabi.
37.27: Ozwe omu kukola ebibbibibbi, okolenge bikole ebisa, awo walibba nʼobutyami omu kyalo emirembe nʼemirembe.
37.28: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa ataka bwenkanya, era talekesula abamwesiga. Abakuuma emirembe gyonagyona. Neye eibyaire lyʼababbibabbi, balirijigirica.
37.29: Abatuukirirye balisikira ekyalo, era ni bakityamamu emirembe gyonagyona.
37.30: Omuntu omutuukirirye ebimuzwamu bibba byʼamalabuki, era atumula byobwenkanya.
37.31: Akwata amateeka ga Kibbumbawe omu mwoyogwe, era taliiba okugazwaku.
37.32: Ababbibabbi bagonerera abantu abatuukirirye, nga banoonia okubaita.
37.33: Neye oMusengwa tiyaliganya abatuukirirye okugwa omu bwezye bwʼababbibabbi abo, waire okubaleka ni babasingisya omusango omu kooti.
37.34: Weesigenge oMusengwa, era ogonderenge ebiragirobye. Yalikugulumalya, nʼosikira ekyalo. Era walibona ababbibabbi nga babajigirica.
37.35: Naboine omuntu omubbimubbi era omukambwe nga nabuli kimo kimwabira nakusani ooti musaale ogwamerere omwitakali erijimu.
37.36: Neye tete owenabitireyo, yabbaire takaali aboneka. Namunoonerye, neye nga taboneka.
37.37: Weetegereze omuntu onambulaku ekyokumunenya, era weekenenye omuntu omulongoole omu mwoyo. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba enkomerero yʼomuntu oyo gibba mirembe.
37.38: Neye bonabona abakola ebibbibibbi balibajigirica omulundi gumo, ababbibabbi balikomenkereza nga bajigirikire.
37.39: OMusengwa anunula abatuukirirye, era niiye olugaga lwabwe omu biseera ebyʼebigosi.
37.40: OMusengwa ababbeera nʼabanunula. Abanunula okuzwa omwifuge lyʼababbibabbi nʼabalamya, olwʼokubba bairukira eeri niiye okubakuuma.

38.1: Oo Musengwa, tiwaannenyera omu busungubwo, waire kumbonerezera omu bulwabwo.
38.2: Onsumutire nʼobulasobwo, era nʼonkubba nʼengaloyo ni ngwa.
38.3: Olwʼobusungubwo mpulira obulumi omu mubiri gwange gwonagwona, mpulira amagumba gange gameketa olwʼekibbikibbi kyange.
38.4: Ebibbibibbi byange binzitoowereire, biri ooti mugugu ogutasetulikika.
38.5: Amabbwa gange gavundire era gafunya olwʼobusirusiru bwange.
38.6: Ndi omu bulumi bungi bungederemu ino, nsada ngankunga okumalaku olunaku.
38.7: Omu maniko munjocererya, mpulira obulumi omu mubiri gwange gwonagwona.
38.8: Gampoire era ngondagondeire nakimo, nkenyera olwʼenima egindinayo oku mwoyo.
38.9: Oo Musengwa, ebineetaaga byonabyona obimaite, nʼokukenyera kwange okuwulira.
38.10: Omwoyo gwange gupumpa ino, era amaani gampoiremu. Amaiso gange gatangaire.
38.11: Olwʼamabwa gange, abakaagwa bange nʼabaliranwa bange tibaigerera e gyendi, nʼabaganda bange bamba yala.
38.12: Abataka okunjita bantega emitego, abataka okuntucaaku akabbikabbi bateesa okummalawo. Basiiba kunsalira nkwe.
38.13: Neye nze ndi ooti masiipe, ooti-so timpulira, era ooti bbubbu, ooti-so tintumula.
38.14: Nsuukire ooti masiipe atayezya okuwulira, era ooti bbubbu atayezya okwiramu.
38.15: Oo Musengwa, niiwe ogunsuubiriramu, Musengwa iwe oKibbumba wange, niiwe owanjiramu.
38.16: Nkusaba tiwaganya abalabe bange okwegooŋa, waire okujaagaana olwa kumpangula.
38.17: Nkusaba ntyo olwʼokubba ndi kumpi kugwa, era ndi omu bulumi obutakoma.
38.18: Mbutula ebikole byange ebibbibibbi, era ni nnakuwala ino olwʼebibbibibbi byange.
38.19: Abalabe bange bali omu bwomi busa era bʼamaani. Nʼabancaawa anambula nsonga babitiriri.
38.20: Ibo abenkolera ebisa, bansasulamu bikole bibbibibbi. Bampalana olwʼokubba ndwanikana okukola ebikole ebisa.
38.21: Oo Musengwa, tiwandekesula. Kibbumba wange, tiwamba yala.
38.22: Oyanguwe okumbeera, Musengwa niiwe omununuli wange.

39.1: Nakobere nti, “Neegenderezanga omu mpisa gyange, era nakuumanga olulumi lwange nandi ni ntumula ebibbibibbi. Nasirikanga obutabbaaku nʼekintumula kasita abakola ebibbibibbi babbanga baliwo.”
39.2: Neye owenasirikire nandi ni nnyega, era nandi ni ntumulaku waire ku kintu ekisa kyonakyona, enima yange yeeyongeireku.
39.3: Omwoyo gwange ni gucemuka. Eginakomerye okufumintiriza, nʼomwoyo gwange gigwakomerye okucemuukirira. Okwo kunasinziriire ni nkoba nti,
39.4: “Musengwa, onkobere entuuco gyʼokufa kwange, nʼeibbanga erinawangaala. Ommanyikisye obwomi bwange owebwakomera.”
