39.5: Wakolere obwomi bwange ni bubba bumpi ooti kigalabaayo. Akaseera akenaliwangaala, mpaawo wekenkana omumaisogo. Dala obwomi bwa buli muntu bwa kaseera katono ooti mwotagwe ogwayeera,
39.6: buli ooti kiriirye, tibubba omu kifo ekimo! Byonabyona ebyakola bimufeera bwereere. Akumbaania obugaiga nga tamaite eyalibba onanyerebwo.
39.7: Neye atyanu Musengwa, nsuubire niki? Eisuubi lyange liri mu niiwe.
39.8: Onnunule omu bibbibibbi byange byonabyona, tiwandeka abasirusiru ni bansekerera.
39.9: Tinatumule, nasirika-busiriki, olwʼokubba niiwe owatakire otyo.
39.11: Owobonereza omuntu ngʼomunenya olwʼebibbibibbibye, ojigirica ebyataka ooti kiwuuka niikyo ekibiriire. Dala nabuli muntu mwota-woota.
39.12: Oo Musengwa owulire okusaba kwange, era owulisisye okwenkunga kwange ombeere. Tiwaneebityaku nga ndi omu maliga! Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba ndi musenzewo era munamawanga, ngʼabazeiza bange bonabona owebabbaire.
39.13: Ondeke nsangaaleku tete, nga nkaali okuzwa oku kyalo era nga nkaali okugoterera.

40.1: Nakuumiriire nʼokuguminkiriza oMusengwa okumbeera, yeetegerezere nʼawulira owenamwekungiriire.
40.2: Yantoire omu kiina ekyʼentiisya, nʼomwitonsi nʼanjinululya omu lutente, nʼanjemererya okwibbaale, ni ntambula nga ndi mugumu.
40.3: Yampaire olwembo oluyaaka, olwʼokuwuujanga iye oKibbumba waiswe. Bangi babonanga ekyo ni batya, ni beesiganga oMusengwa.
40.4: Wʼenkabi iye oyo eyeesiga oMusengwa, era atakola omukumbo nʼabamalala, waire nʼabasinza ebifaananyi.
40.5: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange mpaawo akwagaagana. Ebyewuunyisya bingi ebyonkoleire. Ebintu ebyotutegekeire bibitiriri okubibala. Nʼowengezyaku okubitumulaku, timpezya nʼokubimalayo!
40.6: Esadaaka nʼebyo ebibawaayo, tiniibyo omwoyogwo ebigwegombere, neye wanjigwirye amatwi mpulire. Esadaaka egibooca yonayona nʼeyo eyʼokusoniya ekikole ekibbikibbi, tiwabisiimire.
40.7: Kagira nkoba nti, “Ngonu, ndi aanu, njizire okukola ebyotaka, ngʼeKiwandiike owekintumulaku.
40.8: Oo Kibbumba wange, nsangaala okukola ebyotaka, era nkwata amateekago omu mwoyo gwange.”
40.9: Omu nkumbaana enene nnangirira ngʼobwotununula. Tindeka okukitumulaku, ngʼobwokimaite Musengwa.
40.10: Timbisabisa omu mwoyo gwange ebikwata oku butuukiriryebwo. Nnangirira nti oli mwesigwa, era onunula. Omu nkumbaana enene, tindeka kubakobera oku kisaakyo nʼobwesigwabwo.
40.11: Oo Musengwa tiwakomya okunkwatira ekisaakyo. Ekisaakyo nʼamazimago binkuumenge bulijo.
40.12: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba ebigosi ebineeruguuliriirye kibbiiryo, tibibalika. Njizwire ebibbibibbi bingi, tibikaali binjikirirya okubona. Bikiraku enziiri egyʼoku mutwe gwange obungi. Era mpoiremu amaani.
40.13: Oo Musengwa, oikirirye okunnunula. Oo Musengwa oyanguwe okumbeera.
40.14: Oleke abo bonabona abataka okunjita, baswale era batabuketabuke. Nʼabo abanoonia okujigirica obwomi bwange, babakanjirirye nga baswaire.
40.15: Oleke abo abansekerera, ensisi ebakwate olwʼokuswala kwabwe.
40.16: Oleke abo bonabona abakunoonia bajaagaane era basangaale oku lulwo. Abo abasiima obununulibwo, bakobenge bulijo bati, “OMusengwa bamugulumalye.”
40.17: Neye nze ndi mudoobi era ndamba, nsaba oMusengwa anseegeku. Niiwe ombeera era niiwe onnunula. Oo Kibbumba wange, tiwaalwawo!

41.1: Wʼenkabi iye oyo alumirwa abadoobi, ebigosi owebimutuukaku, oMusengwa amununula.
41.2: OMusengwa amukuuma nʼamuwa obwomi, amuwa enkabi omu kyalo, tamuwaayo omu bwezye bwʼabalabebe.
41.3: OMusengwa amubbeera nga mulwaire ali oku buliri, nʼamulamirya nakimo.
41.4: Nze nkoba nti, “Oo Musengwa nakolere ekikole ekibbikibbi omumaisogo, onkwatire ekisa era ondamye.”
41.5: Abalabe bange batumula nga basairirya bati, “Yalifa di ni bamwerabira?”
41.6: Befaanania ooti baiza kumbona, neye omu kubba aawo bannooniaku lugambo, era owebazwawo baaba ni balusasya.
41.7: Bonabona abancaawa baweweetanganira ebinfaaku. Ebikira obubbibubbi bibantakirya.
41.8: Bakoba bati, “Obulwaire obwalwaire, tibwakulama, tiyalisetuka oku buliri obwo bbe.”
41.9: Nʼomukaagwa wange, oyo oguneesiga eino, ogundya naye, ancuukiire.
41.10: Neye iwe Musengwa, onkwatire ekisa, onsetule, kaisi njezye okubasasula.
41.11: Mmaite nti onsiima, olwʼokubba toganyire abalabe bange okumpangula.
41.12: Okuumire obwomi bwange olwʼokubba nkola ebituuce. Onkuumiire omumaisogo emirembe gyonagyona.
41.13: OMusengwa oyo oKibbumba wa Isirairi bamuwuujenge. Bamuwuujenge emirembe nʼemirembe. Amiina era Amiina.

42.1: Ngʼokimaadu owaaluga nʼenyonta yʼamaizi, omwoyo gwange gwona gutyo weguluga okutaka oKibbumba.
42.2: Omwoyo gwange guyayaanira oKibbumba oyo oKibbumba onanyere obwomi. Nalyaba di okusinza oKibbumba?
42.3: Nkunga omusana nʼobwire era agenkunga gennywa, neenu ngʼabalabe bange bambuulya okumalaku olunaku bati, “OKibbumbawo ali yaina?”
42.4: Omwoyo gwange gwizula enima oweneebukirya ebyʼeira, ngʼowenayabanga nʼekiyindi kyʼabantu, ni nabeekubbemberamu nga twaba omu nyumba ya Kibbumba, nga tuceera olwʼeisangaalo era tubbookooka okumuwuuja, omu kiyindi nga tujaguza.
42.5: Kale atyanu lwaki omwoyo gwange gunakuwala? Era lwaki omwoyo gwange gweraliikirira? Oleke eisuubi lyange nditeeke mu Kibbumba, olwʼokubba nalimuwuuja tete, Iye omununuli wange era oKibbumba wange.
42.6: Omwoyo gwange gunakuwaire! Kagira mmuseegaku nga ndi omu kyalo kyʼe Yoludaani nʼoku Lusozi oKerumooni nʼoku Lusozi oMizali.
42.7: Olwabi lwʼamaizi lweta olwinaye, olwʼokuyiriitira kwʼamaizigo agawolomboga. Amaizigo ageedumbya gaika, nʼamayengogo gonagona ni bimmooma!
42.8: OMusengwa andaga ekisaakye omusana, kaisi obwire ni mmwembera, nga nsaba oKibbumba oyo ampa obwomi.
42.9: Nkoba oKibbumba iye eibbaale lyange omu neebisa, nti, “Lwaki oneerabiire? Lwaki mbaawo nga nkunga olwʼabalabe bange okungadya?”
42.10: Ebizumi byʼabalabe bange bindumirirya ooti magumba niigo agammeketa. Basiiba bambuulya bati, “OKibbumbawo ali yaina?”
42.11: Kale atyanu lwaki omwoyo gwange gunakuwala? Era lwaki omwoyo gwange gweraliikirira? Oleke eisuubi lyange nditeeke mu Kibbumba, olwʼokubba nalimuwuuja tete, Iye omununuli wange era oKibbumba wange.

43.1: Oo Kibbumba, olangirire ngʼowembulaku omusango, era ondwanirire eeri abantu abatakutya, Onnunule eeri abo ababbeyi era ababbibabbi.
43.2: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba Kibbumba njirukira eeri niiwe okunkuuma. Lwaki ondekeswire? Lwaki mbaawo nga nkunga olwʼabalabe bange okungadya?
43.3: Osindike ekitangaalakyo nʼamazimago, oganye binnungamye, era bintuuce oku lusozirwo olutukulye, omu kifo ekyo e gyobba.
43.4: Awo kaisi njabe oku kyoto kya Kibbumba, eeri oKibbumba wange iye eisangaalo lyange eribitiriri. Era nakuwuujanga nga nkukubbira otongoli, oo Kibbumba, iwe oKibbumba wange.
43.5: Kale atyanu lwaki omwoyo gwange gunakuwala? Era lwaki omwoyo gwange gweraliikirira? Oleke eisuubi lyange nditeeke mu Kibbumba, olwʼokubba nalimuwuuja tete, Iye omununuli wange era oKibbumba wange.

44.1: Oo Kibbumba, twewuliriireku nʼagaiswe, era abazeiza baiswe batulonseirye ebiwakolere omu mulembe gwabwe, omu biseera ebyʼeira.
44.2: Ngʼokolesya obwezyebwo wabbingire abanamawanga, ekyalo kyabwe nʼokiwa abazeiza baiswe. Wasasaigwire abantu abanamawanga, neye abazeiza baiswe nʼobawa eisagaaluko.
44.3: Abazeiza baiswe tibawangwire ekyalo ekyo nga bakolesya mpiima gyabwe, era tibasunire obuwanguli nga bakolesya maani gaabwe, neye gabbaire maanigo nʼobwezyebwo, era waabbanga nabo olwʼokubba wabbaire obasiima.
44.4: Niiwe oKabaka wange era oKibbumba wange, awa oYaakobbo obuwanguli.
44.5: Okubitira mwiwe tuwangula abalabe baiswe, omu liinalyo ni twemyagira ansi abatusetukiraku.
44.6: Tineesiga akalaso kange, waire empiima yange okundamya.
44.7: Neye niiwe otununula eeri abalabe baiswe, nʼoswaza abatucaawa.
44.8: Twenyumirizanga mu niiwe Kibbumba okumalaku olunaku, era twawuujanga liinalyo emirembe gyonagyona.
44.9: Neye atyanu otulekeswire, nʼotuleka ni tuswala, era tokaali weekubbembera amaje gaiswe omu lutalo.
44.10: Watulekere abalabe baiswe ni batwiririrya, era abo abatucaawa ni banyaga nʼebintu byaiswe.
44.11: Watuwaireyo batwite ooti ntaama egibaaba okusala, nʼotusalaanicirya omu banamawanga.
44.12: Watundire abantubo dondolo era nandi nʼogobamu.
44.13: Otusuucirye kizumi eeri abaliranwa baiswe, era ibo abo abatweruguuliriirye batujerega era batunyooma.
44.14: Otusuucirye majwalo omu banamawanga, era tuli nseko gyʼabantu abo.
44.15: Nswaluka okumalaku olunaku, era njizwire nsoni,
44.16: olwʼebibono byʼabo abanjolonga, era abanzuma, nʼolwabalabe nʼabo abanoonia okunyaaŋa.
44.17: Ebyo byonabyona bitutuukireku newankubbaire nga titukwerabiire, waire okumenya endagaano egiwakolere na iswe.
44.18: Emyoyo gyaiswe tigikuzwangaku, era titujeemerangaku ebiragirobyo.
44.19: Neye era watusasaiguliire awali emisege, nʼotuleka omu ndiikirya awayezya okubba okufa.
44.20: Singa twerabiire eriina lya Kibbumba waiswe, ooba ni tusinza okibbumba owʼabanamawanga,
44.21: ekyo Kibbumba wandikizwire, olwʼokubba iwe omanya ebyama ebibba omu mwoyo.
44.22: Neye era nabuli lunaku tubba mu kabbikabbi ka kutwita oku lulwo, batubona ngʼabasaanira kufa ooti ntaama ogubatwala omu kibbaagiro.
44.23: Oo Musengwa, olamuke! Lwaki ogona? Osisimuke, totulekesula emirembe nʼemirembe!
44.24: Lwaki otukubbira omugongo? Lwaki tofaayo oku kunyolwa kwaiswe nʼokutugadya?
44.25: Batudyakire omu nkungu, ni batumigirirya ansi okwitakali.

45.1: Omwoyo gwange gwizwire ebibono ebisa nga nnyembera okabaka olwembo olunjiyire. Olulumi lwange lutomboolya ebibono ooti kalaamu yʼomuwandiiki omukugu.
45.2: Oli muŋoono okukiraku abasaiza bonabona, era oli mutumuli omusa, olwʼokubba oKibbumba akuwaire enkabi egyʼenkalaakalira.
45.3: Weesibe empiimayo omu nkende iwe omulwani owʼamaani. Oli wʼekitiisya era oli mukulu.
45.4: Omu kitiisyakyo ngʼoli oku mbalaasi owangulenge olwʼokulwanirira amazima, nʼobuwombeeki nʼobutuukirirye. Oleke engaloyo endiiro, ekole ebyewunyisya.
45.5: Obulasobwo obwogi busumute emyoyo gyʼabalabebo, Owangule abanamawanga babbe ansi wʼobwezyebwo.
45.6: Obwakabaka oKibbumba obwakuwaire bwakubbaawo emirembe nʼemirembe. Okufugakwo omu bwakabakabwo kutambulira ku bwenkanya.
45.7: Otaka ebikole byʼobutuukirirye nʼocaawa obubbibubbi. Kagira nze oKibbumba, oyo oKibbumbawo, nkusukireku amafuta ni nkuwa eisangaalo erikira eryʼabandi bonabona.
45.8: Amaganduula gaanywe gonagona gafunya okalifuwa ogubeeta omiira, nʼogondi bati alowe, nʼokaisiya. Ebivuga byʼenkosi ebibakubba bikusangaalisya ngʼoli omu mbirigyo egibajolijirye nʼamasyanka.
45.9: Omu bakali abʼekitiisya abakuweererya mulimu abambeiza, omugolewo ali oku lubba olwʼengaloyo endiiro azwaire ebyʼamajolobero ebyʼezaabbu yʼOfiri.
45.10: Mumbeiza, ontegere ekitwi, owulisisye era otwale ebinkukoba; weerabire abantu bʼewaanywe nʼabʼekikaakyo.
45.11: Obusiipoonobwo bwasikirizanga okabaka. Omugonderenge olwʼokubba niiye omusengwawo.
45.12: Abantu bʼe Tiiro balikuleetera ebirabo, abasuni balikwegudyera.
45.13: Omumbeiza ali omu Lubiri, omu kitiisyakye ekizwalokye bakijolijirye nʼewuuzi egyʼezaabbu.
45.14: Azwaire ekizwalo ekibatungire omu wuuzi gyʼerangi egyʼenjawulo, bamutwala eeri okabaka, ngʼemperya enguna gimuzwaku e nyuma.
45.15: Babatwala nga bali omwisangaalo nʼokujaagaana ni baingira omu lubiri lwa kabaka.
45.16: Abaanabo balibba bakabaka ngʼabazeiza baabwe, walibasuuca bakabaka omu kyalo kyonakyona.
45.17: Abantu beebukiryanga eriinalyo emirembe gyonagyona olwʼolwembo lwange. Era abantu bakuwuujanga emirembe nʼemirembe.

46.1: OKibbumba niiye ekiirukiro kyaiswe era niiye amaani gaiswe, bulijo abbaawo okutubbeera omu bugosi.
46.2: Nʼolwekyo titwatyenge waire ekyalo kyatengeetanga, nʼensozi ni gyemuma omu lwabi lwʼenyanza;
46.3: waire amaizi gʼenyanza gawooganga ni gafuuja, waire ensozi gyatengeetanga olwʼokwedumbya kwʼamaizi ago.
46.4: Waliwo omwiga, ngʼemyala gyagwo gireeta eisangaalo omu kibuga kya Kibbumba, ikyo ekifo ekitukulye, oNambulaku aMwagaagana e gyabba.
46.5: OKibbumba abba mu kibuga ekyo, kale tibalikijigirica, oKibbumba Yakirwaniriranga ngʼobwire bwatira okuca.
46.6: OKibbumba atumula nʼeigono eryata amatwi ooti kubbwatuka kwʼeraadu, amawanga ni geesisiwala, obwakabaka ni bugwa, ekyalo ni kinyolokoka.
46.7: OMusengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona ali na iswe. OKibbumba wa Yaakobbo niiye ekiirukiro kyaiswe.
46.8: Mwize mubone oMusengwa ebyakola, mubone ebyewuunyisya ebyakola oku kyalo.
46.9: Akomya entalo omu kyalo kyonakyona. Avunavunamu obulaso, nʼajigirica amasimo, nʼayoca engabo nʼomusyo.
46.10: Nʼakoba ati, “Mwikaikane! Mumanye muti ninze oKibbumba ogubagulumalyanga omu mawanga gonagona. Gubagulumalyanga omu kyalo kyonakyona.”
46.11: OMusengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona ali na iswe, oKibbumba wa Yaakobbo niiye ekiirukiro kyaiswe.

47.1: Mukubbe omu ngalo bantu inywe abʼamawanga gonagona, Mubbookooke enyembo gyʼeisangaalo nga muwuuja oKibbumba,
47.2: olwʼokubba oMusengwa oNambulaku aMwagaagana wʼentiisya. Niiye oKabaka omukulu afuga ekyalo kyonakyona.
47.3: Yatuwanguliire abʼamawanga, nʼatwezyesya okufuga amawanga ago.
47.4: Yatulondeire ekyalo ekitulimu okubba obusika bwaiswe, ekitwesiimisya iswe eibyaire lya Yaakobbo abaasiima.
47.5: OKibbumba ayabire e ngulu ngʼabantu webaceera olwʼeisangaalo. OMusengwa ayabire e ngulu ngʼabantu webafuwa amakondeere.
47.6: Mwembe okuwuuja oKibbumba, mwembe okumuwuuja. Mwembe okuwuuja oKabaka waiswe, mwembe okumuwuuja.
47.7: Olwʼokubba oKibbumba niiye oKabaka wʼekyalo kyonakyona, mumwembere enyembo egimuwuuja.
47.8: OKibbumba afuga amawanga gonagona, ngʼatyaime oku ntebeye eyʼobwakabaka entukulye.
47.9: Abafugi bʼamawanga bakumbaine nʼabantu ba Kibbumba wa Ibbulaimu. Olwʼokubba oKibbumba niiye afuga abʼekubemberi bʼoku kyalo, oKibbumba bamugulumalyenge ino.

48.1: OMusengwa niiye omukulu era asaaniire okumuwuuja ino, omu kibuga kya Kibbumba waiswe, oku lusozirwe olutukulye.
48.2: OSayuuni lusozi oluboneka nakusani omu bugulumali, isangaalo lyʼekyalo kyonakyona. Lugulumali ooti lusozi oZafoni, era oku Sayuuni niikwo okuli ekibuga iye oKabaka oMukulu ekyafuga.
48.3: OKibbumba ali omu minaala egyʼekibuga ekyo, yeemanyikisirye nga niiye olugaga lwakyo.
48.4: Abakabaka bagaitire amaje gaabwe ni baizira aamo okulumba ekibuga ekyo,
48.5: neye owebakiboine beewuninkiriire, ensisi nʼebakwata era ni bakangirira.
48.6: Ensisi yabakwatiire eeyo, era ni babba nʼobulumi ngʼobwʼomukali alumwa.
48.7: Wabajigiricirye ngʼompunga azwa e buzwaisana, owaajigirica amaato gʼe Talusiisi.
48.8: Ebitwawuliranga-obuwuliri, atyanu tubiboine, omu kibuga kya Kibbumba waiswe, omu kibuga kya Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona, ekyakuuma emirembe gyonagyona.
48.9: Oo Kibbumba, nga tuli omu Yeekaaluyo tufumintiriza oku kisaakyo.
48.10: Oo Kibbumba, eriinalyo ngʼobweriri erikulu, batyo webakuwuuja nabuli wantu oku kyalo. Ofuga mu bwenkanya.
48.11: Oleke abantu bʼoku Lusozi oSayuuni basangaale. Oleke abantu bʼomu bibuga bya Yuda bajaagaane, olwʼokulamulakwo okwʼobwenkanya.
48.12: Mutambule mumaleku oSayuuni, mubale eminaala gyamu.
48.13: Mwetegereze ebikomera byakyo, mwetegereze engaga gyakyo, mwezye okulonserya abʼomulembe ogwaliirawo.
48.14: OKibbumba oyo niiye oKibbumba waiswe emirembe gyonagyona, niiye eyatulungamyanga paka owetwalifa.

49.1: Muwulisisye kinu abantu nywenanywena. Mutege amatwi nywenanywena abatyami bʼoku kyalo.
49.3: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba ebibono ebintumula byʼamalabuki, era ebinfumintiriza omu mwoyo gwange bitegerekeka.
49.4: Njaba okwetegereza olugero, nalusonzola nga ndwembera oku tongoli.
49.5: Lwaki mba nʼokutya omu biseera ebigosi, ngʼababbibabbi era ababbeyi baneeruguuliriirye?
49.6: Abo ababbibabbi abeesiga obusuni obubalinabwo, abeewaana olwʼobungi bwʼebintu byabwe.
49.7: Mazima mpaawo ayezya okwenunula ngʼasasula oKibbumba empiiya okumugulya obwomi.
49.8: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba kyʼebbeeyi ino okwenunula; era mpaawo ayezya okusasula egimala,
49.9: nʼawangaala emirembe gyonagyona, nandi nʼaingira e magombe.
49.10: Omuntu yenayena akimaite ati abʼamalabuki bafa; nʼomu ngeri enanyere eyo abasirusiru nʼabamaayaani bajigirika, nʼobusuni bwabwe ni babulekera bandi.
49.11: Amagombe gaabwe niigo ebisito byabwe emirembe gyonagyona, era gibabba emirembe gyonagyona, waire nga babbaire nʼeitakali eryabwe-okubwabwe.
49.12: Omuntu tabbeerererawo lwakubba nti musuni, yena ajigirika ngʼebisolo.
49.13: Ekyo niikyo ekituuka kwabo abateeka obwesigwa omu byʼekisirusiru, niiyo enkomerero yʼabo abeematira nʼobusuni bwabwe.
49.14: Bali ooti ntaama ogubatwala omu kibbaagiro, okufa kwalibalya. Lwalica lumo aBatuukirirye ni bafuga abantu abo; nʼemibiri gyabwe gyalivunda e magombe, e yala nʼebisito byabwe.
49.15: Neye nze oKibbumba yalinunula omwoyo gwange eeri amaani gʼe magombe, mazima yalinjaniriza.
49.16: Omuntu nʼowagaigawala ekitiisyakye ni kyeyongera, tikikwewuninkiriryanga.
49.17: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oweyalifa tiyalyabaku nʼekintu. Ekitiisyakye tikyalyaba naye.
49.18: Newankubbaire omu bwomibwe yeebala okubba wʼenkabi, ni bamuwaana olwʼokubba nakusani,
49.19: yalyeyimbya kwabo abʼomulembe gwʼabazeizabe, etibalibonaku kitangaala tete.
49.20: Omuntu owaabba nʼobusuni ngʼabula okutegeera, yena ajigirika ngʼebisolo.

50.1: OWabwezye, oKibbumba oyo oMusengwa atumula, nʼayetesya abantu bonabona oku kyalo, okuzwa eisana e girizwa paka e girigwa.
50.2: OKibbumba anekaaneka ngʼasinzirira omu Sayuuni, ekibuga ekikirira nakimo obusiipoono.
50.3: OKibbumba waiswe aiza, neye tikasirinkiriri, omusyo ogulunkuuma gumwekubbembeire, ompunga owʼamaani yamweruguuliriirye.
50.4: Ayeta eigulu nʼekyalo okubona ngʼalamula abantube.
50.5: “Munkumbaanirye aanu abatukulye bange, abo abakolere endagaano na nze mu kumpa sadaaka.”
50.6: Eigulu lirangirira obutuukirirye bwa Kibbumba, olwʼokubba iye onanyere, mulamuzi.
50.7: “Abantu bange muwulisisye, era natumula. Oleke nkulumirize iwe Isirairi, ninze oKibbumba, oyo oKibbumbawo.
50.8: Tinkunenya lwa sadaakagyo, ooba lwʼesadaaka egibooca yonayona egyodeeberera okumpa.
50.9: Ente enumi egyʼomu biraalobyo nʼembuli empanya egyʼomu bisibobyo timbitaka.
50.10: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba ebisolo byonabyona ebyʼomu bibira, byange, nʼente egiri oku nsozi enkumi nʼenkumi.
50.11: Ebinyonyi byonabyona ebyʼoku nsozi, nabuli kyomi ekiri omu kigona, kyange.
50.12: Singa mba nzala tinkukobera niiwe, olwʼokubba ekyalo nʼebintu byonabyona ebirimu byange.
50.13: Ndya nyama ya nte onumi? Ooba nnywa musaaye gwʼembuli?
50.14: Owengeyo eeri oKibbumba esadaaka eyʼokumwebalya, otuukiriryenge obweyamobwo eeri iye oNambulaku aMwagaagana.
50.15: Onjetenge ngʼoli omu bigosi, nakununulanga, era nʼongulumalya.”
50.16: Neye oKibbumba akoba omubbimubbi ati, “Lwaki oyemba amateeka gange ngʼekikwate. Era lwaki otumula oku ndagaano eginakolere na iwe?
50.17: Iwe ocaawa okukulungamya, nʼogaana ebinkukoba okukola.
50.18: Owoobona omwibbi ngʼomuwagira; okola omukumbo nʼabalendi.
50.19: Omunwagwo gutumula bibbibibbi, nʼolulumirwo lwizwire bubbeyi.
50.20: Osiiba kutumula wundi ku bagandabo, nʼokucocoomererya baana ba maawo.
50.21: Ebyo byonabyona obikolere era ni nsirika, nʼoseega oti ndi nga iwe. Neye atyanu nkukawuukira, ni nkulagira kimo omusango.”
50.22: “Inywe abaneerabira, mwekuume, nga bbe, nabanyiiranyiiramu nga mpaawo abanunula.
50.23: Oyo iye aleeta esadaaka eyʼokuneebalya, angulumalya. Era oyo iye atambula nakusani, nze oKibbumba nalimununula.”

51.1: Oo Kibbumba, onkwatire ekisa, okusinzirira oku kutakakwo okutakoma. Olwʼekisaakyo ekinene, ontooleku emisango gyange gyonagyona.
51.2: Onnaabyeku obubbibubbi bwange bwonabwona, era ontukulye okuzwa omu kikole ekibbikibbi.
51.3: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba mmaite nga nabbengere, ekibbikibbi kyange kinnumiriza bulijo.
51.4: Niiwe onanyerenyeere ogunabbengereku, ni nkola ekicaamu omumaisogo. Nʼolwekyo ooli mutuuce omu byʼotumula, era olamula mu bwenkanya.
51.5: Mbaire omu bibbibibbi okuzwa ngʼowebambyaire, mazima okuzwa ngʼomama oweyasunire ekida kyange.
51.6: Iiwe osangaalira mazima omu mwoyo gwʼomuntu. Onsomesya amalabuki omu mwoyo gwange.
51.7: Ontukulye okuzwa omu kibbikibbi kyange mbe mulongoole, onnaabye ntukule okukiraku obbalaafu.
51.8: Oleke mpulire eisangaalo nʼokwesiima. Oleke njaagaane waire ngʼonvuniankire.
51.9: Tiwambalira ebikole byange ebibbibibbi, onsanguleku obubbibubbi bwange bwonabwona.
51.10: Oo Kibbumba, ombumbiremu omwoyo omulongoole, onteekemu omwoyo omuyaaka era omwesimbu.
51.11: Tiwambinga omumaisogo, era tiwantoolaku oMwoyowo oMutukulye.
51.12: Onjirirye eisangaalo eryowa aboonunula, era ompe omwoyo ogukugondera.
51.13: Awo nʼayegesyanga abatakugondera ebiragirobyo, kaisi abakola ebibbibibbi bacuukenge ni baira egyoli.
51.14: Oo Kibbumba onnunule omu musango gwʼokusuka omusaaye, iwe Kibbumba omununuli wange. Era awo nayembanga ino oku butuukiriryebwo.
51.15: Oo Musengwa, oyasamye omunwa gwange, kaisi njezye okukuwuuja.
51.16: Iwe tosiima sadaaka, nandibbaire ngikuwa. Tosiima waire okusiima esadaaka egibooca yonayona.
51.17: Esadaaka egyosiima niigwo omwoyo ogwenenya. Omwoyo ogwenenya era ogwikaikana, Kibbumba tiwagugaanenge.
51.18: Oo Kibbumba, obbe wʼekisa eeri oSayuuni era omubbeere. Oyombeke buyaaka ebitempe bya Yerusaalemi,
51.19: kaisi osangaalire esadaaka egibawaayo omu mwoyo omusa, nʼesadaaka egibooca yonayona, kaisi ente enumi bagiweeyo oku kyotokyo.

52.1: Iwe owʼamaani, lwaki weepankira omu kibbikibbi? Ekisa kya Kibbumba kinkuuma okumalaku olunaku.
52.2: Osala enkwe okujigirica abandi, ebibonobyo bisala ooti kamweso akoogi, bulijo oyiiya ebyʼobubbeyi.
52.3: Osiima obubbibubbi okukiraku obusa, era nʼobubbeyi okukiraku amazima.
52.4: Osiima ebibono ebirumya abandi, mubbeyi iwe!
52.5: Neye oKibbumba yalikujigirica emirembe gyonagyona. Yalikwangula omu nyumbayo era nʼakunyiiranyiiramu, nʼakutoola omu kyalo kyʼaboomi.
52.6: Abantu abatuukirirye balibona ni batya. Balikusekerera ni bakoba bati,
52.7: “Obone oyo anandi nʼasuuca oKibbumba okubba olugagalwe, wazira ni yeesiganga busunibwe obubitiriri, nʼokweyongera mu maani ngʼajigirica abandi. ”
52.8: Neye nze ndi kusani omu nyumba ya Kibbumba ooti musaale omuzaituuni ogukula kusani. Neesiga kisa kya Kibbumba emirembe nʼemirembe.
52.9: Nakwebalyanga emirembe gyonagyona, era nakwesiganga olwʼebyo ebyokolere. Nabbutulanga omumaiso gʼabatuukiriryebo ngʼobwoli omusa.

53.1: Abasirusiru bakoba omu myoyo gyabwe bati, “Mpaawo Kibbumba.” Boonoonoki, era bakola bibbibibbi; mpaawo akola ebisa.
53.2: OKibbumba asinzirira omwigulu nʼalingirira abantu bonabona, okubona nga waliwo amutegeera, ooba nga waliwo amunoonia.
53.3: Neye abantu bonabona bamuzwireku, ni basuuka ekitagasa egyali. Mpaawo akola ebisa, era kadi waire moiza.
53.4: Abakola ebibbibibbi tibalyega? Bamalawo abantu bange ooti muntu akaavuula ekyokulya, era tibasinza oKibbumba.
53.5: Neye baliizula entiisya egibatabbangakuumu. OKibbumba yalisasaania amagumba gʼabo abazingiza abantube. Yalibaswaza, olwʼokubba oKibbumba yabagaine.
53.6: Nsaba nti oyo eyanunula oIsirairi azwe mu Sayuuni! OKibbumba oweyaliiryawo eidembe omu bantube, abʼeibyaire lya Yaakobbo ibo aBaisirairi balijaagaana.

54.1: Oo Kibbumba, onnunule ngʼokolesya obwezye bwʼeriinalyo, okolesye obwezyebwo ontaase!
54.2: Oo Kibbumba, owulire okusaba kwange, owulisisye ebibono byange.
54.3: Abanamawanga bansetukiireku, abaŋeŋese banoonia obwomi bwange. Tibafaayo oku Kibbumba.
54.4: Neye oKibbumba niiye ambeera, oMusengwa niiye ambeesyawo.
54.5: Oleke obubbibubbi abalabe bange obubantakirya bubacuukire. Omu bwesigwabwo obajigirice.
54.6: Oo Musengwa, naawangayo egyoli ebyokuwaayo omu kutaka, nakwebalyanga olwʼokubba oli musa.
54.7: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba onnunwire omu bigosi byange byonabyona, ni mbona ngʼowangwire abalabe bange.

55.1: Oo Kibbumba, otege ekitwi eeri okusaba kwange, tiwagaana okwegairira kwange.
55.2: Ompulisisye era onjiremu. Ebigosi bimbitiriireku era ndi mu kwekedenkerera.
55.3: Okuceera kwa balabe bange, nʼababbibabbi okunjiigaania, bintiisiriirye. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba bankolaku obulabe, era omu busungu banteekereku endibo.
55.4: Njizwire obulumi oku mwoyo, ensisi yʼokufa enkwaite.
55.6: Era nakobere nti, “Singa mbaire nʼamayaya ooti njiiwa, nandigulukire ni nnoonia e ginandisuniire eidembe.
55.7: Nandigulukire ni njaba yala, ni mba eeyo omwidungu.
55.8: Nandisunire mangu aweneebbambika, ni mbawunuka abo abali ooti mpunga owʼamaani era ooti ikendi owʼamabbaale.”
55.9: Oo Musengwa otabuletabule ababbibabbi, era entumula yaabwe ogigotesyegotesye, olwʼokubba mbona bikole byʼobukambwe nʼokayaani omu kibuga.
55.10: Omusana nʼobwire batambula nga beeruguuliirirya ekikomera kyʼekibuga ekyo, era mwikyo mwizwire bikole ebibbibibbi na mitawaana.
55.11: Obutemo niibwo obuli omu kibuga ekyo, okutiisyatiisya nʼobubbeyi tibica omu nguudo gyakyo.
55.12: Singa omulabe niiye anzuma, nandikigumiire. Singa ampalana niiye aneepankiraku, nandibbaire mmwebisaku.
55.13: Neye niiwe omunange oguntambula naye, omuntu owange, omukaagwa wange,
55.14: ogunnonsyanga naye, ogutukumbaananga naye omu nyumba ya Kibbumba.
55.15: Oleke okufa kugwe oku balabe bange kibbwatukira. Oleke baabe e magombe nga bakaali boomi, olwʼokubba ekibbikibbi kibba omu bisito byabwe nʼomu myoyo gyabwe.
55.16: Neye nze nasabanga oKibbumba okumbeera, era oMusengwa yannunulanga.
55.17: Eigulo nʼamakeezi nʼomusana neezulugumanga ni nkuukulya, nʼawulira eigono lyange.
55.18: Yalinjirya nakusani okuzwa omu lutalo olunsetukiireku, waire ngʼabandwanisya bangi.
55.19: OKibbumba eyafugire okuzwa eira nʼeira yampulira nga mmwegairira nʼawangula abalabe abo, olwʼokubba tibacuuka okuleka ebikole byabwe, era tibatya oKibbumba.
55.20: Omuntu owange alumbire abakaagwabe, nʼamenya endagaano egiyakolere nabo.
55.21: Ebibonobye byabbaire binyuma okuwulira okukiraku okukomba amakita, neye nga ekimuli oku mwoyo, lutalo. Nʼebibonobye byabbaire byogi ooti mpiima.
55.22: Ebigosibyo obikwatisyenge Musengwa, niiye eyakubbeeranga. Tiyalekenge abatuukirirye, abantu okubawangula.
55.23: Neye iwe Musengwa, abantu abo abatemo nʼababbeyi walibadyaka omu kiina ekitakoma ngʼemyanka egibandiwangaire bakaali nʼokugituuca aakati. Neye nze neesiganga niiwe.

56.1: Oo Kibbumba onkwatire ekisa, olwʼokubba abantu bannumba. Okumalaku olunaku lwonalwona, abalabe bange banjiigania.
56.2: Abalabe bange bannumba okumalaku olunaku lwonalwona. Omwidumi lyabwe bandwanisya.
56.3: Neye nabuli owentya, nteeka obwesigwa bwange mu niiwe.
56.4: OKibbumba namuwuujanga olwʼebyo ebyasuubiza. Omu Kibbumba munateekanga obwesigwa bwange, tinaatyenge. Abantu-obuntu bayezya kunkola niki?
56.5: Okumalaku olunaku abalabe bange bacuusacuusa ebibono byange. Basala enkwe bulijo okunkolaku akabbikabbi.
56.6: Beekumbaania awabise, ni bakeeta entambula yange nga bankiiya.
56.7: Oo Kibbumba, tiwabaganya okuwunuka ekibonerezokyo. Omu busungubwo, owangule abantu abo.
56.8: Iwe omaite okunakuwala kwange. Omaite obungi bwʼamaliga agenjabire nga nkunga. Timawandiike omu kitabokyo?
56.9: Olunaku olunalikwekungirira okumbeera, abalabe bange balicuuka ni bakangayo e nyuma. Olwʼekyo mmaite nga iwe Kibbumba, oli oku lubba lwange.
56.10: OKibbumba mmuwuuja olwʼebyo ebyasuubiza. OMusengwa mmuwuuja olwʼebyo ebyasuubiza.
56.11: Omu Kibbumba munateekanga obwesigwa bwange, tinaatyenge. Abantu-obuntu bayezya kunkola niki?
56.12: Oo Kibbumba, ndi nʼokutuukirirya obweyamo bwange. Naliwaayo egyoli esadaaka eyʼokwebalya.
56.13: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba onnunwire omu kufa, nʼonunula nʼebigere byange obuteesiitaala, awo ni ntambulira omumaisogo, omu kyalo kyʼaboomi.

57.1: Onkwatire ekisa Kibbumba wange, onkwatire ekisa olwʼokubba njirukira eeri niiwe okunkuuma. Nsuna obukuumi mu kiiriirye kyʼebiyayabyo paka entalo owegica.
57.2: Neekungirira Kibbumba oNambulaku aMwagaagana, oKibbumba oyo atuukirirya ebiyantegekeire.
57.3: Yalisindika obubbeeri okuzwa omwigulu okunnunula, yalikaawukira abanjolonga. OKibbumba yalindaga okutakakwe okutakoma, era yalindaga ngʼobwali omwesigwa.
57.4: Ndi aakati omu balabe abali ooti mpologoma egiri amairu okukaavuula abantu. Amaino gʼabalabe bange gabeesongoirye ooti masimo nʼobulaso. Endimi gyabwe njogi ooti mpiima.
57.5: Oo Kibbumba bakugulumalyenge okubitamu eigulu, oleke ekitiisyakyo kiwoisye ekyalo kyonakyona.
57.6: Abalabe bange bategere omutego okumpapalya, ngoogookere omu bigosi ebimpitiriireku! Bakwire ekiina omu nzira yange, neye ibo abananyere niibo abakigwiremu.
57.7: Oo Kibbumba, omwoyo gwange mugumu, omwoyo gwange mugumu, nayembanga era ni nkuwuuja.
57.8: Olamuke iwe mwoyo gwange, olamuke iwe tongoli era iwe nkana! Nalamuka ngʼemambya ekaali okusala!
57.9: Oo Musengwa nakusisiijiryanga omu bantu. Nayembanga okukuwuuja omu mawanga.
57.10: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba okutakakwo okutakoma kugulumali okutuuka kwigulu. Obwesigwabwo butuuka nʼoku kireri.
57.11: Oo Kibbumba, bakugulumalyenge okubitamu eigulu, oleke ekitiisyakyo kiwoisye ekyalo kyonakyona.

58.1: Inywe abafugi, dala muwa ebiragiro mu butuuce? Abantu mubalamula mu bwenkanya?
58.2: Kadi, omu myoyo gyanywe museega kukola bibbibibbi, era mukola byobukambwe oku kyalo.
58.3: Ababbibabbi bacaama kuzwa ngʼowebababyala, era bababyala nʼobubbeyi.
58.4: Ebibono ebibazwamu bya kabbikabbi ooti saagwa wa mpiri, basyalaire ooti kongomasaka omasiipe,
58.5: atawulira eigono lya mulogo omukwati wʼempiri, ooba lya mandwa omukugu.
58.6: Oo Kibbumba abo abali ooti mpologoma obamulungulemu amaino. Oo Musengwa obbongolyagemu amaino gaabwe agali ooti gʼempologoma enzira.
58.7: Oleke baweewo ooti maizi agakulumuka, era owebatoolangayo obulaso bwabwe okulasa, bubbenge butuntunyiri.
58.8: Oleke babbe ooti kikovu ekinyeenyeera nga kitambula, oleke babbe ooti mwana ogubabyaire nga mufu etiyalibonaku eisana.
58.9: OKibbumba yalibamalawo mangu; abatobato nʼabakulu, nga nʼensaka egibateekere oku musyo gwʼenkwi egyʼamawa, ekaali okusyoya.
58.10: Abatuukirirye balijaagaana owebalibona okunyaaŋa okwo. Balinaaba ebigere byabwe omu musaaye gwʼababbibabbi.
58.11: Abantu balikoba bati, “Dala abatuukirirye basuna empeera. Dala oKibbumba aliwo, iye alamula emisango oku kyalo!”

59.1: Oo Kibbumba wange, ondamye abalabe bange, onkuume eeri abo abannumba.
59.2: Ondamye eeri abakola ebibbibibbi, onnunule eeri abatemo abo.
59.3: Obone owebagonerera okunjita. Oo Musengwa, abasaiza abʼamaani abakambwe beekumbaania okunnumba anambula kibbikibbi ekinkolere ooba omusango.
59.4: Mbulaku kibbikibbi ekinkolere, neye beetegeka okunnumba. Obone embeera egindimu osetukiremu ombeere.
59.5: Oo Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona, oKibbumba wa Isirairi, osetukiremu obonereze amawanga gonagona agatusetukiireku. Tiwasaasira abʼenkwe abakola obubbibubbi.
59.6: Baira nabuli igulo ni batambulatambula omu kibuga, nga baluluma ooti mbwa.
59.7: Owulire ebibono ebibakaasa okuzwa omu minwa, bakaasa ebibono ebisumuta ooti mpiima. Baseega bati mpaawo abawulira.
59.8: Neye iwe Musengwa, obasekerera, era ojerega amawanga ago gonagona.
59.9: Oo Kibbumba, iwe amaani gange nkuumirira niiwe okunnunula, olwʼokubba niiwe olugaga lwange,
59.10: iwe Kibbumba wange ankwatira ekisa. OKibbumba omu kisaakye yaliiza nʼambeera, era nalyegooŋa ngʼawangwire abalabe bange.
59.11: Neye Musengwa iwe engabo yaiswe tiwabaita, abantu bange bayinza okwerabira. Ngʼokolesya obwezyebwo, obagadangadye era obaice.
59.12: Olwʼebibono ebibbibibbi ebibatumula, era olwʼebibono ebizwa omu minwa gyabwe, oleke babakwatire omu kwekudumbalya kwabwe. Olwʼokulaama nʼolwʼokubbeya kwabwe,
59.13: obajigirice omu bulwabwo, obajigirice baweerewo nakimo. Awo abantu omu kyalo kyonakyona bamanya bati, oKibbumba niiye afuga oIsirairi.
59.14: Baira nabuli igulo ni batambulatambula omu kibuga, nga baluluma ooti mbwa.
59.15: Balaaduuka ooti mbwa eginoonia ebyokulya, ni giruruma nga tigisunire ebigimala.
59.16: Neye nze nayembanga oku bwezyebwo. Nabuli makeezi nabbookookanga oku kutakakwo okutakoma, olwʼokubba oyabire ngʼobba niiwe olugaga lwange, era ekiirukiro kyange omu biseera byʼebigosi.
59.17: Nayembanga okukuwuuja iwe aMaani gange, oKibbumba olugaga lwange, iwe andaga okutaka okutakoma.

60.1: Oo Kibbumba otulekeswire, era nʼotoolawo obukuumibwo egituli. Otusunguwaliire, neye otwiriryemu.
60.2: Otengeeterye ekyalo nʼokyatyaga ni kyasaamirira. Atyanu oigale enjatikira gyakyo egyo, olwʼokubba kiri kumulunguka.
60.3: Olekere abantubo ni bagada ino, tugagaituka ooti bateemeere.
60.4: Neye abo abakutya, obasiiriirye ebbendera ngʼobalabula kaisi bayezye okuwunuka okujigirika.
60.5: Otununule era otubbeere ngʼokolesya obwezyebwo, kaisi abatakebo bayezye okuwunuka.
60.6: OKibbumba atumuliire omu Weemaye ati, “Naligabulyagamu oSekemu nga njaagaana, ni nsalasalamu ekiinamo oSukosi.
60.7: OGireyaadi kyalo kyange, nʼoManase kyange. Efulaimu iye nkofiira yange eyʼekyoma, oBuyudaaya iye mwigo gwange ogwʼobwakabaka.
60.8: OMowaabbu iye kalaayi omunnaabira. Edomu iye gimmumaku engaito gyange; era nceera olwʼokubba mpangwire ekyalo kyʼe Firisitiya.”
60.9: Naani eyalinnyingirya omu kibuga ekiriku olugaga? Naani eyalineekubbembera okwingira omwEdomu?
60.10: Oo Kibbumba, dala otulekeswire? Tokaali oyaba nʼamaje gaiswe omu lutalo?
60.11: Otuwe obubbeeri okulwanisya omulabe oyo, olwʼokubba obubbeeri bwʼabantu tibugasa.
60.12: Nga tuli nʼoKibbumba twasunanga obuwanguli, era niiye eyayemyagiranga ansi abalabe baiswe.

61.1: Oo Kibbumba, owulisisye nga nkwekungirira, owulire okusaba kwange.
61.2: Nkweta okumbeera nga nsinzirira e tali kumpi, era nga mpoiremu eisuubi. Ontwale ombise e ngulu okwibbaale eriwanvu.
61.3: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba niiwe ekiirukiro kyange, era olugaga olwʼamaani olunkuuma eeri abalabe bange.
61.4: Onganye mbenge omu weemayo enaku gyʼobwomi bwange gyonagyona. Onganye neebisenge ansi wʼebiyayabyo.
61.5: Oo Kibbumba, owuliire obweyamo bwange, era ompaire ebyobusika ebyogabira abakutya.
61.6: Oyongereyo enaku gyʼobwomi bwa kabaka, awangaale emyanka nʼemyanka.
61.7: Omuganye afuge ngʼali omu bukuumibwo emirembe nʼemirembe. Ekisaakyo nʼobwesigwabwo, bimukuumenge.
61.8: Kale nayembanga okukuwuuja emirembe gyonagyona, nga wentuukirirya obweyamo bwange nabuli lunaku.

62.1: Omwoyo gwange gusunira ekiwuumulo mu Kibbumba yenkani. Obununuli bwange buzwa eeri niiye.
62.2: Niiye yenkani eibbaale lyange omu neebisa era omununuli wange. Niiye olugaga lwange, era tinabbeerengeku nakimo nʼokutya.
62.3: Mwalituuca di inywe nywenanywena nga mulumba omuntu omoiza okumwita, atakiraku ekitempe ekitaka okugwa amaani, ooba olukita oluvune?
62.4: Mutaka okumutoola oku bukulu. Mukira kusangaalira bubbeyi. Entumula yaanywe eraga okutakirya omuntu obusa, neye ngʼomu myoyo gyanywe mumulaama.
62.5: Omwoyo gwange gusuna ekiwuumulo mu Kibbumba yenkani. Eisuubi lyange lizwa eeri niiye.
62.6: Niiye yenkani eibbaale lyange omu neebisa era omununuli wange. Niiye olugaga lwange, era naabbanga mucaati.
62.7: Obununuli bwange nʼekitiisya kyange bizwa eeri Kibbumba. Niiye eibbaale lyange eryʼamaani omu neebisa, era niiye ekiirukiro kyange.
62.8: Bantu bange, mwesigenge oKibbumba nabuli kiseera. Mumukoberenge niiye ebigosi byanywe byonabyona, olwʼokubba niiye ekiirukiro kyaiswe.
62.9: Dala abantu mwota-bwota. Nʼobwebabba bʼekitiisya, tibeesigika. Owebabapima oku minzaani tibazitowa era babba bawuuku okukiraku omwota.
62.10: Tiwesiganga eifuge, era tiwesisiijanga olwʼebyo ebyonyagire. Obusunibwo nʼowebweyongera obungi, tobwesiganga.
62.11: OKibbumba atumwire omulundi gumo, ni mpuliramu ebintu bibiri nti, iwe Kibbumba oli wʼamaani,
62.12: era nti, iwe Musengwa oli wʼekisa. Mazima walisasula nabuli muntu kusinzirira ku mulimogwe.

63.1: Oo Kibbumba, niiwe oKibbumba wange, nkunoonia nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona. Obwomi bwange bukuli nyonta, nʼomubiri gwange gukukandiire ooti kyalo ekikalu ekikandiire, amaizi.
63.2: Nkuboine omu Weemayo, era ni mbona amaanigo nʼekitiisya.
63.3: Olwʼokubba okutakakwo okutakoma kukirira nakimo obwomi, nakuwuujanga.
63.4: Nakwebalyanga nga nkaali ndi mwomi, nakusabanga nga nsiirirye engalo gyange egyoli.
63.5: Omwoyo gwange gwanogananga ooti muntu aliire ekyokulya ekinoli, era nayembanga nʼeisangaalo okukuwuuja.
63.6: Obwire bwonabwona oku buliri bwange, nkwebukirya ni nkuseegaku.
63.7: Olwʼokubba niiwe obubbeeri bwange; era nnyemba ni njaagaanira omu kiiriirye kyʼebiyayabyo.
63.8: Omwoyo gwange gukwevambaku nʼompanirira nʼamaani agʼengaloyo endiiro.
63.9: Abakiiya okunjita balijigirika, balyaba e magombe.
63.10: Balibaita nʼempiima, ni basuuka kyokulya kyʼamakibbwe.
63.11: Neye okabaka yalijaagaana olwa Kibbumba. Nabuli alayira oKibbumba, yamuwuujanga; neye eminwa gyʼababbeyi bagibbuunangaku.

64.1: Oo Kibbumba owulire okwezuluguma kwange. Okuume obwomi bwange eeri entiisya yʼabalabe.
64.2: Onkuume eeri enkwe gyʼababbibabbi, era ondamye eeri ekiziima kyʼababbibabbi abo.
64.3: Bakolesya endimi gyabwe ooti mpiima enjagalye, era bakasuka ebibono ebikambwe ooti bulaso.
64.4: Beeteegera ni balasa oyo onambulaku omusango, bamuvumbinkirirya ni bamulasa, nga tibatya.
64.5: Bagumyangana nga bategeka okukola obubbibubbi, ni bateesa okutega emitego gyabwe mu kyama, nga bakoba bati, “Naani-so eyagibona?”
64.6: Bateesa ekibbikibbi ni bakoba bati, “Entegeka enu egitukolere, mpaawo ekyagikaisisya.” Ebiseego byʼomuntu omunda omu mwoyogwe, mpaawo ayezya okubitegeera.
64.7: Neye oKibbumba yalibalasa nʼobulaso, amangu ago ni bagwa ansi.
64.8: Ebibono byabwe ebibatumula byalibakangira ni bibajigirica. Bonabona abababona balitengeetya emitwe okubatala.
64.9: Abantu bonabona balitya ni balangirira oKibbumba ebyakola, era ni bafumintiriza kwebyo ebyakola.
64.10: Abatuukirirye bajaagaaniranga omu Musengwa, era ni bairukira egyali okubakuuma. Bonabona abalongoole omu myoyo bamuwuujanga.

65.1: Oo Kibbumba, osaanira okukuwuujanga omu Sayuuni era twatuukiriryanga obweyamo bwaiswe egyoli.
65.2: Oo iwe owulira okusaba kwaiswe, abantu bonabona baliiza egyoli.
65.3: Ebikole byaiswe ebibbibibbi nʼowebitubitiriraku, iwe obitusoniya.
65.4: Wʼenkabi iye oyo ogwolonda nʼomusemberya e gyoli okubbanga omu kifookyo ekitukulye. Twaikutanga ebisa ebyʼomu nyumbayo, ebyʼomu Yeekaaluyo entukulye.
65.5: Oo Kibbumba oMununuli waiswe, otwiramu ngʼokola ebikole ebyʼobutuukirirye ebyentiisya. Abantu bonabona oku kyalo nʼabali oku manyanza agʼe yala bakwesiga niiwe.
65.6: Oli wʼamaani, era olwʼobwezyebwo wateekere ensozi omu bifo byagyo.
65.7: Osirica okuwooga kwʼenyanza, era okuwooga kwʼamayengo gaayo. Osirica okwediima kwʼamawanga.
65.8: Abantu omu kyalo kyonakyona batya ebyewunyo ebyokola. Obaizulya eisangaalo okuzwa amakeezi okutuukira nakimo eigulo.
65.9: Olabirira ekyalo nʼokisukirira, era nʼokijimuca ino. Emiiga gya Kibbumba giizwiremu amaizi, okuwa abantu ebimera, olwʼokubba wategekere otyo ekyalo.
65.10: Obulime bwakyo obusukirira amaizi mangi ni bugonda. Eitakali olinyinyintirya oikendi nʼowa ebirime byaku okubala.
65.11: Omwanka nʼogwigalawo nʼamakungula amangi, nabuli gyobita ogalekawo mu bungi.
65.12: Ebiriisiryo ebyʼomwidungu bikubbaku ebisolo, obusozi ni bwizulaku eisangaalo.
65.13: Ebiriisiryo biizwire biraalo, nʼebiinamo biizwire ngaano. Nabuli kintu kiceera era ni kyemba olwʼeisagaalo.

66.2: Mwembe oku kitiisya kyʼeriinalye, mumuwuuje omu ngeri emuwa ekitiisya.
66.3: Mukobe oKibbumba muti, “Ebyokola nga byewunyisya! Olwʼobwezyebwo obwʼamaani, abalabebo omu kutya banyolokoka omumaisogo.
66.4: Ekyalo kyonakyona kikusinza, ni bemba okukuwuuja, bemba okuwuuja eriinalyo.”
66.5: Mwize mubone oKibbumba ebyakola, ebyewunyisya ebyo ebyakolera abantu.
66.6: Enyanza yagisuucirye lukalu, ni bagibitamu na bigere. Eeyo ni tujaagaana olwʼebiyakolere.
66.7: Afuga nʼobwezyebwe emirembe gyonagyona, ateekere amaisoge oku banamawanga. Aale abajeemu abo tibamwepankirangaku.
66.8: Muwuuje oKibbumba waiswe inywe amawanga gonagona, era eigono lyanywe erimuwuuja liwulikikane.
66.9: Niiye atukuuma ni tusigala nga tuli boomi, era taleka ni batuwangula.
66.10: Oo Kibbumba, watugezeserye, watulongoire ngʼowebakola efeeza.
66.11: Watulekere ni tugwa omu mutego nʼotutiika emigogolo egikaluba.
66.12: Walekere abalabe baiswe ni batwemyaga oku mitwe, ni tubita omu musyo nʼomu maizi. Neye watutuucirye omu kifo ekyokwesiima.
66.13: Naleetanga omu nyumbayo esadaaka egibooca yonayona. Natuukiriryanga obweyamo bwange egyoli;
66.14: ebyo omunwa gwange ebigwabbutwire nʼebinasuubizire owenabbereire omu bigosi.
66.15: Naawangayo egyoli esadaaka egibawaayo nga bagyoca yonayona, eyʼebisolo ebisava. Ni mpaayo egyoli esadaaka egibawaayo nga bagyoca yonayona eyʼentaama ensaiza, nʼente emasiniki nʼembuli.
66.16: Mwize muwulire inywe nywenanywena abatya oKibbumba, nʼabakobera ebyankoleire.
66.17: Namwekungiriire okumbeera, era ni nnyemba okumuwuuja.
66.18: Singa nabbaire mbisire ekibbikibbi omu mwoyo gwange, oMusengwa tiyankumpuliire.
66.19: Neye dala oKibbumba ampuliire, nʼawulisisya okusaba kwange.
66.20: OKibbumba bamuwuuje olwʼokubba tagaine okusaba kwange, ooba tantoireku okutakakwe okutakoma.

67.1: Oo Kibbumba, otukwatire ekisa, era otuwe enkabi. Otuloleku nʼamaiso agʼekisa,
67.2: kaisi ekyalo kyonakyona kimanye ebyotaka, era amawanga gonagona gamanye ngʼowoonunula.
67.3: Oo Kibbumba, oleke abantu bakuwuuje, oleke abantu bonabona bakuwuuje.
67.4: Oleke amawanga gasangaale era gayembe nʼeisangaalo, olwʼokubba ofuga abantu omu bwenkanya, era olungamya amawanga gonagona omu kyalo.
67.5: Oo Kibbumba, oleke abantu bakuwuuje, oleke abantu bonabona bakuwuuje.
67.6: Ekyalo kibala ebineneka byakyo bingi, oKibbumba, iye oKibbumba waiswe atuwaire enkabi.
67.7: OKibbumba atuwaire enkabi, oleke abantu omu kyalo kyonakyona bamuwenge ekitiisya.

68.1: Oleke oKibbumba asetuke, abalabebe basalaanike. Oleke abo abamucaawa bamwiruke.
68.2: Ngʼompunga owaafuumuula omwosi, wena woobba obafuumuule. Ngʼodipoli owaasaanuuka omu musyo, nʼababbibabbi webabba bajigirike omumaiso ga Kibbumba.
68.3: Neye oleke abo abatuukirirye basangaale, era bajaagaane omumaiso ga Kibbumba, oleke bajaagaane olwʼeisangaalo.
68.4: Mwembere oKibbumba, mwembe okuwuuja eriinalye. Mumuwuuje iye oyo atambulira omu bireri. Eriinalye niiye oMusengwa, era mujaagaanire omumaisoge.
68.5: Niiye oiteeye wʼabafuubbi, era niiye omulwaniriri wʼabanamwandu, iye oKibbumba abba omu kifookye ekitukulye.
68.6: OKibbumba awa abanambulaku abantu baabwe, ebisito. Atoola abasibe omu mabbuusu, ni babba omwidembe. Neye abajeemu babba mu kyalo ekikalu.
68.7: Oo Kibbumba, owewakubbembeire abantubo, owewatambwire ngʼobita omwidungu,
68.8: ekyalo kyatengeetere, eigulu ni lisusuca oikendi, iwe oKibbumba wa Isirairi owewabonekeire oku Sinaayi.
68.9: Oo Kibbumba, watoonyeserye oikendi mungi oku kyalo, nʼoiryamu obujimu ekyalokyo okububwo ekyabbaire kinafuwire.
68.10: Abantubo ni batyama omwo, era Kibbumba, olwʼobusaabwo obubitiriri, wagabiriire abadoobi ebibeetaaga.
68.11: OMusengwa yawaire ekiragiro, abakali bangi ni basasya amawuliroge agati,
68.12: “Abakabaka nʼamaje gaabwe bairukire. Abakali abasigala e ika niibo abagaba omunyago.
68.13: Newankubbaire nga basigala mu biraalo byʼentaama, bali ooti mayaya ga njiiwa agebabiikireku efeeza, ngʼamaviirige bagabiikireku ezaabbu enekaaneka.”
68.14: OKibbumba oWabwezye Bwonabwona oweyasalaanicirye abakabaka oku kyalo ekyo, kyabbaire ooti bbalaafu agwire oku lusozi oZalumoni.
68.15: Olusozi oBbasani niirwo olusozi lwa Kibbumba, olusozi oBbasani luwanvu.
68.16: Inywe ensozi empanvu, lwaki mugongera olwʼolusozi oKibbumba oluyalondere iye okubbanga? Dala oMusengwa, okwo kuyaabbanga emirembe gyonagyona.
68.17: OMusengwa azwa oku lusozi oSinaayi nʼenkumi nʼenkumi gyʼebigaali byʼamaje, nʼaiza omu Weemaye.
68.18: Owewaniinire oku lusozi oluwanvu, watwaire abawambe bangi. Abantu bakuwaire ebirabo bingi, nga nʼabajeemu bona balimu, Iwe Musengwa obbenge eeyo nʼabo.
68.19: OMusengwa bamuwuujenge, bawuujenge oKibbumba omununuli waiswe, iye oyo atujejera nabuli lunaku.
68.20: OKibbumba waiswe niiye oKibbumba anunula, iye aKira Byonabyona, oyo oMusengwa atulamya okufa.
68.21: Mazima oKibbumba yalitentena emitwe gyʼabalabebe, nʼasusungula ebiyanga byʼabo abanyiikiira okubbenga.
68.22: OMusengwa akoba ati, “Nalibairya okuzwa e Bbasani; Nalibainululya omu lwabi lwʼenyanza,
68.23: kaisi inywe abantu bange mwezye okwemyaga omu musaaye gwabwe, nʼembwa gyanywe ni gyesunira ekyokulya.”
68.24: Oo Kibbumba, abantu bakuboine nga weekubbembereimu mukumba olwʼobuwanguli, iwe Kibbumba wange, era oKabaka, ngʼoingira omu Weemayo.
68.25: Abembi beekubbembeire, abʼebivuga ni bazwaku e nyuma. Aakati ni wabbaawo abaala, nga bakubba obugoma.
68.26: Muwuuje oKibbumba omu lukumbaana olunene. Muwuuje oMusengwa omu nkumbaana gya Isirairi.
68.27: Ekika kya Bbenyamini ekisembayo obutono kibeekubbembeire, ni kwiraku ekiziima kyʼabakungu abʼekika kya Yuda. Ni kwiraku abakungu abʼekika kya Zebbulooni nʼekya Nafutaali.
68.28: Oo Kibbumba olage obwezyebwo, otulage amaanigo ngʼowookolanga.
68.29: OlwʼeYeekaaluyo eri omu Yerusaalemi, abakabaka bakuleeteranga ebirabo.
68.30: Okaawuukire ogusolo ogwo ogwʼomu bitooko, era abantu abo abali ooti gamasiniki agali omu manyana. Obaikaikanie bakuleetere efeeza. Osalaanica amawanga ago agataka eino entalo.
68.31: Abakwenda balizwa e Misiri, nʼabantu bʼEsyopiya balyewaayo eeri oKibbumba.
68.32: Mwembere oKibbumba inywe obwakabaka bwʼoku kyalo. Mwembe okuwuuja oMusengwa.
68.33: Mwembere oyo atyama omwigulu, eryʼeira nʼeira. Muwulire ngʼabbwatuka nʼeigonolye eryʼamaani.
68.34: Mulangirire obwezye bwa Kibbumba, ekitiisyakye kiwoisya oIsirairi, nʼobwezyebwe buli omwigulu.
68.35: OKibbumba nga wʼentiisya omu Weemaye! OKibbumba wa Isirairi niiye awa abantube obwezye nʼamaani. OKibbumba bamuwuujenge.

69.1: Oo Kibbumba onnunule, amataba gandi mu mamiro.
69.2: Njolomera omu lutente olwabiriri, awabula obusinziriro. Ndi mu lwabi, amataba gammira.
69.3: Ndembere okukunga olwʼokutaka obubbeeri, amamiro gankalire. Amaiso gandoolere, nga nkukuumiriire iwe Kibbumba wange okumbeera.
69.4: Abancaawa anambula nsonga, bangi okukiraku enziiri gyʼoku mutwe gwange. Abalabe bange bangi abancaawa anambula nsonga, ibo banoonia kunjita, bankaka nʼokwirya ebinandi ni njibba.
69.5: Oo Kibbumba, omaite obusirusiru bwange, nʼebibbibibbi byange tibikwebisa.
69.6: Abo abakwesiga tiwabaganya okuswaluka oku lwange, Musengwa iwe oKibbumba oWabwezye Bwonabwona; tiwaganya abo abakunoonia okuswala oku lwange, iwe oKibbumba wa Isirairi!
69.7: Ngumira ebizumi ebibanzuma oku lulwo, era ni nswaluka.
69.8: Nsuukire ooti ndi munamawanga eeri abantu bange, ooti ndi mugwira eeri abaana ba mama,
69.9: olwʼokubba okutaka eino enyumbayo kummalisyawo, nʼabantu ebibakuduula, biira ku ninze.
69.10: Owenkunga, era ni nsiiba, ekyo kyona kinzumisya.
69.11: Oweneesiba ebibenga olwʼenima, nsuuka nseko gyabwe.
69.12: Abo abatyama oku mulyango gwʼekibuga bangeya, era nsuukire lwembo lwʼabateemeere.
69.13: Neye nze neegairira niiwe Musengwa, omu kiseera kyʼokusiimakwo, nʼolwʼokutakakwo okutakoma, Kibbumba onjiremu ngʼonnunula ngʼowewasuubizire.
69.14: Onnunule okuzwa omu lutente, tiwaganya ni njolomera, ontaase eeri abo abancaawa, ontoole omu lwabi.
69.15: Tiwaganya amataba okummira, ooba nze okweinika omu lwabi, waire okwika e magombe.
69.16: Oo Musengwa onjiremu, olwʼokubba okutakakwo okutakoma kusa; olwʼekisaakyo ofeeyo oku kusaba kwange.
69.17: Tiwakubbira omuweereryawo omugongo, oyanguwe okunjiramu, olwʼokubba ndi mu bugosi.
69.18: Oigerere e gyendi onnunule, ondamye abalabe bange.
69.19: Omaite ngʼowebanzuma, ngʼowebanswaza era ngʼowebanjerega. Abalabe bange bonabona obabona.
69.20: Ebizumi byabwe binyolya omwoyo gwange, era bimmaliremu amaani. Nnoonerye ayezya okunsaasira ni nkayaku, era nʼayezya okunjiryamu amaani nandi ni mmusuna.
69.21: Omu kyokulya kyange banteekeiremu ondulwe. Enyonta oweyankwaite, bannywisirye nviinyo ensasaami.
69.22: Nʼolwekyo oleke ekiinulo kyabwe kibasuukire mutego. Era eidembe eribalimu, libasuukire mupaasuka.
69.23: Oleke amaiso gaabwe gayofuwale bakaye okubona, Era emigongo gyabwe gigodobale emirembe gyonagyona.
69.24: Obasukeku ekiruyikyo, era obakambuwalire omu busungubwo obubitiriri.
69.25: Oleke enkambi gyabwe gisuuke kinameje. Tiwaabbaawo muntu asigala omu weema gyabwe,
69.26: olwʼokubba bayiigaania oyo ogwobonerezere, era bongera okulumya oyo ogwokangabairye.
69.27: Obavunaane musango ku musango tiwabanunula naire.
69.28: Amaliina gaabwe bagasangule omu kitabo kyʼaboomi, era tiwabawandiika aamo nʼabatuukirirye.
69.29: Neye nze ndi mu bugosi era ndi mu bulumi. Oo Kibbumba onnunule era onsetule angulu.
69.30: Nawuujanga eriina lya Kibbumba omu lwembo, namugulumalyanga nga mmwebalya.
69.31: Ekyo kyasangaalyanga oMusengwa, okukiraku okumuwa onte omasiniki ooba okitobba nʼamaziga gaaku nʼebibbonge.
69.32: Abebagadya balibona ekyo, ni basangaala. Ibo abanoonia oKibbumba baliiramu amaani.
69.33: OMusengwa awulisisya abo abadoobi, era tiyeerabira abantube abasibe.
69.34: Oleke eigulu nʼekyalo bimuwuujenge, era nʼenyanza nʼebyomi byonabyona ebigirimu,
69.35: olwʼokubba oKibbumba yalinunula oSayuuni, nʼayombeka obuyaaka ebibuga bya Yuda. Awo abantube balibba omwo, ekyalo ekyo ni kibba kyabwe.
69.36: Eibyaire lya baweereryabe lyalikisikira, nʼabo abamutaka, balikityamamu.

70.1: Oo Kibbumba, oyanguwe okunnunula, Musengwa oyanguwe okumbeera.
70.2: Oleke abo bonabona abataka okunjita, baswale era batabuketabuke. Nʼabo abanoonia okujigirica obwomi bwange, babakanjirirye nga baswaire.
70.3: Oleke abo abansekerera, bakangirire olwʼokuswala kwabwe.
70.4: Oleke abo bonabona abakunoonia, bajaagaane era basangaale oku lulwo. Abo abasiima obununulibwo, bakobenge bulijo bati, “OKibbumba bamugulumalye.”
70.5: Neye nze ndi mudoobi era ndamba, nsaba Kibbumba, oyanguwe okwiza egyendi. Niiwe ombeera era niiwe onnunula. Oo Musengwa, tiwaalwa!

71.1: Oo Musengwa niiwe ekiirukiro kyange, tiwandekanga ni nswala.
71.2: Omu butuukiriryebwo, ombeere era ontaase; ontegere ekitwikyo era onnunule.
71.3: Obbe niiwe eibbaale lyange omu neebisa okusuna obukuumi bulijo; olagire bannunule olwʼokubba niiwe eibbaale lyange omu neebisa era olugaga lwange.
71.4: Oo Kibbumba wange onnunule omu bwezye bwʼababbibabbi, ontoole omu bwezye bwʼabakola ebibbibibbi era abaŋeŋese.
71.5: Oo oMusengwa iwe aKira Byonabyona, eisuubi lyange liri mu niiwe, njabire nga neesiga niiwe okuzwera nakimo omu mavuvuka gange.
71.6: Okuzwa ngʼowebambyaire, niiwe omulabiriri wange. Niiwe owantoire omu kida kya mama. Nakuwuujanga bulijo.
71.7: Obwomi bwange bubbaire kyokuboneraku eeri abantu bangi, olwʼokubba obbaire kiirukiro kyange ekyʼamaani ekinkuuma.
71.8: Nkuwuuja okumalaku olunaku era nga wennangirira obukulubwo.
71.9: Tiwambinga nga nkayiriire, tiwandekesula omu biseera amaani owegampweramu.
71.10: Abalabe bange bangeya, abo abataka okunjita bateesera aamo.
71.11: Bakoba bati, “OKibbumba amulekeswire. Tumuyiige tumukwate, olwʼokubba mpaawo eyamutaasa.”
71.12: Oo Kibbumba, tiwamba yala. Oo Kibbumba wange, oyanguwe okumbeera.
71.13: Nsaba nti abo abanvunaana baswale era bajigirike, abo abataka okunkola akabbikabbi, babasekerere era babanyoome.
71.14: Neye nze nʼasuubiranga bubbeeribwo bulijo, neeyongeranga okukuwuuja.
71.15: Natumulanga oku bikolebyo ebyʼobutuukirirye nʼoku kununulakwo okumalaku olunaku, newankubbaire nga timpezya okubimalayo.
71.16: Oo Musengwa iwe aKira Byonabyona nalangiriranga bikole ebyokola. Nalangiriranga butuukiriryebwo, obubwo iwe wenkani.
71.17: Oo Kibbumba, okuzwera nakimo omu mavuvuka gange wanjegeserye era paka kuti nkaali ntumula oku bikolebyo ebyewunyisya.
71.18: Newankubbaire nga nkairiire ndi kinvinvi, Kibbumba tiwandekesula, paka owenamanyikisya abʼomugigi ogwiraku amaanigo, nʼobwezyebwo eeri abo bonabona abaliirawo.
71.19: Oo Kibbumba, obutuukiriryebwo bugulumali okutuuka okwigulu, iwe akolere ebikulu. Oo Kibbumba, naani aali ooti niiwe?
71.20: Waire ondekere ni mba omu kugada okunene nʼomu bigosi ebingi era waliiryawo obwomi bwange tete, nʼontoola e magombe nʼonsetula tete.
71.22: Nakuwuujanga nga nkukubbira otongoli, olwʼokubba oli mwesigwa, Kibbumba wange. Nayembanga okukuwuuja nga nkukubbira enkana. Iwe oMutukulye Wenkani owa Isirairi.
71.23: Nabbookookanga olwʼeisangaalo nga nnyemba okukuwuuja, nze oguwanunwire.
71.24: Natumulanga oku bikolebyo ebyʼobutuukirirye okumalaku olunaku, olwʼokubba abataka okunkolaku akabbikabbi obakwatisirye ensoni era nʼobaswaza.

72.1: Oo Kibbumba, oyegesye okabaka obwenkanyabwo, era oyegesye omwana wa kabaka amazimago.
72.2: Awo yalamulanga abantubo mu mazima, nʼabebagadya nʼabalamula mu bwenkanya.
72.3: Oleke ensozi gireetere abantu eidembe, era obusozi bubaletere ebibala byʼobutuukirirye.
72.4: Oleke okabaka alwanirirenge abagada, anunulenge abaana bʼabadamba, era awangulenge abo ababajolonga.
72.5: Abantu bakuwenge ekitiisya emirembe gyonagyona, paka eisana nʼomweri owebyalikomya okwaka.
72.6: Oganye obufugi bwa kabaka bugase abantu ngʼoikendi owaagasa emisiri, bubbe ngʼoikeindi owaatoonya nʼasukirira ekyalo.
72.7: Oganye oku mulembegwe, abantu abatambulira omu butuukirirye beeyongere obungi, era wabbeewo eidembe eribitiriri, paka omweri owegwalikomya okwaka.
72.8: Oganye afugenge okuzwera oku nyanza okutuuka oku nyanza egendi, okuzwera oku mwiga Ewufulaate okutuuka ekyalo e gikikoma.
72.9: Amawanga agali omwidungu gakotamyenge emitwe gyabwe omumaisoge, era abalabebe beeyalenge ansi omumaisoge.
72.10: Abakabaka bʼe Talusiisi nʼabʼoku bizinga bamuleeterenge omusolo. Abakabaka bʼe Syebba nʼabʼe Seebba bamuleeterenge omusolo.
72.11: Abakabaka bonabona bakotamyenge emitwe gyabwe omumaisoge, abantu abʼamawanga gonagona bamuweereryenge.
72.12: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba anunula abadamba, ibo abamwekungirira, abo abadoobi era abanambulaku obubbeeri.
72.13: Akwatira ekisa abanafu nʼabadamba, anunula abadamba nandi ni bafa.
72.14: Abanunula eeri eifuge nʼeeri abababitya obundi, olwʼokubba obwomi bwabwe bwʼebbeeyi ino egyali.
72.15: Okabaka awangaale! Oleke bamuwenge ezaabbu okuzwa e Syebba. Abantu bamusabirenge bulijo, era bamusabirenge enkabi okumalaku olunaku.
72.16: Ekyalo ekyo kyonakyona kibbengemu ebyokulya ebibitiriri; oleke bireremalenge oku nsozisozi okwo kwonakwona. Oleke ekineneka kyamu kibbenge kijimu ooti kyʼomu Lebbanooni; oleke kikule nakusani ooti isubi lyʼomu kigona.
72.17: Oganye eriina lya kabaka balyebukiryenge emirembe gyonagyona, era lyeyongerenge okufuma paka eisana oweryalikomya okwaka. Oganye abantu bonabona basunenge enkabi kubitira mu niiye. Era bamwetenge wʼenkabi.
72.18: OMusengwa Iye oKibbumba wa Isirairi bamuwuujenge, Iye yenkani akola ebyewunyisya.
72.19: Eriinalye eryʼentiisya baliwuujenge emirembe gyonagyona. Ekyalo kyonakyona kiizule entiisyaye. Amiina era Amiina.
72.20: Okusaba kwa Dawudi omutaane wa Yese kukoma yaawo.

73.1: OKibbumba dala musa eeri oIsirairi, eeri abo abʼemyoyo emirongoole.
73.2: Neye nze, nabbaire natira okuwaamu amaani, okwikirirya kwange nga kusebengerera.
73.3: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba abeekudumbalya bangongeirye, owenaboine ngʼababbibabbi abo bali omu bwomi obusa.
73.4: Ababbibabbi mpaawo ekibadambya paka kufa, emibiri gyabwe ginyirira era gyʼamaani.
73.5: Tibagada ngʼabantu abandi, tibabba nʼebigosi ngʼabantu abandi.
73.6: Nʼolwekyo okwekudumbalya kwabwe tikwebisa ooti kajegere kʼomu mamiro, ebikole byabwe ebyobukambwe byeraga ooti kizwalo.
73.7: Emyoyo gyabwe giizwire biseego ebibbibibbi, basiiba mu kukola bubbibubbi.
73.8: Bajerega abantu, era babatumulaku kubbikubbi, beepanka ni batiisyatiisya okumigirirya abandi.
73.9: Batumula kubbikubbi oku Kibbumba aali omwigulu, era banyooma abantube oku kyalo.
73.10: Kagira abantu ba Kibbumba bagalukira egibali, ni baikirirya nabuli kibakoba.
73.11: Era ababbibabbi abo ni beebuulya bati, “OKibbumba yamanya atya? Dala oKibbumba oNambulaku aMwagaagana abitegeera?”
73.12: Kinu niikyo ababbibabbi ekibali, babba nakusani bulijo, era nga beeyongera kugaigawala.
73.13: Olwo dala nteganiire bwereere okwekuuma nandi ni njonoona, era ni neekuuma okutabbaaku omusango?
73.14: Ngada nabuli lunaku era nabuli makeezi nsuna ebibonerezo.
73.15: Singa nabbaire ntumwire ntyo ooti babbibabbi, nandibbaire mbeyere abantubo.
73.17: Paka owenaabire omu Weemayo, awo ni ntegeera enkomerero yʼababbibabbi.
73.18: Dala obateeka omu bifo ebityereri, obasindika omu kujigirika.
73.19: Bajigirikirawo, bafeera mu nsisi ni baweerawo nakimo.
73.20: Ngʼekirooto owekigota oku muntu owaalamuka, iwe Musengwa owewalisetuka, batyo webaligota omu biseegobyo.
73.21: Omwoyo gwange owegwanakuwaliire, era ni mpulira wundi,
73.22: nabbaire musirusiru era nga tintegeera; nabbaire kinambulamu omumaisogo ooti kisolo.
73.23: Neye era mba kumpi na iwe bulijo, era onkwatirira oku ngalo endiiro.
73.24: Onnuŋamya ngʼonjegesya, era oluzwanyuma walinjaniriza omu kifo ekyʼekitiisya.
73.25: Naani ogundinaye omwigulu nga tiniiwe? Niiwe oguneetaaga okukiraku ekintu kyonakyona oku kyalo.
73.26: Omubiri gwange nʼomwoyo gwange biyinza okubba binafu, neye oKibbumba niiye amaani gʼomwoyo gwange era niiye owange enaku gyonagyona.
73.27: Ibo abo ababba e yala na iwe bajigirika; omalawo abo bonabona abatali beesigwa egyoli.
73.28: Neye nze nga kisa okubba okumpi nʼoKibbumba. Nsuucirye oMusengwa aKira Byonabyona, kiirukiro kyange, kaisi nkoberenge abantu byonabyona ebyakolere.

74.1: Oo Kibbumba, lwaki otulekesuliire nakimo? Lwaki obusungubwo bumeigera oku ntaama gyʼomu kiriisiryokyo?
74.2: Oyebukirye abantubo abewagulire eira eino okubba ababo okububwo okuzwa eira nʼeira, eigwanga eriwanunwire okubba eriryo okububwo. Oyebukirye olusozi oSayuuni awabbaire obutyamibwo.
74.3: Olambuule obone ebijigirice, omulabe ajigiricirye ebintu byonabyona, omu Weemayo.
74.4: Abalabebo bakubbiire olukero omu kifookyo e gitukusisinkanira, ni bateekamu ebbendera gyabwe, okulaga bati bawangwire.
74.5: Beebitya ooti bantu abasiirya embaizi gyabwe okutema emisaale omu kisaka.
74.6: Basusungwire ebijolije byonabyona ebibaize, nga bakolesya embaizi nʼenyundo.
74.7: Bakumireku eWeemayo omusyo nʼeya nʼewaawo, ni babebenyesya ekifo e gibakusinzira.
74.8: Bateesere bati, “Twabajigiricirya nakimo!” Kale ni bayoca nabuli kifo omu kyalo e gibasinziranga oKibbumba.
74.9: Titukaali tubona obumanyiciryo bwʼebyewunyo, mpaawo kadi naabbi aliwo. Era kwiswe mpaawo kadi amaite ekyo owekyalikomera.
74.10: Oo Kibbumba, abalabe balituuca di okukujerega? Eriinalyo balirizumirira emirembe gyonagyona?
74.11: Lwaki totubbeera nʼengaloyo, iyo endiiro eyʼobwezye? Ogitooleyo e gyogiringiire omu kifubba obajigirice.
74.12: Neye iwe, Kibbumba niiwe oKabaka wange okuzwa eira nʼeira, niiwe omununuli oku kyalo.
74.13: Niiwe owayawiiremu amaizi gʼenyanza ngʼokolesya amaanigo, wasusungwire emitwe gyʼagampiri omu maizi.
74.14: Watentenere emitwe gyʼogumpiri ogwʼomu maizi, nʼoguwaayo okubba kyokulya eeri ebibbumbe byʼomwidungu.
74.15: Niiwe owatemwire ensulo nʼemyala ni gikulumuca amaizi, nʼokalya emiiga egyabbaire tigikalira.
74.16: Omusana nʼobwire bibyo, wateekere eisana nʼomweri omu bifo byabyo.
74.17: Niiwe owateekerewo ensalo gyonagyona egyʼekyalo, nʼoteekawo ebiseera byʼeibbugumu nʼebyʼobuwolondoki.
74.18: Oo Musengwa, oyebukirye engeri omulabe egyakujeregere, nʼabasirusiru ngʼowebazumiriire eriinalyo.
74.19: Tiwaawaayo abantubo abanambulaku obubbeeri eeri abalabe baabwe abakambwe. Abantubo abagada, tiwabeerabira emirembe gyonagyona.
74.20: Oyebukirye endagaano egiwakolere na iswe, olwʼokubba ekyalo kiizwire ndikiirya na bikole byʼobukambwe.
74.21: Tiwaleka abebajolonga ni baswala, oganye abadoobi nʼabadamba bagulumalyenge eriinalyo.
74.22: Oo Kibbumba, osetukiremu olwanirire ensongayo, oyebukirye engeri abasirusiru egibakujerega okumalaku olunaku.
74.23: Tiweerabira ocerete wa balabebo, okereere waabwe owa buli kiseera.

75.1: Tukwebalya, Kibbumba, tukwebalya olwʼokubba oli kumpi, era abantu batumula oku byewunyobyo.
75.2: OKibbumba akoba ati, “Nalondere ekiseera ekinaliramuliramu, era naliramula mu bwenkanya.
75.3: Ekyalo owekitengeeta nʼabantu bonabona abakirimu ni batukuta, ninze ngumya empango gyakyo.
75.4: Nkoba abeepanka nti, ‘Mulekeraawo okwepanka.’ Nʼababbibabbi nti, ‘Mukomye okukubba ebifubba.
75.5: Timwakubbanga ebifubba, waire okutumula nga mwepanka.’ ”
75.6: Okugulumalya tikuzwa buzwaisana, waire bugwaisana waire mwidungu.
75.7: Neye oKibbumba niiye asalawo okwica omuntu, nʼagulumalya ogondi.
75.8: OMusengwa akwaite ekikopo ekiizwire enviinyo egifuukira ogyʼobusungubwe. Agusukira ababbibabbi bonabona oku kyalo ni bagunywa, ni bagumalirawo nakimo.
75.9: Neye nze, nalangiriranga ebyakolere emirembe gyonagyona, nayembanga okuwuuja oKibbumba wa Yaakobbo.
75.10: Yalijigirica amaani gʼababbibabbi, neye yalyongera agʼabatuukirirye.

76.1: OKibbumba amanyikanire omu Yuda, era eriinalye likulu omwIsirairi.
76.2: Eweemaye eri mu Yerusaalemi, era abba ku Lusozi oSayuuni.
76.3: Eeyo niiyo e giyasinziriire nʼavunavuna obulaso bwʼabalabe obwita, nʼengabo, nʼempiima, nʼebyokulwanisya byabwe ebindi ebyʼolutalo.
76.4: Oo Kibbumba, oli wʼekitiisya, era wʼentiisya okukiraku ensozi enene egiriku ebisolo ebibayiiga.
76.5: Abalwani abʼamaani, byonabyona ebibabbaire nabyo babanyagireku, era atyanu bafu. Oku balwani abo, mpaawo ayezya okusetula engalogye okulwana.
76.6: Oo Kibbumba wa Yaakobbo, owewabakaawukiire, embalaasi nʼabagityamaku bagwire ni bafa!
76.7: Niiwe ogubali nʼokutyanga. Naani ayezya okwemerera omumaisogo ngʼosunguwaire?
76.8: Wamanyikisirye ensalayo eyʼomusango ngʼosinzirira omwigulu, ekyalo ni kitya era ni kisirika,
76.9: owewasetukire Kibbumba okusala omusango, okununula abebagadya oku kyalo.
76.10: Dala obusungu bwʼabantu bwongera kukuweesya kitiisya. Abo abawunuka obusungubwo kibaleetera kwegendereza.
76.11: Mukolenge obweyamo eeri oMusengwa iye oKibbumba waanywe, era mubutuukiriryenge. Abantu bonabona abʼamawanga agamweruguuliriirye baleete ebirabo, eeri Iye Oyo ogubali nʼokutya.
76.12: Aica abafugi, era abakabaka bʼoku kyalo bamutya.

77.1: Neekungiriire oKibbumba okumbeera; neekungiriire oKibbumba, nga mmusaba ampulire.
77.2: Owenabbaire nga ndi omu kabbikabbi, nanoonerye oMusengwa. Nasiirirye engalo gyange engulu nga nsaba obwire bwonabwona amantademba, neye omwoyo gwange gwagaine okwiramu amaani.
77.3: Owenseega oku Kibbumba neeraliikirira. Owemmufumintirizaku, amaani gampwamu.
77.4: Tanganya okugona, neeraliikirira ino nandi ni mpezya okutumula.
77.5: Nseega oku biseera ebyʼeira, ni neebukirya emyanka egyʼeira.
77.6: Nseega ekiire kyonakyona, ni nfumintiriza nga weneebuulya omu mwoyo nti:
77.8: Tiyaliirayo okutukwatira ekisa emirembe gyonagyona? Nʼebiyasuubizire bikomere aawo?
77.9: OKibbumba yeerabiire okubba owʼekisa? Obusungubwe bwigaliriirye okusaasira?”
77.10: Era nakobere nti, “Ekinnuma eino niikyo kinu, oKibbumba oNambulaku aMwagaagana takaali alaga amaanige!”
77.11: Nayebukiryanga ebikole bya Musengwa, dala nayebukiryanga ebyamagero ebiwakolanga eira.
77.12: Nafumintirizanga oku byokola byonabyona, era ni nseega oku byewunyo ebyokola byonabyona.
77.13: Oo Kibbumba, ebyokola byonabyona bitukulye, kibbumbaki owʼamaani ooti Kibbumba waiswe?
77.14: Niiwe oKibbumba akola ebyamagero, olaga amaanigo omu mawanga.
77.15: Wanunwire abantubo nʼengaloyo eyʼamaani, wanunwire abʼeibyaire lya Yaakobbo nʼoYusufu.
77.16: Oo Kibbumba, amaizi owegakuboine gatiire, olwabi lwʼenyanza ni lutengeeta.
77.17: Ebireri ni bisusuca amaizi oku kyalo, eigulu ni libbwatuka, okumesya ni kuwoisya wonawona!
77.18: Eigono lyʼokubbwatukakwo, ni liwulikikanira omu gumpunga ogwʼamaani; okumesya ni kumoleka ekyalo kyonakyona. Ekyalo ni kitya era ni kitengeeta!
77.19: Wateekerewo enzira omu nyanza, era ekimaira omu maizi amangi. Neye awantu ebigere awebyemere tiwabonekere.
77.20: Wekubbembeire abantubo ooti-so weekubbembera ntaamagyo, ngʼoMusa nʼAlooni babalabirira.

78.1: Oo inywe bantu bange muwulire ebinjegesya. Mutege amatwi eeri ebibono ebintumula.
78.2: Nalitumula nga nkolesya ngero, nalibbutula ebimbaire nkaali okubiikula ebyʼeira nʼeira,
78.3: ebitwawuliire era ni tubimanya, abazeiza baiswe ebibatukobeire.
78.4: Titwalibibisa abaana abʼomulembe ogwaliirawo. Twalibakobera obwezye bwa Musengwa nʼebiyakolere ebikulu, aamo nʼebyewunyobye.
78.5: Yawaire abaizukulu ba Yaakobbo ebiragiro, nʼateeka amateeka oMwisirairi. Yalagiire abazeiza baiswe bageegesyenge abaana baabwe.
78.6: Abʼomulembe ogwaliirawo olwo kaisi bagamanyenge, nʼabaana bona abebakaali kubyala era bona bagamanyikisye abaana baabwe.
78.7: Omu ngeri eyo bateekenge eisuubi lyabwe mu Kibbumba. Era nandi ni beerabira oKibbumba ebyakola, neye ni bakwatanga amateekage.
78.8: Tibaabbanga ooti bazeiza baabwe abʼomulembe omukakanyali era omujeemu. Emyoyo gyabwe tigyagondeire oKibbumba, era nga tibeesigwa egyali.
78.9: Abantu bʼEfulaimu babbaire bakwaite obulaso, neye bairire e nyuma oku lunaku olwʼolutalo.
78.10: Tibakuumire endagaano yaabwe nʼoKibbumba, era bagaine okugondera amateekage.
78.11: Beerabiire ebintu ebiyabbaire akolere, nʼebyewunyo ebiyabbaire abalagire.
78.12: Yakolere ebyewunyo omumaiso gʼabazeiza baabwe nga bali omu kyalo kyʼe Misiri, omu kitundu kyʼe Zowani.
78.13: Yayawiiremu enyanza, nʼababityamu aakati. Yayemereirye amaizi, ni gakola ontuumo.
78.14: Omusana yabeekubbemberanga nʼekireri, kaisi obwire bwonabwona nʼekikondo kyʼomusyo.
78.15: Yaatire amabbaale omwidungu, nʼabawa amaizi mangi ooti-so gazwa mu lwabi.
78.16: Yatemwire ensulo omwibbaale, nʼakulumuca amaizi ooti miiga.
78.17: Neye era ni beeyongera okukola ebikole ebibbibibbi omumaisoge, nga bali omwidungu ni bajeemera oyo oNambulaku aMwagaagana.
78.18: Ni bakema oKibbumba mu kugenderera, nga bamusaba ebyokulya ebibayoya.
78.19: Ni batala oKibbumba, nga bakoba bati, “OKibbumba tayezya okutugabirira ebyokulya omwidungu.
78.20: Dala yakubbire eibbaale, amaizi ni gatiiriika okuzwamu, ni gakola emyala egyʼamaani ni gikulumuka. Neye ayezya okutuwa ekyokulya kyona? Ayezya okugabirira abantube enyama?”
78.21: OMusengwa oweyabawuliire, nʼasunguwala ino, obusungubwe ni bwika oku Yaakobbo, obulwabwe ni busetukira okwIsirairi.
78.22: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba tibaikiririirye omu Kibbumba, ooba okwesiga obwezyebwe obununula!
78.23: Neye era nʼalagira ebireri angulu, era nʼaigulawo emiryango gyʼeigulu
78.24: nʼamagalica emaanu abantu okulya nʼabawa ekyokulya okuzwa omwigulu balye.
78.25: Abantu ni balya ekyokulya ekyʼabamalaika, oKibbumba nʼabawa ekyokulya ekibitiriri.
78.26: Yasetwire ompunga omwigulu nʼafuwa okuzwa e buzwaisana, era olwʼamaanige nʼasindika ompunga okuzwa e maserengeta.
78.27: Yabamagaliciirye enyama ooti nsenye, enyonyi ni gibba nyingi ooti musenye oguli oku mbale kwʼenyanza.
78.28: Yagireetere ni gigwa aakati omu nkambi, okweruguulirirya eweema gyabwe.
78.29: Kale abantu baliire era ni baikuta, olwʼokubba yabawaire ekibabbaire beegomba.
78.30: Neye nga bakaali balya ekibatakire, nʼekyokulya nago nga kikaali kiri omu minywa gyabwe,
78.31: obusungu bwa Kibbumba ni bubasetukiraku. Nʼaitamu abo abakira amaani, era oIsirairi nʼafiirwa abanyeete.
78.32: Waire ebyo byonabyona nga bityo, era basigaire nga bakola ebikole ebibbibibbi. Waire yakolere ebyewunyo, nandi ni bamwikiririiryamu.
78.33: Kale nʼakomya obwomi bwabwe ooti mwota ogubayeera, nʼamalawo obwomi bwabwe mu kirulumo kyʼekibbwatukira.
78.34: Nabuli oluyabaitangamu, awo ni bamunoonia, ni bacuuka ni baira eeri oKibbumba.
78.35: Beebukiirye bati oKibbumba niiye eibbaale lyabwe omu beebisa, era bati oKibbumba oNambulaku aMwagaagana niiye omununuli waabwe.
78.36: Neye era babbutwire nʼeminwa gyabwe kumukiina. Era ni batumula ebibono kumubbeya.
78.38: Neye oKibbumba olwʼokubba iye wʼekisa, nʼabasoniya ebibbibibbi. Era tiyabajigiricirye. Emirundi nʼemirundi nʼafuganga obusungubwe, era nandi nʼabasetuliraku obulwabwe bwonabwona.
78.39: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba yayebukiirye ati ibo bantu abafa, era abali ooti mpunga afuwa nʼagotawo.
78.40: Emirundi mingi egibamujeemeire omwidungu, era ni bamusunguwalirya omwidungu.
78.41: Emirundi nʼemirundi ni bakema oKibbumba, ni basunguwalya oMutukulye wa Isirairi.
78.42: Tibayebukiiryeku obwezyebwe, nʼolunaku oluyabanunuliireku eeri omulabe,
78.43: oweyalagire obumanyiciryo wʼebyewunyobye omu kyalo kyʼe Misiri, nʼebyamagero omu kitundu kyʼe Zowani.
78.44: Emiiga yagisuucirye musaaye, nga tibayezya okunywa oku myala gyagyo.
78.45: Yabasindikiremu ebiziima byʼenzi egyabagadirye, nʼebikere ebyababitirye obundi.
78.46: Nʼebirime byabwe nʼabiwa amagino okubirya, nʼenzige okujigirica emisiri gyabwe.
78.47: Yajigiricirye emizabbibbu gyabwe ngʼakolesya amabbaale ga ikendi, nʼemitiini ngʼakolesya amataba.
78.48: Ente gyabwe gyona yagiitire nʼamabbaale ga ikendi, entaama gyabwe eraadu nʼegikubba.
78.49: Yabasukireku entiisya yʼobusungubwe, nʼobulwa, nʼekiruyi, nʼabateekaku nʼendibo, nga biri ooti bamalaika abajigirica.
78.50: Yasalirewo okutafuga obusungubwe, waire okuteterya obwomi bwabwe, wazira nʼabasindikira okawumpuli okubaita.
78.51: Yaitire abaana bonabona ababere abʼomu Misiri, ibo abaana bʼomu mavuvuka omu kyalo kyʼe Misiri.
78.52: Olwo nʼakubbembera abantube ooti muliisya owaakubbembera entaamagye, nʼabalungamya okubabitya omwidungu.
78.53: Yabakubbembeire kusani nga babula okutya. Neye enyanza nʼebbuunaku abalabe baabwe.
78.54: Nʼatuuca abantube omu kyalokye ekirongoole, omu kyalo kyʼensozi iye onanyere ekiyawambire.
78.55: Nʼabbingamu abanamawanga ngʼabantube bakituukiremu, nʼakibagabulyagiramu ngʼobusika. Era ebisito byabwe nʼabikwatisya ebika bya Isirairi.
78.56: Neye era ni bagezesya oKibbumba era ni bajeemera oyo oNambulaku aMwagaagana. Tibakwaite ebiragirobye.
78.57: Nga tibagonda era nga tibeesigwa ooti bazeiza baabwe ngʼowebabbaire. Babbaire tibeesigika ooti mwini oguwulunguta omu mbaizi.
78.58: Bamusunguwairye olwʼamasabo gaabwe, ni bamutanula eibuba olwʼebifaananyi byabwe ebyokusinza.
78.59: OKibbumba oweyaboine bityo nʼasunguwala ino, nʼalekesulira nakimo oIsirairi.
78.60: Yazwire omu Weemaye omu Siiro omu yaabbanga ngʼali omu bantu.
78.61: Yawaireyo eSanduuku yʼeNdagaano ni bagiwamba, yawaireyo akamanyiciryo kʼobwezyebwe nʼekitiisyakye omu bwezye bwʼomulabe.
78.62: Yasunguwaliire abantube, nʼabaleka ni babaita nʼempiima.
78.63: Omusyo ni gumalawo abanyeete baabwe, abaala baabwe ni bakayaku ababafumbirwa.
78.64: Abalabe baitire aBakabona baabwe nʼempiima, era nandi baikirirya abanamwandu okubakunga.
78.65: Olwo kaisi oMusengwa nʼabba ooti alamukire mu ndoolo, era ooti muzira enviinyo ogugicemwire.
78.66: Nʼakanjirirya abalabebe e nyuma, ensoni egitalikoma ni gibakwata.
78.67: Cooka nʼalekesula abaizukulu ba Yusufu, nandi nʼalonda ekika kyʼEfulaimu.
78.68: Wazira nʼalonda kika kya Yuda, nʼoLusozi oSayuuni ebyasiima.
78.69: Nʼayombeka eWeemaye ooti kifookye ekyʼomwigulu, nʼagigumya ino ngʼoweyakolere ekyalo ekyʼokubbaawo emirembe gyonagyona.
78.70: Yalondere omuweereryawe oDawudi, nʼamutoola omu kiriisiryo.
78.71: Yabbaire azwa ku kuliisya ntaama egyonkesya, nʼamutoolayo alabirirenge eibyaire lya Yaakobbo, ibo oIsirairi abantube okububwe.
78.72: Era oDawudi yabalabiriire omu mwoyo omusa, ngʼabafuga nʼobukugu.

79.1: Oo Kibbumba, abanamawanga balumbire ekyalokyo, basuucirye eYeekaaluyo entukulye kyomuliko. OYerusaalemi bakirekere gawumpu.
79.2: Emirambo gyʼabaweereryabo bagirekeire binyonyi kulya. Emibiri gyʼabeesigwabo, gisuukire kyokulya kyʼebisolo.
79.3: Basukire omusaaye gwʼabantubo ooti maizi, omu Yerusaalemi mwonamwona, ni wabulawo kadi abaliika!
79.4: Abaliranwa baiswe batuzuma, abatuli okumpi batunyooma era ni batujerega.
79.5: Oo Musengwa, walitusunguwalira paka di? Mirembe gyonagyona? Eibubalyo lyalyeyongera kusiiriirya ooti musyo?
79.6: Oirye obusungubwo ku mawanga agatakumaite, nʼoku bwakabaka obutakusinza.
79.7: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba bajigiricirye abʼeibyaire lya Yaakobbo, ni bajigirica nʼobutyami bwabwe.
79.8: Tiwatubonereza olwʼebibbibibbi byʼabazeiza baiswe. Oyanguwe okutukwatira ekisa, olwʼokubba tuwoiremu amaani.
79.9: Oo Kibbumba, omununuli waiswe otubbeere, olwʼekitiisya kyʼeriinalyo. Otununule era otusoniye ebibbibibbi byaiswe olwʼeriinalyo.
79.10: Lwaki oleka abanamawanga okutubuulya bati, “OKibbumba waanywe ali yaina?” Weerage omu banamawanga nga tubona, ngʼonyaaŋa olwʼomusaaye gwʼabaweereryabo ogususukire.
79.11: Owulisisye okukenyera kwʼabasibe. Olwʼobwezyebwo obwʼamaani, onunule abebasaliire ogwʼokufa.
79.12: Oo Musengwa, abaliranwa baiswe obasasulemu emirundi musanvu olwʼokukujooga.
79.13: Awo iswe abantubo, entaama gyʼomu kiriisiryokyo, twakwebalyanga bulijo emirembe gyonagyona. Mulembe ku mulembe, twadeebereranga okukuwuuja.

80.1: Oo Mulabiriri wa Isirairi, otuwulisisye, iwe alungamya eibyaire lya Yusufu ooti kiraalo kyʼentaama. Iwe atyama oku ntebe yʼobwakabaka aakati wa bakeruubbi;
80.2: oyake omumaiso gʼekika kyʼEfulaimu nʼekya Bbenyamini nʼekya Manase. Olage amaanigo, oize otununule.
80.3: Oo Kibbumba, otwirye obuyaaka, otuloleku nʼeriiso eryʼekisa, twezye okulama.
80.4: Oo Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona, walituuca di ngʼosunguwalira okusaba kwa bantubo?
80.5: Agebakunga gebanywa, era obalekere ni banywa amaliga mu bungi.
80.6: Otusuucirye nsonga yʼokulwanagana kwʼabaliranwa baiswe, era abalabe baiswe batujerega.
80.7: Oo Kibbumba oWabwezye Bwonabwona, otwirye obuyaaka, otuloleku nʼeriiso eryʼekisa, twezye okulama.
80.8: Watoire omuzabbibbu e Misiri, nʼobbinga abʼamawanga agandi omu kyalo kyabwe, nʼogukomayo.
80.9: Wagutegekeire amatinde, ni gukoma emirandira, era ni gumalaku ekyalo.
80.10: Ebyoleerya byagwo ni bimalaku ensozi, amasaga gaagwo ni gabiika emivule emiwanvu.
80.11: Gwatandabaire ni gutuuka oku Nyanza oMeditereniani, era amasaga ni gatuuuka oku Mwiga Ewufulaate.
80.12: Kale tete lwaki ovunirewo ebikomera byagwo, kaisi bonabona ababitawo ni baibbanga ebineneka byagwo?
80.13: Embiizi egyʼomu kigona gigubebenya, era ebibbumbe ebyomi byonabyona ebyʼomu kigona bigulya.
80.14: Oo Kibbumba oWabwezye Bwonabwona, otwiriryemu, olole ansi ngʼosinzirira omwigulu obone, era ofeeyo oku muzabbibbu ogwo,
80.15: iwe onanyere oguweekomeire nʼengaloyo endiiro, nʼonsebukira iwe onanyere oguweekuliirye.
80.16: Omuzabbibbugwo bagutemerewo ni bagwoca nʼomusyo, obakaawukire ngʼonyiikaire, bajigirike.
80.17: Neye oleke obukuumibwo bubbe kwʼoyo oguwalondere okubba owuwo, omwana wʼomuntu iwe onanyere oguwasuucirye owʼamaani;
80.18: awo titwalikuzwaku. Otwirye obuyaaka, kaisi tukuwuujenge.
80.19: Oo Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona otwirye obuyaaka, otuloleku nʼeriiso eryʼekisa, kaisi tulame.

81.1: Mwembere oKibbumba nʼeisangaalo, iye amaani gaiswe. Mubbookooke nga mwembera oKibbumba wa Yaakobbo!
81.2: Mutoolere okwemba, mukubbe akagoma, nʼotongoli avuga okusani nʼenkana.
81.3: Mufuwe ekondeere ngʼomweri gwankumasuka, nʼowegubbeera mulamba, oku lunaku olwʼomukolo gwaiswe.
81.4: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba eryo iteeka eeri oIsirairi, kiragiro kya Kibbumba wa Yaakobbo.
81.5: OKibbumba oweyalumbiire ekyalo kyʼe Misiri, yalisuucirye iteeka eeri oYusufu. Ni mpulira olutumu oluntategeera nga lukoba luti:
81.6: “Nabatiikwire ebyabakaluubiriranga oku mabega gaabwe, engalo gyabwe ni ngiwuumulya okuginga emigugu gyʼamatafaali.
81.7: Owemwabbaire omu bugosi, mwankungiriire ni mbanunula, nabairiremu omu kubbwatuka kwʼeraadu. Nabagezeserye oku nsulo gyʼe Meribba.
81.8: “Bantu bange, muwulire mbalabula. Isirairi, singa nʼompulisisya!
81.9: Mwinywe timwabbangamu okibbumba ogondi, timwakotamyanga emitwe okusinza okibbumba owʼabanamawanga.
81.10: Ninze oMusengwa, oyo oKibbumba waanywe, eyabatoire omu kyalo kyʼe Misiri. Mwasamye eminwa gyanywe, era nagiizulya.
81.11: “Neye abantu bange kadi kumpulisisya, oIsirairi kadi kungondera.
81.12: Kale zena ni mbawaayo eeri obukakanyali bwʼemyoyo gyabwe, bakole ekibabona bati niikyo ekituuce.
81.13: Oo singa abantu bange bampulisisya! Kale singa oIsirairi atambulira omu manzira gange!
81.14: Nandibbaire mwangu okuwangula abalabebe, ni mbonereza abamuwalana.
81.15: “Abo abacaawa oMusengwa bandinyolokokeire omumaisoge, era ekibonerezo kyabwe kyandibbaire kyʼemirembe gyonagyona.
81.16: Neye inywe nandibawaire ekyokulya ekyʼengaano egikiraku obusa, ni mbaikutya nʼomujenene ogwʼomwibbaale.”

82.1: OKibbumba akubbiriza olukiiko olukulu olwʼomwigulu; aakati omu lukumbaana lwʼabakibbumba awa okusalawokwe ati:
82.2: “Mwalituuca di okusalanga emisango omu butali bwenkanya, nʼokwekubbiranga oku lubba lwʼababbibabbi?
82.3: Musalenge emisango gyʼabadoobi nʼabafuubbi mu bwenkanya, abebagadya nʼabadamba, mubabbeerenge okutabamigirirya.
82.4: Mutaasenge abadoobi nʼabadamba, mubanunulenge eeri ababbibabbi.
82.5: “Nga timutegeera! Nga muli basiru! Muliira nakimo ino enguzi, era obwenkanya buwoirewo omu kyalo.
82.6: Nkobere nti, ‘Muli bakibbumba,’ nywenanywena muli baana bʼoNambulaku aMwagaagana.
82.7: Neye mwalifa ngʼabantu, mwalifa ngʼomukungu yenayena.”
82.8: Oo Kibbumba, osetuke olamule ekyalo, olwʼokubba amawanga gonagona gago ku bubwo.

83.1: Oo Kibbumba tiwasirika-busiriki nandi nʼonyega, Kibbumba tiwasirika nandi nʼobbaaku ekyokola.
83.2: Obone abalabebo ngʼobwebali kwegugunga, abo abakucaawa ngʼobwebali kwediima.
83.3: Basala enkwe omu lukuujukuuju okulumba abantubo. Bateesa okukola akabbikabbi oku bantubo abootaka eino.
83.4: Bakoba bati, “Mwize tujigirice eigwanga lyabwe, kaisi eriina Isirairi balyerabirire nakimo!”
83.5: Bateesera aamo ni baikirizagania, ni bakola endagaano okukulwanisya.
83.6: Mulimu abantu bʼEdomu nʼaBaisimairi, nʼabʼe Mowaabbu nʼaBakagali,
83.7: nʼabʼe Gebbali nʼabʼAmoni, nʼabʼAmereki, nʼabʼe Firisitiya, nʼabantu bʼe Tiiro.
83.8: Era nʼAsiiriya yeegaitire nabo, okubbeera eibyaire lya Luuti.
83.9: Obakole ngʼowewakolere aBamidiyaani era ngʼowewakolere oSisera nʼokabaka oYabbini oku mwiga oKisoni.
83.10: Bajigirikiire Endoli era emirambo gyabwe ni givundira oku ngulu.
83.11: Abeekubbemberi baabwe obakole ngʼowewakolere Olebbu nʼoZeebbu. Owangule abakungu baabwe ngʼowewawangwire oZebba nʼoZalumuuna.
83.12: Abo bakobere bati, “Oleke twetwalire ekyalo kya Kibbumba kibbe kyaiswe.”
83.13: Nʼolwekyo, Kibbumba wange, obaduumuule ooti nkungu ompunga ogwaluguulya, ooti mpunga owaafuwa ebisusungu.
83.14: Ooti musyo owegwoca ekibira, ooba ooti nnimi gyʼomusyo owegyoca ensozi,
83.15: woobba obalukutye nʼompungawo, era obatiisye nʼompungawo owʼamaani.
83.16: Oo Musengwa, obaswazire nakimo, kaisi bayezye okukunoonia.
83.17: Oleke ensoni gibakwate baswale, era babbe omu kutya enaku gyonagyona, oleke bajigirike nga baswaire.
83.18: Kaisi bategeere bati niiwe oMusengwa, era bati niiwe wenkani oNambulaku aMwagaagana, afuga ekyalo kyonakyona.

84.1: E gyobba nga wasa, iwe Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona!
84.2: Njoya ino, era mpulira nfa okubona oMusengwa e gyabba. Omwoyo gwange nʼomubiri gwange, byekunga nga byegomba oKibbumba onanyere obwomi.
84.3: Dala ontaaye yeerukira ekinyumba, era onamusiisi yena yeerukira ekisaasiriro e gyayezya okwalulirya obwanabwe, okumpi nʼebyotobyo, iwe Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona, era oKabaka wange era oKibbumba wange.
84.4: Bʼenkabi abo ababba omu nyumbayo, nga bakuwuuja bulijo.
84.5: Bʼenkabi abo ngʼamaani gaabwe gazwa giri niiwe, ngʼemyoyo gyabwe giri ku lugendo lwʼe Sayuuni.
84.6: Nga webabita omu Kiinamo ekibeeta oBbaka, obateekeramu amaluba; oikendi owa mwiro akiizulya nʼebitaba byʼamaizi.
84.7: Baaba nga beeyongera amaani, paka nabuli moiza oweyaliboneka omumaiso ga Kibbumba omu Sayuuni.
84.8: Oo Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona owulire okusaba kwange, ompulisisye Kibbumba owa Yaakobbo.
84.9: Oo Kibbumba iwe atutaasa, owuwo oguwasukireku amafuta omulole omu maiso.
84.10: Olunaku olumo omu luuga lwʼeYeekaaluyo, lukiraku 1,000 egimmalira awandi. Kasinga mba oku mulyango gwʼenyumba ya Kibbumba wange, okukiraku okubba omu nyumba gyʼababbibabbi.
84.11: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa niiye eisana era engabo. OMusengwa atulaga ekisa era nʼatuwa nʼekitiisya. Mpaawo kintu ekisa ekyaima abo abatambulira omu bwomi obunambulaku ekyokubunenya.
84.12: Oo Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona, nga wʼenkabi iye oyo akwesiga!

85.1: Oo Musengwa, walagire ekisa eeri ekyalokyo, wairiryewo enkabi gya Isirairi.
85.2: Wasoniire ensobi gyʼabantubo, nʼobatoolaku ebikole byabwe ebibbibibbi byonabyona.
85.4: Oo Kibbumba oMununuli waiswe, otwirye obuyaaka, era olekeraawo okutusunguwalira.
85.6: Otwiryemu amaani buyaaka, kaisi iswe ababo tujaagaanirenge mwiwe.
85.7: Oo Musengwa, otulage okutakakwo okutakoma, era otununule.
85.8: Oleke mpulisisye oKibbumba iye oMusengwa ekyakoba, olwʼokubba asuubiza abantube eidembe, ibo abatuukiriryebe owebatairayo omu busirusiru bwabwe.
85.9: Dala mutegeke okununula abamutya, kaisi ekitiisyakye kibbenge omu kyalo kyaiswe.
85.10: Okutaka okutakoma nʼobwesigwa bisisinkana, obutuukirirye nʼeidembe bigwangana omu bifubba.
85.11: Obwesigwa buzwera oku kyalo, era obutuukirirye businzirira omwigulu ni biika ansi oku kyalo.
85.12: Dala oMusengwa yatuwa ebisa, era ekyalo kyaiswe kyabbaamu amakungula mangi.
