86.1: Oo Musengwa, otege ekitwikyo, era onjiremu, olwʼokubba ndi mudoobi era ndamba.
86.2: Okuume obwomi bwange, olwʼokubba ndi mwesigwa egyoli. Niiwe oKibbumba wange, onnunule nze omuweereryawo akwesiga!
86.3: Oo Musengwa, onkwatire ekisa olwʼokubba nkwekungirira okumalaku olunaku.
86.4: Oo Musengwa onsangaalisye nze omuweereryawo olwʼokubba neewaayo egyoli.
86.5: Oo Musengwa, oli musa era osoniya, oli wʼekisa kinene eeri abo bonabona abakusaba.
86.6: Oo Musengwa, owulire okusaba kwange, owulisisye nga nkwekungirira okunkwatira ekisa.
86.7: Omu kiseera ekyʼebigosi nkwegairira, olwʼokubba onjiramu.
86.8: Oo Musengwa, omu bakibbumba mpaawo aali ooti niiwe, waire aali nʼebikole ooti bibyo.
86.9: Oo Musengwa, amawanga gonagona agewakolere gaizanga egyoli ni gakusinza. Era gagulumalyanga eriinalyo.
86.10: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oli wʼamaani, era okola ebyewuunyisya. Niiwe oKibbumba wenkani.
86.11: Oo Musengwa, ondage enzirayo, kaisi ntambulirenge omu mazimago. Oyegesye omwoyo gwange okukuweereryanga niiwe wenkani, kaisi nkutyenge.
86.12: Oo Musengwa iwe oKibbumba wange, nakuwuujanga nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona. Nagulumalyanga eriinalyo emirembe gyonagyona.
86.13: Olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma okubitiriri egyendi, wandamirye okutaika e magombe.
86.14: Oo Musengwa, abeekudumbalya bansetukiireku, ekibbula kyʼabantu abaŋeŋese bataka kunjita, ibo abantu abatakuseegaku.
86.15: Neye iwe Musengwa oli Kibbumba alumirwa era owʼekisa. Olwawo okusunguwala, oizwire ekisa ekibitiriri nʼobwesigwa.
86.16: Ondoleku era onkwatire ekisa, ompe nze omuweereryawo amaanigo, onnunule nze omwana wʼomuweereryawo omukali.
86.17: Ompe akamanyiciryo akalaga obusaabwo, kaisi abancaawa babone era baswale, olwʼokubba iwe Musengwa ombeereire era ongumirye.

87.1: OMusengwa yayombekere ekibugakye ku lusozi olutukulye.
87.2: Ataka ekibugakye oSayuuni okukira ebifo byonabyona oYaakobbo omwabba.
87.3: Iwe ekibuga kya Kibbumba, bakutumulaku ebyʼekitiisya.
87.4: “Omu mawanga agammaite, mbaliramu eryʼe Misiri nʼeryʼe Bbabbulooni. Abʼe Firisitiya, nʼe Tiiro nʼEsoopiya mbabalira mu babyale bʼe Sayuuni.”
87.5: OSayuuni bakitumulaku bati, “Nabuli muntu mubyale wʼomwo. Era iye oyo oNambulaku aMwagaagana yalikisuuca kyʼamaani.”
87.6: OMusengwa awandiika abantu omu lukalala lwʼamawanga ati, “Onu bamubyala mu Sayuuni.”
87.7: Abembi nʼababini bakoba bati, “Enkabi gyaiswe gizwa mu niiwe.”

88.1: Oo Musengwa iwe oKibbumba annunula, nkwekungirira omusana nʼobwire.
88.2: Oleke okusaba kwange kutuuke egyoli. Ontegere ekitwi nga nkwekungirira.
88.3: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba obwomi bwange bwizwire bigosi, era ngonerera kufa.
88.4: Bambalira mu baabo abaika e magombe, ndi ooti muntu onambulaku obubbeeri.
88.5: Ndi ooti muntu ogubalekeswire omu bafu, ndi ooti baadi abebaitire abagalaamiriire omu magombe, abootokaali oyebukirya. Era abootokaali obbeera.
88.6: Onteekere omu kiina ekyabiriri eino, omu bifo ebyʼendikiirya era ebyabiriri.
88.7: Obusungubwo bunkaluubirira ino, bungadya ino ooti mayengo.
88.8: Ozwereireku abakaagwa bange abʼoku mwoyo ni banjawukanaku, onsuucirye kyʼengigina egibali. Ndi musibe omu kifo omuntayezya okuwunuka.
88.9: Amaiso gandoolere olwʼenima. Oo Musengwa, nabuli lunaku nkusaba okumbeera. Nsiirya engalo gyange egyoli nga nkwegairira.
88.10: Ebyewunyo obikolera bafu? Abafu bazwa e magombe ni bakuwuuja?
88.11: Okutaka okutakoma okulaga baabo abali e magombe, ooba obwesigwabwo obulaga mu kifo kyʼokujigirika?
88.12: Ebyewunyobyo babimanyira mu kifo kyʼendikiirya, ooba obutuukiriryebwo mu kyalo kyʼabo abebeerabiire?
88.13: Neye nze Musengwa, nakwekungirira, era nabuli makeezi nkusaba.
88.14: Oo Musengwa, lwaki ondekesula? Lwaki onkubbira omugongo?
88.15: Mbaire nʼokugada era kumpi nʼokufa, kuzwera nakimo mu mavuvuka gange. Ebitiisirirya ebyontuuciryeku bimpaire okweraliikirira.
88.17: Bineeruguulirirya ooti mataba okumalaku olunaku, binzingizira nakimo.
88.18: Ontoireku abanange nʼabatake bange, endikiirya niiyo omukaagwa wange amba okumpi.

89.1: Nayembanga oku kutaka okutakoma okwa Musengwa enaku gyonagyona. Obwesigwabwo nabulangiriranga emirembe gyonagyona.
89.2: Nkoba nti, “Okutakakwo okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona, obwesigwabwo tibuwaawo, bubbeerererawo ooti igulu.”
89.3: Wakobere oti, “Nkolere endagaano nʼomulonde wange. Omuweererya wange oDawudi mmulayirira nti,
89.4: ‘Omwibyaireryo niimwo omwazwanga abakabaka emirembe nʼemirembe, era ni njemereryawo obwakabakabwo emirembe gyonagyona.’ ”
89.5: Oo Musengwa, eigulu likuwuujenge olwʼebyewunyobyo, obwesigwabwo bwona babuwuujenge omu lukumbaana lwʼabatukulye.
89.6: Naani oku bali omwigulu ogubayezya okugeraagerania oku Musengwa? Kiriina oku bibbumbe byʼomwigulu ekiri ooti Musengwa?
89.7: Omu lukiiko lwʼabatukulye omwigulu oKibbumba bamutyera nakimo ino, wʼentiisya okukiraku bonabona abamweruguuliriirye.
89.8: Oo Musengwa oWabwezye Bwonabwona, naani aali ooti niiwe? Oo Musengwa, oli nʼobwezye era oli mwesigwa mu byonabyona.
89.9: Ofuga enyanza nʼokwefukuula kwayo, amayengo owegeedumbya ogaikaikania.
89.10: Wasusungwire oLakabbu nʼafa. Abalabebo wabasalaanicirye ngʼokolesya obwezyebwo obwʼamaani.
89.11: Eigulu liryo, nʼekyalo kikyo, ekyalo nʼebikirimu niiwe owabikolere.
89.12: Wabbumbire amambuka nʼamaserengeta. Olusozi oTabboli nʼoKerumooni gyembera eriinalyo omwisangaalo.
89.13: Iwe oli wʼobwezye ino, engaloyo yʼamaani, engaloyo endiiro bagigulumalyanga.
89.14: Obutuukirirye nʼobwenkanya niibyo omusingi gwʼentebe yʼobwakabakabwo. Okutaka nʼobwesigwa bibonekera omu byokola.
89.15: Oo Musengwa, nga bʼenkabi abo abamaite okukuwuuja omu nyembo, abatambulira omu kitangaala kyʼokubbaawokwo.
89.16: Oku lulwo basangaala okumalaku olunaku, era bajagaana olwʼobutuukiriryebwo.
89.17: Ekitiisya kyabwe nʼamaani gaabwe bizwa eeri niiwe. Olwʼekisaakyo otuwa obuwanguli.
89.18: Oo Musengwa, niiwe engabo yaiswe, niiwe oMutukulye wa Isirairi, owatuwaire okabaka waiswe.
89.19: Omu biro ebyʼeira watumwire nʼabaweereryabo abeesigwa omu kwolesebwa oti, “Mpaire omulwani owʼamaani obubbeeri. Ngulumalya yooyo ogunalondere omu bantu bonabona okubba Kabaka.
89.20: Nkivumbwire nti oDawudi, yaabba muweererya wange, mmulondere nga mmusukaku amafuta amawonge okumwawula okubba kabaka.
89.21: Namuwanga amaani, era olwʼobwezye bwange yaabbanga mugumu.
89.23: Nalijigiricirya omumaisoge abalabebe, era ni mmalawo abo abamucaawa.
89.24: Naabbanga mwesigwa egyali era namulaganga okutaka okutakoma, era omu liina lyange yalisuna obuwanguli.
89.25: Yafuganga enyanza, engaloye endiiro nagiteekanga oku miiga.
89.26: Yankobanga ati, ‘Niiwe oBbaabba era oKibbumba wange, niiwe eIbbaale lyange omu neebisa era omununuli wange.’
89.27: Nalimusuuca mubere wange, yaligulumala okukiraku abakabaka bonabona abʼoku kyalo.
89.28: Namukwatiranga ekisa bulijo, era nakuumanga endagaano yange naye emirembe gyonagyona.
89.29: Omwibyairerye niimwo omwazwanga abakabaka emirembe nʼemirembe, nʼobwakabakabwe bwabbeerererangawo nga tibuwaawo ooti igulu.”
89.30: “Neye abʼeibyairerye owebalijeemera amateeka gange, ni bazwa oku biragiro byange,
89.31: owebalinyooma amateeka gange, ni bamenya ebiragiro byange,
89.32: nalibakubba omwigo olwʼebibbibibbi byabwe, era nalibafaamuula olwʼokubbenga kwabwe.
89.33: Neye tinalirekeraawo okumutaka, waire okuleka okutuukirirya ekinamusuubizire.
89.34: Tinalimenya endagaano yange naye, waire okucuusamu ebinamusuubizire.
89.35: Nalayiire omulundi gumo lumala olwʼeriina lyange eritukulye nti, oDawudi tinalimubbeya.
89.36: Eibyairerye lyabbeererangawo emirembe nʼemirembe, nʼobwakabakabwe bwabbeerererangawo ooti isana iryo eritakoma okwaka.
89.37: Bwabbeerererangawo emirembe nʼemirembe ooti mweri owegwaka, ni gukola obujulizi obwesigwa angulu.”
89.38: Neye atyanu Kibbumba omulekeswire era omuzwireku, osunguwaliire okabaka oguwasukireku amafuta.
89.39: Omenyerewo endagaano egiwakorere nʼomuweereryawo, era enguleye ogimumire omu nkungu.
89.41: Abatambuli ababitawo bonabona banyaga ebintubye, asuukire nseko gyʼabaliranwabe.
89.42: Owaire abamulwanisya amaani ni bamuwangula, abalabebe bonabona ni bajaagaana.
89.43: Ebyokulwanisyabye obisuucirye ebitagasa, era omu lutalo omulekere nandi nʼomubbeera.
89.44: Omutoireku obwezyebwe obwʼobwakabaka entebeye oyʼobwakabaka ogidyakire okwitakali.
89.46: Oo Musengwa, walituuca di okwebisa? Mirembe gyonagyona? Nʼobusungubwo bwalikomya di okwoca ooti musyo?
89.47: Oyebukirye ngʼobwomi bwange obwebuli obumpi. Oyebukirye ngʼabantu bonabona abewabbumbire, babbaawo kaseera-buseera ni bafa.
89.48: Muntuki omwomi etiyalifa? Naani ayezya okweramya obutaika e magombe?
89.49: Oo Musengwa, okutakakwo okutakoma okwasookere kuli nkonaki, iwe omwesigwa okuwasuubizire oDawudi?
89.50: Oo Musengwa, oyebukirye ngʼobwebali kuzumanga abaweereryabo, era ngʼobwenguminkiriza ebizumi byʼabantu bonabona.
89.51: Oo Musengwa, abalabebo bazuma oguwasukireku amafuta, nabuli e gyayaba bamuzuma.
89.52: OMusengwa bamuwuujenge emirembe gyonagyona! Amiina era Amiina.

90.1: Oo Musengwa, obbaire kiirukiro kyaiswe, emirembe nʼemirembe.
90.2: Ensozi nga gikaali okubbaawo, era ngʼokaali okubbumba ekyalo nʼebintu byamu, emirembe nʼemirembe niiwe oKibbumba.
90.3: Abantu obairyayo omwitakali, ngʼokoba oti, “Mwireyo omwitakali inywe abaana bʼabantu.”
90.4: Emyanka olukumi omumaisogo giri ooti lunaku olumo olubita, ooba ooti kisisimuko omu kiire.
90.5: Otoolawo obwomi bwʼabantu ngʼekirooto owekizwawo. Bali ooti isubi erimeruka amakeezi,
90.6: linyirira ni likula nakusani, neye owebwirugalira libba liwotokere era likalire.
90.7: Obusungubwo butumalawo, era ensisi etukwata olwʼobulwabwo.
90.8: Okwonoona kwaiswe okuteekere omumaisogo, nʼebikole byaiswe ebibbibibbi ebyʼekyama obiteekere e gyʼobibonera.
90.9: Obulwabwo busalaku enaku gyʼobwomi bwaiswe, obwomi bwaiswe buwaawo mangu ngʼomuyeero.
90.10: Emyanka gyʼobwomi bwaiswe gikoma ku 70, ooba 80 owetubba abacaati, kaisi nga giizwire kufambikana na bigosi. Gyaba mangu, ni tuzwawo.
90.11: Naani amaite amaani gʼobusungubwo, nʼobulwabo obuzweraku ni bakutya?
90.12: Otwegesye okumanya obwomi bwaiswe ngʼowebuli obumpi, kaisi tubbe bʼamalabuki.
90.13: Oo Musengwa, otwiriryemu. Walituuca di ngʼotusunguwaliire? Okwatire iswe abaweereryabo ekisa.
90.14: Nabuli makeezi otulagenge okutakakwo okutakoma, kaisi twembenge nga tujaagaana era tusangaalenge omu bwomi bwaiswe bwonabwona.
90.15: Otuwe eisangaalo okumala ebiseera nga bidi omu watugadiirye, era okumala emyanka ngʼegitwabbaire omu bugosi.
90.16: Otuganye iswe abaweereryabo tubone ebikolebyo ebyʼamaani, nʼabaizukulu baiswe bona babone ekitiisyakyo.
90.17: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba waiswe, otuwenge enkabi, emirimo gyaiswe ogiwenge enkabi. Dala owenge emirimo gyaiswe enkabi.

91.1: Nabuli ayaba eeri oNambulaku aMwagaagana okusuna obukuumi, nabuli eyaabbanga omu bukuumi bwʼoyo oWabwezye Bwonabwona,
91.2: yamukobanga ati, “Niiwe ekiirukiro kyange era niiwe olugaga lwange, niiwe oKibbumba wange; niiwe oguneesiga.”
91.3: Dala niiye eyakununulanga eeri emitego egibategere, nʼeeri okawumpuli ajigirica.
91.4: Iye yakulabiriranga, era omu biyayabye mu wasunanga obukuumi. Obwesigwabwe bwabbanga ngaboyo okukukuumanga.
91.5: Tiwatyenge entiisya yʼobwire, waire akalaso akebalasa omusana,
91.6: ooba olumbe olwiza omu ndikiirya, waire amaani gʼendikiirya agajigirica esaawa omukaaga egyʼomusana.
91.7: Abantu 1,000 abakuliranire bayinza okufa, nʼabantu 10,000 abakweruguuliriirye ni bafa, neye iwe akabbikabbi nandi ni kakutuukaku.
91.9: Olwʼokubba osuucirye oMusengwa kiirukirokyo, iye oNambulaku aMwagaagana omukuumiwo,
91.10: akabbikabbi tikalikutuukaku, era mpaawo kazigizigi akalituuka oku kisitokyo.
91.11: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba yalagiranga abamalaikabe okukukuuma nabuli gyoyaba.
91.12: Balikubbaka omu ngalo gyabwe, kaisi nandi weekontola ekigerekyo okwibbaale.
91.13: Walyemyaga ompologoma nʼoyema oku nkongomasaka, walyemyaga ompologoma omukambwe nʼoyema oku mpiri.
91.14: OKibbumba akoba ati, “Nalimununula olwʼokubba antaka. Era namukuumanga olwʼokubba angondera.
91.15: Oweyansabanga namwirangamu, omu bigosi naabbanga naye. Nalimununula ni mmugulumalya.

92.1: Oo Musengwa, kisa okukwebalyanga, nʼokwemba okukuwuujanga iwe oNambulaku aMwagaagana.
92.2: Kisa okutumula oku kutakakwo okutakoma nabuli makeezi nʼoku bwesigwabwo nabuli kiire,
92.3: nga tukubba enkana eyʼenkosi eikumi era nga tukubba otongoli.
92.4: Oo Musengwa, ebyokola binsangaalya, nnyemba nʼeisangaalo olwʼebyo ebyokola.
92.5: Oo Musengwa, ebyokola nga bikulu, nʼebyoseega nga bigosi okubitegeera!
92.6: Omuntu omumayaani tamanya kinu, era omusirusiru takitegeera ati,
92.7: newankubbaire ababbibabbi bameruka ooti isubi, era bonabona abakola ebibbibibbi ngʼebibakola bibitamu, balibajigirica emirembe gyonagyona.
92.8: Neye iwe Musengwa, bakugulumalyanga emirembe gyonagyona.
92.9: Oo Musengwa kyʼamazima kiti, abalabebo balijigirika. Bonabona abakola ebibbibibbi balibasalaanica.
92.10: Neye nze ompaire amaani ooti ga mbogo, era onsukireku amafuta amasa.
92.11: Mboine ngʼowangula abalabe bange, abanjiigaania bakungire ni mpulira.
92.12: Abatuukirirye babba kusani ooti kikolo kyʼensansa, babba bagumu ooti mivule gyʼomu Lebbanooni.
92.13: Babba ooti misaale egibakomere okumpi nʼenyumba ya Musengwa, ni gikula nakusani oku luuga lwʼeYeekaalu ya Kibbumba waiswe.
92.14: Omu bukaire gisigala nga gibala ebibala, gisigala nga mijimu era nga ginyirira.
92.15: Ekyo kiraga kiti oMusengwa musa, era niiye eibbaale lyange omu neebisa, era mwiye mpaamu bubbibubbi.

93.1: OMusengwa niiye afuga, era ali nʼekitiisya; oMusengwa ali nʼekitiisya era ali nʼamaani. Yateekere ekyalo omu kifo kyakyo, era tikyezya okuyuugayuugana.
93.2: Oo Musengwa, entebeyo eyʼobwakabaka yabbairewo kuzwa ira nʼeira. Era obbeerererawo emirembe nʼemirembe.
93.3: Oo Musengwa, amaizi gʼomu nyanza geedumbya, enyanza ewooga, enyanza esetwire amayengo gaayo.
93.4: OMusengwa aali omwigulu, iye wʼamaani okukiraku okuwooga kwʼenyanza, nʼokukiraku amayengo agʼamaani.
93.5: Oo Musengwa, ebiragirobyo tibicuuka, era eYeekaaluyo ntukulye ino emirembe nʼemirembe.

94.1: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba anyaaŋa, iwe oKibbumba anyaaŋa, oboneke olage obusungubwo.
94.2: Iwe omulamuzi owa bonabona, osetuke osasule abʼamalala ekibasaanira.
94.3: Oo Musengwa, ababbibabbi balituuca di, balituuca di okwepanka?
94.4: Basesema bibono byʼokwekudumbalya, era bonabona abakola ebibbibibbi baizwire kwepanka.
94.5: Oo Musengwa, basasaigula abantubo, era bagadya abantubo okububwo.
94.6: Baita abanamwandu nʼabafuubbi, era batemula abanamawanga.
94.7: Bakoba bati, “OMusengwa tali kubona; iye oKibbumba wa Yaakobbo tafaayo.”
94.8: Bamaayaani inywe, mwegendereze, basirusiru inywe, mwalibba di nʼamalabuki?
94.9: Iye oyo eyateekerewo amatwi tawulira? Iye oyo eyakolere amaiso tabona?
94.10: Iye oyo anenya abanamawanga tabonereza? Iye oyo ayegesya abantu amalabuki mpaawo ekyamaite?
94.11: OMusengwa amaite ebiseego byʼabantu, abimaite ati binambulamu.
94.12: Oo Musengwa, wʼenkabi iye oyo ogwogolola, iye oyo ogwoyegesya amateekago.
94.13: Omuwumuca omu biseera ebigosi paka nga bakuuliire ababbibabbi ekiina okubapapalya.
94.14: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa talekawo abantube; iye talekesula abantube okububwe.
94.15: Okusalanga emisango omu butuukirirye kwaliirawo, bonabona abalongoole omu myoyo balikusiima.
94.16: Naani eyasetuka okuntaasa eeri ababbibabbi? Naani eyayemerera okundamya abakola ebikole ebibbibibbi?
94.17: Singa oMusengwa tiyambereire, nandibbaire nayabire ira e magombe e wasiriki.
94.18: Owenakobere nti, “Ntyerera,” Musengwa okutakakwo okutakoma, kwampaniriire.
94.19: Ebineeraliikirirya owebimbitiriraku, onjiryamu amaani ni nsangaala.
94.20: Toyezya okwegaita nʼabafugi abacaamu, abagunja ebitali byobwenkanya omu mateeka.
94.21: Ababbibabbi beekumba ni bateesa okukola obubbibubbi abatuukirirye, ni basalira ogwʼokufa abanambulaku musango.
94.22: Neye oMusengwa niiye olugaga lwange, era oKibbumba wange niiye eibbaale lyange omu neebisa, mwiye ginjirukira okunkuuma.
94.23: Yalibabonereza olwʼebibbibibbi byabwe, nʼabajigirica olwʼobubbibubbi bwabwe. OMusengwa iye oKibbumba waiswe yalibajigirica.

95.1: Mwize twembere oMusengwa, tumwembere nʼeisangaalo, oyo eIbbaale omutwebisa ni tusuna obununuli.
95.2: Oleke twabe omumaisoge tumwebalye, era tubbookooke enyembo egyʼokumuwuuja.
95.3: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba, oMusengwa niiye oKibbumba omukulu, era niiye oKabaka omukulu akira abakibbumba abandi bonabona.
95.4: Emisingi gyʼekyalo giri mu ngalogye, nʼenairungu gyʼensozi, gyona gigye.
95.5: Enyanza yiye, olwʼokubba niiye eyagikolere, nʼolukalu niiye eyalwekoleire nʼengalogye.
95.6: Mwize tukotame era tusinze, tukome amazwi omumaiso ga Musengwa, eyatubbumbire.
95.7: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba niiye oKibbumba waiswe, era niiswe abantu abʼomu kiriisiryokye, niiswe entaamagye egyalabirira. Olwatyanu owemwawulira eigonolye,
95.8: timwakakanyalya emyoyo gyanywe ngʼabazeiza baanywe owebakolere e Meribba, oku lunaku olubabbaire e Maasa omwidungu,
95.9: ngʼowebankemere ni bangezesya, waire nga babbaire baboine ebinabbaire nkolere.
95.10: Okumala emyanka 40 nasunguwaliire abantu abo, ni nkoba nti, “Emyoyo gyabwe ginzwaku ni gigota, tibagondera ebiragiro byange.”
95.11: Kagira nasunguwaire ni ndayira nti, “Tibalituuka kadi omu kifo omu nankabaweereire ekiwuumulo.”

96.1: Mwembere oMusengwa olwembo oluyaaka, abʼoku kyalo nywenanywena mwembere oMusengwa.
96.2: Mwembere oMusengwa nga muwuuja eriinalye, nabuli lunaku mulangirirenge ngʼobwali omununuli.
96.3: Mumanyikisye ekitiisyakye omu mawanga, nʼebyewunyisya ebyakola omu bantu bonabona.
96.4: OMusengwa niiye omukulu era asaanira okumuwuuja ino, bali nʼokumuwa ekitiisya ino okukira ekibawa abakibbumba abandi bonabona.
96.5: Abakibbumba abandi bonabona abʼabanamawanga bifaananyi byʼokusinza, neye oMusengwa niiye eyabbumbire eigulu.
96.6: Ekitiisya nʼobukulu bimweruguuliriirye, obwezye nʼobusa biri omu Weemaye.
96.7: Inywe abantu abali oku kyalo muwuuje oMusengwa, muwuuje ekitiisya kya Musengwa nʼamaanige.
96.8: Muwe oMusengwa ekitiisya ekyasaanira, muleete ebyokuwaayo, era mwingire omu luugalwe.
96.9: Musinze oMusengwa ngʼowaanekaaneka omu butukulyebwe, abantu bonabona oku kyalo batukute omumaisoge.
96.10: Mukobere amawanga gonagona muti, “OMusengwa afuga.” Yateekere ekyalo omu kifo kyakyo, era tikyezya okuyuugayuugana. Yaliramula abantu mu bwenkanya.
96.11: Oleke eigulu lijaagaane, nʼekyalo kisangaale, oleke enyanza ewooge, nʼebigirimu byonabyona biceere nga bimuwuuja.
96.12: Oleke emisiri nʼebigirimu byonabyona bijaguze. Emisaale egyʼomu kibira gyonagyona giceere olwʼeisangaalo;
96.13: gyayembera omumaiso ga Musengwa, olwʼokubba aiza. Aiza okusalira ekyalo omusango. Yaliramula ekyalo mu bwenkanya, yaliramula abantu mu mazima.

97.1: OMusengwa niiye afuga, oleke ekyalo kisangaale; oleke abali oku bizinga bonabona bajaagaane.
97.2: Ebireri nʼondikiirya ozigizigi bimweruguuliriirye; obutuukirirye nʼobwenkanya niibyo omusingi gwʼentebe yʼobwakabakabwe.
97.3: Omusyo gumwekubbemberamu, ni gwoca abalabebe abamweruguliriirye.
97.4: Okumesyakwe kumoleka ekyalo, era ekyalo kibona ni kitya.
97.5: Ensozi omumaiso ga Musengwa gisaanuuka ooti malembo, gisaanuuka omumaiso ga Musengwa owʼekyalo kyonakyona.
97.6: Eigulu lirangirira obutuukiriryebwe, era abantu bonabona ni babona ekitiisyakye.
97.7: Bonabona abasinza ebifaananyi, abo abenyumiriza mwebyo ebitali Kibbumba, baswaire. Abakibbumba bonabona bakotamya emitwe okusinza oMusengwa.
97.8: Oo Musengwa, abʼomu Sayuuni basangaala, nʼabʼomu bibuga bya Yuda bajaagaana olwʼokulamulakwo.
97.9: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba iwe Musengwa, niiwe oNambulaku aMwagaagana afuga ekyalo kyonakyona, era bakugulumalirya nakimo ino okukiraku abakibbumba abandi bonabona.
97.10: Inywe abataka oMusengwa, mucaawe ekibbikibbi. Iye akuuma obwomi bwʼabo abamwesiga, era nʼabanunula omu bwezye bwʼababbibabbi.
97.11: Ekitangaala kyakira abatuukirirye, nʼeisangaalo libba eeri abʼemyoyo emirongoole.
97.12: Inywe abeesiga oMusengwa mujaagaane olwʼebyo ebyakola, era mumuwuuje iye oMutukulye.

98.1: Mwembere oMusengwa olwembo oluyaaka, olwʼokubba akolere ebyewuunyisya; olwʼobwezyebwe nʼamaanige amabitiriri, abawanguliire.
98.2: OMusengwa alagire ngʼobwali omununuli, era abanamawanga abalagire obutuukiriryebwe.
98.3: Ayebukiirye okutakakwe okutakoma nʼobwesigwabwe eeri aBaisirairi. Abantu omu kyalo kyonakyona baboine obununuli bwa Kibbumba waiswe.
98.4: Nywenanywena abʼoku kyalo, mubbookookere oMusengwa olwʼeisangaalo, mujaagaane nga mwemba okumuwuuja.
98.5: Mwembe okuwuuja oMusengwa nga mumukubbira otongoli, mumwembere nʼeigono eriweeweeri nga mukubba otongoli.
98.6: Era nga mufuwa amakondeere nʼonzobe, muceere olwʼeisangaalo omumaiso ga Musengwa iye oKabaka.
98.7: Oleke enyanza ewooge ngʼemuwuuja, nʼebigirimu byonabyona biceere nga bimuwuuja, ekyalo nʼebikirimu byonabyona bimwembere.
98.8: Oleke emiiga gikubbe omu ngalo, nʼensozi gyembere aamo omwisangaalo.
98.9: Oleke byembere omumaiso ga Musengwa, olwʼokubba aiza okusalira ekyalo omusango. Yalikubbembera abantu mu bwenkanya, era yaliramula abantu nga tiyeekubbira.

99.1: OMusengwa niiye afuga, era oleke amawanga gatukute. Atyaime oku ntebeye eyʼobwakabaka aakati omu bakeruubbi, era oleke ekyalo kitengeete.
99.2: OMusengwa niiye akira obukulu omu Sayuuni, niiye ogubagulumalya omu mawanga gonagona.
99.3: Oleke bawuuje eriinalye erikulu era eryʼentiisya. Iye Mutukulye.
99.4: OKabaka iye owabwezye, ataka bwenkanya. Wateekerewo enkola yʼokutamomola, era omwIsirairi okolere ekyo ekyʼobwenkanya era ekituuce.
99.5: Mugulumalye oMusengwa iye oKibbumba waiswe! Era mumusinze nga muli omumaiso gʼentebeye eyʼobwakabaka, olwʼokubba iye Mutukulye.
99.6: OMusa nʼAlooni babbaire bamo oku bakabonabe, nʼoSamwiri yabbaire moiza kwabo abamwegairiranga. Beegairiranga oMusengwa era nʼabairangamu.
99.7: Yatumwire nabo ngʼasinzirira omu kireri ekiterembereri ooti kikondo; bakwaite amateekage nʼebiragiro ebiyabbaire abawaire.
99.8: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba waiswe, wabairiremu. Wabalagire ngʼobwoli Kibbumba asoniya, waire wona nga wababonerezere olwʼebibbibibbi byabwe.
99.9: Mugulumalye oMusengwa iye oKibbumba waiswe, era mumusinzire oku lusozirwe olutukulye, olwʼokubba oMusengwa iye oKibbumba waiswe iye Mutukulye.

100.1: Mubbookookere oMusengwa nʼeisangaalo, nywenanywena abʼoku kyalo.
100.2: Muweererye oMusengwa nʼeisangaalo, mwize omumaisoge nga mwemba enyembo egyʼeisangaalo.
100.3: Mumanye muti oMusengwa niiye oKibbumba. Niiye eyatubbumbire, era tuli babe. Tuli bantu ababe era tuli ntaama gyʼomu kiriisiryokye.
100.4: Mwingirire omu mageetige nga mumwebalya, mwabe omu luugalwe nga mumuwuuja. Mumwebalye era muwuuje eriinalye.
100.5: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa musa, era okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona. Obwesigwabwe bubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.

101.1: Nayembanga oku kutakakwo okutakoma nʼoku bwenkanyabwo; Musengwa nakwemberanga nga nkuwuuja.
101.2: Neegenderezanga ni ntambulira omu bwomi obunambulaku kyokubunenya. Waliiza di egyendi? Omu kisito kyange, naabbanga wʼamazima.
101.3: Tinaguminkirizenge obubbibubbi bwonabwona. Ncaawa ebikole byʼabo abazwa oku Kibbumba, era tinabyemigirengemu.
101.5: Nabuli asibirirya oku mwinaye omu mbiso, namujigiricanga. Nabuli owʼamalala era owʼeidumi tinamuguminkirizenge.
101.6: Omwesigwa eeri oKibbumba, niiye ogunsiima okubbanga aamo nanze. Oyo onambulaku kyokumunenya niiye eyampeereryanga.
101.7: Omuntu omubbeyi tiyaabbenge omu kisito kyange, era atumula ebyobubbeyi tiyaabbenge aamo na nze.
101.8: Nabuli oluca najigiricanga ababbibabbi bonabona omu kyalo kinu, era nalimalirawo nakimo abakola ebibbibibbi omu kibuga kya Musengwa.

102.1: Oo Musengwa, owulire okusaba kwange, oganye okukunga kwange kutuuke egyoli.
102.2: Tiwankubbira omugongo nga ndi omu bugosi. Ontegere ekitwikyo, owenkusaba tiwaalwawo okunjiramu.
102.3: Obwomi bwange buwaawo mangu ooti mwosi, nʼomubiri gwange gumeigera ooti tanuulu.
102.4: Ngondagondere ooti isubi eribakubbakubbire ni liwotoka, nʼomwoyo gubula oku kyokulya.
102.6: Nsigaire denge ooti kiwuugulu ekiri omwidungu, nsuukire ooti kiwuugulu ekiri omu kinameje.
102.7: Mbonia obwire okuca, ndi ooti nyonyi asigaire yenkani oku kisooto kyʼenyumba.
102.8: Abalabe bange bamalaku olunaku nga banzuma, abanjerega, bakolesya eriina lyange ngʼekizumi.
102.9: Eikoke niiryo erisuukire ekyokulya kyange, ebyokunywa byange byetabulya nʼamaliga.
102.11: Obwomi bwange bwa kaseera katono ooti kiiriirye kyeigulo ekigotawo mangu, era mpotoka ooti isubi.
102.12: Neye iwe Musengwa, ofuga obwakabakabwo emirembe gyonagyona, era eitutumolyo lyabbeerererangawo emirembe gyonagyona.
102.13: Wasetuka nʼokwatira oSayuuni ekisa, olwʼokubba ekiseera kituukire ekyʼokumusaasira, ikyo ekiseerakyo ekituuce kituukire iwe okubbeera.
102.14: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba abaweereryabo bataka ino oSayuuni, basaalirwa okubona ngʼajigirikire!
102.15: Amawanga galitya eriina lya Musengwa, abakabaka bonabona abʼoku kyalo balitya ekitiisyakye.
102.16: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa yalyombeka obuyaaka oSayuuni, era yalyeragisya omu kitiisyakye.
102.17: Yaliiramu okusaba kwʼabadoobi, era tiyalinyooma okwegairira kwabwe.
102.18: Oleke kinu bakiwandiikire abʼomulembe ogwiza, kaisi awo kibbe kiti, nʼabebakaali okubyala baliwuuja oMusengwa:
102.19: Bakiwandiike bati, “OMusengwa yalolere ansi ngʼasinzirira omwigulu omu kifookye ekitukulye, ngʼasinzirira omwigulu nʼalingirira ekyalo.
102.20: Nʼawulira okukenyera kwʼabasibe, nʼateera abebabbaire basaliire ogwʼokufa.”
102.21: Awo balimanyikisya eriina lya Musengwa omu Sayuuni, era ni bamuwuuja omu Yerusaalemi,
102.23: OMusengwa ankendeiryeku amaani nga nkaali muvuvuka, asalireku emyanka gyange egyʼokuwangaala.
102.24: Kale ni nkoba nti, “Oo Kibbumba wange, tiwantoolawo nga nkaali okukairira, iwe abbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
102.25: Eira eino wakolere ekyalo nʼokigumirya oku musingi, era nʼeigulu niiwe owalikolere iwe onanyere.
102.26: Ibyo byaliwaawo, neye iwe obbeerererawo; byonabyona byalikairira ni biwaamu ooti kizwalo. Walibidyaka eedi ooti kizwalo era ni bigotawo.
102.27: Neye iwe osigala kyekimo, nʼobwomibwo tibwalikoma.”
102.28: Abaana bʼabaweereryabo baabbanga e gyoli ngʼobakuuma; eibyaire lyabwe lyabbeerererangawo omumaisogo.

103.1: Mwoyo gwange owuuje oMusengwa. Nabuli ekiri omunda mu nze kiwuuje eriinalye iye omutukulye.
103.2: Mwoyo gwange owuuje oMusengwa, era tiweerabiranga ebisa byonabyona ebyakola.
103.3: Asoniya ebibbibibbibyo byonabyona, nʼalamya endwairegyo gyonagyona.
103.4: Anunula obwomibwo okuzwa omu kiina ekitakoma, era nʼakuwa enkabi olwʼokutakakwe okutakoma nʼokusaasira.
103.5: Amatiza obwomibwo nʼebintu ebisa, nʼakwirya butobuto ooti kokomi.
103.6: OMusengwa iye tiyeekubbira, era alaga obwenkanya eeri bonabona abebagadya.
103.7: Yamanyikisirye oMusa entegekagye, era nʼalaga aBaisirairi ebikolebye.
103.8: Alumirwa era asaasira, alwawo okusunguwala, era aizwire kutaka okutakoma.
103.9: Tasengererya okutuvunaana, waire okubbeererera omusunguwali emirembe gyonagyona.
103.10: Tatubonereza ngʼebikole byaiswe ebibbibibbi owebituukana, waire kutusasula ngʼebibbibibbi byaiswe owebiri.
103.11: Ngʼeigulu obweriri e yala eino nʼekyalo, nʼokutakakwe okutakoma gikikoma okubba okungi eeri abo abamutya.
103.12: Ebikole byaiswe ebibbibibbi abitutoolaku, nʼabiteeka yala na iswe ngʼobuzwaisana obwebuli e yala nʼobugwaisana.
103.13: Ngʼoiteeye wʼabaana owaabba nʼekisa eeri abaanabe, atyo nʼoMusengwa waabba nʼekisa eeri abamutya.
103.14: Amaite ngʼobweyakolere emibiri gyaiswe, ayebukirya ati tuli nkungu.
103.15: Obwomi bwʼomuntu bubbaawo ekiseera kitono ooti isubi, bubbaawo ekiseera kitono ooti kimuli kyʼomu kigona.
103.16: Ompunga akifuwa, nandi ni kiirayo okuboneka.
103.17: Neye omu mirembe gyonagyona okutaka kwa Musengwa okutakoma kubba kwabo abamutya; era obusaabwe bubba oku baizukulu baabwe,
103.18: nʼoku bantu abakuuma endagaanoye, era ni banyiikiira okukwata amateekage.
103.19: OMusengwa yateekere entebeye eyʼobwakabaka mwigulu, era okwo kwafugira byonabyona.
103.20: Muwuuje oMusengwa inywe abamalaikabe abʼamaani, inywe abagondera ebiragirobye, era abagondera ebyakoba.
103.21: Muwuuje oMusengwa, nywenanywena amajeege agʼomwigulu, inywe abaweereryabe abakola ebyataka.
103.22: Muwuuje oMusengwa, inywe ebibbumbebye nywenanywena omu bifo byonabyona ebyafuga. Iwe mwoyo gwange, owuuje oMusengwa.

104.1: Mwoyo gwange, owuuje oMusengwa. Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange, oli mukulu ino. Oli nʼamaani era oli nʼekitiisya.
104.2: Ozwaire ekitangaala ooti kizwalo, oyanzululya eigulu ooti weema.
104.3: Oyombeka ekifookyo e kyobbaamu ku maizi agali angulu, osuuca ebireri kigaalikyo ekyʼamaje, nʼotyama oku mpunga nʼakutambulya.
104.4: Osuuca ompunga bakwendabo, omusyo nʼennimi gyagwo obisuuca baweereryabo.
104.5: Wakolere ekyalo nʼokigumirya oku musingi gwakyo, kaisi tikyatengeeta emirembe gyonagyona.
104.6: Wakibbuunireku amataba ooti bakibiikireku ijoola, amaizi ni geedumbya okusingamu ensozi.
104.7: Neye owewagakaawuukiire, ni gairuka; olwʼokubbwatukakwo, ni gayanguwa okuzwawo.
104.8: Gakulumukiire oku nsozi, ni gaserengetera omu biinamo, gaaba omu bifo e giwagateekeirewo okubbanga.
104.9: Wagateekeirewo ensalo e gigatayezya kubandya; okutairangayo tete okutaabaala oku kyalo.
104.10: Olagira ensulo ni gisindika amaizi omu nkonko, ni gakulumukira aakati wʼensozi.
104.11: Ebisolo byʼomu kigona byonabyona ni binywa amaizi ago, empunda gyʼomu kigona ni giika enyonta.
104.12: Ebinyonyi ni biruka ebinyumba byabyo okumpi nʼamaizi ago, ni bikungiranga omu bisaale.
104.13: Osinzirira omwigulu e gyobba nʼotoonyesya oikendi oku nsozi, ekyalo ni kiizula ebineneka ebyobalya.
104.14: Omererya ebisolo eisubi, nʼomererya abantu ebirime babirabirirenge, ni bibawa ebyokulya okuzwa omwitakali.
104.15: Ebirime ebyo bibawa enviinyo egibawa okusangaala, nʼebizigo ebibaleetera okunyenyenta, era nʼebyokulya ebibawa amaani.
104.16: Oikendi asukirira emisaale gya Musengwa, igyo emivule egyʼe Lebbanooni iye egiyamererye.
104.17: Mwigyo, ebinyonyi mu byerukira ebinyumba, ogolo nʼasuna awokugona omu misaale emiwanvu.
104.18: Enamoli gibba ku nsozi empanvu, enapowo igyo ni gyebisa omu njatikira.
104.19: Wateekerewo omweri okulaganga ebiro, nʼeisana limaite esaawa eyʼokugwa.
104.20: Oleetawo endikiirya, ni kwirugala, ebisolo byʼomu kigona byonabyona bizwayo ni bisooba okunoonia ekyokulya.
104.21: Empologoma enkambwe giruluma nga giyiiga ekyokulya kyagyo, era nga ginoonia ekyokulya oKibbumba ekyagiwa.
104.22: Eisana owerizwayo, gisooba, ni gikanga gyegonera omu mpuku gyagyo.
104.23: Olwo-so abantu ni bawuluka okwaba omu mirimo gyabwe, ni bakola paka igulo.
104.24: Oo Musengwa, ebintu ebyenjawulo ebiwakolere nga bingi ino! Byonabyona wabikolere nʼamalabuki, ekyalo kiizwire bibbumbebyo.
104.25: Waliwo nʼenyanza enene era engalami, erimu ebibbumbe ebingi ebitabalika, ebibbumbe ebyomi, ebitono nʼebinene.
104.26: Emeeri giseeyeeyeraku, nʼogumpiri oguwabbumbire guzeenyera omwo.
104.27: Ebibbumbe ebyo byonabyona biringirira niiwe okubiwa ekyokulya omu kiseera ekituuce.
104.28: Owobiwa ekyokulya, bitoola ni birya. Owobigabirira, birya ni biikutira nakimo ino.
104.29: Owobikubbira omugongo, byeraliikirira ino; owobitoolamu omwota, bifa era ni bikanga omu nkungu omu byazwire.
104.30: Owoobifuwamu omwota, obikola ni bibba byomi, era nabuli kimo oku kyalo nʼokisuuca kiyaaka.
104.31: Oleke ekitiisya kya Musengwa kibbeewo emirembe gyonagyona. Oleke oMusengwa asangaale olwʼebyo ebiyakolere.
104.32: Iye oyo alola oku kyalo ni kitengeeta, iye oyo akwata oku nsozi ni giduunya omwosi.
104.33: Nayemberanga oMusengwa omu bwomi bwange bwonabwona. Nayembanga okuwuuja oKibbumba wange nga nkaali ndi mwomi.
104.34: Oleke ebiseego byange bisangaalyenge oMusengwa, olwʼokubba eisangaalo lyange liri mu niiye.
104.35: Oleke abakola ebikole ebibbibibbi bajigirike oku kyalo, nʼababbibabbi baweerewo nakimo. Iwe mwoyo gwange, owuujenge oMusengwa. Muwuujenge oMusengwa.

105.1: Mwebalye oMusengwa, mumusinze, mumanyikisye ebikolebye omu mawanga.
105.2: Mumwembere, mwembe okumuwuuja, mutumule oku bikolebye byonabyona ebyewunyisya.
105.3: Mwenyumirizirenge omu liinalye iye omutukulye, abo abanoonia oMusengwa basangaale.
105.4: Munoonienge oMusengwa okubawa amaani, mumunoonienge bulijo.
105.5: Mwebukiryenge ebyewunyo ebiyakolere, nʼebyamagero ebiyakolere, nʼemisango egiyasalire,
105.6: inywe eibyaire lya Ibbulaimu omuweereryawe, inywe eibyaire lya Yaakobbo omulondewe.
105.7: Niiye oMusengwa iye oKibbumba waiswe; niiye alamula omu kyalo kyonakyona.
105.8: Akuuma endagaanoye emirembe gyonagyona, yeekuuma okutuukirirya ebisuubizobye eeri emirembe lukumi.
105.9: Eyo niiyo endagaano egiyakolere nʼoIbbulaimu, era ekyeyamo ekiyeeyamiire oIsaka.
105.10: Endagaano eyo yagikakasire eeri oYaakobbo okubba iteeka, era nʼeeri oIsirairi okubba ndagaano eyenkalaakalira.
105.11: Yakobere ati, “Nalibawa ekyalo kyʼe Kanani ni kibba kyanywe nʼeibyaire lyanywe.”
105.12: Babbaire bakaali batono, nga batono ino era nga basenze,
105.13: nga bagadangada igwanga kwigwanga, bwakabaka ku bwakabaka.
105.14: Cooka tiyabbaireku nʼogwaganya okubajolonga; era oku lwabwe, yakaawukiranga abakabaka ati,
105.15: “Timukwatanga oku balonde bange; abanaabbi bange timubakolanga akabbikabbi.”
105.16: OKibbumba yaleetere enzala omu kyalo kyʼe Kanani, nʼajigirica ebyokulya byabwe byonabyona.
105.17: Yatumire omuntu okubeekeerera omumaiso, nga niiye oYusufu ogubatundire okubba omugalama.
105.18: Ebigerebye babinuuwire nʼempingu, eikotirye ni balisibamu ekyoma,
105.19: paka ekiyabbaire atumwire owekyatuukiriire. Ekibono kya Musengwa ni kikakasa kiti, yabbaire mutuuce.
105.20: OFalaawo yamutumisirye nʼamutoola omu mabbuusu, iye oyo omufugi wʼabantu nʼamuteera.
105.21: Omufugi oyo yamuwaire obukulu omu nyumbaye, nʼokukulira ebintu byʼomufugi oyo byonabyona,
105.22: okulagiranga abakungu ngʼowaataka, nʼokuwanga abakulu amalabuki.
105.23: Awo oIsirairi nʼayaba e Misiri, oYaakobbo oyo yawulikiire omu kyalo kyʼe Kaamu.
105.24: OMusengwa yawaire abantube aBaisirairi okubyalagana ino, nʼabasuuca bangi ino okukiraku abalabe baabwe.
105.25: Yacuusire emyoyo gyʼaBamisiri ni bacaawa abantube aBaisirairi, era ni basalira abaweereryabe enkwe.
105.26: Awo oMusengwa nʼatuma oMusa omuweereryawe nʼAlooni omulondewe.
105.27: Ni bakola obumanyiciryo bwʼebyewunyo bya Kibbumba omu Bamisiri, nʼebyamagero omu kyalo kya Kaamu.
105.28: OMusengwa nʼasindika endikiirya nʼekwata oku kyalo, neye aBamisiri ni bajeemera ekibonokye.
105.29: Amaizi gʼomu miiga gyabwe yagasuucirye musaaye, enyanyi gyabwe ni gifa.
105.30: Ekyalo kyabwe ni kiizula ebikere, ni bingira nʼomu bisenge bya kabaka waabwe.
105.31: OMusengwa nʼalagira ebiziima byʼenzi nʼenkukuni ni biizula omu kyalo kyʼe Misiri mwonamwona.
105.32: Omukifo kya ikendi, yabasindikiire mabbaale ga ikendi, nʼokumesya ni kubba nabuli wantu omu kyalo kyabwe.
105.33: Yajigiricirye emizabbibbu nʼemitiini gyabwe, nʼavunianka emisaale gyonagyona omu kyalo kyabwe.
105.34: Nʼalagira enzige ni giiza, ni gibba nyingi nga tigibalika.
105.35: Ni girya ebimera byonabyona omu kyalo kyabwe, ni girya ebirime byabwe byonabyona.
105.36: Nʼaita abataane baabwe ababere bonabona omu kyalo kyabwe, ibo abaana baabwe abʼomu mavuvuka.
105.37: Awo nʼatoolayo aBaisirairi nga bali nʼefeeza nʼezaabbu, bonabona nga boomi era bʼamaani.
105.38: ABamisiri ni basiima ino ngʼaBaisirairi basimbuka, olwʼokubba babbaire babeeraliikirirya.
105.39: OMusengwa nʼayanzululya ekireri ni kibabiikanga, nʼateekawo nʼomusyo okubamoleekereranga obwire.
105.40: Basabire nʼabawa enindu, era yabawaire ebyokulya bibitiriri okuzwa omwigulu.
105.41: Yakubbire eibbaale amaizi ni gatiiriika okuzwamu, ni gakulumukira omwidungu ooti mwiga.
105.42: Kyabbaire kityo olwʼokubba yayebukiirye ekisuubizokye iye omutukulye, ekiyasuubizire oIbbulaimu omuweereryawe.
105.43: Kagira yatoire abantube omu Misiri nʼeisangaalo, ibo abalondebe yabatoireyo nga bajaagaana.
105.44: Nʼabawa ebyalo byʼabanamawanga, era ni basuna obwananyini oku birime badi ebibabbaire bakalabanire,
105.45: kaisi bayezye okugonderanga ebiragirobye, era bakwatenge amateekage. Muwuujenge oMusengwa.

106.1: Muwuujenge oMusengwa. Mwebalyenge oMusengwa, olwʼokubba musa; okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
106.2: Naani ayezya okubbutula ebyʼamaani byonabyona oMusengwa ebyakola, ooba okumuwuuja ekimala ngʼowaasaanira?
106.3: Bʼenkabi ibo abo abakola ebyobwenkanya, ibo abakola ebituuce bulijo.
106.4: Oo Musengwa onjebukiryenge, ngʼokolera abantubo ebyʼekisa, zena ombeerenge ngʼobanunula,
106.5: olwo kaisi njezye okubona ngʼabalondebo basuna ebisa, nsangaalire aamo nʼeigwangalyo; neenyumirizire aamo nʼabantubo okububwo.
106.6: Tukolere ebikole ebibbibibbi ngʼabazeiza baiswe owebakolere, tusoberye, ni tukola obubbibubbi.
106.7: Abazeiza baiswe nga bali e Misiri, tibafiireyo okwebukirya ebyamagero ebiwakolere. Tibayebukiirye okutakakwo okutakoma, wazira bajeemere owebatuukire oku nyanza entukuliki.
106.8: Neye era iye yabanunwire oku lwʼeriinalye, kaisi alage obwezyebwe obubitiriri.
106.9: Yakaawukiire enyanza entukuliki nʼekalira; yabeekubbembeire ni babita omu lukonko nga lukalu ooti idungu.
106.10: Yabalokoire omu bwezye bwʼababacaawa; yabanunwire omu bwezye bwʼabalabe baabwe.
106.11: Amaizi gamirire abalabe baabwe, nandi ni wasigalakuuwo kadi moiza.
106.12: Awo-so abantube ni baikirirya ebiyatumwire, ni bayemba nga bamuwuuja.
106.13: Neye beerabiire mangu ebiyabbaire akolere, era tibakuumiriire okulungamyakwe.
106.14: Nga bali omwidungu babitiriirye okutaka ebyokulya, era owebabbaire eeyo, ni bagezesya oKibbumba.
106.15: Kale nʼabawa ekibamusabire, neye nʼabasindikamu okawumpuli.
106.16: Nga bali omu nkambi, bakwatiire oMusa engongi, ni bagikwatira nʼAlooni omuwonge wa Musengwa.
106.17: Eitakali lyatikire ni limira oDasani, era ni lirya Abbiraamu nʼabainaye.
106.18: Omusyo gwatumbukire omu basengereri baabwe, era omusyo ni gumalawo abantu abo ababbibabbi.
106.19: Nga bali e Kolebbu, babbumbire ekifaananyi kya nyana ekyʼokusinza, ni basinza ekitali Kibbumba ekibabbumbire omu kyoma.
106.20: Ekitiisya ekibandiwaire oKibbumba, ni bakiwa kifaananyi kya nte, iye alya isubi.
106.21: Beerabiire oKibbumba eyabanunwire, iye eyabbaire akolere ebikulu omu Misiri,
106.22: nʼebyewunyo ebiyabbaire akolere omu kyalo kyʼe Kaamu, nʼebyʼentiisya ebiyabbaire akolere oku nyanza entukuliki!
106.23: Nʼolwekyo oKibbumba nʼakoba ati yankubbaire abasaanyawo, singa oMusa omulondewe, tiyayemereirewo okumwegairira oku lwʼabantu, atyo nʼaica obusungu nandi nʼabasaanyawo.
106.24: Awo ni banyooma ekyalo ekyesiimisya, olwʼokubba tibaikiririirye omu kisuubizokye.
106.25: Neye beemuluguunyiire omu weema gyabwe, era nandi bagondera oMusengwa.
106.26: Kagira yasiirirye engalogye ngʼalayira ati, yalibaitira omwidungu,
106.27: nʼaitira eibyaire lyabwe omu banamawanga, ni basalaanikira omu byalo nago.
106.28: Beemigiire omu kusinza oBbaali Peyoli, ni balya ebibawongereyo eeri abafu.
106.29: Bagirire oMusengwa nʼabasunguwalira olwʼebikole byabwe, era okawumpuli nʼabagwamu.
106.30: Awo oFenekansi nʼaguma nʼabingiramu era nʼabonereza abasoberye, era okawumpuli nʼakoma.
106.31: Ekyo ni kimuzweraku okumubala okubba omutuukirirye, emirembe gyonagyona.
106.32: Oku nsulo gyʼe Meribba yona basunguwaliiryeyo oMusengwa, ni baleetera oMusa emiteewaana.
106.33: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba basunguwairye ino oMusa, nʼatumula ebyʼekisiru.
106.35: Neye ni bakolagana nabo, era ni beega enkola gyabwe egyʼobukaafiiri.
106.36: Ni basinza ebifaananyi byabwe ebyʼokusinza, ekintu ekyabasuukiire omutego.
106.37: Ni bawangayo nʼabaana baabwe abaisuka, nʼabaala okubba esadaaka eeri emizimu.
106.38: Basukanga omusaaye ogunambulaku musango, omusaaye gwʼabataane baabwe nʼabaala baabwe abebaawangayo ngʼesadaaka eeri abakibbumba bʼe Kanani. Ekyalo ni bakyonoona nʼokusuka omusaaye.
106.39: Batyo ni beeyononesya, olwʼebikole byabwe, era olwʼebikole byabwe ni babba tibeesigwa eeri oKibbumba.
106.40: OMusengwa kagira yasunguwaliire ino abantube, era nʼazuzuula abantube okububwe.
106.41: Yabawaireyo eeri abanamawanga, era ababacaawa ni babafuganga.
106.42: Abalabe baabwe ni babajooganga, era nʼabaica ansi wʼeifuge lyʼabalabe baabwe!
106.43: Emirundi mingi oMusengwa yabanunulanga, neye ibo ni basalangawo kumujeemera, era ni beeyongeranga kweinika mu kukolanga kibbikibbi.
106.44: Neye era yabakwatiranga ekisa omu kuluga kwabwe, nʼawuliranga okukunga kwabwe.
106.45: Oku lwabwe, nʼayebukiryanga endagaanoye, era nʼairyanga omwoyo olwʼokutakakwe okubitiriri.
106.47: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba waiswe otununule, otusolooje okuzwa omu mawanga, kaisi twezye okwebalyanga eriinalyo iwe omutukulye, era tusangaalenge nga tukuwuuja.
106.48: OMusengwa, oyo oKibbumba wa Isirairi, bamuwuujenge emirembe nʼemirembe. Era abantu bonabona bakobenge bati, “Amiina!” Muwuujenge oMusengwa.

107.1: “Mwebalye oMusengwa olwʼokubba musa; okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.”
107.2: Oleke oMusengwa abeyanunwire bakirangirire; abo abeyanunwire omu bwezye bwʼomulabe,
107.3: abo abeyasoloojere okuzwa omu mawanga, okuzwa e buzwaisana nʼe bugwaisana, nʼe mambuka nʼe maserengeta.
107.4: Bagadangadiire omwidungu, nga tibabona enzira eyaba omu kibuga e gibayezya okutyama.
107.5: Enzala nʼenyonta byabalumire, era ni bawaamu eisuubi.
107.6: Awo ni beekungirira oMusengwa omu bigosi byabwe, era nʼabanunula omu kuluga kwabwe.
107.7: Yabeekubbembeire omu nzira enterembereri, paka owebatuukire omu kibuga awokutyama.
107.8: Kale beebalye oMusengwa olwʼokutakakwe okutakoma nʼolwʼebyewunyobye ebyakolera abantu.
107.9: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba abo abali enyonta, iye agibamalaku era aikutya abanzalwa nʼebintu ebisa.
107.10: Abamo babbanga mu ndikiirya ikyo ekiiriirye ekyokufa, nga basibe omu mabbuusu, era nga banyigule oku njegere,
107.11: olwʼokujeemera ebiragiro bya Kibbumba, nʼokunyooma okusisiitira kwʼoNambulaku aMwagaagana.
107.12: Kale nʼabeeyanikisya emyoyo gyabwe nʼemirimo egikaluba; baagwanga ansi neye nga mpaawo ababbeera.
107.13: Awo ni beekungirira oMusengwa omu bigosi byabwe, era nʼabanunula omu kuluga kwabwe.
107.14: Nʼabatoola omu ndikiirya ikyo ekiriirye kyʼokufa, nʼakutula enjegere egyabbaire gibanyigwire.
107.15: Kale beebalye oMusengwa olwʼokutakakwe okutakoma, nʼolwʼebyewunyo ebyakolera abantu.
107.16: Amenya amageeti agebakolere omu bbulonzi, nʼakutulamu emitalimbwa.
107.17: Abamo omu basirusiru bwabwe boonoonere, era ni bagada olwʼebibbibibbi byabwe.
107.18: Emyoyo gyabwe gyenyinyairye ebyokulya byonabyona, ni batuuka ku mugo gwʼamagombe.
107.19: Awo ni beekungirira oMusengwa omu bugosi bwabwe, era nʼabanunula omu kuluga kwabwe.
107.20: Yatumire ekibonokye nʼabalamya, nʼabanunula omu kufa.
107.21: Kale beebalye oMusengwa olwʼokutakakwe okutakoma, nʼolwʼebyewunyo ebyakolera abantu.
107.22: Bawengeyo esadaaka egyʼokwebalya, era bayembenge nʼeisangaalo okulangirira ebyakola.
107.23: Abamo baseeyeeyeire oku nyanza omu meeri; nga batambulya ebyamaguli oku gunyanza.
107.24: Baboine ebikole oMusengwa ebiyakolere, ebyewunyisya ebiyakolere oku ganyanza.
107.25: Yalagiire ompunga owʼamaani nʼafuwa, nʼasetula amayengo oku gunyanza.
107.26: Ni gasetula emeeri omwibbanga, era ni gigwa ansi omu lwina lwa mayengo. Omu kabbikabbi akatyo ni bawaamu emyoyo.
107.27: Ni bayuuga era ni bagagaituka ooti bateemeere, era ni bakaya ekyokukola.
107.28: Awo ni beekungirira oMusengwa omu bugosi bwabwe, era nʼabanunula omu kuluga kwabwe.
107.29: Yasiricirye ompunga, era amayengo ni gawaaku.
107.30: Awo ni basangaala olwʼamayengo okuwaaku, nʼabalungamya ni batuuka oku mwalo egibatakire.
107.31: Kale beebalye oMusengwa olwʼokutakakwe okutakoma, nʼolwʼebyewunyobye ebyakolera abantu.
107.32: Oleke bamugulumalye omu lukumbaana lwʼabantu, era bamuwuuje omu lukiiko lwʼabeekubbemberi.
107.33: Asuuca emiiga idungu, nʼasuuca ensulo gyʼamaizi itakali erikalu.
107.34: Nʼasuuca ekyalo ekijimu kikwere, olwʼobubbibubbi bwʼabo abakityamamu.
107.35: Asuuca eidungu ni libbaamu ebidiba byʼamaizi, nʼekyalo ekikalu ni kibbaamu ensulo egikulumuka.
107.36: Era omwo mwateeka abanzalwa okubbanga, ni bombekamu ekibuga ekyʼokutyamangamu.
107.37: Basiga ensigo omu misiri, ni bakoma emizabbibbu, era ni basuna amakungula mangi.
107.38: Yabawaire enkabi ni beeyongera ino obungi, era nandi nʼaganya ebyayo byabwe okukendeera.
107.39: Owebakendeire obungi ni banyolwa olwʼokubagadya, nʼebigosi, nʼenima,
107.40: oMusengwa yanyoomere abakungu baabwe, nʼabaleetera okugadangadira omwidungu awabula enzira.
107.41: Neye abadamba yʼabatoire omu kugada, era ebisito byabwe nʼabiizulya abantu ooti biraalo ebirimu ebyayo ebingi.
107.42: Abatuukirirye babona ebyo era ni basangaala, neye ababbibabbi bonabona ni babbuunaku eminwa gyabwe.
107.43: Nabuli ali nʼamalabuki, ebyo abiteekeku omwoyo; era bafumintirizenge oku kutaka okwa Musengwa okutakoma.

108.1: Oo Kibbumba, omwoyo gwange mugumu; nayembanga era ni nkuwuuja nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona.
108.2: Olamuke iwe tongoli era iwe nkana! Nze nalamuka ngʼemambya ekaali okusala!
108.3: Oo Musengwa nakusisiijiryanga omu bantu. Nayembanga okukuwuuja omu mawanga.
108.4: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba okutakakwo okutakoma kugulumali okukiraku eigulu; obwesigwabwo butuuka nʼoku kireri.
108.5: Oo Kibbumba, bakugulumalyenge okubitamu eigulu, oleke ekitiisyakyo kiwoisye ekyalo kyonakyona.
108.6: Otununule era otubbeere ngʼokolesya obwezyebwo, kaisi abatakebo bayezye okuwunuka.
108.7: OKibbumba atumuliire omu Weemaye ati, “Naligabulyagamu oSekemu nga njaagaana, ni nsalasalamu ekiinamo oSukosi.
108.8: OGireyaadi kyalo kyange, nʼoManase kyange. Efulaimu iye nkofiira yange eyʼekyoma, oBuyudaaya iye mwigo gwange ogwʼobwakabaka.
108.9: OMowaabbu iye kalaayi omunnaabira. Edomu iye gimmumaku engaito gyange; era nceera olwʼokubba mpangwire ekyalo kyʼe Firisitiya.”
108.10: Naani eyalinnyingirya omu kibuga ekiriku olugaga? Naani eyalineekubbembera okwingira omwEdomu?
108.11: Oo Kibbumba, dala otulekeswire? Tokaali oyaba nʼamaje gaiswe omu lutalo?
108.12: Otuwe obubbeeri okulwanisya omulabe oyo, olwʼokubba obubbeeri bwʼabantu tibugasa.
108.13: Nga tuli nʼoKibbumba twasunanga obuwanguli, era niiye eyayemyagiranga ansi abalabe baiswe.

109.2: olwʼokubba abantu ababbibabbi era ababbeyi bankotoogerera; bantumulaku ebibono ebyobubbeeyi.
109.3: Bansukumulaku ebibono byʼobucaawi; bannumba anambula nsonga.
109.4: Nze okubataka, bansasulamu mpalano, neye nze neewaayo mu kusaba.
109.5: Omu kubakola okusani bansasulamu bibbibibbi, owembalaga okutaka, ibo bansasulamu bucaawi.
109.6: Omuteekeku omuntu omubbimubbi amulamule, oleke omulabewe niiye abbe amulumirize.
109.7: Owebamuwozesya, bagumusingisye, era okusabakwe bakubale ngʼekibbikibbi.
109.8: Oleke ekiseera kyʼobwomibwe kibbe kitono; oleke omuntu ogondi atwale ekifookye ekyʼobwekubbemberi.
109.9: Oleke abaanabe babbe bafuubbi, era omukaliwe abbe namwandu.
109.10: Oleke abaanabe babbe balaaduuki abasabirirya; oleke bababbingenge omu bisito byabwe ebifafaagani.
109.11: Oleke amubanza amuwambeku ebyalinabyo byonabyona; oleke abaizaizana bamunyageku ebintubye byonabyona ebiyakolereire.
109.12: Oleke adambeku amukwatira ekisa, ooba afaayo oku baanabe abafuubbi.
109.13: Oleke eibyairerye life liweewo, era babbe nga tibakaali babeebukirya omu mulembe ogwaliiraku.
109.14: Oleke oMusengwa ayebukiryenge ebibbibibbi byʼabazeizabe; era oleke ekibbikibbi kya maaye tiyakisoniya.
109.15: Oleke oMusengwa ayebukiryenge ebibbibibbi byabwe bulijo, era abonere nakimo ati babeerabira oku kyalo.
109.16: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba tiyaseegereku okukola ebyʼekisa, wazira yayiigaanirye abadoobi, nʼabadamba nʼabanyolere omu myoyo okubaita.
109.17: Iye yatakanga kulaama, kale oleke ebiraamibye bimukangire; ngʼowenandi nʼasiimanga okutakirya abantu enkabi, kale oleke gimwesambe.
109.18: Yeeteekereku okulaama ni kubba kwa bulijo ooti kizwalokye; kwamwingiire ooti maizi agaanywa ni gaingira omu mubiri, kwamwingiire ooti kalifuwa oguyeesiiga nʼaingira omu magumba.
109.19: Aale oleke ebiraami bimwevambiryeku ooti kizwalo ekyazwala, bimwesibeku ooti musipi bulijo oguyeesiba.
109.20: Oleke ebyo bibbe niibyo empeera oMusengwa egyawa abalabe bange, abo abantumulaku okubbikubbi.
109.21: Neye iwe, Kibbumba oMusengwa wange, ombeere olwʼeriinalyo, era onnunule olwʼobusa bwʼokutakakwo okutakoma.
109.22: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba ndi mudoobi, era ndamba, era ndi mukosefu omu mwoyo.
109.23: Natira okugotawo ooti kiiriirye kyeigulo ekigotawo mangu, banfuumuula ngʼompunga owaafuumuula enzige.
109.24: Amazwi gange ganafuwire olwʼokutalya; nnyondere era nsigaire magumba.
109.25: Nsuukire kizumi eeri abalabe bange; owebambona, batengeetya mitwe olwʼokunduula.
109.26: Oo Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba wange ombeere, onnunule olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma.
109.27: Oleke bamanye bati, obbaire niiwe, bati iwe Musengwa niiwe okikolere.
109.28: Oleke ibo balaame, neye iwe ompe enkabi; Oleke abanjiigaania baswale, neye oganye nze omuweereryawo nsangaale.
109.29: Oleke abalabe bange baswale ino, era oleke ensoni gibabbeeku ooti bazwaire bizwalo.
109.30: Neebalyanga ino oMusengwa nga mbutula; namuwuujanga omu lukumbaana lwʼabantu olunene.
109.31: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba alwanirira adamba, okumununula eeri abo abamusalira ogwʼokufa.

110.1: OMusengwa yakobere oMusengwa wange ati, “Otyame ngʼondiraine, oku lubba lwange olwʼengalo endiiro, paka owenaligondya abalabebo ni mbasuuca mukonkolo gwʼokuwuumuliryaku ebigerebyo.”
110.2: OMusengwa yaligalamya obwakabakabwo okuzwera omu Sayuuni; walifuga abalabebo abakweruguuliriirye.
110.3: Oku lunaku olwʼokulwanisiryaku abalabebo amajeego galyewaayo ni gakwegaitaku. Abavuvukabo baliiza e gyoli, oku nsozi entukulye okukubbeera, ni bakwiryamu amaani ngʼolume lwʼamakeezi oweruwolya eitakali.
110.4: OMusengwa yalayiire era tiyalicuusa ekiyalayiire ati, “Oli kabona owʼemirembe nʼemirembe, okufaananaku nʼoMerikizedeki ngʼoweyabbaire kabona.”
110.5: OMusengwa ali oku lubbaalwo olwʼengaloyo endiiro okukukuuma, oweyalisunguwala, yalisasaigula abakabaka.
110.6: Yaliramula amawanga, ekyalo ni kiizula emirambo, era yalisasaigula abafugi oku kyalo kyonakyona.
110.7: Neye iye okabaka yalinywa okwiruba eriri oku nzira, era yaliiramu amaani olwakuwangula abalabebe.

111.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa. Neebalyanga oMusengwa nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona omu batuukirirye era omu nkumbaana gyabwe.
111.2: OMusengwa ebyakola bikulu, bonabona ababisangaalira babifumintirizaku.
111.3: Ebyakola byʼekitiisya era bikulu, obutuukiriryebwe bubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
111.4: OMusengwa agira abantu ni beebukirya ebikolebye ebyewuunyisya, iye wʼekisa era alumirwa.
111.5: Agabirira abamutya ebyokulya, era ayebukirya endagaanoye bulijo.
111.6: Alagire abantube ngʼobwali owʼamaani, nʼabawa ebyalo byʼabanamawanga.
111.7: Omu byakola, mwesigwa era mwenkanya, era ebiragirobye byonabyona byesigwa.
111.8: Bibbeerererawo emirembe nʼemirembe, babiteekerewo mu mazima era mu butuukirirye.
111.9: Yanunwire abantube, nʼakola nabo endagaano eyenkalaakalira. Iye Mutukulye era wʼentiisya.
111.10: Okutya oMusengwa, okumanya mu kutandiikira. Bonabona abagondera ebiragirobye, bategeeri. OMusengwa bamuwuujenge emirembe nʼemirembe.

112.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa! Wʼenkabi iye oyo atya oMusengwa, era iye oyo asangaalira eino mu kugondera biragirobye.
112.2: Abaanabe baabbanga bʼamaani oku kyalo. Eibyaire lyʼomutuukirirye lyabbanga lyʼenkabi.
112.3: Amakaage gaabbanga masuni era gakulaakulananga, era ebikolebye ebyobutuukirirye tibalibyerabira emirembe gyonagyona.
112.4: Omutuukirirye ekitangaala kimwakira nʼomu ndikiirya, olwʼokubba abba wʼekisa, era alumirwa, era mwenkanya.
112.5: Ebintu byabira nakusani iye oyo akola ebyʼekisa era akoopa abainaye, era omwenkanya omu byakola.
112.6: Mazima yaabbanga mucaati bulijo, era bamwebukiryanga emirembe gyonagyona.
112.7: Tatya okuwulira amawuliro amabbimabbi, omwoyogwe mugumu era yeesiga Musengwa.
112.8: Tatya, omwoyogwe mugumu, paka oweyalibona ati abalabebe babawangwire.
112.9: Agabira abadoobi nʼomwoyo gumo. Era ebikolebye ebyobutuukirirye tibalibyerabira emirembe gyonagyona, bamugulumalyanga ni bamuwa ekitiisya.
112.10: Ekyo omubbimubbi akibona ni kimusunguwalya, nʼanyayiya neye nga mpaawo kyokukola. Okusairirya kwʼomubbimubbi tikwatuukirirenge.

113.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa. Mumuwuuje, inywe abaweererya ba Musengwa, muwuuje eriina lya Musengwa.
113.2: Eriina lya Musengwa baliwuuje, okuzwa atyanu paka emirembe gyonagyona.
113.3: Okuzwera e buzwaisana okutuuka e bugwaisana bali nʼokuwuuja eriina lya Musengwa.
113.4: OMusengwa niiye afuga amawanga gonagona, era ekitiisyakye kikiraku eigulu.
113.5: Naani ali ngʼoMusengwa Iye oKibbumba waiswe, Iye atyama oku ntebeye eyʼobwakabaka eri omwigulu?
113.6: OKibbumba niiye akotama nʼalingirira okubita omwigulu nʼabona ekyalo.
113.7: Asetula abadoobi nʼabatoola omu nkungu, asetula abadamba nʼabatoola oku kibbomboizi,
113.8: nʼabatyamisya aamo nʼabakungu, aamo nʼabakungu abo abafuga abantube.
113.9: Awa omukali abula omwana eisangaalo omu kisitokye nʼamusuuca omukali omubyaire. Muwuuje oMusengwa.

114.1: ABaisirairi owebazwire e Misiri, ibo eibyaire lya Yaakobbo owebazwire omwigwanga lyʼabanamawanga eryo,
114.2: oBuyudaaya kyasuukire kifo kya Musengwa ekitukulye, oIsirairi ni kibba kyalokye okububwe.
114.3: Enyanza eNtukuliki oweyababoine nʼeiruka, omwiga oYoludaani ni gukangayo e nyuma.
114.4: Ensozi gyabuukabuukire ooti ntaama ensaiza, obusozi ni bucuulyacuulya ooti ntaama entonto.
114.5: Kyabbaire niki iwe nyanza okwiruka? Iwe Yoludaani, lwaki wakangireyo e nyuma?
114.6: Inywe ensozi, lwaki mwabuukabuukire ooti ntaama ensaiza? Nywena obusozi, lwaki mwacuulyacuulirye ooti ntaama entonto?
114.7: Iwe kyalo otukute omumaiso ga Musengwa, omumaiso ga Kibbumba wa Yaakobbo,
114.8: oyo acuusa eibbaale okubba kidiba kyʼamaizi, eibbaale erigumu ni libbaamu ensulo egikulumuka.

115.1: Oo Musengwa, iswe titusaanira ekitiisya, iswe titukisaanira, wazira niiwe okisaanira, olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma nʼobwesigwabwo.
115.2: Lwaki abanamawanga babuulya bati, “OKibbumba waabwe ali yaina?”
115.3: OKibbumba waiswe abba mwigulu, era akola nabuli kyataka.
115.4: Neye ebifaananyi ebyʼokusinza ebyʼabakibbumba baabwe byʼefeeza na zaabbu, abantu ebibeekolera na ngalo.
115.5: Biri nʼeminwa, neye tibitumula, biri nʼamaiso, neye tibibona.
115.6: Biri nʼamatwi, neye tibiwulira, biri nʼamanindo, neye tibifunyirya.
115.7: Biri nʼengalo, neye tibikwata ekintu, biri nʼebigere, neye tibitambula. Era amamiro gaabyo tigazwamu eigono.
115.8: Abo ababikola basuuka ooti niibyo, era bonabona ababyesiga babba ooti niibyo.
115.9: Inywe abʼenyumba ya Isirairi, mwesigenge Musengwa, niiye ababbeera era niiye engabo yaanywe.
115.10: Inywe abʼenyumba yʼAlooni, mwesigenge Musengwa, niiye ababbeera era niiye engabo yaanywe.
115.11: Inywe abatya oMusengwa, mumwesigenge, niiye ababbeera era niiye engabo yaanywe.
115.12: OMusengwa atwebukirya, era atuwa enkabi. Yaawa abʼenyumba ya Isirairi enkabi, Yaawa abʼenyumba yʼAlooni enkabi.
115.14: OMusengwa aganye mweyongere obungi, inywe nʼabaana baanywe.
115.15: Oleke oMusengwa abawenge enkabi, Iye eyakolere eigulu nʼekyalo.
115.16: Eigulu iryo lya Musengwa, neye ekyalo yakiwaire bantu.
115.17: Abafu tiniibo abawuuja oMusengwa, abo abaikirira e magombe awasiriki.
115.18: Neye iswe aboomi niiswe abagulumalya oMusengwa, atyanu nʼemirembe gyonagyona. Muwuuje oMusengwa.

116.1: Ntaka oMusengwa, olwʼokubba awulira eigono lyange, nʼokwegairira kwange.
116.2: Olwʼokubba antegera ekitwi, namusabanga omu kiseera kyʼobwomi bwange bwonabwona.
116.3: Akabbikabbi akʼokufa kabbaire kaneeruguuliriirye, entiisya yʼe magombe nʼeneesibaku, ni mba omu bugosi nʼenima.
116.4: Awo ni nsaba oMusengwa nti, “Oo Musengwa, onnunule!”
116.5: OMusengwa wʼekisa era mutuukirirye, oKibbumba waiswe musaasiri.
116.6: OMusengwa akuuma abatayezya kwerwanaku, owenabbaire mpoiremu eisuubi, yannunwire.
116.7: Mwoyo gwange, oiremu okubba mugumu, olwʼokubba oMusengwa abbairenge musa egyendi.
116.8: OMusengwa andamirye okufa, nʼansangula amaliga. Andamirye okugwa
116.9: kaisi ntambulirenge omumaiso ga Musengwa, omu kyalo kyʼaboomi.
116.10: Naikiririirye omu Kibbumba, waire nga natumwire nti, “Ngadire ino!”
116.11: Natiire ni nkoba nti, “Nabuli muntu mubbeyi!”
116.13: Nasiirya ekikopo kyʼobununuli ni mpuuja eriina lya Musengwa.
116.14: Natuukiriryanga obweyamo bwange eeri oMusengwa, omumaiso gʼabantube bonabona.
116.15: Nga kirumya ino oMusengwa, omoiza oku batuukiriryebe owaafa!
116.16: Oo Musengwa, mazima ndi muweereryawo; ndi muweereryawo, ngʼomama oweyabbaire. Onnunwire omu kufa.
116.17: Nakuwanga esadaaka eyʼokwebalya, era ni nkusaba, Musengwa.
116.18: Natuukiriryanga obweyamo bwange eeri oMusengwa, omumaiso gʼabantube bonabona,
116.19: omu luuga lwʼenyumbaye, aakati omu Yerusaalemi. Muwuuje oMusengwa!

117.1: Muwuujenge oMusengwa inywe abʼamawanga gonagona, mumugulumalye inywe abantu nywenanywena.
117.2: Mumuwuuje olwʼokubba, okutakakwe okutakoma kubitiriri egyetuli, nʼobwesigwabwe bubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona. Muwuuje oMusengwa.

118.1: Mwebalyenge oMusengwa, olwʼokubba musa; okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
118.2: Oleke aBaisirairi bakobe bati, “Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.”
118.3: Oleke abʼenyumba yʼAlooni bakobe bati, “Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.”
118.4: Oleke abo abatya oMusengwa bakobe bati, “Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.”
118.5: Owenabbaire omu bugosi neekungiriire oMusengwa, nʼanjiramu era nʼannunula.
118.6: OMusengwa ali nanze, tinaatyenge. Omuntu ayezya kunkola niki?
118.7: OMusengwa ali nanze, era niiye omubbeeri wange. Nalibona ngʼawangula abalabe bange.
118.8: Kisa kwirukira eeri Musengwa okukukuuma, okukiraku okwesiga abantu.
118.9: Kisa kwirukira eeri Musengwa okukukuuma, okukiraku okwesiga abakungu.
118.10: ABanamawanga bonabona banzingizire, neye omu liina lya Musengwa, bonabona ni mbasaanyawo.
118.11: Banzingizire ku buli lubba, neye omu liina lya Musengwa, ni mbasaanyawo.
118.12: Banjoolookeireku ni banzingiza ooti nzoki, neye bawoirewo mangu mangu ngʼomusyo ogwʼomu mawa owegulikira; omu liina lya Musengwa, nabasaanyirewo.
118.13: Bannumbire nʼamaani, katono bampangule, neye oMusengwa nʼambeera.
118.14: OMusengwa niiye ampa amaani era niiye olwembo lwange; niiye annunula.
118.15: Owulire okubbookooka okwʼeisangaalo era okwʼobuwanguli omu weema gyʼabatuukirirye, okuti, “Engalo endiiro eya Musengwa ekolere ebyamaani.
118.16: Engalo endiiro eya Musengwa bagigulumalye ino, Engalo endiiro eya Musengwa ekolere ebyamaani.”
118.17: Nze tinaafe neye naabba mwomi, era nnangirire oMusengwa ebyakolere.
118.18: OMusengwa ambonerezere ino, neye tampaireyo eeri okufa.
118.19: Munjigulirewo egeeti egingira omu kifo ekitukulye; nnyingire neebalye oMusengwa.
118.20: Enu niiyo egeeti eingira e wa Musengwa, abatuukirirye omu baingirira.
118.21: Nakwebalyanga Musengwa, olwʼokubba wairiremu okusaba kwange, nʼosuuka mununuli wange.
118.22: Eibbaale abombeki eribagaine lisuukire niiryo erisiba ensonda.
118.23: Ekyo oMusengwa niiye eyakikolere, era ni tukibona ni tukyewunya.
118.24: Lunu niirwo olunaku oMusengwa olwakolere, oleke tusangaale, era tulujagaaniremu.
118.25: Oo Musengwa tukwegairiire otununule; oo Musengwa, ebitukola obiwe enkabi.
118.26: Wʼenkabi iye oyo aiza omu liina lya Musengwa. Tubasabira enkabi nga tuli omu nyumba ya Musengwa.
118.27: OMusengwa niiye oKibbumba, era agira ekitangaalakye ni kitwakira. Mukwate esadaaka mugisibire oku maziga gʼekyoto nʼemiguwa.
118.28: Iwe niiwe oKibbumba wange, era nakwebalyanga. Iwe niiwe oKibbumba wange, era nakugulumalyanga.
118.29: Mwebalyenge oMusengwa, olwʼokubba musa; okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.

119.1: Bʼenkabi abali omu bwomi obunambulaku ekyokubunenya, abo abakolera oku mateeka ga Musengwa.
119.2: Bʼenkabi abo abagondera ebiragirobye, ibo abamunoonia nʼemyoyo gyabwe gyonagyona.
119.3: Ibo abo tibakola kibbikibbi, neye batambula ngʼoMusengwa obwataka.
119.4: Musengwa, watutekeirewo amateekago, nʼotulagira tugagonderenge nʼobwesigwa.
119.5: Kale singa ngumiire omu kukwata amateekago!
119.6: Tinankubbaire nswala, singa mbaire ngondera ebiragirobyo.
119.7: Nakuwuujanga nʼomwoyo omulongoole, nga wenjega okugondera amateekago amatuukirirye.
119.8: Nagonderanga amateekago, nkwegairiire tiwandekesulira nakimo. Okugondera aMateeka ga Musengwa
119.9: Omuvuvuka yakuumanga atya amanzirage ni gabba malongoole? Ngʼatambula ngʼobwotaka.
119.10: Nkunoonia nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona, tiwandeka ni ncaama okuzwa oku mateekago.
119.11: Nkuumire ebiragirobyo omu mwoyo gwange, kaisi tinakola ekibbikibbi omumaisogo.
119.13: Nkolesya omunwa gwange ni nnangirira amateekago gonagona agewatuwaire.
119.14: Nsangaalira omu kugondera ebiragirobyo, ooti muntu asangaalira ebyobusuni ebingi.
119.15: Nfumintiriza oku mateekago, era ni nseega oku biragirobyo.
119.16: Nsangaalira okugondera amateekago; tineerabirenge ekibonokyo. AMateeka ga Musengwa galeeta eisangaalo
119.17: Onkolerenge nze omuweereryawo ebintu ebisa, kaisi mmbenge mwomi era ngonderenge ebiragirobyo.
119.18: Olibulye amaiso gange mpezye okubona ebyewuunyisya ebiri omu mateekago.
119.19: Oku kyalo ndi mugeni, tiwambisa ebiragirobyo.
119.20: Omwoyo gwange gukandiire ino okumanya amateekago gonagona.
119.21: Onenya abeekudumbalya, ibo abalaame era ibo abajeemera ebiwalagiire.
119.22: Ontooleku ebizumi nʼokujolonga olwʼokubba ngondera ebiragirobyo.
119.23: Era abafugi batyama ni bantumulaku ebibbibibbi, neye nze omuweereryawo, nfumintiriza ku mateekago.
119.24: Ebiragirobyo niibyo eisangaalo lyange, era niimwo omunsuna amalabuki. Okumalirira okukwata aMateeka ga Musengwa
119.25: Ndi ku mugo gwʼamagombe, onjiryemu obwomi ngʼobwewasuubizire.
119.26: Nakubbutuliire byonabyona ebinakolere, nʼonjiramu; onjegesye amateekago.
119.27: Ombeere okutegeera amateekago, awo kaisi nfumintirizenge ku bikolebyo ebyewunyisya.
119.28: Omwoyo gwange guncemuka olwʼenima onjiryemu amaani ngʼobwewasuubizire.
119.29: Onkuume tinatambulira omu manzira amacaamu, era olwʼekisaakyo, onjegesye amateekago.
119.30: Nsalirewo okubba mwesigwa, nteekere omwoyo ku mateekago.
119.31: Nkolera ino ku biragirobyo, oo Musengwa, tiwandeka ni nswala.
119.32: Nakoleranga ku biragirobyo, olwʼokubba ombeera okubitegeera nakusani. Okusaba okutegeera aMateeka
119.33: Oo Musengwa onjegesye okukwata amateekago, era nagakwatanga bulijo.
119.34: Ombeere okugategeera, era nagakwatanga ni ngagondera nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona.
119.35: Ombeere okugonderanga ebiragirobyo, olwʼokubba mwibyo mu nsagaalira.
119.36: Ocuuse omwoyo gwange gugonderange ebiragirobyo, okukiraku okweiniranga byʼobusuni.
119.37: Ocuuse amaiso gange gazwe oku bintu ebitagasa, era okuume obwomi bwange ngʼobwewasuubizire.
119.38: Otuukirirye ekiwasuubizire omuweereryawo, awo kaisi bakuwe ekitiisya.
119.39: Ontoleku ebizumi ebyentya, olwʼokubba ennamulayo nsa.
119.40: Obone, ntaka ino amateekago, okuume obwomi bwange, olwʼokubba iwe oli mutuukirirye. Okwesiga aMateeka ga Musengwa
119.41: Oo Musengwa, oleke okutakakwo okutakoma kubbe nanze, era onnunule ngʼobwewasuubizire;
119.42: awo kaisi mbeeku nʼekinjiramu abanzuma, olwʼokubba neesiga kibonokyo.
119.43: Tiwaganya ebibono ebyʼamazima ni bimpwamu, olwʼokubba nteekere eisuubi lyange mu mateekago.
119.45: Era naabbanga mwidembe, olwʼokubba neefudaku okukwata amateekago.
119.46: Natumulanga oku biragirobyo, omumaiso gʼabakabaka, era tinaswalenge,
119.47: olwʼokubba nsangaalira amateekago, era ngataka ino.
119.48: Mpa ebiragirobyo ekitiisya era mbitaka; era nafumintirizanga oku mateekago. Okugondera aMateeka kuleeta eisuubi
119.49: Oyebukirye ekiwansuubizire, nze omuweereryawo, olwʼokubba kimpa eisuubi.
119.50: Nʼomu kugada njiramu amaani, olwʼokubba ekisuubizokyo kikuuma obwomi bwange.
119.51: Abeekudumbalya bansekerera ino, neye tinalekenge amateekago.
119.52: Oweneebukirya amateeka agewatuwaire eira, Musengwa, njiramu amaani.
119.53: Ekiruyi kinkwata owembona ababbibabbi nga bazwa oku mateekago.
119.54: Amateekago niigo agennyembaku, ngʼomusenze nabuli awemba.
119.55: Obwire nkwebukirya Musengwa, era ni nfumintiriza oku mateekago.
119.56: Nsunire enkabi, olwʼokubba ngondera ebiragirobyo. Okumalira omwoyo oku Mateeka ga Musengwa
119.57: Oo Musengwa, niiwe omugabo gwange, nsuubiza okugonderanga ebiragirobyo.
119.58: Nkwegairira nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona obbe musa egyendi, onkwatire ekisa ngʼobwewasuubizire.
119.59: Owenningirira engeri egineebityamu, ncuuka ni nsengererya ebiragirobyo.
119.62: Omu kiire aakati ndamuka okukwebalya, olwʼamateekago amatuukirirye.
119.63: Ndi mukaagwa wa bonabona abakutya, era ndi mukaagwa wa bonabona abakwata amateekago.
119.64: Oo Musengwa, ekyalo kiizwire kutakakwo okutakoma, onjegesye amateekago. Omugaso gwʼokukwata aMateeka
119.66: Ompe amalabuki nʼokutegeera, olwʼokubba nkwata amateekago.
119.67: Owenabbaire nga bakaali okumbonereza nacaamanga, neye atyanu ngondera ekibonokyo.
119.68: Oli musa, era ebyokola bisa, onjegesye amateekago.
119.69: Newankubbaire ngʼabeekudumbalya bantumulaku ebyobubbeyi, neye nze ngondera ebiragirobyo nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona.
119.70: Emyoyo gyabwe giizwire biseego ebibbibibbi, neye nasangaalanga olwʼamateekago.
119.71: Okumbonereza kwangasire, olwʼokubba kwanzwereireku okwega amateekago.
119.72: Amateeka agewatuwaire gankiriraku enkumi nʼenkumi gyʼamairambula gʼezaabbu nʼefeeza. AMateeka ga Musengwa matuuce
119.73: Wambumbire nʼengalogyo, era niiwe owankolere, ombeere okutegeera kaisi njege amateekago.
119.74: Oleke abakutya owebambonanga bajaagaanenge, olwʼokubba nteekere eisuubi lyange mu kibonokyo.
119.75: Oo Musengwa, mmaite nti olamula mu butuuce, era wambonerezere olwʼokubba oli mwesigwa.
119.76: Oganye okutakakwo okutakoma kunjiryengemu amaani, ngʼobwewansuubizire nze omuweereryawo.
119.77: Oganye ekisaakyo kimbeeku kaisi mbe mwomi, olwʼokubba amateekago niigo eisangaalo lyange.
119.78: Oleke abeekudumbalya baswale olwʼokunsibiriryaku; neye nze nafumintirizanga ku biragirobyo.
119.79: Oleke abo abakutya baize egyendi, kaisi bayezye okumanya amateekago.
119.80: Onganye nkwatenge kusani amateekago, kaisi tinaswalanga. Okusaba okukutoola omu kabbikabbi
119.81: Oo Musengwa mpulira nfa nga njoya okunnunula, neye nteekere eisuubi lyange mu kibonokyo.
119.82: Amaiso gandoolere olwʼokukuumirira ekiwasuubizire; ni neebuulya nti, “Walinjiryamu di amaani?”
119.83: Waire nga nsuukire kinambulamu era ekintu ekitagasa, neye tineerabira amateekago.
119.84: Nze omuweereryawo naguminkiriza kutuuca di? Walibonereza di abanjiigaania?
119.85: Abeekudumbalya bankuuliire ebiina mbigwemu, ibo abatakwata amateekago.
119.86: Amateekago gonagona meesigwa. Banjiigaania anambula nsonga, ombeere.
119.87: Babbaire bali kumpi kunsaanyawo oku kyalo, neye tinazwire oku mateekago.
119.88: Olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma okuume obwomi bwange, kaisi ngonderenge ebiragirobyo. Okugumira oku Mateeka ga Musengwa
119.89: Oo Musengwa, ekibonokyo kibbeerererawo, era omwigulu kibbaayo nga kinyweze.
119.90: Obwesigwabwo bubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona, wagumiirye ekyalo omu kifo kyakyo ni kibbeerererawo.
119.91: Ebintu byonabyona bikaali biriwo ngʼobwewalagiire, olwʼokubba byonabyona biweererya niiwe.
119.92: Singa amateekago tigabbaire isangaalo lyange, nga nafiire owenabbeereire omu kugada.
119.93: Tineerabirenge ebiragirobyo, olwʼokubba mwibyo mwokuumiire obwomi bwange.
119.94: Ndi wuwo; onnunule, olwʼokubba neefudaku okutuukirirya ebiragirobyo.
119.95: Ababbibabbi bagonerera kunjita, neye nze naseeganga ku mateekago.
119.96: Mboine ebintu byonabyona bikoma, neye amateekago tigakoma. Okutaka aMateeka ga Musengwa
119.97: Oo, nga ntaka ino amateekago, ngafumintirizaku okumalaku olunaku.
119.98: Amateekago gansuuca wʼamalabuki okukiraku abalabe bange, olwʼokubba niigo agannuŋamya nabuli kiseera.
119.99: Ndi nʼokutegeera okukiraku abansomesya bonabona, olwʼokubba nfumintiriza ku biragirobyo.
119.100: Ndi wʼamalabuki okukiraku abakaire, olwʼokubba nkwata amateekago.
119.101: Nkuumire ebigere byange okutatambulira omu nzira yonayona eyʼababbibabbi, kaisi ngonderenge ekibonokyo.
119.102: Tinzwanga oku mateekago, olwʼokubba iwe onyere onjegesya.
119.103: Ebibonobyo nga bimpoomera ino, bimpoomera ino okukiraku omujenene.
119.104: Okubita omu mateekago nsuna obulabuki, nʼolwekyo ni ncaawa entambula yonayona embiibbi. AMateeka ga Musengwa gammoleekerera ooti itaala
119.105: Ekibonokyo niikyo eitaala erimmoleekerera nga ntambula, era ekitangaala omu nzira yange.
119.106: Ndayira era neeyama okukwatanga amateekago amatuukirirye.
119.107: Oo Musengwa, ngadire ino; okuume obwomi bwange ngʼobwewasuubizire.
119.108: Oo Musengwa, osiime okuwuuja okwempaayo omu kutaka nga nkwebalya, era onjegesye amateekago.
119.109: Obwomi bwange bubba mu kabbikabbi nabuli kaseera, neye tineerabira amateekago.
119.110: Ababbibabbi bantegere omutego, neye tinzwire oku biragirobyo.
119.111: Ebiragirobyo niibyo ebyobusika byange ebyʼemirembe gyonagyona; niibyo ebisangaalisya omwoyo gwange.
119.112: Mmaliriire okutuukiriryanga ebiragirobyo, paka owenalifa. AMateeka ga Musengwa niigo agankuuma
119.113: Ncaawa abʼemyoyo emibiri, neye ntaka amateekago.
119.114: Niiwe ekiirukiro kyange era engabo yange; nteekere eisuubi lyange mu kibonokyo.
119.115: Muzwewo e gyendi inywe abakola ebibbibibbi, kaisi nkwate amateeka ga Kibbumba.
119.116: Ongumye ngʼobwewasuubizire, kaisi mbe mwomi, tiwandeka ni nswala ate nga nkusuubirira mu niiwe.
119.117: Ompanirire kaisi mbe omu mweyaayo, era nagonderanga ebiragirobyo bulijo.
119.118: Iwe ocaawa bonabona abazwa oku biragirobyo, olwʼokubba olugezigezi lwabwe kinambulamu.
119.119: Ababbibabbi bonabona oku kyalo obabitya ooti bisasiro, ekyo kinzweraku okutaka ebiragirobyo.
119.120: Ntukuta olwʼokukutya; mbuninkirira olwʼamateekago. Okuwulira aMateeka ga Musengwa
119.121: Nkolere ebyobutuukirirye nʼebyobwenkanya; tiwandekesula eeri abalabe bange.
119.122: Osuubize okunkolera nze omuweereryawo ebisa; tiwaganya abeekudumbalya okunjolonga.
119.123: Amaiso gandoolere nga nkuumiriire okunnunula, nga nkumiriire ekisuubizokyo iwe omwenkanya.
119.124: Ombitye nze omuweereryawo ngʼokutakakwo okutakoma obwekuli, era onjegesye amateekago.
119.125: Ndi muweereryawo, ompe okutegeera, kaisi ntegeere ebiragirobyo.
119.126: Oo Musengwa, niikyo ekiseera okubbaaku nʼekyokola, olwʼokubba abantu ababbibabbi bamenya amateekago.
119.127: Nze ntaka amateekago okukiraku ezaabbu, okukiraku ezaabbu iyo ennongoole.
119.128: Era olwʼokubba ngondera ebiragirobyo byonabyona, ncaawa entambula yonayona embiibbi. Okwegomba okugondera aMateeka ga Musengwa
119.130: Ebibonobyo owebabisonzola, biwa ekitangaala, biwa amalabuki abo abagadamba.
119.131: Njasama omunwa ni neekombakomba, olwʼokuyoya eino amateekago.
119.132: Ondoleku era onkwatire ekisa, nga bulijo obwokwatira abo abakutaka.
119.133: Olungamyenge entambula yange ngʼowewasuubizire, era tiwaganya ekibbikibbi kyonakyona ni kinfuga.
119.134: Onnunule eeri abo abangadya, kaisi njezye okukwata amateekago.
119.135: Ondoleku nze omuweereryawo nʼeriiso eryʼekisa, era onjegesye amateekago.
119.136: Amaliga gakulumuka omu maiso gange ooti maizi, olwʼokubba abantu tibakwata mateekago. AMateeka ga Musengwa ga bwenkanya
119.137: Oo Musengwa, oli mutuukirirye, era amateekago gʼobwenkanya.
119.138: Ebiragirobyo ebiwateekerewo bituuce, era byesigwa nakimo.
119.139: Ekiruyi kinduma ino, olwʼokubba abalabe bange beerabiire ebibonobyo.
119.140: Ebisuubizobyo bikengeize, era nze omuweereryawo mbitaka.
119.141: Waire nga ndi muyejere era bannyooma, neye tineerabira amateekago.
119.143: Ndi omu kugada nʼokuluga okunene, neye amateekago niigo eisangaalo lyange.
119.144: Ebiragirobyo bituuce emirembe gyonagyona; ompe okutegeera kaisi mbe mwomi. Okusaba oMusengwa okutulamya
119.145: Oo Musengwa, nkusaba nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona; onjiremu, era nakwatanga amateekago.
119.147: Mpuuna ngʼemambya ekaali okusala ni nkwekungirira okumbeera; nteekere eisuubi lyange mu kibonokyo.
119.148: Mbonia ekiire okuca, nga nfumintiriza oku bisuubizobyo.
119.149: Owulire okwekunga kwange olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma; oo Musengwa olwʼobwenkanyabwo okuume obwomi bwange.
119.150: Abo abansalira enkwe baigereire, cooka ibo tibakwata amateekago.
119.151: Neye iwe Musengwa ondi kumpi, era amateekago gonagona matuuce.
119.152: Eira nayegere ebiragirobyo, ni mmanya nti wabiteekerewo kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona. Okusaba okusuna obubbeeri
119.153: Obone okugada kwange, onnunule, olwʼokubba tineerabiranga amateekago.
119.154: Ondwanirire era onnunule; okuume obwomi bwange ngʼobwewasuubizire.
119.155: Ababbibabbi babba yala nʼokubanunula, olwʼokubba tibagondera ebiragirobyo.
119.156: Oo Musengwa ekisaakyo kingi, olwʼobwenkanyabwo okuume obwomi bwange.
119.157: Abalabe bange nʼabanjiigaania bangi, neye nze tinzwire oku biragirobyo.
119.158: Owembona abʼenkwe mbazuzuula, olwʼokubba tibakwata ebiragirobyo.
119.159: Oo Musengwa obone ngʼowentaka amateekago; okuume obwomi bwange olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma.
119.160: Omulamwa gwʼamateekago mazima meereere; amateekago gonagona amatuukirirye gʼemirembe gyonagyona. Okutaka eino aMateeka ga Musengwa
119.161: Abafugi banjiigaania anambula nsonga, neye nze ebiragirobyo mbiwa ekitiisya.
119.162: Nsangaalira mu bisuubizobyo, ooti muntu asangaalira omunyago omungi.
119.163: Ncaawa era neesinya obubbeyi, neye ntaka amateekago.
119.164: Nkuwuuja mirundi musanvu nabuli lunaku, olwʼobutuukirirye bwa mateekago.
119.165: Bali nʼeidembe eryʼamaani abo abataka amateekago, era mpaawo ekibeesitaalisya.
119.166: Oo Musengwa, nkuumirira niiwe okunnunula, era ntuukirirya amateekago.
119.168: Nkwata amateekago ni ngondera nʼebiragirobyo, era obona byonabyona ebinkola. Okusaba oMusengwa obubbeeri
119.169: Oo Musengwa, oganye okwekunga kwange kutuuke egyoli; ompe okutegeera ngʼobwewasuubizire.
119.172: Nayembanga oku kibonokyo, olwʼokubba ebiragirobyo byonabyona bituuce.
119.173: Obbenge mutegeki bulijo okumbeera, olwʼokubba nalonderewo kukwatanga mateekago.
119.174: Oo Musengwa, njoya okunnunula, era amateekago niigo eisangaalo lyange.
119.175: Ompe obwomi, awo nkuwuujenge, era oganye amateekago gambeerenge.
119.176: Mmamaalikire ni nkuzwaku ooti ntaama agotere. Onnoonieku, nze omuweereryawo, olwʼokubba tinerabiranga ebiragirobyo.

120.1: Omu bigosi byange nsaba oMusengwa, era nʼanjiramu.
120.2: Oo Musengwa, onnunule eeri abatumula ebyʼobubbeyi nʼeeri abatumula ebyakalebule.
120.3: Inywe abatumula ebyakalebule, iye yalibakola niki, era yalibabonereza atya?
120.4: Yalibabonereza nʼobulaso obwogi ooti bwʼomulwani, era nʼamanda agameigera.
120.5: Nga ndabire okutyama omu Meseki, era okutyama omu Kedali!
120.6: Ntyaime ekiseera kiwanvu omu bantu abacaawa eidembe.
120.7: Nze ndi muntu ataka idembe, neye owentumula, ibo bataka ntalo.

121.1: Nsiirya amaiso gange ni nningirira ensozi, ni neebuulya nti, obubbeeri bwange buzwa yaina?
121.2: Obubbeeri bwange buzwa eeri Musengwa, eYakolere eigulu nʼekyalo.
121.3: Tiyakulekenge okugwa, Iye oyo akukuuma tiyawongerenge.
121.4: Dala iye oyo akuuma oIsirairi tawongera, waire okugona.
121.5: OMusengwa niiye akukuuma, oMusengwa abba kumpi na iwe okukukuuma.
121.6: Eisana tiryakwocenge omusana, waire omweri okukukola obubbibubbi obwire.
121.7: OMusengwa yakukuumanga eeri nabuli kabbikabbi, yalabiriranga obwomibwo.
121.8: OMusengwa yakukuumanga amaaba nʼamaira, okuzwa atyanu, paka emirembe gyonagyona.

122.1: Nasangaire owebankobere bati, “Twabe omu nyumba ya Musengwa.”
122.2: Atyanu tuli aanu, twemereire omunda oku geetiyo, iwe Yerusaalemi.
122.3: OYerusaalemi ikyo kibuga ekibombekere nga kigaite aamo.
122.4: Mwikyo niimwo ebika e gibyaba, ibyo ebika byʼabantu ba Musengwa, okwebalya oMusengwa, ngʼobweyalagiire oIsirairi.
122.5: Mwikyo niimwo omu bateekere entebe egyʼobwakabaka egyʼokulamuliraku, entebe egyʼobwakabaka egyʼabʼenyumba ya Dawudi.
122.6: Musabire oYerusaalemi abbeemu eidembe, muti: “Oganye abo abakutaka babbe idembe.
122.7: Eidembe libbe omu bikomerabyo, nʼobukuumi bubbe omu ngagagyo.”
122.8: Olwʼabantu bange nʼabakaagwa bange, nkoba oYerusaalemi nti: “Eidembe libbe mwiwe!”
122.9: Olwʼabʼomu nyumba ya Musengwa iye oKibbumba waiswe, nkusabira enkabi.

123.1: Iwe atyama oku ntebeyo eyʼobwakabaka omwigulu, nsiirya amaiso gange eeri iwe.
123.2: Ngʼabaweererya obwebeesiga omusengwa waabwe, era ngʼabagalama abakali obwebeesiga omusengwa waabwe, swena niiye owetukwesiga Musengwa, iwe oKibbumba waiswe, paka owewalitukwatira ekisa.
123.3: Oo Musengwa, otukwatire ekisa, otukwatire ekisa, olwʼokubba batunyoomere ino.
123.4: Abamalala bamalire eibbanga liwanvu nga batuduula ino, era abeekudumbalya nga batunyooma.

124.1: Singa oMusengwa tiyabbaire oku lubba lwaiswe, atyanu oleke oIsirairi akobe ati,
124.2: singa oMusengwa tiyabbaire oku lubba lwaiswe, abantu owebatulumbiire,
124.6: OMusengwa bamuwuujenge, iye atatuwaireyo ngʼekyokulya eeri amaino gaabwe.
124.7: Tuwunukire abalabe baiswe ngʼonyonyi owaawunuka omutego gwa mutegi. Omutego gukutukire ni tuwunuka.
124.8: Obubbeeri bwaiswe buzwa eeri Musengwa, eYakolere eigulu nʼekyalo.

125.1: Abo abeesiga oMusengwa bacaati ooti lusozi oSayuuni, olutasagaasagana, era olubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
125.2: Ngʼensozi owegyeruguuliriirye oYerusaalemi, oMusengwa yena atyo weyeeruguuliriirya abantube, okuzwa atyanu paka emirembe gyonagyona.
125.3: Ababbibabbi tibafugirirenge ekyalo kyʼabatuukirirye, demba abatuukirirye bona ni bakola ebibbibibbi.
125.4: Oo Musengwa okolere abo abasa ebisa, abo abʼemyoyo emirongoole.
125.5: Neye abo abakwata enzira gyabwe encaamu, oMusengwa yababonerezeranga aamo nʼababbibabbi. Eidembe libbe okwIsirairi.

126.1: OMusengwa oweyairiryewo eidembe lya Sayuuni, twabbaire ooti tuloota.
126.2: Twasekere ino ni twemba olwʼeisangaalo. Awo abanamawanga ni bakoba bati, “OMusengwa abakoleire ebikulu!”
126.3: OMusengwa atukoleire ebikulu, era tuli basangaali.
126.4: Oo Musengwa oiryewo enkabi gyaiswe, ngʼoikendi owairya amaizi omu miiga gyʼomwidungu oNegevu.
126.5: Abo ibo abasigira omu maliga, balikungula nga basangaala.
126.6: Iye oyo ayaba ngʼali mu maliga ngʼatwala ensigo okusiga, yalikanga ngʼayemba olwʼeisangaalo, ngʼaira nʼamakungula.

127.1: OMusengwa singa tayombeka enyumba, abagyombeka bateganira bwereere. OMusengwa owaatakuuma ekibuga, abakikuuma bateganira bwereere.
127.2: Kibba kinambulamu inywe okulamuka kibbambya, era ni mugona kinamukuku nga mukalabanira ekyokulya. OMusengwa abaataka abawa endoolo.
127.3: Okubyala abaana kirabo okuzwa eeri oMusengwa, dala kirabo kinanyerenyeere.
127.4: Abaana abʼomu buvuvuka, babba ooti bulaso omu ngalo gyʼomulwani.
127.5: Wʼenkabi ali nʼomugobagwe nga gwizwire niibwo, abalabebe tibamuwangula, owaabba omu mpaka nabo omunda oku geeti yʼekibuga.

128.1: Wʼenkabi iye oyo atya oMusengwa. Oyo atambulira omu manzirage!
128.2: Walirya oku bibala bya lwotalwo, walibba wʼenkabi nʼebisa byalibba bibyo.
128.3: Omu kisitokyo, omukaliwo yalibba ooti muzabbibbu ogubala eino. Abaanabo balibba bangi ooti masaga agʼomusaale omuzaituuni nga beeruguuliriirye ekiinulokyo.
128.4: Dala omuntu atya oMusengwa atyo waasuna enkabi.
128.5: OMusengwa akuwe enkabi ngʼasinzirira omu Sayuuni, nsaba obone oYerusaalemi ngʼakulaakulana, enaku gyonagyona egyʼobwomibwo;
128.6: era owangaale obone oku baizukulubo. Eidembe libbe okwIsirairi.

129.1: Bangadirye ino okuzwa omu butobuto bwange, oleke oIsirairi akobe ati,
129.2: “Bangadirye ino okuzwa omu butobuto bwange, neye nandi ni bampangula.
129.3: Bantemulyagire omugongo gwonagwona, ni bagusuuca ooti matinde agebakabaire nʼenkumbi yʼente.
129.4: Neye oMusengwa mutuukirirye; akutulyagire enjegere gyʼababbibabbi nʼantaisulya.”
129.5: Oleke abo bonabona abacaawa oSayuuni babakanjirirye nga baswaire.
129.6: Oleke babbe ooti isubi erimera e ngulu oku nyumba, erikala nga likaali okukula.
129.7: Oyo alisala, mpaawo ekyayerya omu kigalabaayokye, nʼoyo alisala talyerya kadi mu kigalo.
129.8: Era nʼabo ababitawo tibamukoba bati, “OMusengwa akuwe enkabi. Tukuwa enkabi omu liina lya Musengwa.”

130.1: Oo Musengwa, nakwekungirira olwʼokubba ndi omu bugosi bubitiriri.
130.2: Oo Musengwa, owulire okwegairira kwange. Otege amatwi eeri okukunga kwange olwʼobubbeeri.
130.3: Oo Musengwa, singa otubalira ebikole byaiswe ebibbibibbi, naani eyandiwunukire omusango?
