130.4: Neye iwe osoniya, nʼolwekyo bakuwa ekitiisya.
130.5: Nkuumirira oMusengwa, mmukuumirira era neesiga kibonokye.
130.6: Nkuumirira oMusengwa okukiraku abakuumi obwebakuuma obwire okuca, dala okukiraku abakuumi obwebakuuma obwire okuca.
130.7: Oo Isirairi weesigenge Musengwa, olwʼokubba oMusengwa ali nʼokutaka okutakoma, era nabuli kiseera mutegeke okukununula.
130.8: Iye yalinunula oIsirairi okuzwa omu bibbibibbi byabwe byonabyona.

131.1: Oo Musengwa, tindi wʼamalala, tineekudumbalya, tineeniinianiinirya ku bintu ebintayezya, waire ku bintu ebimbitiriraku okubitegeera.
131.2: Wazira omwoyo gwange gwikaikana, ni nsirika ooti mwana ogubazirisirye owaikaikana, ngʼali omu kifubba kya maaye. Dala ngʼomwana ogubazirisirye owaikaikana, zena ntyo wenteereire.
131.3: Oo Isirairi, osuubirenge mu Musengwa okuzwa atyanu okutuuca emirembe gyonagyona.

132.1: Oo Musengwa, oyebukirye oDawudi nʼebigosi byonabyona ebiyagumiire.
132.2: Yakulayiriire, iwe Musengwa, nʼakola nʼobweyamo egyoli, Iwe oWabwezye, oKibbumba wa Yaakobbo ngʼakoba ati,
132.3: “Tinalingira omu nyumba yange, waire okwaba oku buliri,
132.4: tinaliganya endoolo omumaiso gange, waire okuwongeraku,
132.5: paka nga mmalire okusunira oMusengwa ekifo, nga nsuniire oWabwezye oyo oKibbumba wa Yaakobbo ekifo omu yatyamanga.”
132.6: Twawuliireku tuti eSanduuku yʼeNdagaano eri mwEfulaasi, ni tugibonera omu misiri gyʼe Yaali.
132.7: Ni tukoba tuti, “Oleke twabe omu kifookye omwatyama, oleke tumuwuujirye awaawuumulirya ebigerebye.
132.8: Oo Musengwa osetuke, oize omu kifookyo awoowuumulira, iwe nʼeSanduuku eyʼeNdagaano eyʼobwezyebwo.
132.9: Oleke abakabonabo bakolenge ebyʼamazima; oleke abatuukiriryebo baceerenge olwʼeisangaalo.”
132.10: Oku lwʼomuweereryawo oDawudi, tiwalekesula oyo oguwasukireku amafuta.
132.11: OMusengwa yalayiriire oDawudi omu mazima, nga yeeyama ekyeyamo ekyʼenkalaakalira ekiyatalireka ngʼakoba ati, “Nalityamisya omoiza okwibyaireryo oku ntebeyo eyʼobwakabaka.
132.12: Singa eibyaireryo lyakuumanga endagaano yange, ni likwatanga nʼebiragiro byange ebimbasomesya, awo abaana baabwe basikiranga entebeyo eyʼobwakabaka emirembe gyonagyona.”
132.13: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa alondere oSayuuni; niiye ogwasiimire okubba butyamibwe ngʼakoba ati,
132.14: “Kinu niikyo ekifo omunawuumuliranga emirembe gyonagyona, aanu niiwo awenatyamanga oku ntebe eyʼobwakabaka, olwʼokubba nsiimirewo.
132.15: Naawanga oSayuuni enkabi omu bintu bingi ino, abadoobi baakyo nabaikutyanga nʼebyokulya.
132.16: Abakabona baakyo nabawanga enkabi mu buli kimo, nʼabatuukirirye abakirimu ni baceeranga olwʼeisangaalo.
132.17: “Aanu wenalisuucira omoiza okwibyaire lya Dawudi okubba kabaka omukulu, era ni nsuuca ogunasukireku amafuta kitangaala eeri abantu emirembe gyonagyona.
132.18: Abalabebe nalibaswaza, neye kwiye enguleye yalimasaamasa.”

133.1: Dala nga kisa era kisangaalisya aboluganda okubba aamo nga bali ekintu kimo!
133.2: Kiri ooti mafuta agʼebbeeyi agebasukire oku mutwe gwʼAlooni, ni gakulumukira oku kirevu; gakulumukira oku kirevu kyʼAlooni ni gaika oku kitogi kyʼeganduulaye.
133.3: Kiri ooti lume lwʼoku lusozi oKerumooni, olume olugwa oku nsozi gyʼe Sayuuni. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa giyasinziriire okulagira wabbeewo enkabi, nʼobwomi obwʼemirembe gyonagyona.

134.1: Mwize muwuuje oMusengwa inywe nywenanywena abaweereryabe, abaweererya omu nyumbaye obwire.
134.2: Musiirye engalo gyanywe omu kifo ekitukulye era muwuuje oMusengwa.
134.3: Oleke oMusengwa eyakolere eigulu nʼekyalo abawe enkabi ngʼasinzirira omu Sayuuni.

135.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa! Muwuuje eriina lya Musengwa, mumuwuuje, inywe abaweererya ba Musengwa,
135.2: inywe abaweererya omu nyumba ya Musengwa omu luuga lwʼenyumba ya Kibbumba waiswe.
135.3: Muwuuje oMusengwa olwʼokubba iye oMusengwa musa. Mwembe nga muwuuja eriinalye olwʼokubba ekyo kyʼeisangaalo.
135.4: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa yalondere oYaakobbo okubba wuwe, abantu ba Isirairi okubba babe kububwe.
135.5: Mmaite ngʼoMusengwa mukulu, oMusengwa waiswe mukulu okukiraku abakibbumba abandi bonabona.
135.6: OMusengwa nabuli ekyataka akikola omwigulu era nʼoku kyalo, omu nyanza nʼomu njabi gyagyo.
135.7: Niiye asetula ebireri bya ikendi okuzwa ekyalo e gikikoma; niiye aleetera oikendi okumesya, nʼawulucaayo ompunga omu bifo omwamukuumira.
135.8: Niiye eyaitire ebibere byʼe Misiri, ebibere ebyʼabantu nʼebyʼebisolo.
135.9: Niiye eyakusindikiremu obumanyiciryo wʼebyewunyo nʼebyamagero iwe Misiri, okubonereza oFalaawo nʼabakungube bonabona.
135.10: Niiye eyajigiricirye amawanga amangi, era nʼaita abakabaka abʼamaani banu:
135.11: OSikoni okabaka wʼaBamooli, nʼOgi okabaka wʼe Bbasani, nʼabakabaka bonabona abʼe Kanani.
135.12: Ekyalo kyabwe nʼakiwaayo ngʼobusika, ibwo obusika bwʼabantube aBaisirairi.
135.13: Oo Musengwa, eriinalyo libbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona. Oo Musengwa, bakwebukiryanga emirembe nʼemirembe.
135.14: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa yalangiriranga ngʼabantube owebabulaku omusango, era yakwatiranga abaweereryabe ekisa.
135.15: Ebifaananyi ebyʼokusinza ebyʼabakibbumba abʼabanamawanga bya feeza na zaabbu, abantu ebibeekolera na ngalo.
135.16: Biri nʼeminwa, neye tibitumula; biri nʼamaiso, neye tibibona.
135.17: Biri nʼamatwi, neye tibiwulira, era tibiyeera.
135.18: Abo ababikola basuuka ooti niibyo, era bonabona ababyesiga babba ooti niibyo.
135.19: Inywe abʼenyumba ya Isirairi, muwuuje oMusengwa. Inywe abʼenyumba yʼAlooni, muwuuje oMusengwa.
135.20: Inywe abʼenyumba ya Leevi, muwuuje oMusengwa. Nywenanywena abatya oMusengwa, mumuwuuje.
135.21: Bawuuje oMusengwa omu Sayuuni, iye oyo abba omu Yerusaalemi. Muwuuje oMusengwa!

136.1: Mwebalye oMusengwa olwʼokubba musa, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.2: Mwebalye oKibbumba afuga abakibbumba, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.3: Mwebalye oMusengwa wʼabasengwa, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.4: Mumwebalye iye yenkani akola ebyamagero ebyʼamaani, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.5: Iye oyo eyakolere eigulu nʼamalabukige, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.6: Iye oyo eyaalire ekyalo oku maizi, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.7: Iye oyo eyakolere ebyaka ebinene, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.8: Iye oyo eyakolere eisana okufuganga omusana, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.9: Iye oyo eyakolere omweri nʼenkota bifugenge obwire, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.10: Iye oyo eyaitire ebibere ebyʼe Misiri, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.11: Era iye oyo eyatoiryemu aBaisirairi omu Bamisiri, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.12: Iye oyo eyakoleserye obwezyebwe, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.13: Iye oyo eyayawiiremu eNyanza eNtukuliki aakati, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.14: Era nʼabitya aBaisirairi aakati waayo, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.15: Neye iye nʼasaanyawo oFalaawo nʼamajeege omu Nyanza eyo eNtukuliki. Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.16: Iye oyo yakubbembeire abantube okubabitya omwidungu. Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.17: Iye oyo eyaitire abakabaka abʼamaani, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.18: Iye oyo eyaitire abakabaka abatutumuki, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.19: Eyaitire oSikoni okabaka wʼaBamooli, okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona,
136.20: nʼOgi okabaka wa Bbasani, okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.21: Nʼekyalo kyabwe nʼakiwaayo ngʼobusika, okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona,
136.22: nʼakiwa oIsirairi omuweereryawe. Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.23: Iye oyo eyatwebukiirye nga tuli omu bunafu, Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona,
136.24: nʼatununula eeri abalabe baiswe. Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.25: Iye oyo awa ebibbumbe byonabyona ebyomi ebyokulya. Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
136.26: Mwebalye oKibbumba owʼomwigulu. Okutakakwe okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.

137.1: Oku miiga egyʼe Bbabbulooni twatyaime ni tukulumuca amaliga owetwebukiirye oSayuuni.
137.2: Eeyo ni twanika amatongoli gaiswe, oku misaale egiriranirewo,
137.3: olwʼokubba eeyo abatuwambire batukobere tubembereku. Ababbaire batugadya ni batulagira tubasangaalyemu nga tubembera; ni batukoba bati, “Mutwembere olumo oku nyembo egyʼe Sayuuni.”
137.4: Twezya tutya okwemba enyembo gya Musengwa omu kyalo ekitali kyaiswe?
137.5: Owenakwerabira iwe Yerusaalemi, engalo yange endiiro ebba esaanira okwerabira okukubba otongoli.
137.6: Olulumi lwange lubba lusaanira kwekwatira ngulu mu munwa, owentakwebukirya, era owentatwala oYerusaalemi okubba eisangaalo lyange okukiraku ebintu ebindi byonabyona.
137.7: Oo Musengwa, oyebukirye aBeedomu ekibakolere oku lunaku oYerusaalemi owebakiwambiire, nga bakoba bati, “Mukisaanyewo, mukisaanyirewo nakimo paka nʼemisingi!”
137.8: Inywe abantu bʼe Bbabbulooni balibajigirica. Wʼenkabi oyo akusasula olwʼebyotukolere.

138.1: Oo Musengwa, nakwebalyanga nʼomwoyo gwange gwonagwona, ni nnyemba nga nkuwuuja omumaiso gʼabakibbumba.
138.2: Nakotamyanga omutwe okukuwa ekitiisya nga nningiriire eeri eYeekaaluyo entukulye. Era nakuwuujanga olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma nʼolwʼobwesigwabwo, olwʼokubba wagulumairye eriinalyo nʼekibonokyo okukiraku ebindi byonabyona.
138.3: Oku lunaku owenakusabireku wanjiriremu, wanjiriryemu amaani nʼongumya.
138.4: Oo Musengwa, oleke abakabaka bonabona abʼoku kyalo bakuwuuje, olwʼokuwulira ebibono ebizwa omu munwagwo.
138.5: Oleke bembe oku bikwata oku manzirago, olwʼokubba ekitiisyakyo Musengwa, kyʼamaani!
138.6: Waire ngʼoMusengwa yagulumaire okukiraku nabuli kintu, afaayo oku bayeejere; Neye abʼamalala, yabeesamba.
138.7: Nʼowemba aakati omu bigosi, iwe okuuma obwomi bwange. Olwanisya abalabe bange abandiku ekisungu, nʼonnunula nʼamaanigo.
138.8: OMusengwa otuukirirya ebigendererwabye eeri nze; Oo Musengwa, okutakakwo okutakoma kubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona. Tiwandekesula nze oguwakolere.

139.2: Nʼowentyama era nʼowensetuka obba ommaite, nʼowoobba e yala nanze ebiseego byange obitegeera.
139.3: Owempuluka nʼowenyingira, ontegeera, omanya nabuli kimo ekinkola.
139.4: Nga nkaali nʼokubbutula ekibono, Musengwa obba okimaitiire nakimo.
139.5: Oneeruguulirirya oku mba gyonagyona, nʼonkuuma nʼamaanigo.
139.6: Okumanya okwo okwommaitemu kwewunyisya, kumbitiriireku, timpezya okukutegeera.
139.7: Yaina e gimpezya okwaba ni nzwa eeri oMwoyowo? Yaina e gimpezya okwirukira ni nzwa e gyoli?
139.8: Oweniina omwigulu, eeyo oliyo. Owenjika ni ngona e magombe, eeyo oliyo.
139.9: Nʼowenguluka ni mbitawo nʼe buzwaisana, ooba ni njaba ni ntyama e yala eino e bugwaisana,
139.10: nʼeeyo yona oliyo okunnungamya, era oliyo okumbeera.
139.11: Nʼowensaba nti, “Dala endikiirya embuuneku, era ekitangaala ekineeruguulirye kisuuke ndikiirya,”
139.12: nʼendikiirya yona tebba ndikiirya eeri iwe; nʼobwire buboneca ooti musana. Kwiwe endikiirya nʼekitangaala bifaanangana.
139.13: Niiwe owabbumbire ebitundu byange ebyʼomunda byonabyona, niiwe owayungayungire ebitundu byange ebyʼomubiri omu kida kya mama.
139.14: Nkuwuuja olwʼokubba wankolere mu ngeri etiisya era eyeewuunyisya. Ebikolebyo byewuunyisya ino, era ekyo nkimaitiire nakimo ino.
139.15: Owebabbaire bakola amagumba gange, nga bannyungayunga omu kida kya mama; owenabbaire nga nkulira eeyo omu mbiso, tikyabbaire kibise egyoli.
139.16: Wamboine nga nkaali okubba omu kida kya mama; enaku egyʼobwomi bwange gyonagyona, wagiwandikire omu kitabokyo nga gikaali nʼokutandiikaku.
139.17: Oo Kibbumba, ebyonseegaku nga byomugaso ino! Ebyonseegaku tibibalika!
139.18: Owemba kubibala, bikira omusenye obungi. Owendamuka mba nkaali ndi na iwe.
139.19: Oo Kibbumba, kadi singa oita ababbibabbi! Munzwerewo baiti inywe!
139.20: Bakutumulaku kubbikubbi, abalabebo babona eriinalyo ngʼeritagasa.
139.21: Oo Musengwa, nga ncaawa abo abakucaawa, era nga nnyooma abo abakujeemera!
139.22: Mbacaawira nakimo ino, mbeeta balabe bange.
139.23: Oo Kibbumba onkebere, kaisi otegeere ebiri omu mwoyo gwange. Onkeme, kaisi omanye ebiseego byange.
139.24: Obone ooba nga ndimu ekibbikibbi kyonakyona, era onkubbembere omu nzirayo eyʼenkalaakalira.

140.1: Oo Musengwa, onnunule eeri abantu ababbibabbi, ontaase eeri abaiti.
140.2: Ibo bategeka omu myoyo gyabwe kukola bubbibubbi, tibagonerya kusiikuula ntalo.
140.3: Ebibono ebibazwamu byʼobulabe ooti mpiri omukambwe, ebibono byabwe bikangabalya ooti saagwa wa nfulugundu.
140.4: Oo Musengwa, ontaase eeri abantu ababbibabbi, ontaase eeri abaiti ibo abakola entegeka eyʼokumpapalya.
140.5: Abeepanka bantegere omutego omu kyama, bategere olutuula lwabwe era bantegere emitego omu nzira.
140.6: Oo Musengwa nkoba nti, “Niiwe oKibbumba wange.” Oo Musengwa, owulire okwegairira kwange, ombeere.
140.7: Oo Musengwa, iwe oMusengwa wange, omununuli wange owʼamaani, niiwe onkuuma oku lunaku lwʼolutalo.
140.8: Oo Musengwa, tiwaawa ababbibabbi ebibataka, tiwaganya entegeka gyabwe okubitamu, bademba ni beewaana.
140.9: Tiwaganya abalabe bange okuwangula, oganye ebyo ebibantiisyatisya bibakangire.
140.10: Oleke amanda agameigera gabagweku, oleke babadyake omu musyo, babadyake omu biina ebyabiriri, tibabizwamu naire.
140.11: Tiwaganya abo abali nʼentumula embiibbi okubbaaku nʼe gibabba oku kyalo; oleke ekibbikibbi kiyiigenge mangu abakambwe ni kibajigirica.
140.12: Musengwa, mmaite ngʼotaasa abebajolonga, era olwanirira abanambulaku obubbeeri.
140.13: Mazima abatuukirirye, bakuwuujanga; era abʼemyoyo emirongoole basunanga obutyami omumaisogo.

141.1: Oo Musengwa, nakwekungirira, oyanguwe okumbeera. Ompulisisye nga nkusaba.
141.2: Oganye esaala yange etuuke e gyoli ngʼokuduunya kwʼobubbaani, nʼokusiirya engalo gyange omu kusaba kubbe ngʼesadaaka eyʼakanaigulo.
141.3: Oo Musengwa, ofuge entumula yange, ombuuneku omunwa gwange.
141.4: Tiwaganya omwoyo gwange ni gwegomba okukola ekibbikibbi kyonakyona, tiwaguganya okwemigira omu bibbibibbi, nʼomu mukumbo nʼabakola ebibbibibbi era tiwaganyanga ni nabeegaitaku omu kulya embaga gyabwe.
141.5: Oganye omuntu omutuukirirye ambonereze, ekyo kintu ekyʼekisa; oganye annenye, ekyo kirongoola ooti mafuta agebansukire oku mutwe. Ekyo tinkigaana. Neye esaala yange bulijo eyakanisya ebikole byʼabakola ebibbibibbi.
141.6: Abafugi baabwe balibadyaka okuzwa e ngulu okwibbaale eriwanvu, awo ababbibabbi webalimanyira bati ebibonobyo Musengwa byʼamazima.
141.7: Awo balikoba bati, “Ngʼowebadaata era ni bakankadyaga eitakali, batyo webalikankadyaga amagumba gaiswe oku mugo gwʼamagombe.”
141.8: Neye iwe Kibbumba, oMusengwa wange niiwe oguneesiga; njirukira giri niiwe okunkuuma; tiwandeka ni nfa!
141.9: Ontaase emitego egibantegere, era entuula ababbibabbi egibategere.
141.10: Oleke ababbibabbi bagwe omu ntuula abananyere egibategere, neye nze nga neebitira mwidembe.

142.1: Neekungirira oMusengwa, neegairira oMusengwa okunkwatira ekisa.
142.3: Owemba mpoiremu amaani, niiwe amanya ekyendi nʼokukola. Omu nzira omu mbita, abalabe bange bantegeremu omutego omu mbiso.
142.4: Owendola aawo e gyendi mbona nga mpaawo anfaaku, era mpaawo awokwirukira okusuna obukuumi. Mpaawo afaayo oku bwomi bwange.
142.5: Oo Musengwa, nakwekungirira niiwe, ni nkoba nti, “Niiwe ekiirukiro kyange, niiwe owange omu kyalo kyʼaboomi.”
142.6: Owulisisye okwekunga kwange, olwʼokubba ndi omu bwetaavu bubitiriri! Onnunule eeri abanjiigaania, olwʼokubba bankiraku ino amaani.
142.7: Ontoole omu busibe obwo kaisi nkuwuujenge. Awo abatuukirirye bakumbaaniranga e gyendi olwa busaabwo egyendi.

143.1: Oo Musengwa, owulire okusaba kwange, owulisisye okwegairira kwange, onjiremu, omu bwesigwabwo era nʼomu butuukiriryebwo.
143.2: Tiwansalira nze omuweereryawo omusango, olwʼokubba mpaawo muntu atuukiriire omumaisogo.
143.3: Abalabe bange banjiigire, era bampanguliire nakimo, ni bandetera okubba omu kifo ekyʼendikiirya, ni mba ngʼabo abafiire eira.
143.4: Kale ekyo ni kinzweraku okuwaamu amaani; omwoyo gwange ni gweraliikirira.
143.5: Njebukirya ebiseera ebyʼeira, ni nfumintiriza kwebyo byonabyona ebiwakolere, ni nseega kwebyo engalogyo ebigyakolere.
143.6: Nsiirya engalo gyange e gyoli nga nsaba. Omwoyo gwange gukuli nyonta ooti kyalo ekikalire ekikandiire oikendi.
143.7: Oo Musengwa, oyanguwe okunjiramu, amaani gampoiremu. Tiwaneebityaku, ni mba ooti baadi abaikirira e magombe.
143.8: Nabuli makeezi, oneebukiryenge okutakakwo okutakoma, olwʼokubba neesiga niiwe. Ondage enzira egindi nʼokukwata, olwʼokubba neewaayo gyoli mu kusaba.
143.9: Oo Musengwa, onnunule eeri abalabe bange, olwʼokubba njirukira giri niiwe okusuna obukuumi.
143.10: Onjegesye okukola ebyotaka, olwʼokubba niiwe oKibbumba wange. Oganye oMwoyowo omusa annungamye omu mweyaayo.
143.11: Oo Musengwa, oku lwʼeriinalyo okuume obwomi bwange; omu butuukiriryebwo, ontaase omu bugosi.
143.12: Olwʼokutakakwo okutakoma, omalewo abalabe bange, ojigirice bonabona abanjiigaania, olwʼokubba ndi muweereryawo.

144.1: OMusengwa bamuwuujenge iye oyo eibbaale lyange omuneebisa, iye oyo anjegesya okulwana entalo iye oyo antegeka okulwana.
144.2: Niiye ali nʼokutaka okutakoma egyendi, era ekikomera kyange ekiwanvu. Niiye olugaga lwange, era omununuli wange, niiye engabo yange era egyali ginjirukira okusuna obukuumi, oyo niiye aica amawanga ansi wange.
144.3: Oo Musengwa, lwaki olumirwa omuntu-obuntu? Era omuntu niki-so ekigira nʼomuseegaku?
144.4: Omuntu abbaawo kaseera-buseera ooti mwota; enakugye ntono ooti kiiriirye ekigotawo mangu.
144.5: Oo Musengwa obiikule eigululyo, era oike ansi; okwate oku nsozi, kaisi giduunye omwosi.
144.6: Osindike okumesya, era osalaanice abalabebo. Olase obulasobwo obatiringanisye.
144.7: Ogolole engaloyo ngʼosinzirira omwigulu; ontaase era onnunule okuzwa omu maizi amangi, okuzwa omu bwezye bwʼabanamawanga,
144.8: ibo abo abatatumula amazima, era abalayira nʼebyobubbeyi.
144.9: Oo Kibbumba, nakwemberanga olwembo oluyaaka; nakukubbiranga enkana eyʼenkosi eikumi nga wenkwembera.
144.10: Iwe awa abakabaka obuwanguli, iwe akuuma omuweereryawo oDawudi eeri empiima eyʼakabbikabbi.
144.11: Ontaase era onnunule okuzwa omu bwezye bwʼabanamawanga, ibo abo abatatumula amazima era abalayira nʼebyobubbeyi.
144.12: Oganye abataane baiswe omu mavuvuka gaabwe bakule nakusani, ooti bimera ebikulire nakusani, nʼabaala baiswe baboneke nakusani ooti bikondo ebikulungule owebiwonekesya kusani olubiri.
144.13: Ebideero byaiswe biizule nga mulimu amakungula aga buli ngeri. Entaama gyaiswe gibyalagane ensaiza nʼenkali omu biriisiryo byaiswe.
144.14: Oganye ente gyaiswe gibyalagane, nga tigisumula waire okufiisya. Tiwaabbaawo kuvunia bikomera nga mpaawo kwaba mu buwambe, nga mpaawo kukuukulya omu bifo byaiswe.
144.15: Bʼenkabi abantu abo oKibbumba abaakolera ebintu ebyo; Bʼenkabi ibo abo ngʼoMusengwa niiye oKibbumba waabwe.

145.1: Nagulumalyanga niiwe oKibbumba era oKabaka wange; nakuwuujanga emirembe nʼemirembe.
145.2: Nabuli lunaku nakuwuujanga, nawuujanga eriinalyo emirembe nʼemirembe.
145.3: OMusengwa mukulu, era asaaniire okumuwuuja eino, obukulubwe tibumalikayo.
145.4: Abʼomulembe ogundi balisiijirya abʼomumulembe ogwiraku ebyakola, balibalonserya ebyamaani ebyakola.
145.5: Natumulanga oku kitiisyakye ekibitiriri nʼokufumintirizanga oku byewunyisya ebyakola.
145.6: Abantu batumulanga oku maani agʼebyʼentiisya ebyakola, era nze namanyikisyanga obugulumalibwe.
145.7: Balangiriranga obusaabwe obubitiriri, era ni bemba nʼeisangaalo oku butuukiriryebwe.
145.8: OMusengwa wʼekisa era alumirwa, alwawo okusunguwala, era aizwire kutaka okutakoma.
145.9: OMusengwa musa eeri bonabona, era akwatira ekisa ebyo byonabyona ebiyakolere.
145.10: Oo Musengwa, ebyomi byonabyona ebiwakolere byakuwuujanga, nʼabatuukiriryebo bonabona bakuwuujanga.
145.11: Batumulanga oku kitiisya kyʼobwakabakabwo, era balonsyanga oku maanigo,
145.12: okumanyikisya abantu bonabona ebyamaani ebyokola, nʼekitiisya ekyʼobukulu bwʼobwakabakabwo.
145.13: Obwakabakabwo bwʼemirembe nʼemirembe, era obufugibwo bubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona. OMusengwa mwesigwa mu byonabyona ebyasuubiza, era wʼekisa eeri byonabyona ebiyabbumbire.
145.14: OMusengwa awanirira abo bonabona abagwa, nʼairyamu amaani abo abanafuwire.
145.15: Amaiso gʼebyomi byonabyona galingirira niiwe era obiwa ebyokulya omu biseera ebituuce.
145.16: Oyanzululya engaloyo okubigabirira nʼoikutya nabuli kyomi omu byetaago byakyo.
145.17: OMusengwa mutuuce mu byonabyona ebyakola, era wʼekisa omu bikolebye byonabyona.
145.18: OMusengwa abba kumpi nʼabo bonabona abamusaba, abo bonabona abamusaba omu mazima.
145.19: Atuukirirya okwegomba kwabo abamutya, era awulira okwekunga kwabwe nʼabanunula.
145.20: OMusengwa akuuma abo bonabona abamutaka, neye yalijikirica ababbibabbi bonabona.
145.21: Nze nʼatumulanga ni mpuuja iwe Musengwa, oleke nabuli ekiri nʼobwomi kikuwuuje emirembe nʼemirembe iwe omutukulye.

146.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa. Mwoyo gwange, owuuje oMusengwa.
146.2: Nawuujanga oMusengwa obwomi bwange bwonabwona; nayembanga okuwuuja oKibbumba nga nkaali mwomi.
146.3: Timwesiganga abafugi, ibo abantu-obuntu abatayezya okununula.
146.4: Owebafa, bakanga mwitakali; oku lunaku olunanyere olwo entegeka gyabwe lugifeera.
146.5: Wʼenkabi iye oyo ngʼoKibbumba wa Yaakobbo niiye obubbeeribwe, iye oyo ngʼeisuubirye liri mu Musengwa iye oKibbumbawe,
146.6: iye eyakolere eigulu nʼekyalo, nʼenyanza nʼebigirimu byonabyona, iye oMusengwa asigala nga mwesigwa emirembe gyonagyona.
146.7: Alamula mu bwenkanya abo abebagadya, era awa abanzalwa ekyokulya. OMusengwa ateera abasibe,
146.8: oMusengwa alibulya amaiso gʼaboofu. OMusengwa airyamu amaani abo abanafuwire; oMusengwa ataka abatuukirirye.
146.9: OMusengwa akuuma abasenze, nʼabbeera abanamwandu nʼabafuubbi, neye afafaagania ababbibabbi.
146.10: OMusengwa afuga emirembe gyonagyona. Iwe Sayuuni, oKibbumbawo afuga emirembe nʼemirembe. Muwuuje oMusengwa.

147.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa. Nga kisa okwemba nga tuwuuja oKibbumba waiswe, nga kisangaalya era nga kisaanira okumuwuuja!
147.2: OMusengwa ayombeka obuyaaka oYerusaalemi, akumbaania aBaisirairi abasuna obwirukiro omu kyalo ekindi.
147.3: Alamya abanyolere omu myoyo, era ababudaabuda omu bukosefu byabwe.
147.4: Niiye asalawo obungi bwʼenkota, nʼawa nabuli moiza eriina.
147.5: OMusengwa waiswe mukulu era wʼobwezye obwʼamaani, nʼamalabukige tigakoma.
147.6: OMusengwa asetula abebanyooma, neye afafaagania ababbibabbi.
147.7: Mwembere oMusengwa nga mumuwuuja, mwembere oKibbumba waiswe nga mukubba otongoli.
147.8: Abiika ebireri okwigulu; ategekera ekyalo oikendi, era amerya eisubi oku nsozi.
147.9: Awa ebisolo ekyokulya kyabyo, nʼawa abaana ba nankololo abakunga ekyokulya.
147.10: Eisangaalolye tiriri mu mbalaasi endwani, waire okwenyumirizakwe omu maje agʼoku bigere.
147.11: Wazira oMusengwa asangaalira baabo abamutya, abo abateeka eisuubi lyabwe mu kutakakwe okutakoma.
147.12: Owuuje oMusengwawo, iwe oYerusaalemi; owuuje oKibbumbawo, iwe oSayuuni,
147.13: olwʼokubba agumya ebiigaliro byʼamageetigo, era awa enkabi abantubo abakulimu.
147.14: Aleeta eidembe oku nsaloyo nʼamawanga agandi era akuwa ekyokulya ekikira obusa ekikumala.
147.15: Asindika ekiragirokye oku kyalo; ekibonokye ni kifuumuuka embiro.
147.16: Asindika obbalaafu omweru ca ooti byoya bya ntaama omweru, amansira ekisu ooti ikoke.
147.17: Asindika amabbaale ga ikendi ooti bubbaalebbaale. Naani ayezya okugumira obuwolondoki obwasindika?
147.18: Asindika ekibonokye ni kibisaanuuca. Asindika ogumpunga, amaizi ni gakulumuka.
147.19: Abiikulira oYaakobbo ekibonokye, Amanyikisya aBaisirairi amateekage nʼebiragirobye.
147.20: Ekyo takikoleranga amawanga agandi; igo agatamaite ebiragirobye. Muwuuje oMusengwa.

148.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa. Muwuuje oMusengwa nga musinzirira omwigulu. Mumuwuuje inywe abali eeyo angulu.
148.2: Mumuwuuje inywe abamalaikabe nywenanywena, mumuwuuje inywe amajeege gonagona agʼomwigulu.
148.3: Mumuwuuje inywe isana nʼomweri; mumuwuuje inywe enkota gyonagyona egyaka.
148.4: Omuwuuje iwe igulu eriri angulu ino, era omuwuuje iwe amaizi agali e ngulu wʼekireri.
148.5: Oleke biwuuje eriina lya Musengwa, olwʼokubba yalagiire-bulagiri ni bibbaawo.
148.6: Yabiteekere omu bifo byabyo bibbeemu emirembe nʼemirembe, nʼabiteekaku ekiragiro obutazwamu.
148.7: Inywe abali oku kyalo muwuuje oMusengwa. Inywe agampiri gʼomu nyanza, na inywe enjabi gya ganyanza,
148.8: inywe omusyo nʼobbalaafu, nʼobuwolondoki nʼebireri, omuwuuje iwe ompunga owʼamaani otuukirirya ekiragirokye.
148.9: Mumuwuuje inywe ensozi nʼobusozi bwonabwona, emisaale gyʼebineneka nʼemivule gyonagyona,
148.10: ebisolo ebyʼomu kigona, nʼebyayo byonabyona, ebibbumbe ebyekuusa okwitakali nʼenyonyi.
148.11: Inywe abakabaka bʼekyalo nʼamawanga gonagona, abakungu nʼabafugi nywenanywena abʼoku kyalo,
148.12: mumuwuuje inywe abaisuka nʼabaala, abakaire nʼabaana abatobato.
148.13: Oleke ibo bawuuje eriina lya Musengwa, olwʼokubba eriinalye lyonkani niiryo eribagulumalya. Ekitiisyakye kiri angulu ino wʼebintu byʼoku kyalo nʼebyʼomwigulu.
148.14: Yasuucirye eigwangalye lyʼamaani, kagira abatuukiriryebe bonabona bamuwuuja, ibo aBaisirairi, abamuli oku mwoyo. Muwuuje oMusengwa.

149.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa! Mwembere oMusengwa olwembo oluyaaka, mumuwuuje omu nkumbaana gyʼabatuukiriryebe.
149.2: Oleke oIsirairi asangaalire oyo eyamukolere. Abantu bʼe Sayuuni basangaalire oKabaka waabwe.
149.3: Muwuuje eriinalye nga mubina, era mumwembere nga mukubba obugoma nʼotongoli.
149.4: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba oMusengwa asiima abantube; abbeera abawombeeki ni bawangula.
149.5: Oleke abatya oMusengwa bajaagaane olwʼokuwangula; bayembe olwʼeisangaalo oku buliri bwabwe.
149.6: Oleke okuwuuja oKibbumba kubbe omu minwa gyabbwe, nga bakwaite empiima egyʼobwogi obubiri,
149.8: okusiba abakabaka baabwe nʼenjegere, nʼabakungu baabwe nʼempingu,
149.9: okutuukirirya ekibonerezo kyʼomusango ekibabawandiikireku. Okwo niikwo okwesiima kwʼabatya oMusengwa. Muwuuje oMusengwa!

150.1: Muwuuje oMusengwa. Muwuuje oKibbumba omu kifookye ekitukulye; mumuwuuje ngʼali omu kifo kyʼobwezyebwe omwigulu.
150.2: Mumuwuuje olwʼebikolebye ebyamaani; mumuwuuje olwʼobukulubwe obutenkanika.
150.3: Mumuwuuje nga mufuwa ekondeere, mumuwuuje nga mukubba otongoli nʼenkana.
150.4: Mumuwuuje nga mukubba obugoma era nga mubina, mumuwuuje nga mukubba ebivuga ebyʼenkosi era nga mufuwa emirere.
150.5: Mumuwuuje nga mukubba ebisekende, mumuwuuje nga mukubba ebisekende ebivuga eino.
150.6: Oleke ebiyeera byonabyona biwuuje oMusengwa. Muwuuje oMusengwa.

1.1: Engero gya Sulemaani okabaka wa Isirairi, omutaane wa Dawudi.
1.2: Engero ginu gibbeera abantu okusuna amalabuki nʼokwega, gibabbeera okutegeera amakulu amainike agagirimu.
1.3: Era gyegesya amalabuki agʼokukola ebintu nʼamalabuki, okukola ebituuce nʼebyʼobwenkanya nʼokuteekubbira.
1.4: Giwa amalabuki abo ababisi, era gigeziwalisya abavuvuka.
1.5: Aale abʼamalabuki bagiwulisisye, beeyongere okwega, nʼabategeeri basunemu okubalungamya,
1.6: bategeere engero nʼebikobe ebyʼamakulu amainike, ibyo ebibono ebyʼabʼamalabuki nʼebikoiko byabwe. Okulaabbira abavuvuka
1.7: Okutya oMusengwa, okumanya mu kutandiikira. Neye abasirusiru banyooma amalabuki, nʼebiragiro.
1.8: Mwana wange, owulisisyenge okulungamya kwa iteewo, era tiwalekanga okulaabbira kwa maawo,
1.9: olwʼokubba birongoola empisagyo ngʼengule owenyumisya omutwe, era ngʼamajolobero agʼomu mamiro oweganyumisya oyo agazwaire.
1.10: Mwana wange, abakola ebikole ebibbibibbi owebakusendasendanga, toikiriryanga.
1.11: Owebakukobanga bati, “Oize watweyimbyeku; oize tugonerere omuntu tumwite, tuvumbiikirirye onambulaku omusango anambula nsonga.
1.12: Oleke tubamalirewo nakimo ngʼamagombe owegakola abantu, abo nago aboomi yomo, tubasaanyewo babbe ooti baabo abaika e magombe;
1.13: twetwalire ebyobusuni byabwe byonabyona, twizulye amanyumba gaiswe omunyago.
1.14: Oize wena wetwegaiteku, twagabana ebitwanyaga.”
1.15: Mwana wange, tokolanga omukumbo nabo, tokwatanga amanzira gaabwe,
1.16: olwʼokubba tibeezizya okukola ekibbikibbi, babba bategeki kusuka musaaye.
1.17: Kubba kwedambya okutega omutego, ngʼonyonyi ogwotaka okupapalya akubona.
1.18: Abantu abo, babba beetega niibo abananyere, batega omutego ogwabapapalya niibo abananyere.
1.19: Kityo wekibba ku buli asuna ebintu omu bucaamu; ekyo kitwalisya obwomi bwʼoyo abisuna. Okulabula eeri abanyooma amalabuki
1.20: Amalabuki geeterera omu nguudo gyʼomu kibuga, gaaminkirira omu bifo abantu e gibakumbaanira omu kibuga.
1.21: Gatumula maaminkirira omu mansanganira omuli obuyoga, gatumulira e gibangirira omu kibuga.
1.22: “Inywe ababisi, mwalituuca di okutaka obubisi? Inywe abanyoomi mwalituuca di okusangaalira obunyoomi? Inywe abasirusiru mwalituuca di okucaawa okumanya?
1.23: Singa mwawulisisyanga okunenya kwange, nabakoberanga ebiri oku mwoyo gwange, ni mbamanyikisya ebiseego byange.
1.24: Neye olwʼokubba mwagaine okumpulisisya owenabeetere era ni watabbaawo afaayo owenabasimiirye,
1.25: olwʼokubba timwateekereyo omwoyo oku kulungamya kwange kwonakwona, era nandi mwikirirya okunenya kwange,
1.26: kale zena nalibasekerera ngʼakabbikabbi kabagwireku. Nalibajeeja ngʼakatyabaga kabagwireku.
1.27: Ngʼakatyabaga kabagwireku ooti ikendi owa mpunga, akabbikabbi owekalibagwaku ooti gumpunga ogwʼamaani, enima nʼobugosi owebyalibagwaku.
1.28: “Awo balinjeta, neye tinalibairamu; balinnoonia, neye tibalimbonaku.
1.29: Ngʼowebagaine okwega, era ni basalawo okutatya oMusengwa,
1.30: ngʼowebataikiriirye okulungamya kwange, era ni banyooma okunenya kwange,
1.31: kagira balirya ebineneka ebizwa omu bikole byabwe era ni baikuta ebineneka byʼenkwe gyabwe.
1.32: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba obubisi bwʼababisi niibwo obubaita, era obutafaayo bwʼabasirusiru bwabajigiricanga.
1.33: Neye nabuli ampulisisya yaabbangawo mwidembe, era yaabbanga mirembe, anambula kutya kabbikabbi.”

2.1: Mwana wange, singa wakwatanga ebibono byange, era nandi weerabira ebiragiro byange;
2.2: nʼotega ekitwi eeri amalabuki, nʼoteekayo omwoyo eeri okutegeera;
2.3: dala singa wasabanga okusuna okumanya, era ni weegairira bakuwe okutegeera;
2.4: owewanoonianga amalabuki ooti onoonia feeza, era ooti onoonia byobusuni ebibabisire,
2.5: awo walitegeera okutya oMusengwa, era walizuula okumanya oKibbumba,
2.6: olwʼokubba oMusengwa niiye agaba amalabuki, okumanya nʼokutegeera bizwa giri niiye.
2.7: Awa obutegeeri abalongoole omu myoyo, Iye ngabo eeri abo abatambulira omu bwomi obunambulaku ekyʼokubunenya,
2.8: akuuma abakola ebyʼobwenkanya, era alabirira abo abamwesiga.
2.9: Era awo walimanya ebituuce, nʼebyʼobwenkanya nʼokuteekubbira. Walimanya ebyosaaniire okukola.
2.10: Walisuuka wʼamalabuki, era okumanya kwalikusangaalisya.
2.11: Okusalawo okusa kwakulabiriranga, okutegeera kwakukuumanga.
2.12: Amalabuki gakuwunucanga amanzira gʼababbibabbi, gakulamyanga abo abatumula ebyʼobugwagwa,
2.13: abo abazwire oku manzira gʼobutuukirirye, ni baira mu kukolanga bibbibibbi,
2.14: abasangaalira kukola bibbibibbi, abanyumirwa byʼobugwagwa.
2.15: Ibo bantu bʼamanzira amacaamu, era bakucaakuca omu nkola yaabwe.
2.16: Amalabuki galikwezyesya okuwunuka omukali omulendi, okuwunuka omukali oyo owʼamaiso amagumangu nʼebibonobye ebisendasenda.
2.17: Omukali oyo, aleka oibaaye owʼomu mavuvukage, ni yeerabira endagaano egiyakolere nʼoKibbumbawe.
2.18: Kale okwaba omu nyumbaye, kubba kukwata nzira eyaba e magombe, era enzira eyaba e wuwe, ekutwala mu bafu.
2.19: Abaingira e wuwe tibaira; nʼokwira tibaira omu nzira yʼobwomi.
2.20: Kale otambulirenge mu manzira gʼabantu abasa, era okwatenge manzira gʼabatuukirirye,
2.21: olwʼokubba abʼemyoyo emirongoole niibo ababbaawo oku kyalo, era abanambulaku ekyokubanenya, niibo abakisigalamu.
2.22: Neye oKibbumba yalitoolawo ababbibabbi oku kyalo, era abatali beesigwa yalikibatoolamu.

3.1: Mwana wange, tiweerabiranga ebinkwegesya, ogonderenge ebiragiro byange,
3.2: awo wawangaala emyanka mingi, era byakuleetera eidembe.
3.3: Tiwaazwanga oku mazima nʼoku bwesigwa. Tiwabirekanga, byeragenge ooti kizwalo ekyʼomu mamiro ekyozwaire, obikuumirenge omu mwoyogwo.
3.4: Awo waabbanga mukoda era mutake, eeri oKibbumba nʼeeri abantu.
3.5: Weesigenge Musengwa nʼomwoyogwo gwonagwona, tiweesiganga kutegeerakwo.
3.6: Oyebukiryenge oMusengwa mu byonabyona ebyokola, awo yakulaganga ekyosaaniire okukola.
3.7: Tiweebonanga okubba owʼamalabuki. Otyenge Musengwa, era weewalenge ekibbikibbi.
3.8: Ekyo kyakuzwerangaku omubirigwo ni gubba mwomi, era amagumbago ni gabba masa.
3.9: Owenge oMusengwa ekitiisya ngʼomutonera oku byobusunibwo, owengeyo ebirime ebyekereri oku byʼokungula byonabyona;
3.10: awo ebideerobyo byaizulanga du, ebikunyirobyo byaizulanga enviinyo empyo.
3.11: Mwana wange, tonyoomanga okugolola kwa Musengwa, tiweesinyanga okunenyakwe,
3.12: olwʼokubba oMusengwa agolola ogwataka, ngʼomubyaire owaagolola omwanawe ogwataka.
3.13: Wʼenkabi iye oyo asuna amalabuki, wʼenkabi iye oyo asuna okutegeera,
3.14: olwʼokubba amalabuki gʼomugaso okukiraku efeeza, era gʼamagoba okukiraku ezaabbu.
3.15: Amalabuki gʼomugaso okukiraku amabbaale agʼebbeeyi; era mpaawo ekiweegomba ekyoyezya okugageraageraniaku.
3.16: Amalabuki gakuwa okuwangaala, ni gakuwa nʼobusuni nʼekitiisya.
3.17: Amalabuki gakuwa obwomi obwesiimisya, gakuleetera eidembe.
3.18: Amalabuki musaale gwʼobwomi eeri abo abagatwala; abagagumiraku basuna enkabi.
3.19: OMusengwa ngʼakolesya amalabuki yakolere ekyalo nʼakigumirya oku musingi, era yateekerewo eigulu ngʼakolesya kutegeera.
3.20: Amalabukige, gabindigwirye ensulo gyʼamaizi, era gatoonyesya oikendi okuzwa omu bireri.
3.21: Mwana wange, weekwatenge oku malabuki nʼokutegeera; tiwabiganyanga ni bikuzwaku.
3.22: Byalikuwa obwomi, byalikuwoomesya ooti ijolobero eryʼomu mamiro.
3.23: Awo watambulanga nakusani omu lugendolwo, era ebigerebyo tibyesiitaalenge.
3.24: Owewalambaalanga, tiwatyenge. Owewalambaalanga wagonanga endoolo ni gikuwoomera.
3.25: Tiwaatyenge akabbikabbi okukugwerenkerera, waire okujigirika okwizira ababbibabbi,
3.26: olwʼokubba oMusengwa yakukuumanga, tiyakulekenge okugwa omu mutego.
3.27: Nabuli owoobba oyezya, tiwaimanga obubbeeri abantu ababusaanira.
3.28: Tiwakobanga omwinawo oti, “Oyabe, waira eizo ni nkuwa,” ate ngʼekiyeetaaga oli nakyo esaawa eyo.
3.29: Tiwategekanga okukola omwinawo akabbikabbi, oyo atyama okumpi na iwe era nga yakwesiga.
3.30: Tiwavunaananga omuntu anambula nsonga, nga mpaawo kabbikabbi akakukolere.
3.31: Tiwakwatiranga engongi oyo asuna ebintu ebyobukukumpanya, era tosalangawo okukola nga iye obwakola,
3.32: olwʼokubba oMusengwa acaawa abo abacaama ni bazwa omu nzira entuuce, neye abba mukaagwa wʼabalongoole omu myoyo.
3.33: Ekiraami kya Musengwa kibba oku maka gʼababbibabbi, neye agʼabatuukirirye agawa enkabi.
3.34: OMusengwa ajerega abatala abainaabwe, neye abawombeeki abakwatira ekisa.
3.35: Abʼamalabuki balibba bʼekitiisya, neye abasirusiru baliswala-buswali.

4.1: Baana bange, muwulisisye oiteewanywe ebyabeegesya. Muteekeyo omwoyo, kaisi mubbe bategeeri,
4.2: olwʼokubba ebimbeegesya bisa, kale timwalekanga ebimbasomesya.
4.3: Owenabbaire nga ndi mwisuka, nga ndi mutomuto, era nga ndi mwana moiza oku mama,
4.4: obbaabba yanjegesyanga ati, “Oteekenge ebinkukoba oku mwoyogwo. Ogonderenge ebinkulagira, kaisi obbengewo mwomi.
4.5: Osune amalabuki, osune okutegeera. Tiweerabiranga ebibono byange waire okubizwaku.
4.6: Tiwalekesulanga amalabuki, era gakukuumanga; ogatakenge, era gakulabiriranga.
4.7: Amalabuki, niigo agakirira nakimo obukulu, nʼolwekyo osune amalabuki. Omu bintu byonabyona, kikulu okubba mutegeeri.
4.8: Otwale amalabuki ngʼekintu ekikulu, galikusuuca mukulu; wageekwateku, galikuweesya ekitiisya.
4.9: Galikutiikira engule eyʼobukoda, engule eyalikuweesya ekitiisya.” Okulaabbira omwana
4.10: Owulisisye mwana wange, otwale ebinkukoba, kaisi owangaale emyanka emingi.
4.11: Nkwegesya kubba mulabuki, era nkulungamya mu nzira entuuce.
4.12: Owewatambulanga tiwaabbengewo ekikutigalira, owewairukanga tiweesiitaalenge.
4.13: Ebyoyegere obikwatenge, tiwabirekanga, obikuumenge, olwʼokubba niibyo obwomibwo.
4.14: Tiwakwatanga enzira yʼababbibabbi, ooba okutambuliranga omu nzira yʼabakola ebibbibibbi.
4.15: Wagyesambenge, tiwagitambulirangamu. Wagyewalenge, okwatenge iyo nʼoyaba,
4.16: olwʼokubba tibagona okutoolaku nga bamalire okukola ekibbikibbi. Tibatoola ondoolo, paka nga waliwo ogubatuuciryeku akabbikabbi.
4.17: Okukola ebibbibibbi kibanyumira ooti kyokulya era ebikole byʼobukambwe, bibanyumira ooti kyokunywa.
4.18: Enzira eyʼabatuukirirye, ebba ooti isana erizwayo, ni lyaba nga lyeyongera okwaka paka musana perekete.
4.19: Neye enzira yʼababbibabbi eri ooti ndikiirya ekwaite zigizigi, tibabona ekibaleetera okwesiitaala.
4.20: Mwana wange, owulisisye ebibono byange, otege ekitwi eeri ebintumula.
4.21: Tiwaganyanga ni bikuzwaku, obikuumirenge omu mwoyogwo,
4.22: olwʼokubba abo ababisuna, bibaleetera obwomi, era biramya omuntu omubirigwe gwonagwona.
4.23: Ekikulu omu byonabyona, weegenderezenge ino ebyoseega, olwʼokubba niibyo ebifuga obwomibwo.
4.24: Tiwatumulanga ebyakalebule, weewalenge okutumula ebyotamaiteku omutwe nʼebigere.
4.25: Oleke amaisogo galingirirenge buterembereri e gyoyaba, olingirirenge nakimo mumaiso e gyoyaba.
4.26: Weekeenenyenge omu ntegeka yʼebyokola, kaisi ebyokola byonabyona bikwabirenge nakusani.
4.27: Tiwaazwanga omu nzira entuuce. Weewalenge ebibbibibbi.

5.1: Mwana wange, owulisisye amalabuki gange, otege ekitwi eeri ebibono ebinkwegesya,
5.2: kaisi okolenge ebyʼamalabuki, era ebibonobyo biragenge biti oli nʼokumanya.
5.3: Ebibono byʼomukali omulendi, binyuunyuula ooti mujenene, era ebibonobye bikiraku amafuta gʼomuzaituuni okuweweerya,
5.4: neye oku nkomerero, aluluwa ooti ndulwe, asala ooti mpiima yʼobwogi obubiri.
5.5: Akuserengetya mu kufa, enziraye eyaba buterembereri magombe.
5.6: Tafaayo oku nzira yʼobwomi, amanzirage macaamu neye takimaite!
5.7: Kale atyanu baana bange, mumpulisisye; timwazwanga oku bibono ebintumula.
5.8: Omukali ngʼoyo, wamwewalenge, era toigereranga oku mulyango gwʼenyumbaye.
5.9: Singa okikola, abandi balitwala ekitiisyakyo, omuntu omukambwe nʼakwita ngʼokaali muvuvuka.
5.10: Demba abantu abʼe nza ni beetwalira ebyobusunibyo, era ebiwateganiire ni bisuuka byʼomuntu gondi!
5.11: Oku nkomerero yʼobwomibwo, ngʼoyondere osigaire magumba, walikenyera.
5.12: Walikoba oti, “Kale lwaki nacaawire okundaabbira? Era lwaki omwoyo gwange gwanyoomere okugunenya?
5.13: Tinawulisisyanga abasomesya bange, waire okutega ekitwi eeri abanjegesya.
5.14: Mbulireku katono okuswalira kimo ino aakati omu bantu abakumbaine!”
5.15: Onywenge maizi gʼomwiruba eriryo, ogabanenge okutakakwo nʼomukali owuwo yenkani.
5.16: Lwaki osukaania amaizi gʼomwirubalyo omu nguudo ni weegaitanga nabuli mukali?
5.17: Amaizi gʼomwiruba eryo gabbenge gago wenkani tiwagagabananga nʼabʼe nza.
5.18: Oleke omukaliwo abbenge nsulo yʼeisangaalolyo. Era osangaalenge nʼomukali owʼomu mavuvukago.
5.19: Yeesiimisya era asangaalya ooti mboneka ya kisolo omutomuto. Oleke amabeerege gakumalenge enaku gyonagyona, bulijo okutakakwe kukusangaalisyenge.
5.20: Lwaki mwana wange, omukali omulendi akusendasenda, Lwaki ogwa omu kifubba kyʼomukali wʼabananyere?
5.21: OMusengwa abona nabuli muntu ekyakola, era yeetegereza amanzira gʼomuntu gonagona.
5.22: Ebibbibibbi byʼomuntu omubbimubbi bimusuukira mutego, ebibbibibbibye ebyakola bimusuukira ooti miguwa egimusiba.
5.23: Yalifa olwʼokubba yagaine okwekuuma, aliiba olwʼobusirusirubwe obubitiriri.

6.1: Mwana wange, owooyemereranga omuntu ogwotamaite, nʼobba muyimawe eeri omwinawo,
6.2: obba weesibire olwʼebibono ebyotumwire, ngʼebibono ebyo bikuleeteire okwesiba.
6.3: Awo mwana wange, okolanga kiinu okweramya, olwʼokubba obba ogwire omu bwezye bwʼomwinawo. Oyabanga egyali ni weewombeeka, ni wamwegairira akulingemu.
6.4: Kale toganyanga nʼogona endoolo, waire kuwongera.
6.5: Weeramyanga ooti kimaadu airuka okuzwa omu ngalo gyʼomuyiigi, era ooti nyonyi awunuka omutego gwʼomutegi. Okwewala obugayaali
6.6: Iwe omugayaali, oyegere oku nkababe, weetegereze enkola yaagyo era olabuke.
6.7: Tigibba nʼagikubbembera, waire okalabaalaba, ooba omufugi,
6.8: neye gyebisira ebyokulya okweisana, gyesoloojerya ebyokulya omu makungula.
6.9: Iwe omugayaali, waligona kutuuca di? Waliramuka di okuzwa omu ndoolo?
6.10: Okugonaku katono, nʼowungulyaku akatono, nʼoleraku engalo owuumuleku akatono,
6.11: obudoobi bwalikulumba ooti mutemo nʼobwetaavu ooti mukondo aali nʼekyokulwanisya.
6.12: Omuntu atagasa, era omubbimubbi ayaba ngʼasasya bubbeyi.
6.13: Akiika amaiso, nʼaseesya ebigere, nʼagerya nʼengalogye.
6.14: Omu nseegaye encaamu, ategeka kukola bibbibibbi, bulijo asiga byʼobucaawi.
6.15: Nʼolwekyo akabbikabbi kalimugwerenkerera. Omu kaseera-buseera balimunialula amantalama.
6.16: Waliwo ebintu mukaaga oMusengwa ebyacaawa, musanvu abyomuliko egyali:
6.17: Embonia eyʼamalala, entumula eyʼobubbeyi, engalo egisuka omusaaye gwʼabanambulaku omusango;
6.18: omwoyo oguseega okukola obubbibubbi ebigere ebyanguwa okukola obucaamu;
6.19: omujulizi owʼobubbeyi atumulyaga ebyʼobubbeyi, nʼomuntu asiga ebyʼobucaawi omu bainaye. Okwewala obulendi
6.20: Mwana wange, ogonderenge ebiragiro bya iteewo, era tiwalekanga omaawo ebyakwegesya.
6.21: Obikuumirenge omu mwoyogwo bulijo, tiwabirekanga, byeragenge ooti kizwalo kyʼomu mamiro ekyozwaire.
6.22: Byakulungamyanga ngʼotambula. Byakukuumanga ngʼogonere, byakulaabbiranga ngʼolamukire.
6.23: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba ebiragiro ebyo, itaala, okwegesya okwo, kitangaala, era bigolola abantu, niibyo enzira eyaba omu bwomi.
6.24: Ebyo byakukuumanga eeri omukali omulendi, nʼeeri akalimi akasikiriza akʼomukali wʼamaiso amangu mangu.
6.25: Tiwegombanga obusiipoonobwe omu mwoyogwo, waire okuganya amaisoge okukusikiriza.
6.26: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba omukali omalaaya akunooniaku mpiiya egigula kyokulya; era omukali omulendi, anoonia kujigirica bwomibwo.
6.27: Omuntu ayezya okukwatira omusyo omu kifubbakye, ekizwalokye ekyazwaire nandi kiya?
6.28: Ooba omuntu ayezya okwema oku makala gʼomusyo, ebigerebye nandi bibabuka?
6.29: Kityo wekibba eeri omuntu eyeegaita nʼomuka mwinaye; nabuli akikola, tiyaliwunuka okumubonereza.
6.30: Abantu tibanyooma omwibbi owaabba aibbire kweramya nzala,
6.31: ate ngʼowebamukwata, ateekwa okusasulamu emirundi musanvu, waire nga kimutwalaku nabuli kyali nakyo omu kisitokye.
6.32: Iye oyo ayenda nʼomukali wʼabananyere, abba adamba okutegeera; nabuli akikola, ajikirica obwomibwe.
6.33: Balimunyooma era ni bamukubba, era okuswalakwe tikwalimuzwaku,
6.34: olwʼokubba eibuba lireetera omusaiza omufumbo okwirya obulwa olwʼomukaliwe nandi nʼabba nʼekisa nga yeesasuza.
6.35: Tiyaliikiriryaku omugaito gwonagwona, yaligaana okumuliyira nʼowekwalibba kwʼemirundi nʼemirundi.

7.1: Mwana wange, okwatenge ebibono byange; era okuumenge ebiragiro byange.
7.2: Okuumenge ebiragiro byange, kaisi obbenge mwomi. Ebinkusomesya obikuumenge, ngʼobwokuuma emunge yʼeriisolyo.
7.3: Obyebukiryenge bulijo, obikuumirenge omu mwoyogwo.
7.4: Okobenge amalabuki oti, “Oli ngʼomwonyoko wange,” era obalenge okutegeera ngʼomuntu wʼoku lusegere.
7.5: Byakukuumanga eeri omukali omulendi, eeri omukali wʼamaiso amangu mangu nʼebibonobye ebisikiriza. Obukodyo bwʼomukali omulendi
7.6: Nabbaire oku dinisa omu nyumba yange ni mbitya amaiso omu dinisa ni ndola e nza.
7.7: Ni mbona omu babisi, ni mbona omu baisuka omuvuvuka onambula okutegeera.
7.8: Yabbaire atambula omu luguudo okumpi nʼeikoona omukali omulendi egyabba, ngʼalungama enyumba yʼomukali nago egyeri
7.9: eigulo ngʼobwire bwirugala, endikiirya ngʼekwata.
7.10: Awo omukali nago nʼazwayo okumusisinkana, ngʼazwaire ooti malaaya, era ngʼagenderera kumusikiriza.
7.11: Iye omukali nago atumulira ngulu, era nga wʼempuutu, nga tatyamikica e ika,
7.12: esaawa egendi mu nguudo, olwisi mu bifo abantu e gibakumbaanira, mu buli nsonda ngʼakuumire abasaiza.
7.13: Omukali nago nʼamukwata, era nʼamugwa omu kifubba, era ngʼabulaku nʼensoni oku maiso, nʼamukoba ati:
7.14: “E ika mpaireyo esadaaka eyʼokusyania, era olwatyanu ntuukiriirye obweyamo bwange.
7.15: Kale nzwireyo kusisinkana niiwe, nkunoonerye era atyanu nkuboine.
7.16: Obuliri bwange mbwalireku amasuuka aga lineni okuzwa e Misiri agalimu erangi.
7.17: Obuliri bwange mbufuwireku okalifuwa ogubeeta omiira, nʼogondi bati alowe, nʼokinamooni.
7.18: Oize tunyinyintirye omukwano paka kuca, oleke omukwano gutunyumire.
7.19: Oibawange abulayo e ika; yaabire mu lugendo lwʼe yala.
7.20: Yaabire nʼomugoba nga gwizwire empiiya era yamalayo esaabbiiti ibiri kaisi nʼaira.”
7.21: Omukali oyo nʼebibono ebisendasenda nʼamucaamya; nʼamugondya nʼebibonobye ebisimoolya.
7.22: Amangu ago omuvuvuka oyo nʼamusengererya, ooti nte ogubatwala omu kibbaagiro, ooti kimaadu agwa omu mutego,
7.23: paka akalaso owekasumuta einirye, ooti nyonyi avulumuka okugwa omu mutego nga tamaite ati yafiirwa obwomibwe!
7.24: Atyanu baana bange, mumpulisisye, era muteekeyo omwoyo oku bintumula.
7.25: Tiwaganyanga omukali ngʼoyo okucuusa omwoyogwo ni gwaba omu manzirage, ooba okucaamira omu manzirage.
7.27: Okwaba omu nyumbaye kubba kukwata nzira eyaba e magombe, kubba kwaba mu kufa!

8.1: Amalabuki tigeeterera? Okutegeera tikwaminkirira?
8.2: Oku bifo ebigingice oku nzira, era omu mansanganzira gʼenguudo gigeemereire.
8.3: Oku mageeti gʼekibuga, oku miryango e gibaingirira omu kibuga, gaaminkirira gati,
8.4: “Inywe abantu, mbeeta, nabuli muntu oku kyalo mmwaminkirira.
8.5: Inywe ababisi, mwege amakulu gʼamalabuki; inywe abasirusiru, musune okutegeera.
8.6: Muwulisisye olwʼokubba ndi nʼebyʼamakulu ebyokutumula, mbuunulula omunwa gwange kutumula bituuce.
8.7: Ntumula mazima, era ncaawa obubbeyi.
8.8: Byonabyona ebintumula byʼamazima, mpaamu bucaamu waire obugotesye.
8.9: Ebibono byonabyona bitegerekeka eeri oyo ategeera, mpaamu bucaamu eeri abo abali nʼobumanyi.
8.10: Otwale nze amalabuki ebinjegesya, omu kifo kyʼefeeza; era otwale okumanya omu kifo kyʼezaabbu ennongoole,
8.11: olwʼokubba amalabuki gʼomugaso okukiraku amabbaale agʼebbeeyi, era mpaawo kiweegomba ekyoyezya okugageraageraniaku.
8.12: “Nze amalabuki, mba aamo nʼokutegeera; ndi nʼokumanya nʼokusalawo okusa.
8.13: Okutya oMusengwa niikwo okucaawa ekibbikibbi. Ncaawa amalala nʼokwepanka, nʼeneebitya embimbi nʼentumula eyʼobubbeyi.
8.14: Okulungamya nʼokuwa ebiseego ebisa byange; ndi nʼokutegeera nʼobwezye.
8.15: Ninze mbeera abakabaka ni bafuga, nʼabafugi ni bateekawo amateeka agʼobwenkanya.
8.16: Ninze mbeera abafugi ni bafuga, era abakungu bonabona abo ni bafuga oku kyalo.
8.17: Ntaka abo abantaka, era abo abanyikiira okunnoonia bambona.
8.18: Obugaiga nʼekitiisya ninze ndi nabyo, obugaiga obwenkalaakalira nʼenkulaakulana.
8.19: Ebingaba bisa okukiraku ezaabbu ennongoole; abantu ebibasuna okuzwa egyendi bisa okukiraku efeeza ennongoole.
8.20: Ntambulira mu nzira yʼobutuukirirye, ni nkolera omu bwenkanya.
8.21: Mpa obugaiga abo abantaka, era njizulya esitoowa gyabwe.
8.22: “OMusengwa yabbaire na nze omu kutandiika emirimogye, nga wakaali okubbaawo ekintu ekindi kyonakyona.
8.23: Yanteekerewo ira ino, nabbairewo okuzwa oku ntandiika, ngʼekyalo kikaali okubbaawo.
8.24: Nze nabbairewo nga nʼenyanza gikaali okubbaawo, ngʼensulo gikaali okubindigulya amaizi;
8.25: nze nabbairewo ngʼakaali okuteeka ensozi omu bifo byagyo, ngʼakaali okuteekawo obusozi,
8.26: ngʼakaali okubbumba ekyalo, nʼokuteekawo emisiri, waire eitakali lyonalyona eryʼoku kyalo.
8.27: Nabbairewo oweyateekeirewo eigulu omu kifo kyalyo, nabbairewo oweyateekeirewo ekireri e gikiboneka ooti gikyekwatira oku nyanza.
8.28: Nabbairewo ngʼateekawo ebireri omwibbanga, era ngʼateekawo ensulo egyʼenyanza,
8.29: nabbairewo oweyaweereire enyanza ensalosalo, kaisi amaizi tigambukanga ensalo yaago egiyalagiire okubba, era oweyateekeirewo emisingi gyʼekyalo,
8.30: nabbaire naye ngʼomukoli omukugu, era nga mmusangalisya nabuli lunaku, era nga njagaanira omumaisoge bulijo,
8.31: nga njagaanira omu kyalokye, era nga neesiima olwʼabantu.
8.32: “Atyanu baana bange, mumpulisisye; bʼenkabi ibo abo abakwata amanzira gange.
8.33: Muwulisisyenge ebimbeegesya, kaisi mubbenge nʼamalabuki; era timwabirekanga.
8.34: Wʼenkabi iye oyo ampulisisya, aabba oku lwigi lwange ngʼali bulindaala bulijo, ankuumirira oku mulyango gwʼenyumba yange,
8.35: olwʼokubba nabuli anzuula asuna obwomi, era abba mukoda eeri oMusengwa.
8.36: Neye oyo agaana okunnoonia, yeita yenkani. Bonabona abancaawa, babba bataka kufa.”

9.1: Amalabuki gombekere enyumba yaago, gagikoleire empango musanvu.
9.2: Gategekere enyama, gayiisirye ekiyeere kyʼenviinyo era gategekere ekiinulo kyago.
9.3: Gatumire abaweererya baago abaala, baabe omu bifo ebikira obugulumali omu kibuga beete bati,
9.4: “Nabuli muntu omubisi, ayawukire munu!” Nʼoyo adamba okutegeera, gamukoba gati,
9.5: “Oize olye oku kyokulya kyange, era onyweku nʼekiyeere kyʼenviinyo ekimpiisirye.
9.6: Oleke amanzirago agʼobutamanya kaisi obbeewo mwomi. Otambulirenge mu manzira gʼobutegeeri.”
9.7: Nabuli anenya omunyoomi, yeereetera kumuduula; nʼoyo asoica omubbimubbi, asuna bizumi.
9.8: Tiwanenyanga omunyoomi, kaisi tiyakucaawa, onenyenge wʼamalabuki, yakutakanga.
9.9: Olungamyenge owʼamalabuki, yeeyongeranga okubba mulabuki; oyegesyenge omutuukirirye, yeeyongeranga okwega.
9.10: Okutya oMusengwa, okumanya mu kutandiikira, nʼokumanya Oyo oMutukulye, niikwo okubba omutegeeri.
9.11: Olwʼokubba ninze, waliwangaala, era balikwongeraku emyanka gyʼobwomibwo.
9.12: Owoobba nʼamalabuki, gagasa niiwe onanyere; owoobba omunyoomi, weerumya niiwe onanyere.
9.13: Omukali omusirusiru, atumulira ngulu; abula mpisa, era adambaku okumanya.
9.14: Atyama oku mulyango gwʼenyumbaye, ooba oku kityamo omu bifo ebigulumali ebyʼekibuga,
9.15: okweta abo ababitawo, abali omu ŋendo gyabwe ati,
9.16: “Nabuli muntu omubisi, ayawukire munu.” Nʼakoba oyo adamba okutegeera ati,
9.17: “Amaizi agʼobwibbi gawooma, nʼekyokulya ekibalya omu mbiso, kinoli.”
9.18: Neye abo abaayeta tibamaite bati abaingira omwo bafeeramu; tibamaite bati abagenibe, bafu abali e magombe!

10.1: Engero gya Sulemaani: Omwana owʼamalabuki, asangaalya oiteeye, neye omusirusiru anakuwalya omaaye.
10.2: Obusuni bwʼobukumpanya, tibugasa; neye obwesigwa bununula omu kufa.
10.3: OMusengwa taleka omutuukirirye okubba munzalwa; neye akaisya ababbibabbi okusuna ebibeegomba.
10.4: Engalo ennafu gireeta budoobi; neye engalo eginyiikiira, gireeta busuni.
10.5: Akungula okweisana abba mwana wʼamalabuki, neye oyo agona omu biseera ebyʼamakungula, abba mwana aswaza.
10.6: Enkabi giizula oku mutuukirirye, neye omunwa gwʼomubbimubbi gwizula bukambwe.
10.7: Omutuukirirye bamwebukiryanga ngʼowʼenkabi , neye eriina lyʼomubbimubbi ligota.
10.8: Omuntu owʼamalabuki, aikirirya ebibamulagira; neye alabankana ebyʼobusirusiru yalijigirika.
10.9: Omuntu onambulaku ekyʼokumunenya, abba nakusani; neye omukumpanya, balimutegeera.
10.10: Oyo abisabisa amazima, aleeta obugosi; nʼoyo alabankana ebyʼobusirusiru, yalijigirika.
10.11: Omunwa gwʼomutuukirirye nsulo yʼobwomi, neye ogwʼomubbimubbi gwizula bukambwe.
10.12: Obucaawi buleeta enyombo; neye okutaka kuzweraku okusoniyangana ebibbibibbi byonabyona.
10.13: Omutegeeri ebyatumula, mubbaamu amalabuki; neye omugongo gwʼomusirusiru, gukaanya miigo.
10.14: Abantu abʼamalabuki, beebisira okumanya; neye omusirusiru ebyatumula, bimuleetera okujigirika.
10.15: Obusuni eeri abagaiga buli ooti kibuga ekiriku olugaga; neye obudoobi, niibwo obujigirica omudoobi.
10.16: Empeera yʼomutuukirirye emusunisya bwomi; neye omubbimubbi ebyasuna, bimuleetera kwonoona.
10.17: Oyo aikirirya okumubonereza, ali mu nzira yʼobwomi; neye oyo agaana okumunenya, aliiba.
10.18: Iye oyo abisa obucaawi, abba mubbeyi; nʼoyo atumula obundi oku mwinaye, abba musirusiru.
10.19: Omu kutumula ebibono ebingi, timudambamu ebisoba; neye asirika, abba wʼamalabuki.
10.20: Entumula yʼomutuukirirye, ebba ooti feeza ennongoole; neye ebiseego byʼababbibabbi, bigasa katono.
10.21: Ebibono byʼomutuukirirye, bigasa bangi; neye abasirusiru bafa lwʼokudamba kumanya.
10.22: Enkabi gya Musengwa niigyo egigaigawalya, era tagigaitaku enima.
10.23: Omusirusiru ekimusangaalisya, kukola bibbibibbi; neye omuntu omulabuki ekimusangaalisya, kukola byʼobutegeeri.
10.24: Omubbimubbi ebyatya bimutuukaku; neye abatuukirirye ebibeetaaga babisuna.
10.25: Ompunga owaafuwa, ababbibabbi bawaawo; neye abatuukirirye babbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
10.26: Ngʼenviinyo ensasaami owegiita amaino, era ngʼomwosi owegusaata amaiso, nʼomugayaali yena waabba eeri abo abamutuma.
10.27: Okutya oMusengwa kuwangaalya omuntu; neye emyanka gyʼababbibabbi bagisalaku.
10.28: Eisuubi lyʼabatuukirirye lizwamu eisangaalo; neye okusuubira kwʼababbibabbi, tikuzwamu kantu.
10.29: Amanzira ga Musengwa lugaga lwʼabo abanambulaku kyokubanenya; neye abo ababbibabbi gabajigirica.
10.30: Abatuukirirye tibasagaasaganenge; neye ababbibabbi, tibalibbeerererawo omu kyalo.
10.31: Omunwa gwʼomutuukirirye guzwamu byʼamalabuki; neye olulimi olubbeyi, balirusirica.
10.32: Abatuukirirye bamanya ebibasaana okutumula; neye ababbibabbi ebibatumula bicaamu.

11.1: OMusengwa acaawa abakolesya eminzaani egitali ntuuce, neye asiima abakolesya amabbaale gʼeminzaani amatuuce.
11.2: Okwekudumbalya owekwiza, okuswala kubbaawo, neye kyʼamalabuki okubba mwikaikani.
11.3: Obwesigwa obwʼomuntu omulongoole omu mwoyo bumulungamya, neye obukucaakuca bwʼabatali beesigwa, bubazweraku okujigirika.
11.4: Obusuni mpaawo kibugasa oku lunaku lwʼomusango, neye obutuukirirye bununula omu kufa.
11.5: Obutuukirirye bwʼabanambulaku ekyokubanenya bulungamya obwomi bwabwe; neye ababbibabbi, obubbibubbi bwabwe bubagwisya.
11.6: Obutuukirirye bwʼabalongoole omu myoyo bubanunula, neye abatali beesigwa ibo babakwatira mu kwegomba kwabwe okubbikubbi.
11.7: Omubbimubbi owaafa, eisuubirye lifa; ebiyabbaire asuubiira omu maanige bigota.
11.8: Omutuukirirye bamununula omu bigosi, neye omubbimubbi niiye aira nabba nabyo.
11.9: Ebibono byʼomuntu atatya oKibbumba bijirica abainaye, neye abatuukirirye, okumanya kubanunula.
11.10: Abatuukirirye owebabitamu, ekibuga kijaagaana. Ababbibabbi owebafa, wabbaawo okuceera olwʼeisangaalo.
11.11: Olwʼenkabi gyʼabalongoole omu myoyo, ekibuga bakigulumalya, neye olwʼebibono byʼomubbimubbi, kijigirika.
11.12: Omuntu omusirusiru atumula kubbikubbi oku omwinaye, neye omuntu omutegeeri, yeesirikira.
11.13: Owʼolugambo abiikula ebyama, neye iye oyo omwesigwa, abisirikira.
11.14: Anambula okulungamya eigwanga tiryemerera, neye awabba abawi bʼamalabuki abangi, wabbaawo eidembe.
11.15: Ateekawo omusingo oku lwʼoyo ogwatamaite, mazima yalituuka omu bugosi, neye oyo acaawa okubba omuyima okwibbanja lya gondi, iye abba nʼeidembe.
11.16: Omukali owʼekisa, asuna ekitiisya, neye abantu abaŋeŋese, bakoma ku byʼobusuni.
11.17: Omuntu owʼekisa yeegasa niiye onanyere neye omuntu omukambwe yeeretaku bigosi.
11.18: Omubbimubbi empeera egyasuubira tiniiyo egyasuna, neye iye oyo akola ebyʼobutuukirirye asuna empeera enanyerenyeere emugasa.
11.19: Akalangukira omu kukola ebyʼobutuukirirye asuna obwomi, neye iye oyo agumira omu kibbikibbi, yalifa.
11.20: OMusengwa acaawa abʼemyoyo emifuuduuki; neye asangaalira abo abatambulira omu bwomi obunambulaku ekyokubunenya.
11.21: Obbe mukakase ku kinu oti, ababbibabbi balibabonereza, neye eibyaire lyʼomutuukirirye balirinunula.
11.22: Omukali omusiipoono oyo adamba empisa, ali ooti mpeta yʼezaabu eri omu nindo ya mbiizi.
11.23: Okwegomba kwʼomutuukirirye kuzwamu bisa byereere, neye eisuubi lyʼomubbimubbi likomenkereza mu bulwa bwa Musengwa.
11.24: Waliwo omuntu abba omugabi ni yeeyongeranga kugaigawala, nʼogondi nabba mukodo okukiraku ngʼowekisaaniire, neye ni yeeyongeranga kudooba.
11.25: Omugabi yagaigawalanga; iye oyo awa abandi obubbeeri, yena yasunanga.
11.26: Abantu batumula bundi kwoyo akalira oku nsigo gyʼempeke, neye iye oyo abagulyaku, bamusabira enkabi.
11.27: Iye oyo anyikiira okukola obusa asuna obutake, neye ekibbikibbi kyaba ku yooyo akinoonia.
11.28: Eyeesiga obusunibwe yaligwa, neye omutuukirirye yanyiriranga ooti kikoola ekijimu.
11.29: Ajolonga abʼomu kisitokye, mpaawo ekiyalisikira era omusirusiru yaabbanga mugalama wʼoyo ali nʼamalabuki.
11.30: Ebintu omutuukirirye ebyakola, musaale gwʼobwomi, nʼoyo asikiriza emyoyo gyʼabantu abba wʼamalabuki.
11.31: Obanga abatuukirirye basuna empeera nga bakaali bali oku kyalo kunu, kaisi leero kyalibba kitya oku mukaafiiri nʼoyo akola ebibbibibbi?

12.1: Asiima okumulaabbira abba ataka kumanya, neye acaawa okumunenya abba musirusiru.
12.2: Omuntu omusa abba mukoda eeri oMusengwa, neye oMusengwa asingisya owʼenkwe omusango.
12.3: Omuntu akola obubbibubbi tabbaawo nʼatebenkera, neye omutuukirirye iye tasiguka.
12.4: Omukali omwegendereza aweesya oibaaye ekitiisya, neye omukali aswaza, alumya ooti kookolo omu magumba ga ibaaye.
12.5: Entegeka gyʼomutuukirirye gibba gyʼobwenkanya, neye amalabuki gʼomubbimubbi gabba gʼobubbeyi.
12.6: Ebibono byʼomubbimubbi bizweraku okusuka omusaaye, neye entumula yʼomulongoole omu mwoyo enunula iye onanyere.
12.7: OKibbumba yalijigiricirya nakimo ababbibabbi ni bawaawo, neye abʼenyumba yʼomutuukirirye ibo basigala nga mpaawo ekibanyeenya.
12.8: Omuntu bamuwuuja olwʼamalabukige, neye omuwiwiituki iye bamunyooma.
12.9: Omuntu eyeica ni yeekolera, akiraku oyo eyeegulumalya ate ngʼadamba ekyokulya.
12.10: Omuntu omutuukirirye alabirira ebisolobye, neye ebyʼekisa omubbimubbi ebyakola, era bibba byʼobukambwe.
12.11: Oyo iye alima eitakalirye yaabbanga nʼebyokulya bingi, neye anoonia ebitagasa, tabba mutegeeri.
12.12: Omubbimubbi yeegomba omunyago gwʼomubbimubbi ogondi, neye omutuukirirye asigala munywerereri.
12.13: Omubbimubbi bamupapalirya mu ntumulaye embiibbi, neye omutuukirirye awunuka obugosi.
12.14: Entumula yʼomuntu ensa emuleetera okusuna ebisa bingi, era emirimo gyʼengalogye gyamusasulanga.
12.15: Omusirusiru ebyakola abibona ati bituuce, neye owʼamalabuki, awulisisya ebibamulaabbira.
12.16: Omusirusiru owaasunguwala kimanyikanirawo, neye omuntu omutegeeri asirikira ekimunyiizire nʼakizwaku.
12.17: Omujulizi owʼamazima awa bujulizi owʼamazima, neye omujulizi owʼobubbeyi atumula byʼobubbeyi.
12.18: Entumula embiibbi esumuta ooti mpiima, neye ebibono byʼabʼamalabuki bireeta okulama.
12.19: Ebibono ebyʼamazima ibyo bibbeerererawo, neye ebyʼobubbeyi bibba byʼakaseera-buseera.
12.20: Abateesa okukola ebibbibibbi, emyoyo gyabwe giizwire bubbeyi, neye abateesa okukola ebyʼeidembe babba na isangaalo.
12.21: Omutuukirirye mpaawo akabbikabbi akamutuukaku, neye ababbibabbi baizula bigosi.
12.22: OMusengwa acaawa abantu abatumula ebyʼobubbeyi, neye asangaalira abantu abʼamazima.
12.23: Omuntu omutegeeri tatumulyaga nabuli kyamaite, neye abasirusiru balalaasa busirusiru bwabwe.
12.24: Engalo yʼomunyiikiiri emusuuca wʼobwezye, neye obugalanzi, bukusuuca mugalama.
12.25: Enima oku mwoyo ereetera omuntu okwekondamira, neye ekibono ekisa kimusangaalisya.
12.26: Omuntu omutuukirirye alungamya abainaye, neye eneebitya yʼomubbimubbi emuliibya iye onanyere.
12.27: Omuntu omugayaali akaya okwoca ekyayiigire, neye omuntu omunyiikiiri, asuna ebyobusuni ebyʼamaani.
12.28: Enzira eyʼobutuukirirye erimu obwomi, era omu kisinde ekyo mpaamu kufa.

13.1: Omwana owʼamalabuki awulira okulungamya kwa iteeye, neye omunyoomi taganya okumunenya.
13.2: Entumula yʼomuntu ensa emuzweramu ni yeeyagalira omu bisa, neye abatali beesigwa beinira buvuuyo.
13.3: Eyeekuuma omu ntumula akuuma bwomibwe, neye atumulyaga yeereetaku kujigirika.
13.4: Omuntu omugayaali ayoya era nandi nʼasuna, neye omunyiikiiri asuna ebiyeegomba mu bungi.
13.5: Omutuukirirye acaawa obubbeyi, neye omubbimubbi aswaza era akwatisya ensoni.
13.6: Obutuukirirye bukuuma oyo onambulaku ekyokumunenya, neye obubbibubbi buzweraku omubbimubbi okujigirika.
13.7: Waliwo eyeeraga ngʼomugaiga, neenu mudoobi yeeyagira lujo; nʼogondi ni yeeraga ngʼomudoobi, neenu mufeekeeri.
13.8: Obusuni bwʼomuntu buyinza okubba kinunulokye; neye omudoobi mpaawo ekimweraliikirirya.
13.9: Ebikole byʼomutuukirirye byeragira nakimo ooti kitangaala, neye ebikole byʼomubbimubbi bimidirirya ooti itaala eririkira.
13.10: Okwesiiryasiirya kuzwamu yombo, neye amalabuki gabba mu baabo abaikirirya okubalaabbira.
13.11: Obusuni obwʼobukucaakuca buwaawo mangu, neye asolooja obusuni omu butontono, agira ni bwala.
13.12: Eisuubi elirwawo okutuukirira lirwalya ebiseego, neye ekiweegomba owekituukirira kibba ooti musaale gwʼobwomi.
13.13: Omuntu anyooma okumulaabbira yeereetera okujigirika, neye agondera ekiragiro asuna empeera.
13.14: Enjegesya yʼowʼamalabuki iyo nsulo yʼobwomi, era kuwunuca omuntu eeri emitego gyʼokufa.
13.15: Enseega ensa ereetera omuntu okubba mukoda, neye eneebitya yʼoyo atali mwesigwa emuzweramu kujigirika.
13.16: Nabuli muntu omutegeeri, akola ebintubye kuzwa mu kumanya, neye omusirusiru alaga busirusirubwe.
13.17: Omukwenda omubbimubbi, agwa omu bigosi, neye iye oyo omwesigwa aleetawo idembe.
13.18: Obudoobi nʼokuswala bituuka ku yooyo atataka okumulaabbira, neye aikirirya okumunenya, bamuwa ekitiisya.
13.19: Ekiweegomba owekituukirira kisangaalya omwoyo, neye okulekawo ekibbikibbi, kyʼomuliko eeri abasirusiru.
13.20: Iye oyo atambula nʼabʼamalabuki asuuka mulabuki, neye oyo akolagana nʼabasirusiru wakugada.
13.21: Emitawaana gisuupangana nʼababbibabbi, neye omutuukirirye bamugabania bisa.
13.22: Omuntu omusa alekera eibyairerye ebyʼobusika, neye obusuni bwʼomubbimubbi, bwalibba bwʼomutuukirirye.
13.23: Omusiri gwʼomudoobi guyinza okuzwamu ebyokulya bingi, neye abatali benkanya babimalawo.
13.24: Oyo ataswanyulamu omwanawe abba amucaawire, neye iye oyo amutaka, amugolola nga bukaali.
13.25: Abatuukirirye babba nʼebyokulya ebibamala, neye omubbimubbi abba munzalwa.

14.1: Omukali owʼamalabuki ategeka amakaage, neye omusirusiru olwʼobusirusirubwe, ajigirica agage.
14.2: Iye oyo atambulira omu butuukirirye atya oMusengwa, neye iye oyo akwata enzira encaamu abba amunyooma.
14.3: Entumula yʼomusirusiru emukubbisya emiigo, neye ebibono ebyʼabʼamalabuki, bibakuuma.
14.4: Anambula ente egirima, omu kideero timubbaamu kantu, neye omu maani gʼente egirima, muzwamu amakungula mangi.
14.5: Omujulizi owʼamazima tabbeya, neye omujulizi owʼobubbeyi atumula byʼobubbeyi byereere.
14.6: Omuntu omunyoomi anoonia amalabuki nandi nʼagasuna, neye omutegeeri ayega mangu.
14.7: Weewalenge omusirusiru, olwʼokubba mpaawo kyʼamalabuki ekyatumula.
14.8: Amalabuki gʼomutegeeri gamumanyikisya ekyokukola, neye abasirusiru baliiba olwʼobusirusiru bwabwe.
14.9: Abasirusiru tibafaayo nʼowebabbenga omusango, neye abantu abalongoole omu myoyo basaba kisonyiwo.
14.10: Ali nʼenima niiye amanya obulumi bwayo, era mpaawo ayezya okugabana okwisangaalolye.
14.11: Enyumba yʼomubbimubbi baligijigirica, neye eweema yʼomulongoole omu mwoyo yalisigalawo.
14.12: Waliwo enzira omuntu egyabona ati ntuuce neye oku nkomerero ngʼeiguka mu kufa.
14.13: Nʼomu nseko mwona omwoyo gwezya okulumwa, era eisangaalo lyezya okukomenkereza mu nima.
14.14: Omuntu azwa oku Kibbumba balimuweera nakimo empeera ngʼentambulaye obweri, era omuntu omusa, balimuwa empeera esaanira entambulaye.
14.15: Omuntu omubisi aikirirya nabuli kintu; neye omutegeeri, asooka kwetegereza.
14.16: Owʼamalabuki yeegendereza era ni yeewala ekibbikibbi, neye omusirusiru tafaayo, era agwa-kugwa oku byakola.
14.17: Owensire akola bintu byʼobusirusiru; era oyo asalira abainaye enkwe, asuna obucaawe.
14.18: Ababisi beeyongera omu byʼobusirusiru, neye abʼamalabuki ibo basuna okumanya.
14.19: Ababbibabbi balikotamya emitwe omumaiso gʼabasa, era ababbibabbi balyegudyera oku miryango gyʼabatuukirirye.
14.20: Omudoobi nʼabaliranwabe bamucaawa, neye omugaiga abba nʼemikago mingi.
14.21: Iye oyo anyooma omuliranwawe akola kibbikibbi, neye iye oyo akolera abeetaaga ebyʼekisa abba wʼenkabi.
14.22: Ibo abo abategeka okukola obubbibubbi bagota, neye abategeka okukola ebisa, basuna obutake nʼobwesigwa.
14.23: Nabuli mulimo ogwokola nʼamaani guleeta amagoba, neye okutumulanga-obutumuli kuleeta budoobi.
14.24: Obugaiga kasiimo owʼamalabuki akaasuna, neye obusirusiru bwʼabasirusiru buzwamu busirusiru.
14.25: Omujulizi owʼamazima anunula obwomi bwʼabantu, neye omujulizi owʼobubbeyi atumula byʼobubbeyi.
14.26: Iye oyo atya oMusengwa abbaaku obukuumi obwʼamaani, era ekyo kyalibba kyʼobukuumi eeri abaanabe.
14.27: Okutya oMusengwa nsulo yʼobwomi, era kuwunuca omuntu eeri emitego gyʼokufa.
14.28: Ekitiisya kya kabaka bungi bwʼabantu abaafuga, neye omufugi okudamba abantu abaafuga, asuuka kinambulamu.
14.29: Omuntu omuguminkiriza abba nʼobutegeeri bunene, neye owʼensire, alaga busirusiru.
14.30: Omwoyo ogulimu eidembe guleetera omubiri obwomi, neye engongi gigulya ooti kookolo owʼamagumba.
14.31: Omuntu amigirirya omudoobi abba anyoomere yooyo eYamukolere, neye akolera ebyʼekisa adamba abba awa Kibbumba kitiisya.
14.32: Ababbibabbi, obubbibubbi bwabwe niibwo obubazweraku okujigirika, neye omutuukirirye afa ngʼali nʼeisuubi.
14.33: Amalabuki gabba omu myoyo gyʼabantu abali nʼokutegeera, nʼekiri omu myoyo gyʼabasirusiru, kimanye.
14.34: Enkola ensa eyʼokutya oKibbumba egulumalisya eigwanga, neye ekibbikibbi kiswaza igwanga eryo.
14.35: Okabaka yeenyumirizira omu muweererya owʼamalabuki, neye obulwabwe bubba ku muweererya akola ebiswaza.

15.1: Okwiramu nʼeigonda kwikaikania ekiruyi, neye ebibono ebyʼeikayu, byongera busungu.
15.2: Owʼamalabuki atumula ebyʼobutegeeri, neye omusirusiru awolompoka byʼobusirusiru.
15.3: OMusengwa abona nabuli wantu, alabirira abasa nʼababbibabbi.
15.4: Entumula eyʼekisa, ereeta okulama ooti musaale gwʼobwomi, neye ebibono ebyʼobubbeyi, birumya omwoyo.
15.5: Omusirusiru anyooma ebyo oiteeye ebyʼamulaabbira, neye iye oyo omutegeeri aikirirya okumunenya.
15.6: Enyumba yʼomutuukirirye, ebbaamu ebyobusuni bingi, neye ensuna yʼomubbimubbi, emuleetera bigosi mumwe.
15.7: Ebibono byʼabʼamalabuki, bisasya okumanya, neye ebiseego byʼabasirusiru, tibikola bityo.
15.8: OMusengwa acaawa esadaaka eyʼomubbimubbi, neye okusaba kwʼomulongoole omu mwoyo kumusangaalisya.
15.9: OMusengwa acaawa eneebitya yʼabantu ababbibabbi, neye ataka abo abakalangukira omu kukola ebyʼobutuukirirye.
15.10: Iye oyo aleka enzira entuuce balimukangavulira nakimo bundi, oyo acaawa okumunenya yalifa.
15.11: Oobanga oMusengwa amaite ebifa e magombe nʼomu geyeena, neye leero takirawo okumanya emyoyo gyʼabantu!
15.12: Omunyoomi tataka okumunenya, era tataka okwebuulya oku bʼamalabuki.
15.13: Eisangaalo lyʼomwoyo, lireeta akamwenyumwenyu omu maiso, neye enima eri oku mwoyo erubirirya obwomi.
15.14: Omuntu omutegeeri anoonia kumanya, neye omusirusiru anyumirwa byʼobusirusiru.
15.15: Enaku gyonagyona egyʼoyo ogubagadya gibba mbiibbi, neye omwoyo omusangaali gusiiba kubba ooti guli ku mbaga.
15.16: Kisa okubba nʼebitono ngʼotya oMusengwa, okukiraku okubba nʼebyobusuni ebingi ebiriku obugosi.
15.17: Kasinga muliira ebisyodo nga mutakangana, okukiraku okulya ebisava nga muli mu bucaawi.
15.18: Omuntu owensire, asiikuula enyombo, neye omuguminkiriza, aikaikania empaka.
15.19: Enzira yʼomugayaali ebba nswapi nʼamawa, neye ekisinde kyʼomulongoole omu mwoyo lubba luguudo olulambye.
15.20: Omwana owʼamalabuki asangaalya oiteeye, neye oyo omusirusiru anyooma omaaye.
15.21: Obusirusiru ibwo isangaalo lyʼoyo omubuyaabuya, neye omutegeeri yeeyongera ngʼatambulira mu butuuce.
15.22: Anambula kuteesa entegeka gifa, neye awabba abawi abʼamalabuki abangi, gibitamu.
15.23: Omuntu asangaala ngʼawaire ekyokwiramu ekituuce, era kisa okubba nʼekibono omu kiseera kyakyo ekituuce.
15.24: Owʼamalabuki akwata nzira eniina okwaba omu bwomi okumukuuma nandi nʼaika e magombe.
15.25: OMusengwa avunirawo nakimo enyumba eyʼowʼamalala neye akuuma ensalosalo gyʼabanamwandu.
15.26: OMusengwa acaawa ebiseego ebyʼomubbimubbi, neye ebyo ebyʼomulongoole bimusangaalisya.
15.27: Alulunkanira okusuna aleetera amakaage obugosi, neye iye oyo acaawa enguzi, yalibba mwomi.
15.28: Omutuukirirye asooka kuseega kaisi nʼabbaaku nʼekyairamu, neye omunwa gwʼomubbimubbi gusukaania bibbibibbi.
15.29: OMusengwa abba yala nʼomubbimubbi, neye awulira okusaba kwʼomutuukirirye.
15.30: Akamwenyumwenyu omu maiso kaleetera omwoyo okujaagaana, nʼamawuliro amasa geeyagalisya obwomi.
15.31: Iye oyo aikirirya okumulaabbira ebimwombeka, balimubalira omu bʼamalabuki.
15.32: Iye oyo agaana okumulaabbira, abba yeenyooma niiye onanyere, neye aikirirya okumunenya, asuna okumanya.
15.33: Okutya oMusengwa, kwegesya omuntu amalabuki; nʼobuwombeeki bukubbembera ekitiisya.

16.1: Omuntu ategeka omu mwoyogwe ebiyakola; neye oMusengwa niiye asalawo ekyenkomerero.
16.2: Omuntu ayezya okubona ati eneebityaye yonayona ntuuce, neye oMusengwa niiye akebera omwoyo gwʼomuntu.
16.3: Nabuli ekyokola okikwatisyenge Musengwa, era entegekagyo gyatuukiriranga.
16.4: OMusengwa yakolere nabuli kintu nga kiriku ekigendererwa, nʼababbibabbi yabateekeirewo olunaku lwʼakazigizigi.
16.5: OMusengwa acaawa abʼamalala bonabona. Mukimanye muti, tibaliwunuka okubabonereza.
16.6: Olwʼokutaka okutakoma nʼobwesigwa, omuntu bamusoniya ekibbikibbi; olwʼokutya oMusengwa, niikyo ekigira omuntu ni yeewala ekibbikibbi.
16.7: Eneebitya yʼomuntu oweesangaalisya oMusengwa, ezweraku nʼabalabe bʼomuntu oyo ni babba idembe naye.
16.8: Kisa nʼobba nʼebitono ebyosunire mu mazima, okukiraku okubba nʼebingi ebyosunire mu bukucaakuca.
16.9: Omuntu ategeka ebyali nʼokukola, neye oMusengwa niiye asalawo ebiri nʼokutuukirira.
16.10: Ebibono bya kabaka ibyo tibigwa ansi, era ebibonobye byobwenkanya ngʼalamula.
16.11: OMusengwa ataka eminzaani nʼebipima ebindi byonabyona bibbe bituuce; amabbaale gonagona agebapimisya niiye eyagirire ni bagakola.
16.12: Kyʼomuliko okabaka okukola ebibbibibbi, olwʼokubba entebeye eyʼokufuga ebbeerererawo lwʼobutuukirirye.
16.13: Abakabaka basangaalira minwa egitumula ebyʼobutuukirirye; era bataka baabo abatumula ebyʼamazima.
16.14: Okabaka owaasunguwala ayinza okukwita, neye omuntu owʼamalabuki amwikaikania.
16.15: OKabaka owaasangaala, kireeta obwomi; okutakakwe kusangaalya ooti ikendi akulya ebibala.
16.16: Nga kisa ino okusuna amalabuki okukiraku okusuna ezaabbu, era kisa okulondawo okutegeera okukiraku efeeza!
16.17: Okwewala ekibbikibbi niiyo enzira yʼobulongoole, oyo iye afaayo oku ntambulaye, akuuma obwomibwe.
16.18: Amalala galeeta okujigirika; okwekudumbalya kuleeta ekigwo.
16.19: Kisa okwewombeeka nʼobba aamo nʼabebajolonga, okukiraku okugabana ebinyage nʼabʼamalala.
16.20: Oyo iye atwala ebibamulaabbira, bimwabira nakusani, era wʼenkabi oyo iye eyeesiga oMusengwa.
16.21: Omuntu owʼamalabuki niiye ogubeeta omutegeeri, owʼebibono ebisa ategeeresya abantu mangu.
16.22: Amalabuki igo nsulo yʼobwomi eeri oyo abba nago, neye obusirusiru buleetera abasirusiru kibonerezo.
16.23: Ebiseego byʼomuntu owʼamalabuki bimulungamya omu ntumula, nʼebyatumula bimatiza abantu.
16.24: Ebibono ebyʼekisa biri ooti mujenene, binyuunyuulira omuntu ni bimuleetera obwomi obusa.
16.25: Waliwo enzira omuntu egyabona ati ntuuce, neye oku nkomerero ngʼeiguka mu kufa.
16.26: Okutaka okulya kuleetera omuntu okukola nʼamaani; olwʼokubba okwetaaga ekyokulya kimusindiikirirya okweyongera okukola.
16.27: Omuntu omubbimubbi ategeka kukola bubbibubbi, nʼebyatumula bibabula ooti musyo.
16.28: Omuntu atumula ebyʼobugwagwa asiikuula oyombo, nʼolugambo lwawukanisya abʼomukago.
16.30: Oyo iye amigira omwinaye amaiso ateesa byʼobucaamu; oyo iye amugedera omunwa babba baseega kukola kibbikibbi.
16.31: Envi egyʼobukaire ngule yʼekitiisya, abasuna engule eyo baadi abatambulira omu bwomi obutuukirirye.
16.32: Kisa okubba muntu alwawo okusunguwala okukiraku okubba owʼentalo, era okubba ngʼofuga obusungubwo, okukiraku oyo iye afuga ekibuga.
16.33: Abantu bakubba akalulu, neye oMusengwa niiye asalawo ebizwamu.

17.1: Kisa okulya akatono akanyaata ngʼoli nʼeidembe, okukiraku okulya embaga omu kisito omulimu entalo.
17.2: Omuweererya akola ebyʼamalabuki yalifuga omwana owʼomu kisito akola ebiswaza, era yalisuna omugabo oku byobusika ngʼomwana owʼe ika.
17.3: Ekikoomi kikenenula feeza na zaabbu, neye omwoyo gwʼomuntu, oMusengwa niiye agugezesya.
17.4: Omuntu omubbimubbi, awulisisya ntumula embiibbi; nʼomubbeyi awulisisya byʼobubbeyi.
17.5: Oyo iye asekerera abadoobi, azumirira oyo eYabakolere; nʼoyo iye asangaalira ebisiraani byʼabainaye, tiyalikaya okusuna ekibonerezo.
17.6: Abakaire beeyagala lwakubba na baizukulu, nʼabaana beenyumiriza lwʼababyaire baabwe.
17.7: Omusirusiru ngʼowaatatumula ebyʼamakulu; nʼomuntu owʼekitiisya tatuukanira nakimo okubba mubbeyi.
17.8: Enguzi eri ooti irogo eeri oyo agiwa, aseega ati nabuli gyacuukira abitamu.
17.9: Oyo iye asoniya ensobi akuuma okutaka, neye okutumulatumula oku nsobi, kyawukanisya abalya onswa omoiza.
17.10: Okunenya kukola kinene oku muntu omutegeeri, okukiraku emiigo 100 egibakubba omusirusiru.
17.11: Omuntu omubbimubbi, akola bujeemu bwonkabwonkani; era balimusindikira omukwenda omukambwe okumubonereza.
17.12: Kasinga osangaana odubu ogubatoireku abaana, nandi nʼoyagirya omusirusiru ngʼakola ebyʼobusirusirubye.
17.13: Obwosasulamu omuntu kibbikibbi olwʼekintu ekisa ekyakukoleire, akabbikabbi tikalizwa omu kisitokyo.
17.14: Okutanula okwomba, kuli ooti kwigulya mudumo gwʼamaizi; kale olekanga okayaani, ngʼoyombo akaali okugwawo.
17.15: Atoola omusango kwoyo agubbengere nʼoyo asingisya omusango atagubbengere, bombi oMusengwa abacaawa.
17.16: Tikigasa omusirusiru okutoola empiiya okusasulira ebyokwega, olwʼokubba tayezya kubitegeera.
17.17: Abʼomukago batakangana enaku gyonagyona, nʼaboluganda babbaawo okubbeerangana omu bigosi.
17.18: Bubba busirusiru omuntu okweyama nʼateekawo omusingo oku lwʼeibbanja lyʼomwinaye.
17.19: Oyo iye ataka oyombo, ataka kibbikibbi; nʼoyo eyeekudumbalya, anoonia kujigirika.
17.20: Omuntu owʼomwoyo omufuuduuki, tasuna ebisa; nʼatumula ebyʼobubbeyi, yeereetera akabbikabbi.
17.21: Abyala omusirusiru, yeereetera enima; era oiteeye wʼomusirusiru, tabba nʼeisangaalo.
17.22: Omwoyo omusangaali, bulezi busa; neye omwoyo omunakuwali, gukalya amagumba.
17.23: Omuntu omubbimubbi aikirirya enguzi omu nkukutu nandi nʼasala omusango omu bwenkanya.
17.24: Omuntu omutegeeri, ategeka nʼakola ebyʼamalabuki; neye omusirusiru alugaluganirya ebiseego ku buli kintu.
17.25: Omwana omusirusiru, anakuwalya oiteeye, era abba bulumi eeri omaaye.
17.26: Tikituuce okutanza onambulaku omusango, waire okufaamuula abakungu olwʼobwesigwa bwabwe.
17.27: Omuntu owʼamalabuki afuga entumulaye; era omuntu omutegeeri abba mwikaikani.
17.28: Nʼomusirusiru yena owaasirika bayezya okumweta owʼamalabuki; era owaatazwamu kibono bamweta mutegeeri.

18.1: Omuntu eyeeyabula oku bainaye, abba anoonia bibye yenkani, era abba ayakanisya abo abali nʼenseega ensa.
18.2: Omusirusiru tafaayo kwega; neye asiima kutumula kiikyo ekiri omu mwoyogwe.
18.3: Ekibbikibbi kikuzweraku ni bakunyooma; era okuswala kukuzweraku ni bakubityamu amaiso.
18.4: Ebibono omuntu owʼamalabuki ebyatumula biri ooti maizi amaabiriri; era biri ooti mwiga ogukulumuka.
18.5: Tikisa okwekubbira oku lubba lwʼomubbimubbi, nʼokusalirirya onambulaku omusango.
18.6: Ebibono byʼomusirusiru bimuleetera ekinakoolo, era omunwagwe gumukubbisya.
18.7: Omusirusiru ebyatumula bimuzweraku okujigirika, era ebibonobye mutego ogumupapalya.
18.8: Ebibono byʼomugeyi biwooma ino, bingira omuntu ni bimugwa oku mwoyo.
18.9: Omudoto omu byakola, mpaawo njawulo nʼoyo abebenya ebintu.
18.10: OMusengwa, lugaga olwʼamaani, omutuukirirye omwairukira nʼasuna obukuumi.
18.11: Obusuni eeri abagaiga buli ooti kibuga ekiriku olugaga; babuseegaku okubba ekikomera ekigulumali ekibataasa.
18.12: Amalala, geekubbembera kujigirika, neye okwewombeeka kwekubbembera kusuna kitiisya.
18.13: Awa ekyokwiramu ngʼakaali okwetegereza, abba musirusiru, era aswala.
18.14: Obumaliriri bwʼomulwaire okubba mwomi, bubbeesyawo obwomibwe; neye owaatya, endasi gimuwaamu.
18.15: Omuntu omutegeeri asuna okwega; omuntu owʼamalabuki awulisisya nʼayega.
18.16: Ekirabo omuntu ekyagaba kimwigulirawo enzira era ni kimutwala omumaiso gʼomukulu.
18.17: Asooka okwewozyaku, alaga ngʼobwali omutuuce, paka ogwawozya naye owaiza nʼamulumiriza.
18.18: Akalulu kamalawo empaka, era kalamula abʼamaani abayakana.
18.19: Okusyania nʼowoluganda ogwosunguwairye, kigosi okukiraku okwazya okungira omu kibuga ekiriku olugaga; era enyombo gyabula abantu ooti bugumu bwʼegeeti eyʼolugaga ensibemu ebyoma.
18.20: Omuntu ebyatumula bimugasa ooti kyokulya, ebizwa omu byatumula byamugasanga.
18.21: Olulumi lwezya okuleeta okufa ooba obwomi; kale abalukolesya eino, bakungulanga ebiruzwamu.
18.22: Oyo iye asuna omukali owʼobufumbo abba asunire kintu kisa, era asuuka mukoda eeri oMusengwa.
18.23: Omuntu omudoobi, atumula nʼobuwombeeki; neye omusuni, airamu na idumi.
18.24: Abʼomukago abamo babba bʼakaseera-buseera; neye waliwo abba mwesigwa nʼokukiraku owaluganda.

19.1: Kasinga obba omudoobi ngʼotambulira mu bwomi obunambulaku ekyʼokubunenya, okukiraku okubba omubbeyi era omusirusiru.
19.2: Tikisa okubba nʼeiganyi lyʼokukola ekintu ngʼokibulaku obumanyi, waire okubbubbukira ebintu nʼokola ensobi.
19.3: Obusirusiru bwʼomuntu bwonoona obwomibwe, kaisi iye nʼanenya Musengwa.
19.4: Obusuni buleeta emikago mingi; neye omudoobi, nʼomukaagwawe yena amuzwaku.
19.5: Omujulizi owʼobubbeyi tibalikaya okumubonereza, nʼoyo atumulyaga ebyobubbeyi tiyaliwunuka ekibonerezo.
19.6: Bangi abanoonia obukoda eeri omugabi, era nabuli moiza yeegomba okusala omukago na yooyo agaba ebirabo.
19.7: Oobanga omudoobi abagandabe bonabona bamucaawa; kaisi olwo abakaagwabe ibo bamwewala kwenkana aina! Newankubbaire ngʼomudoobi abanoonia nʼokwegairira, era tabasuna!
19.8: Oyo iye asuna amalabuki, abba ataka obwomibwe; akalangula ebyayegere, asuna ebisa.
19.9: Omujulizi owʼobubbeyi tibalikaya okumubonereza, nʼoyo iye atumulyaga ebyʼobubbeyi yalijigirika.
19.10: Omusirusiru tawoomera okubba omu bwomi bwʼokwetalawusa, nʼomugalama tatuukana okufuga abakungu.
19.11: Enseega ensa eyʼomuntu emuwa obuguminkiriza; era okutafaayo oku bibamusobyaku kimuweesya ekitiisya.
19.12: Obulwa bwa kabaka butiisya ooti kululuma kwa mpologoma; neye ekisaakye kiweeweerya ooti lume oluli okwisubi.
19.13: Omwana omusirusiru aleetera oiteeye okujigirika; nʼomukali atalekera okwomba, ali ooti ikendi ataca.
19.14: Enyumba nʼobusuni, babisika ku babyaire; neye oMusengwa niiye agaba omukali omutegeeri.
19.15: Obugayaali buleeta endoolo nyingi; era atataka okukola, abba munzalwa.
19.16: Oyo iye agondera amateeka, akuuma obwomibwe; neye oyo iye aganyoomoola, wʼokufa.
19.17: Oyo iye akwatira omudoobi ekisa, abba akoopere Musengwa, era oMusengwa yalimusasula olwʼebisa ebyakolere.
19.18: Okangavulenge omwanawo, nga wakaali waliwo eisuubi eryʼokumugolola, kaisi tiwamuleka nʼajigirika.
19.19: Omuntu owʼobusungu omulekanga nʼakaanya ebizwa omu busungubwe; singa omununula, walibba nʼokukikola omulundi ogundi.
19.20: Owulisisyenge ebibakulaabbira, era oikiriryenge okukulungamya, era egibwiza walibba mulabuki.
19.21: Entegeka nyingi egibba omu mwoyo gwʼomuntu, neye oMusengwa ebyataka, niibyo ebituukirira.
19.22: Ekitakisya omuntu iye kubba nʼokutaka okutakoma; era omudoobi akiraku omubbeyi.
19.23: Okutya oMusengwa kukutwala mu bwomi; era oyo ali nakwo abba mumatiri, era mpaawo kabbikabbi akamutuukaku.
19.24: Omugayaali akozya ekimegero omu bbakuli, ni kimukaya nʼokukitwala oku munwa!
19.25: Okangavule omunyoomi, era omuntu omubisi yasunamu ekyokwega; owoolaabbira omutegeeri, yeeyongera okutegeera.
19.26: Oyo iye agadya oiteeye, nʼabbinga omaaye omu kisito, abba mwana aswaza era azumisya.
19.27: Mwana wange, singa olekeraawo okuwulisisya okulungamya, ocaama okuzwa oku bibono ebyʼamalabuki.
19.28: Omujulizi owʼobubbeyi, anyooma obwenkanya, nʼababbibabbi, okutumula ekibbikibbi kibanyumira.
19.29: Bateekawo ebibonerezo kukangavula banyoomi, era emigongo gyʼabasirusiru gisaanira makubbe.

20.1: Enviinyo gisindiikirirya, nʼebiteemeerya birwanisya; abo abebicaamya, banambula malabuki.
20.2: Obulwa bwa kabaka, butiisya ooti kululuma kwa mpologoma; oyo iye amusunguwalya, yeita yenkani.
