20.3: Omuntu eyeewala enyombo asuna ekitiisya, neye nabuli musirusiru ataka ino kwomba.
20.4: Omugayaali talimira omu biseera ebituuce, omu kiseera kyʼamakungula yalikayaku ekyokukungula.
20.5: Ebiseego ebibba omu mwoyo gwʼomuntu biri ooti maizi agali ansi omwiruba eryabiriri, neye omuntu aali nʼokutegeera abitoolayo.
20.6: Abantu bangi abeeyeta abali nʼokutaka okutakoma; neye omuntu omwesigwa naani ayezya okumuzuula?
20.7: Omutuukirirye atambulira omu bwomi obunambulaku ekyʼokubunenya, eibyairerye libba lyʼenkabi.
20.8: Okabaka owaatyama oku ntebeye eyʼobwakabaka okusala emisango, yeekeenenya nʼazuula ekisa nʼekibbikibbi.
20.9: Naani ayezya okukoba ati, “Nkuumire omwoyo gwange nga mulongoole; ndi mutukulye era mbulaku kibbikibbi?”
20.10: Eminzaani egyʼobubbeyi, nʼebipima ebindi ebitali bituuce, byombi byʼomuliko eeri oMusengwa.
20.11: Nʼomwana ebyakola biraga ekyali ooba ngʼeneebityaye nnongoole, era ntuuce.
20.12: Amatwi agawulira, nʼamaiso agabona, byombi oMusengwa niiye eyabikolere.
20.13: Tiwatakanga ino endoolo, kaisi tiwadooba; otakenge eino kukola era wasunanga ebyokulya bingi.
20.14: Omuguli ajerega ngʼagula, neye owaamala, azwawo ni yeewaana ngʼowakidondoire.
20.15: Waliwo ezaabbu, nʼamabbaale agʼebbeeyi mangi, neye entumula eyʼamalabuki eri ooti byamajolobero ebyʼebbeeyi.
20.16: Otwalenge ekizwalo kyʼoyo akiwaayo ngʼomusingo okwemerera ogwatamaite, era otwalenge omusingo gwʼoyo ayemerera atali omumanye.
20.17: Ekyokulya ekyosunire omu bukucaakuca kikuwoomera, neye oluzwanyuma kikusuukira ooti kyokulya ekirimu amabbaale.
20.18: Entegeka gibitamu na kusuna kulungamya; owoobba watanula olutalo, osuneku abakulungamya.
20.19: Owolugambo, takuuma ebyama; nʼolwekyo weewalenge abo abeesakabba.
20.20: Atumula ebisongolye okwiteeye ooba oku maaye, obwomibwe bwaligotawo ooti itaala eribalikiirye omu ndikiirya ozigizigi.
20.21: Ebyobusika ebyosuna ngʼekiseera kikaali, tibibbaamu enkabi oku nkomerero.
20.23: Ebipima ebitali bituuce byʼomuliko eeri oMusengwa, era tasiima eminzaani egitali ntuuce.
20.24: OMusengwa niiye alungamya obwomi bwaiswe. Kale omuntu ayezya atya okutegeera obwomibwe e gibulungama?
20.25: Kubba kwemuma mu mutego okwanguwa okweyama okuwa oKibbumba ekintu, kaisi nʼokiseegaku ngʼomalire kweyama.
20.26: Okabaka owʼamalabuki azuula abasobya; era ababonereza nʼobukambwe.
20.27: Omwoyo gwʼomuntu, niigwo eitaala oMusengwa eriyamuteekeremu; limoleka ebyama byʼomunda byonabyona.
20.28: Okutaka okutakoma nʼobwesigwa, bikuuma okabaka; okutaka okutakoma kumugumirya oku ntebe.
20.29: Ekitiisya kyʼabaisuka, maani gaabwe; nʼekitiisya kyʼabakaire, nvi gyabwe.
20.30: Emiigo eginoja, gigolola empisa embiibbi; nʼokuswanyula, kumalamu emize.

21.1: OMusengwa niiye afuga enseega ya kabaka, agirungamya ooti mukula gwʼamaizi ogwacuusa nʼagulungamya ngʼowaataka.
21.2: Omuntu ayezya okubona ati eneebityaye yonayona ntuuce, neye oMusengwa niiye akebera omwoyo gwʼomuntu.
21.3: Okukola ekituuce era ekyobwenkanya, oMusengwa kyasiima okukiraku esadaaka.
21.4: Okwekudumbalya nʼamalala, itaala lyʼababbibabbi, era ibyo kibbikibbi.
21.5: Entegeka gyʼomunyiikiiri, dala gimuzweramu okusuna ebingi; neye mazima nabuli abuguutanira ebintu, kimutuuca mu budoobi.
21.6: Obusuni obubasuna omu bubbeyi, bubita-bubiti ooti mwosi era ibwo mutego ogwita.
21.7: Ababbibabbi obukambwe bwabwe bwalibamalawo, olwʼokubba bagaana okukola ebyʼobwenkanya.
21.8: Obwomi bwʼababbibabbi, tibubbaamu obwesimbu; neye eneebitya yʼabalongoole omu myoyo, ebba ntuuce.
21.9: Kasinga obba oku nsonda e ngulu oku nyumba, nandi nʼobba omu nyumba nʼomukali omuyombi.
21.10: Omubbimubbi yeinira kibbibibbi; takwatira omuntu yenayena ekisa.
21.11: Omunyoomi owebamubonereza, omubisi iye ayega; owʼamalabuki owebamwegesya, yeeyongera okubba owʼamalabuki.
21.12: OKibbumba amanya ebiri omu nyumba yʼomubbimubbi; era adyaka ababbibabbi omu kujigirika.
21.13: Iye oyo aigala amatwige eeri okwekunga kwʼomudoobi, yena yalikunga nandi bamufaaku.
21.14: Ekirabo ekibakuwa omu kyama, kiikaikania obusungu, nʼenguzi eyʼomu mbiso, emalaku ekiruyi.
21.15: Obwenkanya busangaalya abatuukirirye, neye abo abakola ebibbibibbi, bubaleetera nsisi.
21.16: Omuntu acaama okuzwa omu kutegeera, yeeyaja ngʼali mu bafu.
21.17: Iye oyo ataka ebyamasanyu, adooba; oyo iye ataka ebiteemeerya nʼebisava, tiyaligaigawala.
21.18: Abantu ababbibabbi babba kinunulo kyʼabatuukirirye, nʼabatali beesigwa babba kinunulo kyʼabalongoole omu mwoyo.
21.19: Kasinga obba omwidungu, okukiraku okubba aamo nʼomukali omuyombi, era owʼensire.
21.20: Ebyobusuni ebyebbeeyi bibba mu nyumba yʼowʼamalabuki, neye omusirusiru, amalawo ebyali nabyo byonabyona.
21.21: Iye oyo eyeefudaku okukola ebyʼobutuukirirye era alaga okutaka asuna obwomi, nʼobutuukirirye nʼekitiisya.
21.22: Omuntu owʼamalabuki, alumba ekibuga kyʼabo abʼamaani, nʼamenya olugaga lwakyo olubeesiga.
21.23: Iye oyo eyeekuuma omu ntumula, yeeramya emiteewaana.
21.24: Owʼamalala era eyeekudumbalya, iye munyoomi; yeebitya mu mpisa egyʼamalala amabitiriri eino.
21.25: Obwetaavu bwʼomugayaali bumwita, olwʼokubba tataka okukola.
21.26: Okumalaku olunaku omubbimubbi yeegomba kubbaaku na byasuna, neye omutuukirirye agaba na mwoyo gumo.
21.27: Esadaaka eyʼomubbimubbi yʼomuliko, okukirawo eino owagireeta nʼekigendererwa ekitali kisa.
21.28: Omujulizi owʼobubbeyi, yalijigirika, neye ekibono kyʼowʼamazima kibbeerererawo.
21.29: Omuntu omubbimubbi, yeekazakaza; neye omulongoole omu mwoyo, yeekeenenya omu ntambulaye.
21.30: Mpaawo malabuki nʼokutegeera, waire enseega, ebyezya okwakanisya oMusengwa ni bimuwangula.
21.31: Oyezya okutegeka ombalaasi olwʼolutalo, neye obuwanguli buzwa eeri Musengwa.

22.1: Kisa okubba nʼeriina erisa okukiraku okubba nʼobusuni obubitiriri; era abantu okukuwa ekitiisya kikiraku okubba nʼezaabbu ooba efeeza.
22.2: Omugaiga nʼomudoobi bali nʼekiinu ekibagaita; bombi oMusengwa niiye eyabakolere.
22.3: Omuntu omutegeeri abona akabbikabbi, nʼakeewala, neye omubisi, ayaba-bwabi nʼakagwamu.
22.4: Obwikaikani nʼokutya oMusengwa, bireeta obusuni nʼekitiisya, nʼobwomi.
22.5: Amawa nʼemitego, bibba omu nzira yʼomubbimubbi, neye iye oyo akuuma obwomibwe, yabyewala.
22.6: Olungamye omwana omu nzira egyasaaniire okukwata, nʼoweyalikula tiyaligizwamu.
22.7: Omugaiga afuga omudoobi, era iye oyo eyeekoopa, abba mugalama wʼodi amukoopere.
22.8: Iye oyo asiga obutali bwenkanya, yalikungula miteewaana, nʼokulumya abainaye omu bukambwebwe, kwaliwaawo.
22.9: Wʼenkabi iye oyo omugabi, olwʼokubba agabana ekyokulyakye nʼabadoobi.
22.10: Owoobbingawo omunyoomi, nʼentalo giwaawo; era okwomba nʼokuduula bikoma.
22.11: Iye oyo ataka okubba nʼomwoyo omulongoole nʼokutumula ebibono ebyʼekisa, asuuka mukaagwa wa kabaka.
22.12: OMusengwa alabirira abali nʼokutegeera; neye ajikirica entegeka gyʼabatali beesigwa.
22.13: Omugayaali akoba ati, “E nza waliyo ompologoma,” ooba ati, “Banjitira eeyo omu luguudo.”
22.14: Akalumi kʼomukali omulendi, kiina ekiwanvu; abo ibo oMusengwa abaasunguwalira, bakigwamu.
22.15: Obusirusiru bubba omu mwoyo gwʼomwana omutomuto, neye okumubonereza nʼakaswanyuswanyu, kumubutoolamu.
22.16: Iye oyo amigirirya omudoobi, okwongera okwegaigawalya, nʼoyo iye agabira abagaiga ebirabo, bombi balidooba. Ebibono byʼowʼamalabuki omukugu
22.17: Otege ekitwikyo owulisisye ebibono byʼowʼamalabuki; oteekeyo omwoyo, kwebyo ebinkwegesya,
22.19: Mbikwegesya iwe atyanu kaisi weesigenge oMusengwa.
22.21: nga gikwegesya ebibono ebyʼamazima era ebyesigwa, kaisi oyezye okubba nʼekyokwiramu ekitegerekeka eeri oyo iye eyakutumire.
22.22: Tiwamigiriryanga omudoobi olwʼokubba mudoobi waire okumigirirya omudoobi omu kooti,
22.23: olwʼokubba oMusengwa yalingira omu nsonga gyabwe, era nabuli abagadya yena yalimugadya.
22.24: Tiwasalanga omukago nʼomuntu owʼobusungu, waire okubba nʼomukumbo nʼoyo owʼensire,
22.25: odemba nʼoyega emizeegye nʼopapala omu mutego.
22.26: Tiwaabbanga moiza kwabo abeeyama, okusasula ooba okuteekayo omusingo olwʼamabanja gʼomuntu.
22.29: Omuntu omukugu omu byakola, aweererya omumaiso gʼabakabaka; tabba akaali aweererya bantu ba bulijo.

23.1: Owootyamanga okulya nʼomukungu, weegenderezanga ino ekyo ekiri omumaisogo.
23.3: Tolulunkaniranga ebisavaabye, ayinza okubba ngʼataka kukugezyesya.
23.4: Olekenge okukalabana ekibitiriire okusuna obugaiga; obbenge mulabuki nandi weemalamu.
23.5: Obugaiga oyezya okubbaaku nabwo akaseera katono ni buwaawo, olwʼokubba mazima bubba ooti bumerere biyaya ni buguluka omwibbanga ooti kokomi.
23.6: Tiwaalyanga ekyokulya kyʼomuntu omwimi, waire okululunkanira ebisavaabye;
23.7: olwʼokubba iye muntu, asiiba kuseega kubbeeyi yaabyo. Akoba ati, “Olye era onywe,” neye ngʼomu mwoyogwe, tali aamo na iwe.
23.8: Wasesema ebyoliire; nʼebibono ebyotumwire ebyʼokusiima, ni bikufa busa.
23.9: Tiwabbanga nʼekyokobera omusirusiru, olwʼokubba ayaba kunyooma ebyʼamalabuki ebyotumula.
23.10: Tiwacuusanga ekiroowa ekyʼeira, waire okunyaga eitakali lyʼabafuubbi,
23.11: olwʼokubba oMulwaniriri waabwe wʼamaani; niiye eyaliwozya na iwe omusango gwabwe.
23.12: Oteekenge omwoyo oku bibakwegesya, era owulisisyenge ebyʼamalabuki.
23.13: Tiwalekanga okugolola omwanawo; owomubityamu akaigo, tikamwita.
23.14: Omubonereze nʼomwigo, kaisi olamye obwomibwe okufa.
23.15: Mwana wange, obwobba owʼamalabuki, awo omwoyo gwange gusangaala;
23.17: Tiwakwatiranga abakola ebikole ebibbibibbi engongi, neye bulijo obbenge nʼeiganyi lyʼokutya oMusengwa.
23.18: Mazima dala waabbanga nʼeisuubi omu biseera ebyʼomumaiso, nʼeisuubiryo tiryalikoma.
23.19: Mwana wange owulisisye, kaisi obbe wʼamalabuki, era okuumirenge omwoyogwo omu nzira entuuce.
23.20: Tiwakolanga omukumbo nʼabakajuuli, waire abo abeevuunya enyama,
23.21: olwʼokubba abateemeere nʼabaluvu, badooba, ni batuuka nʼokuzwala ebisensemuki.
23.22: Owulisisyenge oiteewo eyakubyaire; era tiwanyoomanga omaawo ngʼakairiire.
23.23: Ogulenge amazima neye tiwagatundanga; osunenge amalabuki, nʼokukulungamya nʼobutegeeri.
23.24: Oiteeye wʼomuntu omutuukirirye, yasangaalanga ino; nʼoyo ali nʼomwana owʼamalabuki, yamwenyumirizangamu.
23.25: Osangaalisyenge oiteewo nʼomaawo, omukali eyakubyaire ajaagaanenge. Omukali omutegeeri
23.26: Mwana wange, oteekenge omwoyo oku binkukoba, era omalirirenge okukwata ebinkola,
23.27: olwʼokubba omukali omalaaya, kiina ekyabiriri nʼomukali owʼamaiso amangu mangu, iruba eridiiŋi.
23.28: Akugonerera ooti mutemo, era ayongeraku obungi bwʼabasaiza abatali beesigwa.
23.29: Naani alabire? Naani omunakuwali? Naani ali nʼenyombo? Naani eyeemuluguunya? Naani ali nʼembaale egyʼobwereere? Naani atukulikire amaiso?
23.30: Niiye oyo asiiba oku mwenge; anywa ebika byʼomwenge ebitali bimo.
23.31: Tiwalangaasiranga omwenge ogutukulikire, ogumirimira omu giraasi, ogwika omu mamiro nʼobuweeweeri.
23.32: Oku nkomerero guboiza ooti mpiri; era guluma ooti nfulugundu.
23.33: Amaisogo gabona ebintu ebitategeerekeka, otandiika okuseega ebintu ebitakwatagana.
23.34: Walibba ooti amo ogalaamiriire ku maizi aakati ku nyanza, era ooti muntu eyeebuubira omwibbanga, oku mulongooti.
23.35: Nʼokoba oti, “Bankubbire kadi kuwuliramu obulumi. Bankubbire nandi ni nkiwuliramu. Nalamuka di, nkangeyo nnoonie ogundi?”

24.1: Tiwakwatiranga ababbibabbi engongi, era tiweegombanga okwekumba nabo,
24.2: olwʼokubba baseega byʼobukambwe, era batumula byʼokukola bugosi.
24.3: Kyetaagisya amalabuki okwombeka enyumba, nʼobumanyi okwombeka omusingi gwayo;
24.4: omu kukolesya amalabuki, ebisenge byayo babiteekamu ebyomugaso ebyʼebbeeyi, era ebisa.
24.5: Omuntu owʼamalabuki abba wʼobwezye, era omuntu omutegeeri yeeyongera amaani;
24.6: olwʼokubba okulwana olutalo, weetaagisya okukulungamya; era okuwangula kwetaagisya abawi bʼamalabuki bangi.
24.7: Ebyʼamalabuki omusirusiru tayezya okubiteegeera; era adambaku ekyokutumula omu lukumbaana lwʼabantu.
24.8: Oyo iye ategeka okukola ekibbikibbi, balimweta mukoli wʼemiteewaana.
24.9: Entegeka egyʼobusirusiru muzwamu okwonoona; era omunyoomi, wʼomuliko eeri abantu.
24.10: Owoonafuwa omu biseera ebyʼebigosi, dala amaanigo gabba matono.
24.11: Onunulenge abebaaba okwitira obwereere, olamyenge abebaaba okwitira obusa.
24.12: Owookoba oti, “Ekyo tinakimaiteku.” Oyo abona ekiri omu mwoyogwo takutegeera? Oyo akuuma obwomibwo takumaite? Tiyalisasula nabuli muntu okusinzirira oku bikolebye?
24.13: Mwana wange, olyenge omujenene, olwʼokubba musa; omujenene ogwʼomu bisasala gukunyuunyuulira.
24.14: Kale okimanye oti amalabuki gona gatyo niiye obweganyunyuulira obwomibwo; singa ogasuna, obba kusani egibwiza, ebyosuubira byalituukirira.
24.15: Tiwabbanga ooti bantu ababbibabbi abagonerera ekisito kyʼomutuukirirye; tiwanyaganga ekisitokye.
24.16: Omuntu omutuukirirye nʼowaagwa emirundi emingi, tete asetuka; neye omubbimubbi emitegano owegimwizira, gimudyaka nandi nʼairiryamu.
24.17: Tiwasangaalanga ngʼomulabewo atuukire omu kabbikabbi; era tiwajaagaananga nga yeesiitaire nʼagwa,
24.18: olwʼokubba oMusengwa tasiima owaabona ngʼokolere otyo, era alekeraawo okumusunguwalira.
24.19: Tiwaabbanga nʼensaalwa olwʼabo abakola ebibbibibbi, waire okugongera olwʼabo ababbibabbi,
24.20: olwʼokubba akola ebibbibibbi abula isuubi lyʼomumaiso, era tabbaamu eisuubi ooti itaala eririkira.
24.21: Mwana wange, owenge oMusengwa ekitiisya nʼokabaka; era tiweeyimbyanga nʼabo abajeemu,
24.22: olwʼokubba ebigosi byalibagwerenkerera, era mpaawo amaite obwebyalyenkana. Emboozi egindi egyʼamalabuki
24.23: Era na binu abo abʼamalabuki babitumwire: Okumomola tikusa ngʼolamula abantu.
24.24: Oyo iye akoba aliku omusango ati, “Obulaku omusango” abantu bamutumulangaku bundi, era amawanga gamuzumiriranga.
24.25: Neye abo abalumiriza omusobya, byabaabiranga nakusani, era babbanga nʼenkabi mpitiriri.
24.27: Osooke otegeke nakusani emirimogyo egyʼe nza, oteereerye nakusani omusirigwo, kaisi weeyombekere enyumba.
24.28: Tiwalumirizanga omwinawo anambula nsonga entuuce, era tiwatumulanga ebyʼobubbeyi.
24.29: Tiwakobanga oti, “Ekyankolere zena nalikimukola; nalisasula omuntu oyo ekiyankolere.”
24.30: Nabitire omu musiri gwʼomugayaali, ni mbita omu musiri ogwʼemizabbibbu ogwʼomuntu onambula okutegeera;
24.31: amawa nga gaziringaniremu mwonamwona, nga gupuucirye, nʼolukita lwagwo olwʼamabbaale nga lugwire.
24.32: Nakiringiriire ni nkiseegaku ino, ni mbaaku ekinjega nti:
24.33: Okugonaku katono, nʼowungulyaku akatono, nʼoleraku engalo owuumuleku akatono,
24.34: obudoobi bwalikulumba ooti mutemo nʼobwetaavu ooti mukondo aali nʼekyokulwanisya.

25.1: Ginu gyona ngero gya Sulemaani, abasaiza ba Keezeekiya okabaka wa Buyudaaya egibakoopoloire.
25.2: Tuwa oKibbumba ekitiisya olwʼebyo ebiyeebisiire; neye tuwa okabaka ekitiisya olwa iye okunonenkereryanga ensonga.
25.3: Enseega ya kabaka tinyangu okugimanya; tetuukikaku ngʼeigulu oweriri e yala era ngʼowaabiriri okwika ansi wʼekyalo owebuli.
25.4: Otoolemu ebicaafu omu feeza, kaisi omuyeesi akuyeeseremu ekyomugaso.
25.5: Otoolewo ababbibabbi omumaiso ga kabaka, kaisi obufugibwe bwemererewo omu butuukirirye.
25.6: Tiweekulyanga omumaiso ga kabaka, era tiweeteekanga omu kifo kyʼabakulu.
25.7: Kibba kisa okukweta bati, “Osembere eenu,” okukiraku owebakuswazira omumaiso gʼomukungu ni bakuteeka omu kifo ekisembayo okubba ekyʼekitiisya. Amaisogo ebigabba gaboine,
25.8: tiwayanguyanga okubitwala omu bʼobwezye, olwʼokubba walikola otya oluzwanyuma omwinawo oweyalikuswaza?
25.9: Owoobbanga nʼensonga nʼomwinawo, musyanianga, nandi nʼobiikula ekyama ekyo eeri abandi,
25.10: demba oyo akiwulira nʼakuswaza, nʼosigala nʼeriina eribbiribbi.
25.11: Ekibono ekisa ekibatumula omu kaseera akatuuce, kisangaalya ooti kifaananyi kyʼomupeera ekibakolere omu zaabbu ni bakiteeka omu kibya ekyʼefeeza.
25.12: Owʼamalabuki ebyalaabbira omuntu awulisisya, biri ooti mpeta eyʼezaabbu eyʼoku matwi, ooba ebyʼamajolobero ebyʼezaabbu ennongoole.
25.13: Omukwenda omwesigwa, awuumulya emyoyo gyʼabamutumire, ngʼamaizi agʼokunywa amawolondoki owegaweeweerya abaganywa omu biseera ebyʼeisana.
25.14: Oyo asuubizire ebirabo nandi nʼagaba, abba ooti bireri nʼompunga ebitaleeta oikendi.
25.15: Okuguminkiriza, kwikirizisya omufugi; nʼolulumi olwʼeiwooyo, lugondya owʼobwezye.
25.16: Obwoyajirya omujenene, olyenge ogukumala-bumali, tiwagubitiriryanga nʼogusesema.
25.17: Tiwasooseranga e wʼomwinawo, kaisi tiyakwesinya nʼakucaawa.
25.18: Omuntu asibirirya oku mwinaye wʼakabbikabbi ngʼomboote nʼempiima, ooba ngʼakalaso akoogi.
25.19: Okwesiga omuntu atali mwesigwa omu biseera ebyʼebigosi, kuli ooti kwesiga liino erirwaire ooba ekigere ekireme.
25.20: Okwembera omuntu ali omu nima, kubba ooti kweyambulyamu bizwalo mu biseera byʼempewo, ooba kuteeka cumbi mwibbwa.
25.21: Omulabewo owaabbanga enzala, omuwanga ebyokulya nʼalya; era owaabbanga enyonta, omuwanga amaizi nʼanywa.
25.22: Obwokola ootyo, walibba ooti omubbiirirye makala gʼomusyo oku mutwe; era oMusengwa yalikuwa empeera.
25.23: Okugeya kuleeta obusungu, ngʼompunga owʼe mambuka owaaleeta oikendi.
25.24: Kasinga obba oku nsonda e ngulu oku nyumba, nandi nʼobba omu nyumba nʼomukali omuyombi.
25.25: Okuwulira amawuliro amasa agazwa omu kyalo ekyʼe yala, kuli ngʼamaizi amawolondoki owegakola ngʼoli nyonta.
25.26: Omutuukirirye eyeerirania omubbimubbi, abba ooti iruba erisetwire eitoosi, ooba onsulo wʼamaizi ogubabebenyere.
25.27: Ngʼobwekitali kisa okulya omujenene omungi, era kityo bwekitali kisa omuntu okwenoonerya ekitiisya iye onanyere.
25.28: Omuntu atayezya okwefuga, ali ooti kibuga ekibaingiririire ni bakireka nga mpaaku kikomera.

26.1: Ngʼobuwolondoki owebutatuukana okweisana, ooba ngʼoikendi owaatatuukana omu makungula, kityo ekitiisya wekitatuukana omusirusiru.
26.2: Ngʼontaaye ooba onamusiisi owaasiiba aguluka, bityo nʼebiraami ebitatuukana bwebitakwata.
26.3: Ngʼombalaasi owebali nʼokumufaamuula, nʼompunda owebali nʼokumusiba mutwe, nʼomugongo gwʼomusirusiru weguli na kukaanya miigo.
26.4: Toirangamu omusirusiru ngʼobusirusirubwe owebuli, kaisi tiwaabba ooti niiye.
26.5: Oirangamu omusirusiru ngʼobusirusirubwe owebuli, kaisi tiyeebona okubba mulabuki.
26.6: Atuma omusirusiru okutwala obukwenda, abba ooti yeetemereku bigere, era yeereetera mitewaana.
26.7: Ngʼebigere byʼomuleme ebiregeya owebitagasa, nʼolugero omusirusiru olwatumula werubba.
26.8: Ngʼowekitagasa okusibira eibbaale omu nvuumuulo, kityo wekibba nʼokuwa omusirusiru ekitiisya.
26.9: Omusirusiru okukolesya olugero, kibba ooti muteemeere kweyokola iwa mu ngaloye.
26.10: Ngʼowekiri kyʼobusirusiru omulasi wʼakalaso okulasa nabuli gwabona, kityo wekibba nʼokuwa omusirusiru ooba omubiti wʼenzira ekipakasi.
26.11: Ngʼombwa owacuukira okulya ebisesemobye, atyo nʼomusirusiru wairairamu ebyʼobusirusirubye.
26.12: Obona omuntu eyeeyeta okubba owʼamalabuki? Wabbaawo eisuubi eeri omusirusiru, okukiraku omuntu oyo.
26.13: Omugayaali akoba ati, “E nza waliyo ompologoma, timpezya okuzwa omu nyumba okwaba okukola emirimo.”
26.14: Ngʼolwigi owerwecuusira oku pata gyalwo, nʼomugayaali atyo weyeecuusira oku buliribwe.
26.15: Omugayaali akozya ekimegero omu bbakuli, ni kimukaya nʼokukitwala oku munwa.
26.16: Omugayaali omu kubonakwe, yeeyeta wʼamalabuki okukiraku abantu omusanvu abayezya omu ngeri eyʼamalabuki okuteereerya ensonga.
26.17: Omuntu abitawo ni yeeyingirya omu mpaka egitamukwataku, abba ooti muntu akwata oku matwi gʼombwa ogwatamaite.
26.18: Ngʼowekiri kyʼobugwairalu okukasuka omuntu ekisiki kyʼomusyo, ooba obulaso obwakabbikabbi,
26.19: kityo wekibba nʼomuntu abbeya omwinaye, kaisi nʼakoba ati, “Mbaire nsaaga-busaagi.”
26.20: Enkwi owegiwaawo omusyo gulikira, kityo nʼowolugambo owaagotawo, oyombo akoma.
26.21: Ngʼobunyoota wʼomusyo owebukola oku manda, era ngʼomusyo owegukola oku nkwi, nʼomutongani atyo kyakola oku luyombo.
26.22: Ebibono byʼomugeyi biwooma ino, bingira omuntu ni bimugwa oku mwoyo.
26.23: Ebibono ebisa ebibiika oku mwoyo omubbimubbi, biri ooti feeza egibasiigire oku kintu ekibabbumbire omwitakali.
26.24: Omuntu omunanfunsi abisa obucaawi ngʼakolesya ebibono ebiwaana.
26.25: Waire ngʼentumulaye yʼekisa, tiwamwikiririryangamu, olwʼokubba omwoyogwe gubba gwizwire bucaawi.
26.26: Obucaawibwe ayinza okububiikaku nʼobubbeyi, neye ebibbibibbibye, byalibbutuka omu lwatu.
26.27: Nabuli akuula ekiina, onanyere akigwamu nʼoyo airingitya ogubbaale, gwalimwira ku niiye onanyere.
26.28: Omubbeyi acaawa abo abaabba abbeyere nʼebibono ebiwaanawaana, bijigirica.

27.1: Tiweewaananga olwʼebyabbaawo eizo, olwʼokubba tomanya ekyabbaawo.
27.2: Oleke ogondi akusisiije, neye nga tiniiwe onanyere; abbe muntu gondi neye nga tiniiwe onanyere.
27.3: Eibbaale nʼomusenye bizitowa, neye emitegano omusirusiru egyaleeta, gibikiraku byombi obuzito.
27.4: Obukambwe ibwo buŋeŋese, era obusungu bubitiriri omu bubbibubbi; neye engongi tete igyo gyʼakabbikabbi ino.
27.5: Akukobera ekisobyokyo omu lwatu akiraku akutaka omu mbiso.
27.6: Oyezya okwesiga okunenya kwʼomukaagwawo, neye omulabewo okukugwanga omu kifubba bubba bubbeyi.
27.7: Omuntu omwikuti agaana omujenene, neye enzala ogweruma nʼekirulu kibba kinyunyuula.
27.8: Omuntu apaala okuzwa omu kisitokye, abba ooti nyonyi apaala okuzwa oku kisaasirirokye.
27.9: Okulaabbira kwʼowʼomukago akulumirwa, kusangaalya omwoyo ooti byakalifuwa nʼebyakaloosa ebibeesiiga.
27.10: Tiwalekangawo omukaagwawo, waire omukaagwa wa iteewo. Tiwairukiranga egiri omugandawo ngʼosunire ekigosi. Omuliraanwawo akuli okumpi akira omugandawo aali e yala.
27.11: Mwana wange, obbenge wʼamalabuki, kaisi osangaalyenge omwoyo gwange; kaisi mbenge nʼekyokwiramu nabuli ansosonkererya.
27.12: Omuntu omutegeeri abona akabbikabbi, nʼakeewala; neye omubisi, ayaba-bwabi nʼakagwamu.
27.13: Otwalenge ekizwalo kyʼoyo akiwaayo ngʼomusingo okwemerera ogwatamaite, era otwalenge omusingo gwʼoyo ayemerera omukali omulendi.
27.14: Owoosugirya omuliranwawo amaaminkirira amakeezikeezi, bakibala ngʼekiraami.
27.15: Omukali omuyombi, ali ooti ikendi owʼomucekenco;
27.16: okumusirica kibba kigosi ino ooti kusirica mpunga, ooba ooti kuwumbira amafuta omu ngalo.
27.17: Ngʼekyoma owekyagalya ekyoma, atyo nʼomuntu waayagalya omuntu omwinaye.
27.18: Oyo iye alabirira omusaale omutiini, yaalyanga oku bineneka byagwo, nʼoyo aweererya omusengwawe, yasunanga ekitiisya.
27.19: Ngʼomuntu oweyeebona ngʼalingiriire omu maizi, nʼomwoyogwe gutyo wegulaga ekyali.
27.20: Ngʼokufa nʼe magombe owebitaikuta abafu, nʼamaiso gʼabantu, wegatademba okubona.
27.21: Ekikoomi kikenenula feeza na zaabbu, neye omuntu bamugezesya na kumuwuuja.
27.22: Nʼowoodundira omusirusiru omu kuwuulo ooti baduunda kyokulya kyʼempeke, tomutoolamu obusirubwe.
27.23: Omanyenge nakusani embeera yʼebyayobyo, ofengeyo ino oku kisibokyo,
27.24: olwʼokubba obusuni tibubbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona, nʼengule yʼobufugi, tebba yensikirano emirembe gyonagyona.
27.25: Eisubi lyʼebyayo owebalisala lisewuka, nʼeryʼoku nsozi balisala era ni balikumbaania,
27.26: entaama ni gikuwa ebyoya nʼokolamu ebizwalo, nʼotunda embuli ni weegulira amatakali.
27.27: Wasunanga amata gʼembuli agakumala, iwe, nʼabʼomu kisitokyo, nʼabagalamabo abakali.

28.1: Ababbibabbi bairuka nga mpaawo abalukutya; neye abatuukirirye babba bagumu ooti mpologoma.
28.2: Eigwanga eribbaamu entalo libba nʼabafugi bangi; neye owerisuna omufugi owʼamalabuki era omutegeeri, litebenkera.
28.3: Omufugi oyo agadya abadoobi, abba ooti ikendi owa mpunga ajikirica ebirime byonabyona.
28.4: Abo ibo abagaana amateeka ga Musengwa bawagira ababbibabbi; neye abo ibo abagakwata, babaakanisya.
28.5: Abantu ababbibabbi, tibategeera obwenkanya; neye abagondera oMusengwa, babutegeera nakusani.
28.6: Kasinga obba omudoobi ngʼotambulira mu bwomi obunambulaku ekyokubunenya, okukiraku okubba omusuni akola ebibbibibbi.
28.7: Omwana akwata amateeka, abba wʼamalabuki; neye aabba nʼomukumbo nʼabalulunkani, aswaza oiteeye.
28.8: Eyeegaigawalya ngʼaseera asune amagoba, obugaigabwe abukumbaanirya yooyo akwatira abadoobi ekisa.
28.9: Agaana okukwata amateeka ga Kibbumba, nʼokusabakwe oKibbumba akwenyinyalya.
28.10: Oyo iye agotesya omuntu omulongoole omu omwoyo nʼamutwala omu nzira embiibbi, yaligwa omu mutegogwe iye onanyere, neye abanambulaku ekyokubanenya balisuna ebisa.
28.11: Omugaiga ayinza okwebona ati wʼamalabuki, neye omudoobi aali nʼokutegeera amubityamu amaiso.
28.12: Abatuukirirye owebaiza omu bwezye, wabbaawo okujaagaana kubitiriri; neye ababbibabbi owebaniina oku bukulu, abantu beebisa.
28.13: Oyo iye abisabisa ebibbibibbibye tasuna enkabi, neye nabuli abibbutula nʼabyenenya, bamukwatira ekisa.
28.14: Wʼenkabi oyo iye atya oMusengwa bulijo, neye oyo iye akakanyalya omwoyogwe, agwa omu mitawaana.
28.15: Ngʼompologoma owaaluluma ooba odubu oweyeetala, nʼomufugi omubbimubbi afuga abanambulaku obubbeeri, atyo waabba.
28.16: Omufugi atakobekwaku, abba mukambwe neye oyo iye acaawa ebyaguzu, yawangaalanga.
28.17: Omuntu abbenga omusango gwʼobwiti, yagadanga nagwo paka kufa; tiwaabbangawo omuntu amubbeera.
28.18: Oyo iye atambulira omu bwomi obunambulaku ekyokubunenya abba nakusani, neye atali mwesigwa okujigirika kwalimugwerenkerera.
28.19: Oyo iye alima eitakalirye, yaabbanga nʼebyokulya bingi; neye anoonia ebitagasa, yadoobanga ino.
28.20: Omuntu omwesigwa, yalisuna ino enkabi; neye abuguutanira okugaigawala, tiyaliwunuka okumubonereza.
28.21: Okumomola kubbikubbi, ate ngʼabantu bakola ensobi olwʼekyokulya.
28.22: Omukodo abuguutanira okugaigawala, nga tamaite ati obudoobi bumukuumiriire.
28.23: Oyo iye agolola omwinaye olwʼensobi, oluzwanyuma yalibba mukoda okukiraku oyo iye ali nʼolulimi oluwaanawaana.
28.24: Oyo iye akoba ati timusango okwibba oiteeye oba omaaye, abba afaanana nʼoyo ajigirica.
28.25: Omululunkani asiikuula enyombo; neye eyeesiga oMusengwa, yaabbanga nʼenkabi.
28.26: Eyeesiga ebiseegobye, abba musirusiru; neye oyo iye asengererya ebyʼamalabuki, abba nakusani.
28.27: Oyo iye agabira abadoobi, tiyadabbenge ekiyeetaaga, neye oyo iye atabafaaku yasunanga ebiraami bingi.
28.28: Ababbibabbi owebaniina oku bukulu, abantu beebisa; neye owebabatoolaku, abatuukirirye beyongera okwala.

29.1: Omuntu ogubanenya emirundi emingi nʼagaanira omu nsobi, mu kaseera-buseera balimunialula amantalama.
29.2: Abatuukirirye owebafuga, abantu bajaagaana; neye ababbibabbi owebafuga, abantu bakunga.
29.3: Eyeinira amalabuki, asangaalya oiteeye, neye oyo asiiba mu bamalaaya, ayonoona bibye.
29.4: Okabaka owaafuga nʼobwenkanya, aleetera ekyalokye okutebenkera; neye oyo iye alulunkanira enguzi akyonoona.
29.5: Omuntu awaanawaana omwinaye, abba yeetega lutuula.
29.6: Omubbimubbi bamukwatira mu nsobigye, neye omutuukirirye, ayemba nʼajaagaana.
29.7: Abatuukirirye bafaayo oku badoobi okusuna obwenkanya, neye ababbibabbi ekyo tibakifaaku.
29.8: Abanyoomi batabangula ekibuga; neye abantu abategeeri baikaikania obusungu.
29.9: Omuntu owʼamalabuki owaayakana nʼomusirusiru, omusirusiru asunguwala nʼamusekerera nandi wabbaawo eidembe.
29.10: Abaiti bakyawa omuntu omwesimbu era banoonia okwita abalongoole omu myoyo.
29.11: Omusirusiru alaga obusungubwe bwonabwona, neye owʼamalabuki yeefuga.
29.12: Omufugi owaawulisisya ebyobubbeyi, abakungube bonabona babba babbibabbi.
29.13: Omudoobi, nʼomujolongi, bali nʼekibagaita: Bombi oMusengwa niiye abawa ekitangaala ni babona.
29.14: Okabaka owaasala emisango egyʼabadoobi omu bwenkanya, entebe eyʼobufugibwe ebbeerererawo emirembe gyonagyona.
29.15: Okukangavula nʼomwigo nʼokunenya, bireeta amalabuki; neye omwana ogubaleka obuleki, aswaza omaaye.
29.16: Ababbibabbi owebeeyongera, nʼokubbenga kweyongera; neye abatuukirirye balibbaawo ni babona okusebengerera kwʼababbibabbi.
29.17: Okangavulenge omwanawo, yakweyagalisyanga, era yakuwuumulyanga omwoyo.
29.18: Anambula okubiikula kwa Kibbumba, abantu bagootaana; neye wʼenkabi oyo iye akwata amateeka.
29.19: Omugalama tibamukangavula na bibono-bubono, olwʼokubba nʼowaategeera, tateekaku mwoyo.
29.20: Wabbaawo eisuubi eeri omusirusiru, okukiraku eeri omuntu oyo agwangalikana nʼebibono.
29.21: Aginia omuweereryawe okuzwa nga mutomuto, oluzwanyuma yalimuleetaku eifuge.
29.22: Omuntu owʼobusungu, atanula enyombo; nʼowʼekiruyi, agwa omu nsobi nyingi.
29.23: Okwekudumbalya kwʼomuntu, kwalimwica; neye eyeedembula omu mwoyo, bamuwa ekitiisya.
29.24: Aabba omu mukumbo nʼomwibbi, acaawa obwomibwe; nʼowebamulayirisya, tabbutula amazima.
29.25: Okutya abantu mutego gwʼakabbikabbi; neye eyeesiga oMusengwa, abba nʼeidembe.
29.26: Bangi abanooonia obukoda omu bakulu; neye obwenkanya buzwa eeri Musengwa.
29.27: Omubbimubbi wʼomuliko eeri omutuukirirye, nʼomutuukirirye wʼomuliko eeri omubbimubbi.

30.1: Binu niibyo ebibono byʼAguli, omutaane wa Yake; obukwenda obuyawaire niibwo bunu: Yabuwaire oItiyeeri, era oItiyeeri nʼoBbukali.
30.2: “Mazima ninze akirirayo nakimo obusirusiru omu bantu era mbulamu akabuntu.
30.3: Tinjegangaku amalabuki, waire okumanya oKibbumba oyo oMutukulye.
30.4: Naani eyaabireku omwigulu, era nʼaika ansi? Naani eyabbuuniireku empewo omu ngaloye? Naani eyasibiireku amaizi omu kizwalokye? Naani eyateekerewo ensalo eyʼekyalo? Eriinalye niiye onaani, nʼeriina lyʼomutaane niiye onaani? Aale onkobere owoobba omaite.”
30.5: “Nabuli kibono kya Kibbumba kyʼamazima; niiye engabo yʼabo abairukira egyali okusuna obukuumi.
30.6: Oku bibonobye, tiwayongerangaku ebibyo, kaisi tiyakunenya nʼakakasa ngʼobwoli mubbeyi.” Okusaba oKibbumba enkabi
30.7: “Oo Kibbumba nkusaba ebintu bibiri, tiwabinjima nga nkaali okufa.
30.8: Tiwaganya nimba nʼokalebule nʼokubbeyanga; tiwampanga obudoobi, waire obusuni, neye ongabirirenge ebyokulya ebineetaaga.
30.9: Nga tikiikyo, amo-so nimba na bibitiriri ino ni nakwegaana ni nkoba nti, ‘OMusengwa-so niiye onaani?’ Ooba ni mba mudoobi ni ntuuka nʼokwibba, ni nswaza eriinalyo Kibbumba wange.”
30.10: “Tiwatumulanga ebyakalebule oku muweererya eeri omusengwawe, amo-so nʼakulaama, ni kikukwata.”
30.11: “Waliwo abatumula ebisongolye oku baitewaabwe, era nga tibasabira abamawaabwe enkabi;
30.12: waliwo abeebona nga balongoole, neye nga tibabatukulyanga okuzwa omu bucaafu bwʼebibbibibbi byabwe;
30.13: waliwo abo abeebona bonkani, era ni baseega bati niibo bonkani abaliwo;
30.14: waliwo abo abali nʼamaino amoogi ooti mpiima, nʼensaya gyabwe giri ooti girimu bwambe, okumalawo abadoobi oku kyalo, era okumalawo abadamba omu bantu.”
30.15: “Omunasa guli nʼabaala baagwo babiri, baceera bati, ‘Ompe! Ompe!’ “Waliwo ebintu bisatu ebitaikuta enaku gyonagyona,” dala biri bina ebitamatira,
30.16: ebyo niibyo e magombe, omukali omugumba, ekyalo ekikalu ekikandiire amaizi, nʼomusyo, igwo etigukoba guti, “Kimala.”
30.17: “Amaiso gʼoyo anyooma oiteeye, era oyo agaana okuwulira omaaye, ebinankololo byʼomu kiinamo byaligatoolamu, era ensega ni gigalya.”
30.18: “Ebintu bisatu ebyankayire okutegeera, dala biri bina ebintamaite:
30.19: Enzira ya kokomi omwibbanga, enzira ya mpiri okwibbaale, enzira yʼeryato oku nyanza, nʼengeri omusaiza nʼomukali egibatuuka omu mukago!”
30.20: “Enu niiyo enkola yʼomukali omulendi: Amala okwenda ni yeenaguca, kaisi nʼakoba ati, ‘Mpaawo kibbikibbi ekinkolereku.’ ”
30.21: “Waliwo ebintu bisatu ebitukutya ekyalo, biri bina ebikitayezya okugumira,
30.22: omugalama owaasuuka kabaka, nʼomusirusiru owaabba nʼebyokulya ebingi;
30.23: omukali eyadibire owaasuna obufumbo, nʼomugalama omukali okusikira omusengwawe omukali.” Ebiwuuka ebyʼamalabuki
30.24: “Oku kyalo kuliku ebintu bina ebityayi, neye biri na malabuki mangi ino:
30.25: Enkababe giri nʼamaani matono, neye gyebisira ebyokulya okweisana.
30.26: Enapowo gyona tigyamaani, neye gyeyombekera ekisito kyabwe omu mabbaale.
30.27: Enzige gibula okabaka, neye gikumbira aamo mu bibbula.
30.28: Onankibbobbo oyezya okumukwata nʼengalo; neye abba paka nʼomu mbiri gyʼabakabaka.
30.29: “Waliwo ebintu bisatu ebikumba nʼosiima, dala biri bina ebitambulira omu lusimbo:
30.30: Ompologoma akirira nakimo amaani omu bisolo, mpaawo gondi ogwatya;
30.31: onkoko ompanguzi, nʼombuli ompanya, nʼokabaka ali nʼamajeege nga gamweruguuliriirye.
30.32: “Owoobbanga okolere ekyʼobusirusiru ni weekudumbalya, ooba nʼoseega okukola ekibbikibbi, osirikanga nʼoseega;
30.33: olwʼokubba okusunda amata ngʼowekuleeta amakita, nʼokumigirirya enindo ngʼowekuleeta omusaaye, kale kityo nʼokutanula obusungu, niiye ewekuleeta enyombo.”

31.1: Binu niibyo ebibono bya Kabaka oLamweri, ebyʼobunaabbi omaaye ebiyasunire nʼamwegesya:
31.2: Oo mwana wange, omwana oguneebyaliire, omwana wange owabweyamo,
31.3: tiwamaliranga amaanigo ku bakali; ibo abo bajikirica nʼabakabaka!
31.4: Oo Lamweri, tikyabakabaka okunywanga omwenge, tikyabafugi okubbanga nʼeireke oku biteemeerya,
31.5: demba ni bagunywa ni beerabira amateeka; era abebagadya nandi ni babakolera ebyʼobwenkanya.
31.6: Omwenge oguwe yʼoyo ajigirika, nʼoyo aali omu bwomi obwʼokugada eino.
31.7: Oleke banywe beerabire obudoobi bwabwe, era tibairayo okwebukirya enima yaabwe.
31.8: Otumuulirirenge abo ababula obutumuliro, olwanirirenge abadambaku omwasiriri.
31.9: Otumulenge era osalenge omusango mu bwenkanya; olwanirirenge abadoobi nʼabali omu kwetaaga okusuna obwenkanya. Okuzuula omukali owʼempisa ensa
31.10: Omukali owʼempisa ensa naani ayezya okumuzuula? Omukali oyo akirira yala amabbaale agebbeeyi eino.
31.11: Oibaaye yamwesiga, era abba tadamba ekintu kyonakyona ekyʼomugaso.
31.12: Omu bwomibwe bwonabwona, abitya nakusani oibaaye, era nandi nʼamukola akabbikabbi.
31.13: Anoonia ebyoya bya ntaama nʼenkokooli era nʼakola emirimo nʼengalogye nʼomwoyo gumo.
31.14: Ali ooti maato gʼabasuubuuzi; ebyokulya abitoola yala.
31.15: Alamuka mu kambwiko, nʼawa abʼomu makaage ebyokulya, era nʼawa abaweereryabe abaala ebyokukola.
31.16: Yeetegereza eitakali nʼaligula, nʼakolesya empiiyagye egyaingirya nʼalikomamu emizabbibbu.
31.17: Anyiikiira okukola nʼamaani, ngʼakola nʼamaani nʼengalogye.
31.18: Abona omugaso gwʼebyo ebyakola, akola paka bwire okwitaala.
31.19: Yeekambira ewuuzigye, iye onanyere nʼaluka engoyegye.
31.20: Agabira abadoobi nʼomwoyo gumo, era abbeera abali omu kwetaaga.
31.21: Obwire nʼowebubba buwolondoki, tatya olwʼabʼomu nyumbaye, olwʼokubba bonabona abazwalisya engoye egibasyoyesya.
31.22: Yeekolera amasuukage agʼoku buliribwe, azwala engoye egya lineni omusa.
31.23: Oibaaye mumanye ino, era mukubbemberi ogubawa ekitiisya omu kibuga.
31.24: Omukali oyo atunga ebizwalo ebisa ebyʼebbeeyi eino nʼatunda. Agulya abasuubuuzi emisibiro.
31.25: Wʼamaani era wʼekitiisya, tatya ebiro ebyʼomumaiso.
31.26: Atumula na malabuki, era okwegesya okwʼekisa tikumuzwa oku munwa.
31.27: Alabirira empisa gyʼabʼomu makaage, era takolera oku byʼobugayaali.
31.28: Abaanabe bamukoba bati wʼenkabi; nʼoibaaye yena amusisiija ati:
31.29: “Abakali bangi abakola ebyʼekitiisya, neye iwe obakiraku bonabona!”
31.30: Okusikiriza kwʼomukali nʼobusiipoono bicaamya, neye omukali atya oMusengwa bamuwuujenge.
31.31: Bamuwengeku akasiimo oku byakolerera, era oleke ebyakola bimuzwerengeku okumuwuuja omu kifo awebakumbaaniira.

1.1: Wabbairewo eyo omusaiza ogubayetanga bati Yona omutaane wʼAmitaayi. Lumo, oMusengwa nʼatumula nʼoYona oyo nʼamukoba ati,
1.2: “Osetukiremu oyabe e Nineeve, omu kibuga ekyo ekinene, olaabbe ngʼolabula abantu baamu olwʼokubba obubbibubbi bwabwe bubitiriire omumaiso gange.”
1.3: Neye oYona omu kifo kyʼokwaba e Nineeve, nʼakwata nzira gendi, nʼataka kwaba Talusiisi olwo ayezye okwiruka oMusengwa. Awo oYona nʼaserengeta oku mwalo e Yoopa e giyayajiirye emeeri eyaba e Talusiisi, nʼasasula empiiya egyʼentambula, nʼaingira omu meeri eyo ni baaba, olwo ayezye okwiruka oMusengwa. OMusengwa abonereza oYona
1.4: Awo oMusengwa nʼasindika ogumpunga ogwʼamaani oku nyanza era enyanza ni yeefukuula, amaizi ni gakubba emeeri nebbuuca okuvunika.
1.5: Awo abavugi bʼemeeri ni batya ino, era nabuli moiza kwibo nʼatandiika okukungirira okibbumbawe. Ni batandiika okumuma emigugu omu nyanza olwʼokukendeeryaku obuzito obwabbaire oku meeri. Omu kaseera ako, oYona iye kaisi yabbaire yeingiriire mu kasenge kʼemeeri akʼansi nga yeefuulutira ndoolo.
1.6: Omukulu wʼabavugi bʼemeeri eyo nʼayaba e gyali nʼamukoba ati, “Obbootya okugona-bugoni? Osetuke okungirire okibbumbawo, amo nʼatukwatira ekisa nʼatulamya.”
1.7: Awo abavugi bʼemeeri ni beteesamu bati, “Kaade tukubbe akalulu tuzuule naani agira ni tugwa oku kigosi kinu.” Owebakubbire akalulu kalagire kati, ekigosi kizwa ku Yona.
1.8: Awo ni batandiika okusonseka oYona ebibuulyo bati, “Aale otukobere, naani agirire ni tugwa oku kigosi kinu? Okola mulimoki? Ozwera yaina? Era oli wʼeigwangaki?”
1.9: OYona nʼabairamu ati, “Ndi Mwebbulaniya. Nsinza Musengwa oyo oKibbumba owʼeigulu, eyabbumbire enyanza nʼobukalu.”
1.10: Abavugi bʼemeeri owebawuliire ekyo, emyoyo ni gibakutuka era ni bamubuulya bati, “Okolere niki ekyo?” Bamubwirye batyo olwʼokubba oYona yabbaire amalire okubakobera ngʼobwali kwiruka ku Musengwa.
1.11: Atyanu olwʼokubba ogumpunga gwabbaire gweyongera-bweyongeri okufuukuula enyanza, abavugi bʼemeeri ni babuulya oYona bati, “Tukukole niki kaisi enyanza eikaikane twezye okulama?”
1.12: OYona nʼabairamu ati, “Munginge mummume omu nyanza, era yaikaikana. Nkimmaite nti nsobi yange ogumpunga ogunene oguti okubaizaku.” OYona bamumuma omu nyanza
1.13: Neye abavugi bʼemeeri ibo tete nandi bafa kwekyo oYona ekiyabakobere. Balwanikaine kuvuga meeri bayezye okukangayo oku mwalo. Neye nandi bayezya olwʼokubba enyanza yeeyongeire kwefuukuula okukiraku ngʼoweyabbaire.
1.14: Awo ni beekungirira oMusengwa bati, “Oo Musengwa, tukwegairira tiwatuleka ni tufa olwʼobwomi bwʼomusaiza onu. Era totunenya olwʼomusaayegwe eritubulaku akabbikabbi eritwaba okusuka olwʼokubba niiwe Musengwa osiimire otyo.”
1.15: Awo ni baginga oYona ni bamumuma omu nyanza, era omu kaseera akananyere ako enyanza nʼeteeka.
1.16: Olwʼekyo abasaiza abo ni batya ino oMusengwa era ni bawaayo esadaaka eeri oMusengwa era ni beeyama okumuweereryanga.
1.17: Neye iye oMusengwa nʼategekawo ogunyanyi ogunene okumira oYona era oYona nʼamala omu kida kyagwo enaku isatu omusana nʼobwire.

2.1: OYona ngʼali omu kida kyʼogunyanyi ogunene nʼasaba ngʼawuuja oKibbumbawe,
2.2: ngʼakoba ati, “Omu bigosi byange nakusabire Musengwa, nʼonjiramu. Nga ndi ansi eeyo e magombe nasabire obubbeeri era nʼowulisisya okwekunga kwange.
2.3: Wankasukire ansi eeyo omu lwabi, ansi eeyo omu maizi awakira okubba awaabiriri, era amaizi amangi ni gambuunaku; amayengogo gonagona nʼamaizi ageedumbya ni gaika ni bimmooma.
2.4: Awo mudi ni nseega nti ombingire omumaisogo; nga tete tinaliirayo okubonaku eYeekaaluyo entukulye!
2.5: Amaizi gabbaire gammira nga gataka kunjita, olwabi ni luneeruguulirirya, nʼekisubi kyʼoku maizi ni kineebbowanganirya oku mutwe.
2.6: Neinikiire nakimo paka ansi omu maizi eeyo, ansi ensozi e gigitandiikira; ni nseega nti naabba eeyo musibe emirembe gyonagyona. Neye iwe Musengwa iye oKibbumba wange, nʼontoolayo omu kiina ekyo nga ndi mwomi!
2.7: Owenabbaire mpulira ngʼobwomi buwaawo, nakwebukiirye Musengwa era esaala yange nʼeniina e gyoli omu Yeekaaluyo entukulye.
2.8: “Abo abeesibiire oku kusinza ebintu ebinambulamu bafiirwa okusaasira okubandisunire.
2.9: Neye nze, Musengwa, nakwebalyanga omu lwembo ni nkuwa nʼesadaaka. Era ebineeyamanga nabituukiriryanga. Obununuli buzwa eeri niiwe Musengwa.”
2.10: Awo oMusengwa nʼalagira ogunyanyi nago ni gusesema oYona oku bukalu.

3.1: Awo oMusengwa tete nʼatumula nʼoYona omulundi ogwokubiri ati,
3.2: “Oyabe e Nineeve, ekibuga ekinene ekyo era okiraabbire obukwenda bunu obunkuwa, obukirabula.”
3.3: Oku mulundi ogwo oYona nʼasetuka nʼayaba e Nineeve ngʼoMusengwa oweyamukobere. Atyanu ekibuga ekyo, kyabbaire kigalami ino era nga kitwala enaku isatu nambirira okutambula okukimalaku.
3.4: OYona oweyatuukire omu Nineeve, olunaku olwasookere yatambwire omu kibuga nga waalaabba eeri abatyami baamu ati, “Wasigaire enaku 40 gyonkani oKibbumba ajigirice ekibuga kinu nʼabantu baamu.”
3.5: Abantu bʼe Nineeve owebawuliire obukwenda obwo, ni baikirirya oKibbumba. Kale ni balangirira okusiiba era bonabona okuzwera oku wʼekitiisya paka oku muyejere ni beesiba ebibenga okulaga bati beenenyere.
3.6: Awo amawuliro ago owegatuukire oku kabaka wʼe Nineeve nʼasetuka oku ntebeye eyʼobwakabaka, nʼatoolamu amaganduulage agʼobwakabaka era ni yeesiba ebibenga era nʼatyama ansi omwikoke okulaga ati yeenenyere.
3.7: Awo nʼawuluca ekiragiro eeri abantu bʼe Nineeve ati, “Kinu kiragiro okuzwa eeri okabaka nʼabakungube.” “Mpaawo muntu ali nʼokulyaku akantu konakona; abantu bonabona waire byayo, nga niibyo ente, nʼentaama nʼembuli mpaawo kulya ooba kunywa.
3.8: Abantu bonabona bali nʼokwesiba ebibenga nʼebyayo byona bali nʼokubisiba ebibenga okulaga okwenenya. Nabuli moiza ali nʼokukungirira oKibbumba okumusoniya era akomye emizeegye emibbimibbi nʼebikolebye ebyobukambwe.
3.9: Amo oKibbumba nʼacuusa ekiseegokye; amo nʼaikaikana ekiruyi nandi nʼatujigirica!”
3.10: Awo oKibbumba oweyaboine ebikole byabwe ebyo, era nga bakomerye nʼemize emibbimibbi, ekisa ni kimukwata nʼabasoniya nandi nʼabajigirica ngʼoweyabbaire akobere.

4.1: Atyanu olwʼokubba oKibbumba tiyairire okujigirica abantu bʼe Nineeve, ekyo tikyasangairye oYona era yasunguwaire-busunguwali.
4.2: Omu kusabakwe nʼakoba oMusengwa ati, “Aale Musengwa, ekyo tiniikyo ekinakobere nga nkaali ndi e waiswe nti kiwakola? Era niikyo ekyo ekyagirire ni neeyuna okukwirukaku neeyabire e Talusiisi. Namaite nti iwe oli Kibbumba owʼekisa era osaasira, olwawo okusunguwala, era owʼokutaka okutakoma era omutegeke okucuusa ekiseego nʼoleka okubonereza omuntu.
4.3: Aale atyanu Musengwa, omale ganeitira. Kasinga nfe okukiraku okubba mwomi.”
4.4: Neye oMusengwa nʼamwiramu ati, “Yona, obba mutuuce okusunguwala olwʼekyo ekinkolere?” OKibbumba ayegesya oYona ebyʼekisa
4.5: Awo oYona nʼawuluka omu Nineeve nʼayaba nʼatyama oku lubba lwʼe buzwaisana obwʼekibuga ekyo. Ngʼali eeyo ni yeerukira akasiisira era nʼatyama omu kiwolu omwo okukuumirira okubona ekyagwa oku kibuga ekyo.
4.6: Awo oMusengwa nʼamumererya ekimera ekiranda ooti suuswa ni kirandira oku kasiisira ni kimukolera ekyoleerya ekisa, era ekyo ni kisangaalya ino oYona.
4.7: Neye eizo waaku ekibbambya, oKibbumba nʼasindika oigino nʼalya ekimera ekyo ni kiwotoka.
4.8: Eisana oweryayangire, oKibbumba nʼasindika ompunga owʼeibbungumu erinene okuzwa e buzwaisana okufuwa oYona. Eisana ni lipaalaaga oYona omu mutwe nʼabbuuca okubbalikaku ni yeegomba nʼokufa. OYona, nʼawuninkirira era nʼakoba ati, “Kasinga nfe okukiraku okubba mwomi.”
4.9: Neye oKibbumba nʼamukoba ati, “Yona, dala obba mutuuce okusunguwala olwʼekimera ekyo?” OYona yena nʼairamu ati, “Mba mutuuce. Era mpulira obusungu, neegomba nʼokwefeera.”
4.10: Awo oMusengwa nʼamukoba ati, “Ekimera ekyo kyakuliire mu kiire kimo, eizo waaku ni kikala. Iwe oku lulwo mpaawo kintu ekiwakikoleire kaisi kikule, waire okukikoma, tiniiwe owakikomere, neye lwaki kikulumirye kityo omwoyo?
4.11: Kale zena lwaki tinandisoniyire oNineeve, ekibuga ekinene ekityo, ekirimu abantu ababita omu 120,000 abakaali nʼokumanyaku okwabulawo ekisa nʼekibbikibbi, oteekeku nʼebisolo ebingi ebikirimu?”

1.1: Lunu niirwo olulyo lwa Yesu Kurisito omwizukulu wa Dawudi, iye eyabbaire omwizukulu wa Ibbulaimu:
1.2: OIbbulaimu yabbaire iteeye wa Isaka, oIsaka yabbaire iteeye wa Yaakobbo, era oYaakobbo yabbaire iteeye wa Yuda nʼabagandabe.
1.3: OYuda yabbaire iteeye wa Pereezi nʼoZeera, era ibo omawaabwe yabbaire Tamali. OPereezi yabbaire iteeye wa Kazirooni, era oKazirooni yabbaire iteeye wa Laamu.
1.4: OLaamu yabbaire iteeye wʼAminadabbu, Aminadabbu yabbaire iteeye wa Nakusoni, era oNakusoni yabbaire iteeye wa Salumooni.
1.5: OSalumooni yabbaire iteeye wa Bbowaazi, era iye omaaye yabbaire Lakabbu. OBbowaazi yabbaire iteeye wʼObbedi era iye omaaye yabbaire Luusi, era Obbedi yabbaire iteeye wa Yese.
1.6: OYese yabbaire iteeye wa Dawudi okabaka, era oDawudi yabbaire iteeye wa Sulemaani, oguyabyaire omu muka Wuliya.
1.7: OSulemaani yabbaire iteeye wa Lekobbwamu, era oLekobbwamu yabbaire iteeye wʼAbbiya, era Abbiya yabbaire iteeye wʼAsafu.
1.8: Asafu yabbaire iteeye wa Yokosofaati, oYokosofaati yabbaire iteeye wa Yokolaamu, era oYokolaamu yabbaire iteeye wa Wuziya.
1.9: OWuziya yabbaire iteeye wa Yosamu, oYosamu yabbaire iteeye wʼAkazi, era Akazi yabbaire iteeye wa Kezeekiya.
1.10: OKezeekiya yabbaire iteeye wa Manase, oManaase yabbaire iteeye wʼAmoni, era Amoni yabbaire iteeye wa Yosiya.
1.11: OYosiya yabbaire iteeye wa Yekoniya nʼabagandabe. Abo babbairewo mu biseera owebatwaliire abantu bʼe Isirairi omu bugalama e Bbabbulooni.
1.12: Okuzwera nakimo omu biseera ebibatwaliiremu aBaisirairi omu busibe e Bbabbulooni paka oku kubyala oYesu, olulyo lwabwe niirwo lunu luti: OYekoniya yabbaire iteeye wa Seyalutiyeeri, era oSeyalutiyeeri yabbaire iteeye wa Zerubbabbeeri.
1.13: OZerubbabbeeri yabbaire iteeye wʼAbbiwudi, Abbiwudi yabbaire iteeye wʼEryakimu, era Eryakimu yabbaire iteeye wʼAzoli.
1.14: Azoli iye yabbaire iteeye wa Zadooki, oZadooki yabbaire iteeye wʼAkimu, era Akimu yabbaire iteeye wʼEriyudi.
1.15: Eriyudi yabbaire iteeye wʼEryezaali, Eryezaali yabbaire iteeye wa Matani, era oMatani yabbaire iteeye wa Yaakobbo.
1.16: OYaakobbo yabbaire iteeye wa Yusufu oibaaye wa Malyamu, oMalyamu eyabbaire omaaye wa Yesu, iye ogubeeta oKurisito ogubasukireku amafuta.
1.17: Kale emigigi gyonagyona giri ikumi nʼeena, okuzwa okwIbbulaimu okutuuka oku Dawudi. Era tete giri emigigi ikumi nʼeena okuzwa oku Dawudi okutuuka oku kutwala aBaisirairi omu bugalama e Bbabbulooni. Era tete nʼegindi giri emigigi ikumi nʼeena okuzwa oku kubatwala e Bbabbulooni okutuuka oku kubyala oKurisito ogubasukireku amafuta. Okubyala oYesu Kurisito (Luk 2:1-7)
1.18: Atyanu okubyala oYesu Kurisito kwabbaire kuti: OMalyamu omaaye wa Yesu yabbaire ngʼasuubizire oYusufu ati ayaba okumufumbirwa era nga kimanyikaine. Neye ngʼakaali okumufumbirwa, ni kitegerekeka ngʼali kida, neye ngʼoMwoyo oMutukulye niiye eyamwezeserye okukisuna.
1.19: Neye olwʼokubba oYusufu eyabbaire ayaba okubba oibaaye, yabbaire muntu atuukiriire, era nga tataka okumuswaza omu lwatu, nʼaseega kumulekawo mu kyama.
1.20: Yabbaire akaali aseega atyo, omalaika wa Musengwa iye oKibbumba nʼamubonekera omu kirooto nʼamukoba ati, “Yusufu, omwizukulu wa kabaka oDawudi, tiwaatya okutwala oMalyamu okubba omukaliwo olwʼokubba, ekida ekyali nakyo oMwoyo oMutukulye niiye eyamwezeserye okukisuna.
1.21: Era ayaba okubyala omwana mwisuka, era bamuwa eriina bati, Yesu, olwʼokubba niiye eyalirokola abantu okuzwa omu bikole byabwe ebibbibibbi.”
1.22: Era ebyo byonabyona byabbairewo, kaisi olwo oMusengwa iye oKibbumba ekiyatumwire ngʼabitira omu naabbi kituukirire, ekikoba kiti:
1.23: “Muwulisisye! Omwala omuguna yalibba ekida, era yalibyala omwana mwisuka. Era balimuwa eriina bati Manweri,” amakulu gaalyo gati, “OKibbumba ali na iswe.”
1.24: Era oYusufu oweyalamukire, nʼakola ngʼomalaika oyo oweyamulagiire era nʼatwala oMalyamu e ika e wuwe nʼabba mukaliwe.
1.25: Neye tiyeegaitire naye paka oweyabyaire, era oYusufu nʼawa omwana oyo eriina ati, Yesu.

2.1: OYesu owebamubyaliire omu kibuga e Bbeserekeemu, omwitwale lyʼe Buyudaaya, oKerode yabbaire niiye okabaka wʼeitwale eryo. Era abasaiza abeetegereza ebyʼenkota ni bazwera omu kyalo kyʼe buzwaisana, ni baaba omu kibuga e Yerusaalemi.
2.2: Kale eeyo ni babuulya abantu bati, “Omwana ogubabyaire okubba okabaka wʼaBayudaaya ali nkonaki? Twaboine onkota alaga ati bamubyaire ngʼaizira eenu, kale twizire kusinza mwana oyo nago.”
2.3: Awo abantu owebakobeire okabaka oKerode ebintu ebyo, ni yeeraliikirira, era nʼabantu abakiraku obungi omu Yerusaalemi ni beeraliikirira.
2.4: Kale awo oKerode nʼakumbaania abakabona abakulu bonabona, nʼabakugu omu byʼaMateeka ga Musa, kaisi nʼababuulya ati, “OKurisito ogubasukireku amafuta iye babbaire nʼokumubyala yaina?”
2.5: Ibo ni bamwiramu bati, “Balimubyala mu kibuga e Bbeserekeemu, omwitwale lyʼe Buyudaaya. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba onaabbi yakiwandiikire ati:
2.6: ‘Inywe abantu bʼomu kibuga e Bbeserekeemu ekyʼomu Buyudaaya, ekibuga kyanywe tiniikyo ekisembayo okubba ekyʼekitiisya omu Buyudaaya, olwʼokubba mwikyo mwalizwamu omufugi, iye yakubbemberanga abantu bange abʼe Isirairi.’ ”
2.7: Kale awo oKerode nʼayeta abasaiza abo abeetegereza ebyʼenkota, nʼababuulya mu kyama ekiseera ekinanyerenyeere onkota ekiyabonekeiremu.
2.8: Awo nʼabatuma e Bbeserekeemu ngʼabakoba ati, “Mwabe munoonererye nakusani omwana oyo, era owemwabba nga mumuboine, mwaira ni munkobera e gyali zena ni njaba ni mmusinza.”
2.9: -10 Atyanu owebamalire okuwulira ebibono bya kabaka oKerode ni baaba. Awo ni bairamu okubona onkota onanyere oyo ogubabbaire baboine e buzwaisana. Cooka owebaboine onkota oyo nago ni basangaalira nakimo ino. Era onkota oyo yabeekubbembereire paka oweyatuukire nʼayemerera e ngulu wʼenyumba omwana omuyabbaire.
2.11: Kale abasaiza abo owebatuukire ni baingira omu nyumba eyo, era ni babona omwana ngʼali nʼomaaye oMalyamu, bakomere amazwi ni basinza omwana oyo. Awo ni basibindula emigangi gyabwe, era ni bamutonera ebirabo. Bamutoneire ezaabbu, nʼobubbaani nʼebyakaloosa ebibeeta miira.
2.12: Neye olwʼokubba oKibbumba yabbaire abalabwire omu kirooto ati tibakanga eeri oKerode, kale owebabbaire bakanga omu kyalo kyʼe waabwe babitiire mu nzira gendi. Okutwala oYesu nʼoMalyamu e Misiri
2.13: Awo abasaiza abeetegereza ebyʼenkota owebazwire e Bbeserekeemu, omalaika wa Musengwa iye oKibbumba nʼabonekera oYusufu omu kirooto, nʼamukoba ati, “Osetuke, oyanguweku otwale omwana nʼomaaye mwirukire omu kyalo kyʼe Misiri. Era mubbe eeyo paka owenalibakoba okuzwayo olwʼokubba oKerode ayaba okunoonia omwana okumwita.”
2.14: Kale awo oYusufu obwire obwo nʼasetuka nʼakwata omwana nʼomaaye ni baaba e Misiri.
2.15: Era ni babba eeyo paka oKerode oweyafiire. Ebyo byabbairewo kaisi oMusengwa iye oKibbumba ekiyatumwire ngʼabitira omu naabbi kituukirire, ekikoba kiti: “Nayetere omwana wange okuzwa omu Misiri.” Okwita abaana abaisuka e Bbeserekeemu
2.16: Awo oKerode oweyamanyicirye ati abasaiza abeetegereza ebyʼenkota bamubbeyere-bubbeyi, nʼanyiiga ino. Kale nʼatuma abaisirikale okwita abaana abaisuka bonabona omu Bbeserekeemu nʼomu byalo ebikyeruguuliriirye, abo ababbaire abʼemyanka emibiri nʼokwika ansi. Ekyo yakikolere ngʼasinzirira ku kiseera abasaiza badi nago ekibamukobeire ekibaboneiremu onkota.
2.17: Ekyo oKerode ekiyakolere kyatuukiriirye kiikyo oKibbumba ekiyatumwire ngʼabitira omu naabbi Yeremiya, ekikoba kiti:
2.18: “Abantu bawulira amazingo nʼokukuukulya okwʼamaani omu kibuga e Laama. OLakeeri akunga olwʼabaanabe, era tataka okumusirica. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba abaanabe abantu babamalirewo.” Okuzwa e Misiri
2.19: Kale oluzwanyuma oKerode oweyafiire, omalaika wa Musengwa iye oKibbumba nʼabonekera oYusufu omu kirooto ngʼali e Misiri.
2.20: Nʼakoba oYusufu ati, “Osetuke, okanje omwana nʼomaaye, omu kyalo kyʼe Isirairi olwʼokubba oodi abbaire anoonia omwana okwita afiire.”
2.21: Awo oYusufu nʼakwata omwana nʼomaaye nʼabakanja e Isirairi.
2.22: Neye oYusufu oweyawuliire ati Alukeraawo niiye ogubasikisirye oiteeye oKerode era niiye afuga eitwale lyʼe Buyudaaya, awo nʼatya okwaba omwitwale eryo. Neye oluzwanyuma oKibbumba oweyamulabwire olundi omu kirooto tete, awo nʼayaba mwitwale lyʼe Galiraaya.
2.23: Kale ni baaba ni babba batyami bʼomu kibuga ekibeeta Naazaleesi. Ekyo kyabbaire kityo kaisi onaabbi ekiyatumwire oku Kurisito kituukirire, ekikoba kiti: “Balimweta owʼe Naazaleesi.”

3.1: Omu naku egyo, oYokaana oMubatizi nʼayaba omwidungu lyʼe Buyudaaya, era nʼalaabba obukwenda bwa Kibbumba eeri abantu.
3.2: Obukwendabwe bwabbaire buti, “Mwenenye, olwʼokubba obwakabaka bwʼomwigulu bwigereire.”
3.3: OYokaana oyo, niiye onaabbi oIsaaya oguyatumwireku ati: “Waliwo atumulira omwidungu nʼeigono eryaminkirira ati, ‘Mutegeke oluguudo lwa Musengwa aiza, muteereerye amanzirage.’ ”
3.4: OYokaana oyo, yazwalanga ekizwalo ekibakolere omu byoya bya kisolo ogubeeta ongamira, ngʼomu nkende yeesiba musipi gwʼeidiba. Era yaalyanga nzige nʼomujenene gwʼenzoki egyʼomu kigona.
3.5: Awo abantu ni bazwanga omu kibuga e Yerusaalemi, nʼomu byalo byʼomu Buyudaaya mwonamwona, nʼomu byalo ebyeruguuliriirye oMwiga oYoludaani, ni baabanga e giri oYokaana,
3.6: ni babbutulanga ebikole byabwe ebibbibibbi era nʼababatiziranga omu mwiga oYoludaani.
3.7: Neye oYokaana oweyaboine ngʼaBafalisaayo nʼaBasedukaayo bangi baaba egyali okubabatiza, nʼabakoba ati, “Inywe abakabbikabbi ooti mpiri enfulugundu! Naani abalabwire ati eenu niiyo engeri eyʼokwiruka obusungu bwa Kibbumba obwaba okwiza?
3.8: Aale atyanu mukole ebikole ebiraga biti dala mwenenyere ebikole byanywe ebibbibibbi.
3.9: Era timwaseega muti mwezya okuwunuka nga mukoba muti, ‘Kasita iswe tuli baizukulu ba Ibbulaimu,’ olwʼokubba mbakobera nti omu mabbaale ganu, oKibbumba ayezya okusuuciryamu oIbbulaimu abaizukulu abandi.
3.10: Mumanye muti muli ooti misaale, nga nʼamambaizi agagitema bamalire okugabiikirya oku kikolo kya buli musaale. Ogwo ogutaneneka ebineneka ebisa baaba kugutema, era bagudyake omu musyo.
3.11: Nze mbabatiza na maizi okulaga nti mwenenyere, neye waliwo ankiraku obwezye aali kwiza oluzwanyuma lwange, oguntasaanira naire okusibindula obusibiro bwʼengaitogye ni ngitoola omu bigerebye. Iye, yalibabatiza na Mwoyo oMutukulye era na musyo.
3.12: Iye ayaba okwabulamu abantu ooti muntu akwata olugali nʼasenyenta, empeke nʼebisusungu. Empeke igyo yaligikumbaanirya omu kideerokye, kaisi ibyo ebisusungu nʼabyoca nʼomusyo ogutalikira.” Okubatiza oYesu (Mak 1:9-11; Luk 3:21-22)
3.13: Awo oYesu nʼazwa omwitwale lyʼe Galiraaya, nʼayaba oku mwiga oYoludaani e giri oYokaana okumubatiza.
3.14: Neye oYokaana nʼagezyaku okuloberya oYesu ngʼamukoba ati, “Nze neetaaga niiwe okumbatiza, tete iwe wena oiza giri ninze nkubatize?”
3.15: Neye iye oYesu nʼamwiramu ati, “Oganye kibbe kityo omu kiseera kinu, ikyo kituuce iswe okukola obutuukirirye bwonabwona.” Kale awo oYokaana nʼaikirirya okubatiza oYesu.
3.16: Amangu ago ngʼoYesu bankumubatiza, nʼazwa omu maizi, era omu kiseera ekinanyere ekyo eigulu ni lyeigula, oYesu nʼabona oMwoyo wa Kibbumba ngʼaika ooti njiiwa, era nʼayemerera oku Yesu.
3.17: Era eigono ni lizwa omwigulu, nga likoba liti, “Oyo niiye oMwana wange omutake era ogunsiima eino.”

4.1: Ebyo owebyawoire, oMwoyo oMutukulye nʼatwala oYesu omwidungu oSitaani okumukema.
4.2: OYesu oluzwanyuma lwʼokumala enaku 40 nga talya omusana nʼobwire, awo enzala nʼemuluma.
4.3: Kale oSitaani iye omukemi nʼayaba eeri oYesu era nʼamukoba ati, “Ngʼoli Mwana wa Kibbumba, aale olagire amabbaale ganu gasuuke kyokulya.”
4.4: OYesu nʼamwiramu ati, “Bakiwandiikire bati: ‘Omuntu tabba mwomi omu bwizulye ngʼalya kyokulya kyonkani, neye yeetaaga nabuli kibono oKibbumba ekyatumula.’ ”
4.5: Awo oSitaani nʼalungamya oYesu okwaba omu kibuga ekitukulye, kaisi nʼamuniinisya oku kisooto kyʼeYeekaalu.
4.6: Awo nʼakoba oYesu ati, “Ngʼoli Mwana wa Kibbumba, ojuuke ogwe ansi olwʼokubba bakiwandiikire bati: ‘OKibbumba yalagiranga abamalaikabe okukukuuma, era balikubbaka omu ngalo gyabwe, kaisi nandi ni weekontola ekigerekyo okwibbaale.’ ”
4.7: OYesu nʼairamu ati, “Era bakiwandiikire bati: ‘Tokemanga oMusengwa iye oKibbumbawo.’ ”
4.8: Tete oSitaani nʼalungamya oYesu okuniina angulu oku lusozi oluwanvu eino, nʼamulagisya obwakabaka obwʼamawanga gonagona obwʼoku kyalo nʼebintu ebyʼamaani byonabyona ebirimu.
4.9: Kaisi awo oSitaani nʼamukoba ati, “Atyanu ebyo byonabyona njaba okubikuwa singa oikirirya okunkomera amazwi nʼonsinza.”
4.10: Awo oYesu nʼamukoba ati, “Sitaani! Onzwe omumaiso, bakiwandiikire bati: ‘Osinzenge Musengwa iye oKibbumbawo, era guwaweereryanga yenkani.’ ”
4.11: Kale oSitaani nʼazwawo nʼaleka oYesu, era abamalaika ni baiza ni bamulabirira. OYesu atandiika okwegesya omu Galiraaya (Mak 1:14-15; Luk 4:14-15)
4.12: Awo oYesu oweyawuliire ati oYokaana omubatizi bamwigaliire omu mabbuusu, nʼazwa e Yerusaalemi nʼakanga omwitwale lyʼe Galiraaya.
4.13: Awo nʼazwa omu kabuga kʼe Naazaleesi nʼayaba nʼabba mutyami omu kibuga e Kaperenawumu ekiri oku nyanza omu bitundu byʼeigwanga lya Zabbulooni nʼebya Nafutaali.
4.14: Ekyo kyabbairewo kaisi olwo oKibbumba ekiyatumwire ngʼabitira omu naabbi oIsaaya kituukirire, ekikoba kiti:
4.15: “Inywe abantu bʼomu bitundu byʼe Zabbulooni, nʼoNafutaali, ebiri okumpi nʼenyanza oGaliraaya oku lubba lwʼomwiga oYoludaani, abantu ababba omwitwale lyʼe Galiraaya eeyo aBatali Bayudaaya e gibabba.
4.16: Abantu abali omu ndikiirya baboine ekitangaala ekyʼamaani. Era nʼabafu omu myoyo, ekitangaala kibaakiire.”
4.17: Okuzwa omu kiseera ekyo, oYesu nʼatandiika okulaabba eeri abantu ati, “Mwenenye olwʼokubba obwakabaka bwʼomwigulu bwigereire.” OYesu ayeta abazibuli abana (Mak 1:16-20; Luk 5:1-11)
4.18: Lumo, oYesu oweyabbaire ngʼabita oku mbale kwʼenyanza oGaliraaya, nʼabona abaganda babiri, oSimooni ogubeeta oPeetero nʼomugandawe Andereya. Babbaire batega akatimba omu nyanza olwʼokubba babbaire bazibuli.
4.19: Awo oYesu nʼabeeta ati, “Mwize mubbe beegi bange! Nalibasuuca bazibuli bʼabantu omu kifo kya bazibuli bʼenyanyi.”
4.20: Amangu ago ni baleka aawo obutimba bwabwe, ni baaba naye.
4.21: Oweyazwire awo ni yeeyongeraku omumaiso, oYesu nʼabona abantu abandi babiri abaganda, oYaakobbo nʼoYokaana abataane ba Zebedaayo. Babbaire bali omu lyato nʼoitewaabwe oZebedaayo nga bakwania obutimba bwabwe, awo oYesu nʼabeeta babbe beegibe.
4.22: Era amangu ago ni baleka aawo eryato nʼoitewaabwe, ni baaba nʼoYesu. Okwegesya nʼokulamya abalwaire (Luk 6:17-19)
4.23: Awo oYesu nʼatambula omwitwale lyʼe Galiraaya lyonalyona ngʼayegesya omu makumbaaniro gaabwe, ngʼalaabba eeri abantu aMawuliro aMasa agʼobwakabaka bwʼomwigulu, era ngʼalamya abantu nabuli ndwaire nʼobunafu omu mubiri.
4.24: Kale amawuliro agamukwataku ni gasalaanira omu kyalo kyʼe Siiriya mwonamwona. Era ni bamuleeteranga abalwaire abʼendwaire egitali gimo, nʼababbaire bakaanya obulumi obubitiriri, nʼabaliku emizimu, nʼabʼempimbu, nʼabasanyalaire, bonabona nʼabalamyanga.
4.25: Awo ebiyindi byʼabantu bingi ino okuzwa omu Galiraaya nʼomwitwale lyʼe Dekapooli, nʼomu kibuga e Yerusaalemi, nʼomu Buyudaaya, era nʼoku lubba lwʼe buzwaisana lwʼomwiga oYoludaani ni bamusengererya.

5.1: Awo oYesu oweyaboine ekiyindi kyʼabantu kinene nga kiigerera e gyali, nʼaniinaniina oku lusozi era nʼatyama okwegesya, awo abeegibe ni bakumbaanira e gyali okumuwulisisya.
5.2: Kaisi nʼatandiika okubeegesya ati,
5.3: “Bʼenkabi abadoobi omu bwomi bwabwe obwʼomwoyo olwʼokubba abo obwakabaka bwʼomwigulu ibwo bwabwe.
5.4: Bʼenkabi abo abakunga, olwʼokubba oKibbumba yalibasaninkirirya.
5.5: Bʼenkabi abo abʼeiwooyo, olwʼokubba oKibbumba yalibawa byonabyona ebiyabasuubizire.
5.6: Bʼenkabi abo abanzalwa nʼabʼenyonta okukola oKibbumba ebyataka, olwʼokubba oKibbumba yalibaikutya.
5.7: Bʼenkabi abo abakola ebyʼekisa, olwʼokubba oKibbumba yalibakwatira ekisa.
5.8: Bʼenkabi abo abaseega ku biibyo oKibbumba ebyasiima byonkani, olwʼokubba ibo balibona oKibbumba.
5.9: Bʼenkabi abo ababbeera abantu okusyania, olwʼokubba abo oKibbumba yalibeeta baanabe.
5.10: Bʼenkabi abo abantu abebayiigaania olwʼokukola oKibbumba ebyataka, olwʼokubba abo obwakabaka bwʼomwigulu ibwo bwabwe.”
5.11: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Muli bʼenkabi singa abantu owebabazumanga, era owebabayiigaanianga, era owebabatumulangaku ebibbibibbi olwʼokubba muli beegi bange.
5.12: Kale ebyo owebibbangawo mujaagaanenge era musangaalenge ino, olwʼokubba oKibbumba yalibawa empeera eyʼamaani omwigulu. Kyalibba kityo nakimo ngʼoKibbumba oweyawaire abanaabbi empeera abo ababbairewo nga inywe mukaali okubbaawo, ibo abazeiza baanywe abebayiigaanirye.” Omuunyu nʼekitangaala (Mak 9:50; Luk 14:34-35)
5.13: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera okukoba abeegibe ati, “Inywe oku kyalo kunu mugasa abantu ooti muunyu omugaanike owegugasa omu byokulya. Neye singa gusuuka mujaalaali, bagwiryamu batya ensa? Gubba tigukaali gugasa omu kintu kyonakyona, okutoolaku okugudyaka-obudyaki eedi abantu ni bagwemyagira eeyo.
5.14: “Niinywe ekitangaala ekyʼoku kyalo abantu ekibatakaya okubona. Kityo nakimo ngʼowebatakaya okubona ekibuga ekibombekere oku lusozi.
5.15: Era abantu tibakwatisya eitaala kaisi ni balifuunikaku ekiibo, wazira balyanika ku kikondo, ni limolekera nabuli muntu abba omu nyumba.
5.16: Kale omu ngeri enanyere eyo, ekitangaala kyanywe kyakenge kityo omu bantu, kaisi babone ebikole byanywe ebisa, era olwʼebyo bawuujanga oItewaanywe aali omwigulu.” AMateeka
5.17: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Muleke okuseega muti naizire oku kyalo kuvunawo Mateeka ga Musa waire Biwandiike byʼabanaabbi. Nze tinaizire kubivunawo, wazira naizire kaisi ibyo bituukirire.
5.18: Mbakobera amazima, eigulu nʼekyalo nga bikaali biriwo, waire akasale akatyayi eino akʼoku kanyukuta akamo oku Mateeka ga Musa tikaligotaku paka byonabyona ebyo ebiri nʼokutuukirira nga bituukiriire.
5.19: Kale atyanu nabuli avunaku erimo oku Mateeka, waire liiryo erisembayo obutono, era nʼokwegesya nʼayegesya abantu okukola batyo, oyo oKibbumba yalimutwala okubba tiwamugaso omu bwakabaka bwʼomwigulu. Neye oyo akwata aMateeka ago era nʼayegesya nʼabandi okugakwata, oyo oKibbumba yalimutwala okubba wʼomugaso ino omu bwakabaka bwʼomwigulu.
5.20: Nʼolwekyo mbakobera nti singa obutuukirirye bwanywe tibwakirengeku obwo obwʼaBafalisaayo nʼabakugu omu byʼaMateeka ga Musa timwalingira omu bwakabaka bwʼomwigulu.” OYesu ayegesya oku busungu (Luk 12:57-59)
5.21: Tete oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Mumaite muti oKibbumba yakobere abazeiza baanywe ati, ‘Tiwaitanga omuntu; eyaitanga omuntu balimusingisya omusango.’
5.22: Neye nze mbakoba nti nabuli muntu asunguwalira omuntu omwinaye, balimusingisya omusango. Era nabuli muntu yenayena azuma omwinaye ati, ‘Obula omugaso’ balimutwala okumuwozesya omu Lukiiko oLufugi olwʼaBayudaaya. Neye nabuli oyo eyazumanga omwinaye ati ‘Oli musirusiru,’ oKibbumba yalimusindika omu geyeena.
5.23: “Kale atyanu owoobbanga otwaire ekirabokyo oku kyoto, kaisi ni weebukirirya yeeyo omwinawo oguwanyiizire,
5.24: kisa oleke awo ekirabokyo omumaiso gʼekyoto. Osooke oyabe osyanie naye, kaisi okange oweeyo ekirabokyo.”
5.25: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera tete ati, “Omuntu yenayena owakuwaabiranga, osyanie naye mangu nga mukaali muli naye mu nzira nga mwaba omu kooti. Owootakola otyo, akuwaabiire yalikuwaayo e wʼomulamuzi, era nʼomulamuzi nʼakuwaayo eeri omwisirikale, era nʼomwisirikale nʼakuteeka omu mabbuusu.
5.26: Era nkukobera amazima nti, owewalituuka omwo, tiwalizwamu paka owewalisasula empiiya gyonagyona egyʼomugaito.” AMateeka agagaana obulendi
5.27: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera okwegesya ati, “Mumaite muti oKibbumba yakobere ati, ‘Tiwayendanga.’
5.28: Neye nze mbakoba nti nabuli alingirira omukali olwʼokwegomba okwegaita naye, oyo abba abbengere ogwʼobulendi omu biseegobye.
5.29: Abba ngʼeriisolyo eryʼoku ngalo endiiro niiryo erikuzweraku okukola ekikole ekibbikibbi, olyokolemu era olimume eedi. Kikiraku iwe okufiirwa ekimo oku bitundu byʼomubirigwo, okukiraku omubirigwo gwonagwona oKibbumba okugusindika omu geyeena.
5.30: Era singa engaloyo endiiro niiyo ekuzweraku okukola ekikole ekibbikibbi, ogitemeku era ogimume eedi. Kikugasa iwe okufiirwa ekimo oku bitundu byʼomubirigwo, okukiraku omubirigwo gwonagwona oKibbumba okugusindika omu geyeena.” Okwawukana omu bufumbo (Mat 19:9; Mak 10:11-12; Luk 16:18)
5.31: Era tete oYesu ni yeeyongera okwegesya ati, “Bakiwandiikire omu Mateeka bati, ‘Nabuli muntu abbinga omukaliwe, amuwenge ekiwandiiko ekikakasa kiti amubbingire.’
5.32: Neye nze mbakoba nti nabuli abbinga omukaliwe, azweraku omukali oyo okubba mulendi okutoolaku ngʼamubbingire lwa bulendi. Era omusaiza yenayena atwala omukali oyo ogubabbingire, abba abbengere ogwʼobulendi.” OYesu ayegesya oku kulayira
5.33: Awo tete oYesu ni yeeyongera okwegesya ati, “Tete mumaite muti oKibbumba eira yakobere abazeiza baanywe ati, ‘Tolayiranga ebyobubbeyi, neye ebyosuubiza oMusengwa iye oKibbumba omu kirayiro, obituukiriryenge.’
5.34: Neye nze mbakoba nti, tolayiranga kadi katyayi kati, waire okulayira ngʼoijuluza eigulu, olwʼokubba niiyo entebe ya Kibbumba.
5.35: Waire okulayira ngʼoijuluza ekyalo kinu, olwʼokubba ekyalo niikyo omukonkolo oKibbumba ogwawuumuliryaku ebigerebye. Waire okulayira ngʼoijuluza eriina lyʼekibuga oYerusaalemi, olwʼokubba niikyo ekibuga oKibbumba iye okabaka omukulu ekyafuga.
5.36: Era tolayiranga waire ngʼowaayo omutwegwo, olwʼokubba iwe toyezya okucuusa erangi yʼoluziiri olumo okubba lweru ooba lwirugazu.
5.37: Wazira mukobenge muti, ‘Niikyo’ nga mutegeeza muti ‘niikyo,’ ooba muti, ‘bbe’ nga mutegeeza muti, ‘bbe.’ Ebindi byonabyona ebimwongerangaku byabbanga bizwire wa Mubbimubbi oSitaani.” OYesu ayegesya oku kunyaaŋa (Luk 6:29-30)
5.38: Era awo oYesu ni yeeyongera okwegesya ati, “Mwawuliire eiteeka erikoba liti, ‘Eyatoolangamu omwinaye eriiso yena bamutoolangamu liiso. Era nʼeyabbongolangamu omwinaye eriino yena bamubbongolangamu liino.’
5.39: Neye nze mbakoba nti, Timwanyaaŋanga, wazira omuntu owakukubbanga okwitama eryʼoku ngalo endiiro, omucuusiranga nʼerindi lidi lyona nʼakubba.
5.40: “Era omuntu yenayena owaatakanga okuwozya na iwe atwale esaatiyo omulekeranga nʼekizibaawokyo kyona.
5.41: Era omuntu yenayena owakukakanga okutambula naye ekiromita emoiza nʼekitundu, otambulanga naye ekiromita isatu.
5.42: Kaisi omuntu owakusabanga ekintu omuwanga, era omuntu owaatakanga iwe okumukoopa ekintu, omukoopanga.” OYesu ayegesya oku kutaka abalabe (Luk 6:27-28,32-36)
5.43: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera okwegesya ati, “Mwawuliire eiteeka erikoba liti: ‘Otakenge omuntu omwinawo, era ocaawenge omulabewo.’
5.44: Neye nze mbakoba nti, mutakenge abalabe baanywe, era musabirenge abo ababayiigaania.
5.45: Era owemwakolanga mutyo mwabbanga mulagire muti muli baana ba Itewaanywe aali omwigulu. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba ayakisya eisana eeri abakola ebisa nʼabakola ebibbibibbi, era atonyesya oikendi eeri abatuukirirye nʼabatali batuukirirye.
5.46: Aale singa mutaka baabo ababataka bonkani, mubba musuubira oKibbumba kubawa mpeera etya? Ibo abasolooji bʼomusolo inywe abemweta muti bakola ebibbibibbi bona kaisi tibataka baabo ababataka?
5.47: Era singa mubba mulonsyaku nʼaboluganda baanywe bonkani, mubba mpaawo kimukolere okukiraku badi ibo abandi. Era nʼabantu aBatali Bayudaaya bona tibakola batyo?
5.48: “Kale atyanu inywe mubbenge batuukirirye, oItewaanywe aali omwigulu ngʼobwali mutuukirirye.”

6.1: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Mwegendereze okutakolanga ebikole byanywe ebyobutuukirirye omu lwatu kaisi abantu bababone. Singa mukola mutyo, oItewaanywe oKibbumba aali omwigulu tiyalibawa empeera.
6.2: Kale owemugabiranga abadoobi, timwewuujanga ooti bananfunsi owebakola omu makumbaaniro nʼomu nguudo, kaisi abantu babawe ekitiisya. Mbakobera amazima nti, empeera yaabwe eyʼokusuna ekitiisya omu bantu babba bagisunire mu bwizulye.
6.3: Neye iwe owoogabiranga abadoobi, tokimanyikisyanga omuntu ogondi yenayena,
6.4: olwʼokugabakwo okubba kwʼekyama. Olwo kaisi oIteewo oKibbumba abona ebikole byʼomu kyama yalikuwa empeera.” Engeri yʼokusaba oKibbumba (Luk 11:2-4)
6.5: Awo era oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Era owemubbanga musaba oKibbumba, timwabbanga ooti bananfunsi, olwʼokubba ibo bataka okusaba nga beemereire omu makumbaaniro nʼomu mansanganzira gʼenguudo, kaisi abantu bababone. Mbakobera amazima nti empeera yaabwe eyʼokusuna ekitiisya omu bantu babba bagisunire mu bwizulye.
6.6: Neye owekubba kusaba, oingirenge omu kisengekyo, nʼoigalawo olwigi, kaisi nʼosaba oIteewo oKibbumba iye ataboneka. Era oIteewo oyo abona ebikole byʼomu kyama yalikuwa empeera.
6.7: “Era owemubbanga musaba, timwakolesyanga ebibono ebingi ebinambulamu makulu ooti bantu abataikiririrya omu Kibbumba owebakola. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba baseega bati abakibbumba baabwe babawulira lwʼebibono byabwe ebingi.
6.8: Kale inywe timwasabanga ooti niibo, olwʼokubba oItewaanywe amaite ebimwetaaga, nga mukaali nʼokumusaba.
6.9: “Kale atyanu mumusabenge muti, ‘Itewaiswe aali omwigulu, eriinalyo baliwe ekitiisya,
6.10: obwakabakabwo bwize. Ebyotaka babikole oku kyalo ngʼowebabikola omwigulu.
6.11: Otuwe nabuli lunaku ekyokulya ekitwetaaga.
6.12: Era otusoniye ebibbibibbi byaiswe, nga swena owetusoniya abatukola ebitulumya.
6.13: Era tiwatuleka okugwa omu bikemo, wazira otulamye eeri omubbimubbi. [Ibwo obwakabaka, nʼobwezye nʼekitiisya bibyo emirembe nʼemirembe. Amiina].’
6.14: “Singa musoniya abantu ababakola ebibalumirirya, oItewaanywe aali omwigulu nywena abasoniya.
6.15: Neye singa timubasoniya, oItewaanywe yena tabasoniya ebikole byanywe ebibbibibbi.” Okusiiba
6.16: Awo era oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Era owemusiibanga, timwabbanga bayungubali omumaiso ooti bananfunsi owebabba, olwʼokubba ibo bayungubala kaisi abantu bababone bati basiiba. Mbakobera amazima nti babba bamalire okusuna empeera yaabwe omu bwizulye eyʼokusuna ekitiisya omu bantu.
6.17: Neye inywe owekubba kusiiba, musanyuluzenge enziiri gyanywe, ni munaaba nʼomumaiso.
6.18: Mukolenge mutyo kaisi abantu nandi ni bayezya okumanya bati musiiba, okutoolaku oItewaanywe iye ataboneka. Era oItewaanywe iye abona omu kyama, inywe yalibawa empeera.” Obusuni omwigulu (Luk 12:33-34)
6.19: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera okutumula nʼabeegibe ati, “Timwebisiranga obusuni oku kyalo kunu ebiwuuka nʼokutalaga okubyezya okububebenyera, era abaibbi e gibayezya okuvuna ni babwibba.
6.20: Neye mwebisirenge obusuni mwigulu, ebiwuuka nʼokutalaga e gibitayezya okububebenyera, era abaibbi e gibatayezya okuvuna ni babwibba.
6.21: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba obusunibwo e gibubba, nʼomwoyogwo gwona niiyo e gigubba.” Ekitangaala kyʼomubiri (Luk 11:34-36)
6.22: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Era amaiso gali ooti itaala lyʼomubiri. Kale singa amaisogo gabba moomi, omubirigwo gwonagwona gwizula ekitangaala.
6.23: Neye amaisogo singa tigabba moomi, omubirigwo gwonagwona gwizula ndikiirya. Kale singa ekitangaala mwiwe kibba ndikiirya, leero endikiirya eyo ebba yenkana etya!” Okwesiga oKibbumba (Luk 16:13; 12:22-31)
6.24: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera okwegesya ati, “Mpaawo muweererya ayezya okuweererya abasengwa ababiri. Kiri kiti, ali nʼokulaga okutaka kunene eeri omoiza okukiraku eeri ogondi, ooba yalyesibira oku moiza, nʼatala ogondi. Kale tikyezeka okubba nʼoKibbumba aamo nʼempiiya byombi nga basengwabo.
6.25: “Kagira mbakoba nti timweraliikiriranga omu bwomi bwanywe olwʼekyokulya ooba ekyokunywa newankubbaire olwʼekyokuzwala. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba obwomi ibwo bwʼebbeeyi okukiraku ekyokulya. Era nʼomubiri gwona gwʼebbeeyi okukiraku ebyokuzwala.
6.26: Aale mubone enyonyi, igyo tigisiga, waire kukungula tigikungula, era tigibba kadi nʼekideero. Neye oItewaanywe aali omwigulu agiwa ekyokulya. Olwo inywe timuli bamugaso ino okukiraku enyonyi?
6.27: Era naani kwinywe oweyeeraliikirira, ayezya okwongeraku waire ekiseera ekityai kiti oku kuwangaalakwe?
6.28: “Era lwaki mweraliikirira olwʼebizwalo? Aale kaade mubonere oku ngeri ebimuli egibikulamu. Cooka ibyo tibikola waire kwetungira bizwalo.
6.29: Neye mbakobera nti nʼewankubbaire okabaka oSulemaani omu kitiisyakye kyonakyona, tiyazwaireku okuboneka nakusani okutuukiryaku ngʼebimuli owebibba.
6.30: Neye obanga oKibbumba azwalisya nakusani atyo ebimuli ibyo ebibbaawo atyanu eizo ni babyoca, tiyalikiraku ino okubazwalisya inywe abaliku nʼokwikirirya okutono?
6.31: “Kale timweraliikiriranga nga mukoba muti, ‘Twalya niki?’ ooba muti, ‘Twanywa niki?’ ooba muti, ‘Twazwala niki?’
6.32: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba ibyo ebyo byonabyona abantu abataikirirya omu Kibbumba niibyo ebibeemaliramu, neye inywe iye oItewaanywe owʼomwigulu amaite ati ebyo byonabyona mubyetaaga.
6.33: Neye ekikira nakimo, mwemalirenge mu kunoonia bwakabaka bwa Kibbumba era nʼebyataka mukole, kaisi era musune byonabyona ebyo ebimwetaaga.
6.34: Kale timweraliikiriranga olwʼebyabbaawo eizo. Eizo lwabba nʼebyokweraliikirira ebyalwo. Nabuli lunaku lubbaaku ebyokweraliikirira ebyalwo.”

7.1: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera okwegesya abeegibe ati, “Timusaliranga abantu emisango, kaisi nywena oKibbumba tiyabasalira.
7.2: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba, ngʼowemusalira abandi emisango, nywena webalibasalira. Era ekipimo ekimukolesya omu kusalira abandi emisango, niikyo ekinanyere ekyo ekibalikolesya okubasalira nywena emisango.
7.3: Kale lwaki ofaayo oku kasubi akali oku liiso lyʼomugandawo, kaisi nandi nʼofaayo oku gusubi oguli oku liisolyo?
7.4: Oyezya otya okukoba omugandawo oti, ‘Oleke nkutooleku akasubi oku liisolyo,’ kaisi ngʼoku liryo kuliku ogusubi?
7.5: Munanfunsi iwe, osooke kutoola gusubi oguli oku liryo, olwo kaisi oyezye okubona nakusani okutoola akasubi akali oku liiso lyʼomugandawo.”
7.6: Era oYesu nʼakoba ati, “Ekibono kya Kibbumba tiweegumyanga okukyegesya abantu abakinyooma era abatataka okuwulisisya. Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba kiri ooti kukwata kintu ekitukulye nʼokiwa embwa kaisi igyo ni gigaluka gikuluma-bulumi. Era kiri ooti kukwata mabbaalego agʼebbeeyi nʼogamumira embiizi kaisi igyo ni gigafutyanka-bufutyanki.” Okusaba, nʼokunoonia, nʼokukonkona (Luk 11:9-13)
7.7: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Musabenge, era balibawa; Munoonienge, era mwalibona; Mukonkonenge oku lwigi, era balibaigulirawo.
7.8: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba nabuli asaba asuna, era oyo anoonia abona, nʼoyo akonkona oku lwigi bamwigulirawo.
7.9: Era naani kwinywe awa omwanawe eibbaale ngʼamusabire kyokulya,
7.10: ooba amuwa ompiri omukifo kya nyanyi ogwabba amusabire?
7.11: Kale obanga inywe abakola ebibbibibbi mumaite okuwa abaana baanywe ebirabo ebisa, kaisi oItewaanywe owʼomwigulu tiyalikiraku ino okuwa ebirabo ebisa abo ababimusaba?”
7.12: Era nʼakoba ati, “Kale atyanu byonabyona ebimutaka abandi babakolere inywe, aale nywena mubibakolerenge. Ekyo niikyo aMateeka nʼenjegesya yʼabanaabbi ekibikoba omu bumpi.” Omulyango omudiiŋi (Luk 13:24)
7.13: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Mwingirire mu mulyango omudiiŋi, olwʼokubba omulyango ogwingira omu kujigirika igwo mugalami, nʼenzira eyabayo ngalami, era bangi abagibitamu.
7.14: Neye omulyango ogwingira omu bwomi igwo mudiiŋi, era nʼenzira eyabayo ndiiŋi, era abagibona batono.” Omusaale nʼebineneka byagwo (Luk 6:43-44)
7.15: Era oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Mwekuume abanaabbi abʼobubbeyi. Baiza egimuli ngʼoku ngulu baboneka ooti tibakabbikabbi ooti ntaama, neye ngʼomunda bali ooti misege egiiza okunyaga.
7.16: Mwalibategeerera ku bikole byabwe. Abantu banokola ebineneka byʼemizabbibbu oku mukamirya, ooba banokola ebineneka byʼemitiini oku namuswata?”
7.17: Era nʼakoba ati, “Nʼomu ngeri enanyere eyo, omusaale omusa guneneka bineneka ebisa, neye omusaale omubbimubbi guneneka bineneka ebibbibibbi.
7.18: Omusaale omusa tiguneneka ebineneka ebibbibibbi, nʼomusaale omubbimubbi tiguneneka ebineneka ebisa.
7.19: Nabuli musaale ogutaneneka ebineneka ebisa bagutema, ni bagudyaka omu musyo.
7.20: “Kale atyanu, mwalibategeerera ku bikole byabwe.” Timbamaite (Luk 13:25-27)
7.21: Awo oYesu ni yeeyongera ati, “Tibuli muntu anjeta ati, ‘Musengwa, Musengwa,’ nti yalingira omu bwakabaka bwʼomwigulu, okutoolaku oyo iye akola oBbaabba aali omwigulu ebyataka.
7.22: Oku lunaku olwʼenkomerero, bangi balinkoba bati, ‘Musengwa, Musengwa, titwalaabbanga omu liinalyo? Titwabbinganga emizimu oku bantu nga tukolesya eriinalyo? Era titwakolanga ebyewunyo bingi omu liinalyo?’
7.23: Neye nze nalibakoba lwatu nti, ‘Inywe timbamaite. Muzwe nʼegyendi inywe abakola ebibbibibbi.’ ” Abombeki ababiri (Luk 6:47-49)
7.24: Awo oYesu nʼamaliirirya okwegesya abeegibe ati, “Kale atyanu nabuli muntu awulira ebibono byange ebyo, era nʼabikoreraku, abba ooti musaiza owʼamalabuki, eyayombekere enyumbaye okwibbaale.
7.25: Oikendi yatoonyere, omukula ni gubanda enyumba eyo, nʼompunga nʼagifuwa, neye nandi nʼegwa olwʼokubba bagyombekere ngʼomusingi guli kwibbaale.
7.26: “Neye nabuli muntu awulira ebibono byange ebyo, nandi nʼabikoleraku, abba ooti musaiza omusirusiru eyayombekere enyumbaye oku musenye.
7.27: Oikendi yatoonyere, omukula ni gubanda enyumba eyo, nʼompunga nʼagifuwa, era nʼegwa, nʼeweera okwitakali.” Obwezye bwa Yesu
7.28: Kale awo oYesu oweyamalire okutumula ebyo, ekiziima kyʼabantu ni kyewunya ino engeri egyayegesyamu,
7.29: olwʼokubba yayegesyanga ngʼonanyere obwezye, neye nga tali ooti bakugu baabwe abʼaMateeka.

8.1: Awo oYesu oweyazwire oku lusozi, oguyindi gwʼabantu ni gumusengererya.
8.2: Era omugenge nʼayaba e giri oYesu, nʼamukomera amazwi ngʼamukoba ati, “Musengwa, mmaite nti oyezya okundamya, owoobba ngʼotakire.”
8.3: OYesu nʼagolola engalo nʼamukwataku, nʼamukoba ati, “Ntaka, era olame!” Amangu ago ebigenge ni bimuwaaku.
8.4: Awo oYesu nʼamukoba ati, “Ekyo, tokikoberaku omuntu kadi moiza wazira oyabe weeyanjule e wa kabona, era ngʼoMusa oweyalagiire, oweeyo nʼekyokuwaayo, kaisi bakakase bati olamire.” Okwikirirya kwʼomwisirikale oMulooma (Luk 7:1-10)
8.5: OYesu oweyaingiire omu kibuga e Kaperenawumu, oMulooma omukulu wʼekibinja kyʼabaisirikale 100, nʼayaba e giyabbaire, nʼasaba obubbeeri
8.6: ngʼakoba ati, “Musengwa, omuweererya wange mulwaire ali e ika oku buliri, asanyalaire omubiri era ali omu bulumi bubitiriri.”
8.7: OYesu nʼamukoba ati, “Naizayo ni mmulamya.”
8.8: Neye oMulooma oyo nʼairamu ati, “Musengwa, tintuukana iwe okwingira omu nyumba yange, wazira otumule-butumuli kibono, era omugalama wange yalama.
8.9: Ekyo kityo olwʼokubba nze zena ndi muntu aali nʼabasengwa bange abantwala, era ngʼowendi nʼabaisirikale abentwala. Owenkoba onu nti ‘Oyabe,’ era ayaba; nʼogondi nti, ‘Oize,’ era aiza; nʼomugalama wange nti, ‘Okole kinu,’ era akikola.”
8.10: Awo oYesu oweyawuliire ebyo, ni yeewunya, nʼakoba ababbaire bamusengererya ati, “Mbakobera amazima nti, tinjajiryangaku omuntu yenayena omwIsirairi ali nʼokwikirirya okwʼamaani ooti kuukwo!
8.11: Era mbakobera nti bangi balizwa e njuyi nʼe njuyi, era ni batyama oku mbaga nʼoIbbulaimu, nʼoIsaka, nʼoYaakobbo omu bwakabaka bwʼomwigulu.
8.12: Neye abo abandibubbairemu, balibabbingira e nza omu ndikiirya, e walibba okukunga nʼokuŋiiya amaino.”
8.13: Awo oYesu nʼakoba oMulooma nago ati, “Oyabe, era kibbe kityo ngʼowoikirirya.” Era omugalamawe nʼalama omu kaseera ako. OYesu alamya abalwaire bangi (Mak 1:29-34; Luk 4:38-41)
8.14: Awo oYesu oweyaingiire omu nyumba ya Peetero, nʼabona omaaye wa muka Peetero ngʼali aawo omusuuja gumuluma ino.
8.15: OYesu nʼamukwata oku ngalo, omusuuja ni gulama, era omukali oyo nʼasetukirawo, era nʼatandiika nʼokumwinula.
8.16: Awo akanaigulo, ni baleetera oYesu abantu bangi ababbaireku emizimu, nʼagibabbingaku ngʼagikaawuukira, era bonabona ababbaire balwaire, nʼabalamya.
8.17: Ekyo kyabbaire kityo, kaisi onaabbi oIsaaya ekiyatumwire kituukirire, ekikoba kiti: “Iye onanyere yatwaire obunafu bwaiswe, era ni yeetiika endwaire gyaiswe.” Ekyofiirwa ngʼoli mwegi wa Yesu (Luk 9:57-62)
8.18: OYesu oweyaboine ngʼekiziima kyʼabantu kimweruguulirirye, nʼalagira abeegibe okwambuka naye okwaba oku lubba ludi olwʼenyanza.
8.19: Awo omoiza oku bakugu omu byʼaMateeka ga Musa nʼaiza e giri oYesu, nʼamukoba ati, “Musomesya, natambulanga na iwe e giwaabiranga wonawona.”
8.20: Neye oYesu nʼamukoba ati, “Amakibbwe igo gali nʼebiina e gigabba, nʼenyonyi gyona giri nʼebisaasiriro. Neye oMwana wa Muntu iye adambaku kadi nʼejaica olubba.”
8.21: Omusaiza ogondi, omoiza oku beegibe, nʼamukoba ati, “Musengwa, naliiza nga mmalire okuliika obbaabba.”
8.22: Neye oYesu nʼamukoba ati, “Oize obbe mwegi wange, era oleke abo abali nʼobwomi obwʼomwoyo obufu baliike abafu baabwe.” OYesu asirica ogumpunga (Mak 4:35-41; Luk 8:22-25)
8.23: Awo oYesu nʼaniina omu lyato, era abeegibe bona ni baaba naye.
8.24: Ogumpunga ogwʼamaani ni gutandiika okufuwa oku nyanza, amayengo ni geesuka omu lyato ni libbuuca kwizula amaizi. Neye oYesu iye yabbaire agonere.
8.25: Abeegibe ni baigerera e giyabbaire, era ni bamulamuca ni bamukoba bati, “Musengwa, otulamye, tufa!”
8.26: OYesu nʼabakoba ati, “Lwaki mutiire? Nga muli nʼokwikirirya kutono!” Awo nʼasetuka, nʼakaawuukira ogumpunga nʼamayengo, era enyanza nʼeteekera nakimo nakusani!
8.27: Bonabona ni beewunya, ni bakoba bati, “Onu muntu wʼengeriki? Obona nʼogumpunga nʼamayengo bimuwulira!” OYesu alamya abasaiza babiri abʼemizimu (Mak 5:1-20; Luk 8:26-39)
8.28: Awo oYesu oweyatuukire oku lubba ludi olwʼenyanza, omu kitundu kyʼaBagaderiini, abantu babiri ababbaireku emizimu, ni bamusangaana nga bazwa omu magombe agʼempuku. Abasaiza abo babbaire bakambwe ino, nga mpaawo muntu ayezya okubitayo e gibabbaire.
8.29: Amangu ago ni bakooka nga bakoba bati, “Otuvunaanira niki iwe oMwana wa Kibbumba? Oizire aanu okutugadya ngʼekiseera kyaiswe kikaali okutuuka?”
8.30: Wabbairewo ekiraalo kinene ekyʼembiizi nga giriisya era nga yalaku okuzwa e gibabbaire.
8.31: Kale emizimu egyo ni gyegairira oYesu giti, “Singa kibba kiti kutubbinga ku bantu banu, otusindike mu kiraalo kyʼembiizi gidi.”
